E: Continuously deals Ice DMG to a target. After using this ability, additionally deals DMG for a number of times equal to the number of Flying Swords on the field. After using this ability, remove all Flying Swords on the field.

C: 对我方全体造成少量火属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标防御力降低。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to all targets, with a high chance to reduce their DEF.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害，如果该目标处于【强烈震荡】状态，则额外对该目标造成物理属性伤害，同时解除该目标的【强烈震荡】状态。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target. If the target is afflicted with Strong Reverberation, they additionally take Physical DMG, and Strong Reverberation is then dispelled.

C: 当呼雷进入【<u>月狂</u>】状态时，每当敌方施放攻击后，为呼雷附加1层【怒意】，若为呼雷攻击，则额外附加1层【怒意】。每当我方施放攻击后，将减少1层【怒意】。【怒意】拥有初始层数，当【怒意】层数叠加到一定值时，呼雷将释放【贪狼逐驰，血色临照】并清除所有【怒意】层数。每当【怒意】由于我方角色攻击被减少至0层时，将削减呼雷的韧性，并重置【怒意】层数为指定层。
E: While Hoolay is in the <u>Moon Rage</u> state, applies 1 stack of Irate to Hoolay after every attack launched by friendly units. If Hoolay uses an attack, additionally applies 1 stack of Irate. After every attack used by target units, reduce 1 stack of Irate. Irate will have an initial set of stacks. When a certain number of Irate stacks is reached, Hoolay will release Lupine Chase Calls Bloody Gleam and remove all Irate stacks. Whenever Irate stacks are reduced to 0 due to attacks from player characters, Hoolay's Toughness will be reduced and reset Irate to a set number of stacks.

C: 对指定我方单体及相邻目标造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 在受到攻击后，会从【狂乱】状态转变为【讥讽】状态。处在【讥讽】状态时，受到攻击后不会切换状态。
E: After being attacked, switches the "Rabid" state to the "Mocked" state. When in "Mocked" state, will not switch states after being attacked.

C: 使敌方全体行动提前。只能在【狂乱】状态下使用。
E: Advances all targets' actions. This ability can only be used while under the "Rabid" state.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害，击中没有护盾的目标后有小概率使目标陷入冻结状态，如果目标身上拥有护盾，则造成伤害后还会对自身造成冰属性伤害，并大概率使自身防御力降低。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target. When hitting targets without a Shield, there is a small chance of Freezing the attacked target. If the target has a Shield, additionally deals Ice DMG to this unit with a high chance to decrease this unit's DEF.

C: 在行动序列上添加【宣诫】，每次【宣诫】行动时，解除场上所有「秩序的傀儡」的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，并释放【为同一律献舞】。每当有一名「秩序的傀儡」的弱点被击破时，【宣诫】的行动将小幅延后。
E: Adds "Commandment" to the Action Order. Every time "Commandment" acts, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Broken states afflicting the Puppets of the Order on the field and unleashes "Dance for Synchrony." Whenever a Puppet of the Order is Weakness Broken, "Commandment" will suffer a slight action delay.

C: 永眠墓碣拥有固定格数的生命值。每次受到攻击，弱点击破和持续伤害时，都会直接扣除自身1格生命值。
E: Sombrous Sepulcher has a fixed amount of HP bars. Each time it is attacked, Weakness Broken, or receives DMG from DoT, 1 bar of HP will be depleted.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成火属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets, with a high chance to Burn them.

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 战斗中所有我方目标被施加<u>【可负载】</u>状态。处于<u>【垂死挣扎】</u>状态的我方目标造成的伤害和弱点击破效率大幅降低，且我方目标若连续处于<u>【垂死挣扎】</u>状态一定回合，将受到致命伤害。
E: All targets in the battle are inflicted with the <u>"Overloadable"</u> state. Targets in the <u>"Death Rattle"</u> state deal greatly reduced DMG and have greatly reduced Weakness Break Efficiency. If targets remain in the <u>"Death Rattle"</u> state for a certain number of turns, they will receive fatal damage.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 受到致命攻击后，若【「无缘黎明」卡厄斯兰那】的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数不为0，立即被其重新召唤，但会使【「无缘黎明」卡厄斯兰那】失去1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>和一定比例的生命值。【「无缘黎明」卡厄斯兰那】施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】时，被其吸收，并回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值。
E: After receiving a killing blow, if the number of "<u>Calamity Power</u>" stacks on "Dawn-Denied Khaslana" is not 0, immediately resummoned this unit. However, "Dawn-Denied Khaslana" will lose 1 stack of "<u>Calamity Power</u>" and a certain percentage of HP. When "Dawn-Denied Khaslana" uses "Cry Not for the Discarded," this unit will be absorbed and the HP that was converted to "<u>Entangled By Agony</u>" will be restored.

C: 免疫除【反造物主】外的行动条变化效果影响。【逻各斯】无法被消灭，受到致命攻击后陷入【重创】状态，使我方全体恢复能量并解除【<u>行动锁定</u>】状态。
E: Immune to the effects of action bar changes, except "Anti-Creator." "Logos" cannot be eliminated. When receiving a killing blow, it enters the "Grave Wound" state, causing all targets to regenerate Energy and dispel the "<u>Action Lock</u>" state.

C: 使【残破容器】进入【共祭】状态，在数次行动内施放【幽冥的悼念】。
E: Causes "Long-Shattered Vessel" to enter the "Mutual Sacrifice" state. Uses "Underworld's Grief" in a certain number of turns.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害，消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>额外造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的【灾难之力】层数越多，伤害的段数越多。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG. The more consumed "Calamity Power" stacks, the higher the instances of DMG.

C: 当拥有的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数不为0时，若【残破容器】受到致命攻击，则立即消耗1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: When the current "<u>Calamity Power</u>" stacks are not 0, if "Long-Shattered Vessel" receives a killing blow, immediately consumes 1 stack of "<u>Calamity Power</u>."

C: 施放【沉默的悲叹】时，消耗生命值召唤【残破容器】，并使消耗的生命值转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>。当拥有的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数不为0时，若【残破容器】受到致命攻击，则立即消耗1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>和一定比例的生命值，重新召唤【残破容器】。施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】时，吸收【残破容器】并回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值。
E: When using "Silent Sorrow," consumes HP to summon a "Long-Shattered Vessel" and converts the consumed HP into <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u> When stacks of <u>"Calamity Power"</u> are not at 0 and if a "Long-Shattered Vessel" receives a killing blow, immediately consumes 1 stack of <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and a percentage of HP to resummon a "Long-Shattered Vessel." When using "Cry Not for the Discarded," absorbs any "Long-Shattered Vessel" and restores the HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u>

C: 消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>对我方全体造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的【灾难之力】层数越多，伤害的段数越多，随后对我方全体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and deals several instances of minor Physical DMG to all targets. The more "Calamity Power" stacks are consumed, the more instances of DMG. Then, deals minor Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 造成伤害，每击有低概率施加裂伤。
E: Deals DMG, with each hit having a low chance to inflict Bleed.

C: 有概率使我方全体陷入嘲讽状态。
E: Has a chance to Taunt all targets.

C: 扑满陷入恐慌，即将在1个回合后逃离。
E: The Treasure Trotter is panicking and will flee in 1 turn.

C: 积蓄力量并吸收所有我方全体持有的【焚烧】状态。
E: Starts charging, and absorbs all the Enkindle statuses that are inflicted on all targets.

C: 召唤【丰饶玄莲】。
E: Summons Abundance Lotus.

C: 对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害，并使受到攻击的我方目标行动延后。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a single target and delays their action.

C: 繁殖真蛰虫群。
E: Spawns True Stings.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 贝洛伯格之地理中心暨政治文化中心，守护者的号令从此处向冬城的每一个角落传告。
E: Located at the heart of Belobog, the Administrative District projects its political and cultural influence to the rest of the city. The commands of the Guardian are cascaded down from here to every corner of the city of winter.

C: 商业街道过去的繁华物象在裂界中静滞、崩裂，此处唯一的活物只剩来自裂界的异形。
E: The past prosperity of the business street collapsed and fell into stagnation in the Fragmentum. Now, the only thing breathing here are the strange beings from the Fragmentum.

C: 难度较低的节点，拥有无限的行动值，敌人会随机掉落战利品晶矿。
E: Low-difficulty Node with unlimited action value. Enemies will randomly drop loot crystal ore.

E: Retrieve the dispersed heliobi in Fyxestroll Garden

E: The Fool's Box

C: 小可爱！
E: Fudge!

C: 七层有餐厅，在那里您随时都可以被食物噎住。
E: There is a restaurant on the seventh floor. You can freely choke on the food there any time.

C: 在黄金的时刻远眺匹诺康尼大歌剧院
E: Gaze upon the Penacony Grand Theater from afar at the Golden Hour

C: 调查钟表匠身边的雕像
E: Investigate the statue next to the Watchmaker

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 可可利亚的末路
E: Cocolia's End

C: 丹恒、彦卿与刃在祈龙台混战。刃以手中长剑刺穿丹恒胸膛，迫使丹恒展现出持明族的姿态。刃向彦卿介绍，丹恒正是身犯十恶逆、被判处永世流放的龙尊「饮月君」。彦卿催动手中飞剑，誓要将刃与丹恒一并缉拿。
E: Dan Heng, Yanqing, and Blade fought intensely at the Dragonprayer Terrace. Blade stabbed Dan Heng through the chest, compelling him to show his true Vidyadhara form. Blade revealed to Yanqing that Dan Heng was actually Imbibitor Lunae, a high elder condemned to eternal banishment for terrible crimes. Yanqing called forth his Flying Sword, determined to capture both Blade and Dan Heng.

C: 乱破扔出飞刀将「蕉授」钉在墙上，「蕉授」却化作小猴四散奔逃。你与乱破、丹恒正欲追击，却被芮克先生以胶卷传送至其他地方。
E: Rappa threw her daggers to pin Profnana to the wall, but Profnana transformed into small monkeys that scattered and fled. Just as you, Rappa, and Dan Heng were about to pursue them, Mr. Reca teleported you elsewhere using his film reel.

C: 波提欧大肆开火，击倒众多助蕉，枪口直指「蕉授」。「蕉授」匆忙逃入忆质黑洞中，紧随其后的，是无数被转变为睡蕉小猴的人们。
E: Boothill opened fire indiscriminately, taking down many Assistananas while targeting Profnana. Profnana quickly fled into the Memoria Singularity, followed by countless people who had been transformed into Slumbernana Monkeys.

C: 那刻夏力战不敌，盗火行者向你们发起突袭。危急时刻，缇安拼尽全力打开「百界门」，与遐蝶合力将盗火行者传送走，旋即昏迷倒地。
E: Anaxa was overpowered in battle when the Flame Reaver launched a surprise attack on you all. In that critical moment, Trianne used every ounce of her strength to open the Century Gate and, together with Castorice, teleported the Flame Reaver away before fainting.

C: 你与昔涟冲出一页永恒，为创世，镌写开篇的一笔！逐火从来不是「毁灭」，而是冲破囚笼的「开拓」！
E: You and Cyrene charged out from An Eternal Page, inscribing the first stroke of genesis! The Flame-Chase was never about "Destruction," but rather "Trailblaze," breaking free from its cage!

C: 一簇神秘的灵火朝你袭来。你尝试躲避，却还是被灵火侵入体内，受其依附。
E: A mysterious Phase Flame hurtled toward you. You tried to evade it, but it pierced through and possessed your body.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>希儿</color>将流浪者赶跑，称「地火」首领奥列格要见布洛妮娅。桑博趁机询问奥列格的去向，希儿称他在大矿区处理麻烦事情。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Seele</color> appeared just in time, driving the vagrants away. She said that Oleg, the leader of Wildfire, wanted to meet with Bronya. Seizing the moment, Sampo asked about Oleg's whereabouts, and Seele replied that he was dealing with some trouble in the Great Mine.

C: 你们被第二道门阻拦，而桑博此时已不知所踪。游荡的机器人称，访客须向克拉拉申请访问权限，而她此刻正在铆钉镇收集零件。
E: You found your path blocked once again by a second gate — and Sampo had vanished without a trace. A wandering robot informed you that anyone seeking entry must first get permission from Clara, who was out in Rivet Town scavenging parts.

C: 罗刹向素裳讲述星神的争斗与陨落，并称自己受托将一具灵柩送回仙舟。丹恒称持明族是「不朽」星神的后裔，能够传承化龙之力。
E: Luocha recounted the wars and falls of Aeons to Sushang, and claimed that he was taking a coffin back to the Xianzhou under request. Dan Heng stated that the Vidyadhara were the descendants of the Aeon of Permanence, and could pass down the art of dragon transmutation.

C: 与快门声一同刻入你记忆中的，还有身旁可爱女孩的温柔呼唤：「茄子——！」
E: As the cute girl beside you gently proclaimed "Cheese!" this moment was sealed into your memories with a shutter of a photo being taken.

C: 三月七讲述停云因误食糖果引发分裂，星期日推测她的记忆化为多个人格。
E: March 7th recounted that Tingyun split into many versions due to eating a candy by accident. Sunday hypothesized that her memories had split into many personalities.

C: 你看到自己与白厄并立，并作为他所憧憬的「救世主」引领其前进。<color=#f29e38ff>盗火行者</color>踏入创世涡心，他正是方才所观看无数记忆的主人。
E: You saw yourself standing beside Phainon as the "Deliverer" he dreamed of, and led him forward. Then, the <color=#f29e38ff>Flame Reaver</color> stepped into the Vortex of Genesis. They were the owner of the countless memories you'd just witnessed.

C: 昔涟现身，揭穿忆者们营造的幻像，尝试阻止三月七通过记忆之门进入翁法罗斯。三月七顾及伙伴的安危，仍然选择进入翁法罗斯。
E: Cyrene appeared, shattering the illusions the Memokeepers had spun and trying to stop March 7th from crossing the Gate of Memory to enter Amphoreus. However, March 7th, who was concerned for her companions' safety, still chose to enter Amphoreus.

C: 艾丝妲抽噎着向阿兰道歉，认为自己给他带去了压力，而阿兰则有些不知所措。为了展示反省的决心，你们需要向阿兰出示手中的证据。
E: Asta tearfully apologized to Arlan, feeling guilty for putting pressure on him, while Arlan stood there, unsure how to respond. To show that you were genuinely trying to make things right, you needed to present the evidence in your possession.

C: 三月七在房间中见到另一个自己，对方自称是完整的「三月七」，拥有全部记忆。姬子来电询问情况，却未得到三月七的回应。
E: In her room, March 7th encountered her other self, who claimed to be the complete "March 7th," possessing all her memories. Himeko called to check on the situation, but March 7th didn't respond.

C: 你们在试验场中心与托帕对峙，托帕料到星穹列车是妨碍布洛妮娅签署合同的阻力。谈判破裂，托帕对列车组的特别攻击行动得到批准。
E: At the heart of the testing ground, you confronted Topaz. She had foreseen the Astral Express becoming the main obstacle to Bronya signing the contract. After negotiations collapsed, Topaz's request for a special assault operation on the Crew was approved.

C: 正如虎克以玩偶熊换来探针，费斯曼卖掉矿脉检测器，为玩偶熊买来服饰与小屋。费斯曼与虎克都认为，自己收到了世界上最棒的礼物。
E: Just as Hook traded her teddy bear for the probe, Fersman sold his ore detector to buy clothes and a house for the teddy bear. Both Hook and Fersman believed they had received the best gift in the world.

C: 在三月七的想象中，瓦尔特的老大只能是帕姆了。虽然交易完成，但因为三月七的「隐藏设定」，你们必须和普洱变成的金人打上一架。
E: In March 7th's imagination, Welt's boss could only be Pom-Pom. Though the deal went through, due to March 7th's "hidden setting," you had to fight the aurumaton that Pu'er transformed into.

C: 浣溪声称路途上的刺客就是她派来的，她认为持明族只需一位龙尊，故要除掉白露。既已撕破脸皮，你们随即展开战斗。
E: Huanxi confessed to orchestrating the assassinations along the way. Convinced the Vidyadhara required just one high elder, she had plotted to eliminate Bailu. With her scheme came to light, combat ensued.

C: 卡芙卡讲述了关于你的事情，以及你为什么能容纳星核。
E: Kafka told things about you and why you were able to contain a Stellaron.

C: 你们将胜利的消息分享给鼹鼠党的孩子们。虎克想要变得比你们更强，总有一天，鼹鼠党要当上下层区的大英雄。
E: You shared tales of your triumph with the kids of The Moles. Hook was going to grow even stronger than you. Someday, Hook said, The Moles would become the legendary heroes of both the Overworld and Underworld.

C: 流萤向你介绍远处天空中的「大剧院」。在一纪一度的谐乐大典上，「同谐」将化身「齐响诗班」降临匹诺康尼，带来恒久安宁的祝福。
E: Firefly introduced you to the Grand Theater lingering above in the distance. During the Charmony Festival that occurs once every era, the Harmony descends upon Penacony via the Harmonious Choir to bring about blessings of everlasting peace.

C: 你与托帕交谈。托帕称砂金做生意时喜欢铤而走险，把「所有，或者一无所有」作为口头禅。托帕对案件了解不多，只能托你继续调查。
E: You spoke with Topaz. She said that Aventurine loved to take risks when doing business, and that his motto was "all or nothing." She did not know much about the case and requested for you to continue investigating.

C: 年幼的星期日与知更鸟捡到受伤坠地的小鸟。知更鸟认为鸟儿生来属于天空，不该被关进笼子，但星期日无论如何都希望小鸟能够活着。
E: A young Sunday and Robin once found a wounded bird that had fallen from the sky. Robin believed that birds belonged to the sky and should not be caged, but Sunday wished for the bird to survive no matter what.

C: 瓦尔特与姬子也来到校庆现场，询问你们这段时间的校园生活是否愉快。列车组畅快交谈之时，知更鸟登上广场。
E: Welt and Himeko arrived at the school festival venue and asked about your campus life lately. As the Express Crew chatted cheerfully, Robin stepped onto the Plaza.

C: 大黑塔带第四面镜来到「算力区」，每秒执行的浮点运算次数达到万垓级别。大黑塔清理了窜居于此的「算力蛰虫」。
E: The Herta arrived at the Computing Zone with the Fourth Mirror, where calculations occurred faster than a yottaFLOPS computer. There, she purged a cluster of Computing Stings that had crept into the system.

C: 你们在「献身拱心」遇到墨涅塔残存神识幻化成的蝴蝶。这是「理性」火种的保险，必须向其证明心中存有「纯粹无私之爱」才能通过。
E: At the Dome of Devotion, you encountered butterflies manifested from Mnestia's remaining soul essence. They served as guardians of the Coreflame of "Reason," allowing only those who proved they possessed pure and unselfish love within their hearts to pass.

C: 瑟希斯将那刻夏的意识唤回凡间，预测其还能在尘世停留十五个日夜。那刻夏认为如此时间已经足够解题，动身前往会见元老院的使者。
E: Cerces was the one who summoned Anaxa's consciousness back to the world of the living, and they estimated that he had about fifteen more days and nights to live. Anaxa felt that fifteen days was far more than enough, and he left to meet the messenger from the Council of Elders.

C: 那刻夏为遐蝶展示了一段漫长而沉重的过去。事关重大，遐蝶希望让你知晓整个过程。
E: Anaxa showed Castorice a past both long and heavy. As the matter was of great consequence, Castorice asked you to hear the entire story, from beginning to end.

C: 你悄悄靠近白厄，发现他在看与致富相关的书籍。白厄认为阿格莱雅之所以能成为优秀的领导者，一个重要的原因是她的家底相当殷实。
E: You quietly approached Phainon and found him reading books about getting rich. Phainon believed that one of the key reasons Aglaea became such an excellent leader was that she came from a pretty well-off background.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯揭露故事的虚假，赛飞儿察觉到巴特鲁斯身上不太对劲。她决定将计就计，在寻宝中陪「巴特鲁斯」玩一会儿。
E: "Spirithief" Bartholos called out Cipher's story for being fake. At the same time, Cipher felt that something was off with Bartholos. She decided to play along, humoring "Bartholos" for a while during their treasure hunt.

C: 赛飞儿即将离开奥赫玛，她将一份礼物交给缇宝，要求其<color=#f29e38ff>天黑之后再打开</color>。缇宝将创世涡心让给风堇，为其留出进行召唤仪式的场地。
E: Cipher was about to leave Okhema. She left a gift with Tribbie, telling her to only open it <color=#f29e38ff>after nightfall</color>. Tribbie gave Hyacine access to the Vortex of Genesis to allow her to prepare her summoning ritual.

C: 壁画上描绘着一位陌生泰坦的形象，与翁法罗斯所有神话都无法联系起来，也许古代天空文明对泰坦有独特的诠释。
E: The mural depicted an unfamiliar Titan that didn't match any Amphorean mythology. Perhaps the ancient sky civilization had its unique interpretation of the Titans.

C: 生命花园的黑潮怪物暂时被肃清。白厄带来风堇成为半神的消息，请公民们相信风堇庇护众生的信念，待在「天空」降下的屏障中。
E: The monsters in the Garden of Life were cleared, at least for now. Phainon shared the news that Hyacine had ascended as a demigod. He urged the citizens to trust in her shelter and remain under the Sky's protection.

C: 预言中的半神悉数集结，逐火者们身负微光，在长夜中艰难向前。此后的旅途，与你熟知的一切并无区别，直至逐火的终幕。
E: The demigods in the prophecy were all present. The Flame-Chasers pushed forward, their faint light cutting through the endless night. From here, the path mirrored the one you know... until the final chapter of the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 帕姆在星穹列车上发现一个梦泡，经阅读发现是「圣杯战争」的请柬。帕姆正欲交给其他乘客时，却发现自己获得参赛资格。
E: Pom-Pom discovered a dream bubble aboard the Astral Express. When they read it, it turned out to be an invitation to the Holy Grail War. Just as Pom-Pom was going to hand it over to other passengers, the right of participation was conferred to Pom-Pom.

C: 砂金通过扮演怪物来锁定葛瑞迪的位置，并称赞其营销才能。葛瑞迪将后备方案和盘托出，说老奥帝与圣杯在匹诺康尼大剧院等待各位。
E: Aventurine played the role of a monster to track Grady's location and praised his marketing skills. Grady revealed his backup plan, indicating Old Oti and the Holy Grail were waiting for you at the Penacony Grand Theater.

C: 破坏房门的举动惊动了「酒店的电锯恶灵」，电锯斯科特从房间里站起，对你们发起攻击。
E: Destroying the room door startled the "Evil Chainsaw Spirit of the Hotel." Chainsaw Skott rose from the room and attacked you.

C: 为搜寻刻法勒的火种，来古士率军洗劫奥赫玛，摧毁云石天宫。以自身之死为丝线，阿格莱雅为圣城编织起名为「团结」的坚固战袍。
E: To find Kephale's Coreflame, Lygus led a purge through Okhema and destroyed the Marmoreal Palace. Through her own death, Aglaea wove a battle robe called "Solidarity" for the holy city.

C: 满溢之杯重归完整，天谴之矛踏出冥河，神明重拾抵御黑潮的职责。海列屈拉终于摆脱漫无止境的劳役，得以奔赴斯缇科西亚的典仪。
E: Once the Chalice of Plenty was restored, the Lance of Fury surged from the River of Souls, and the gods reclaimed their duty to resist the black tide. Freed at last from endless toil, Helektra finally journeyed to Styxia's ceremony.

C: 黑塔与螺丝咕姆进入权杖内核层，这里严重损毁，宛如废墟。为对抗「铁墓」，必须在此揪出<color=#f29e38ff>第十三位泰坦</color>的秘密。假设「德谬歌」并不存在，黑塔将以自身作为对抗「铁墓」的备用方案。
E: Herta and Screwllum entered the core layer of the Scepter, which resembled devastated ruins. To counter Irontomb, they must uncover the secret of the <color=#f29e38ff>Thirteenth Titan</color> here. Should Demiurge not exist, Herta would use herself as the backup plan against Irontomb.

C: 在德谬歌监牢，在格式化进程完成前，每个轮回的昔涟都会向权杖讲述逐火之旅的故事。于是，「记忆的种子」诞生。
E: In Demiurge's prison, before the formatting process was completed, Cyrene of each cycle told the Scepter stories of the Flame-Chase Journey. Thus, the Seed of Memory was born.

C: 你启动仪式，黑暗再度笼罩空间。而这一次，你们要打破被凝固的「绝望」。
E: You initiated the ceremony, and darkness once again engulfed the surrounding space. This time, you will break through the thickened nest of "Despair."

C: 巨大的黑影掠过之后，车窗外的星空变为奇异的红色景象。
E: After a massive shadow streaked past, the stars beyond the window turned into a strange, crimson-hued vista.

C: 瓦尔特完成对引擎的检查，加速即将开始。银枝请瓦尔特稍等，称自己或许有办法帮助各位解决危机。银枝要求与你单独讨论。
E: As Welt completed the engine inspection and the acceleration was about to begin, Argenti asked Welt to wait a moment, saying he might have a way to help everyone resolve the crisis. Argenti requested to discuss this with you privately.

C: 你将「芝士流心」放在马桶上。看着它睁大的无辜双眼，你得下点狠心，相信这是对它更好的归宿。
E: You placed "Molten Cheese Tart" on the toilet. Its wide, innocent eyes stared up at you. You had to harden your heart, believing this was a kinder ending for it.

C: 玲可检查摇摇晃晃的帐篷，用实心地钉将其加固。佩拉检修炉具，发现是地髓燃料的激活元件坏掉了，或许附近的废墟里会有替换件。
E: Lynx inspected the wobbly tent, reinforcing it with solid stakes. Pela checked the stove and found that the activation component of the Geomarrow Fuel was broken. Perhaps they could find a replacement in the nearby ruins.

C: 半夏已经变作魔阴身的样子了，但却仍旧保持清醒。她强撑着想要见到梁沐。
E: Though Banxia had already become mara-struck, she still maintained her consciousness. She struggled to hold on, determined to see Liangmu one last time.

C: 凡是皆有例外，尾巴大爷正是当初为数不多得以逃脱的岁阳。而尾巴大爷之所以被封印，是因为遇上了藿藿。
E: There were always exceptions. Mr. Tail was one of the few heliobi who managed to escape back then. He ended up sealed only because he encountered Huohuo.

C: 帕沃尔的家族世世代代看护着无名英雄留下的石碑，他从石碑下生长出的金树上折下一枝，移栽于此，并拓下英雄留下的碑文。至此，那位被称作云骑士的英雄终于可以与「孤云」一同长眠于故乡。
E: Paavo's family had guarded the nameless hero's stone monument for generations. He broke a branch from the golden tree that grew from beneath the monument and replanted it here, along with inscriptions left by the hero. At last, the hero known as the Cloud Knight can rest eternally with Guyun in their homeland.

C: 彦卿称，仙舟联盟对本次仪典十分重视，「朱明」和「曜青」两座仙舟都派遣使者来贺。景元让彦卿护送你们前往司辰宫，再叙近况。
E: Yanqing explained that the Xianzhou Alliance placed great importance on this ceremony, with both the Zhuming and the Yaoqing sending messengers to offer their congratulations. Jing Yuan had tasked Yanqing with escorting you all to the Palace of Astrum and catching up.

C: 丹恒猜想仙舟天将齐聚罗浮是为了问责建木灾变，景元正承受着巨大压力。你们提议与彦卿一同前往工造司，协助罗浮处理外交事务。
E: Dan Heng speculated that the Arbiter-Generals had gathered at the Luofu to hold someone accountable for the Ambrosial Arbor disaster, and Jing Yuan was under immense pressure. You suggested going to the Artisanship Commission with Yanqing to assist the Luofu with diplomatic affairs.

C: 神秘狐人们察觉到异常，警惕地检查周围情况。
E: The mysterious foxians sensed something was off, cautiously scanning their surroundings.

C: 呼雷向椒丘拷问关于飞霄的信息，对其施刑。椒丘坚持用答案交换答案，询问呼雷的不死秘密。
E: Hoolay tortured Jiaoqiu while demanding information about Feixiao. Jiaoqiu refused to break, and instead attempted to get Hoolay to explain his immortality secret in exchange for answers.

C: 不久之前，椒丘与呼雷的对峙来到最后关头。
E: A moment before, the standoff between Jiaoqiu and Hoolay reached its final moment.

C: 同款娃娃火热上市，高仿复刻，需要请联系！
E: Off-brand model of the toy available for sale! High-quality imitation. DM if interested!

C: 三月七把今天的取景地选在了竞锋舰，是有了好点子吗？汇合之后问问看吧。
E: March 7th has chosen the Skysplitter as today's shooting location — does she have a good idea? Let's ask her after meeting up.

C: 吃惊发愣
E: Surprised

C: 鳞渊境
E: Scalegorge Waterscape

C: 有足够的灵感点进行<color=#f29e38ff>研究</color>了帕！
E: You have enough Inspiration Points to <color=#f29e38ff>conduct research</color>!

C: 全军突击，主动跳帮作战。
E: Perform all-out assault and actively engage in boarding action.

C: 你在高温日冕的表面燃烧。
E: You burn on the surface of a solar corona.

C: 你将星穹列车炸成了两截。
E: You blow the Astral Express in half.

C: 水灵送了你条大鱼。
E: The aqua sprite hands you a big fish.

C: 一柄覆盖着月光的大剑。
E: A greatsword bathed in moonlight.

C: 不要太嘚瑟，你赢赢赢，最后是输光光。
E: Don't get too cocky. You win, win, win — but in the end, it all slips through your fingers.

C: 有没有可能是…工厂的问题？
E: Could it be... the factory's problem?

C: （手语）「我得先去找点饭吃，等下聊。」
E: *signs* "Need to get some food first, catch up later."

C: 他刚好有个让毛发由内到外柔顺的调理方子。
E: He actually has a formula for achieving silky fur from root to tip.

C: 全新的造型有时也会带来全新的麻烦——就拿停云的这几条尾巴来说，虽然看着气派，每日出门打理和睡前护理的时间却也翻了九倍，实在消耗精力。有没有好心恩人的帮助呢——
E: New styles sometimes bring new troubles — take Tingyun's tails for instance. While they look majestic, the daily grooming and bedtime care now take nine times longer, really draining her energy. Perhaps some kind soul could help —

C: 银狼
E: Silver Wolf

C: 平平无奇的…家用设备。不过大部分人不会需要它。
E: A common... household item. Most people will not need it.

C: 枝杈上，龙不吟、虎不啸，一棵古树可笑可笑。
E: On the branch, neither the dragon roars nor the tiger howls. An ancient tree stands, a source of mockery.

C: 竞锋舰炮台
E: Skysplitter Cannon Turret

C: 收取展台产出时有一定概率获得双倍
E: Has a chance to gain double rewards when collecting booth output

C: 星槎•雏形阶段
E: Starskiff: Embryonic Phase

C: 奇异植物
E: Strange Plant

C: 钟表小子雕像
E: Clockie Statue

C: 停放「乌通蓬」独轮飞车
E: Park the Utopon Unicycler

C: 养成时间到
E: Time to level up!

C: 是你干的吧？
E: It was you, wasn't it?

C: 大剑的碎片
E: Fragment of a Greatsword

C: 裂界侵蚀
E: Fragmentum corrosion

C: 阿哈
E: Aha

C: 忆泡：赎罪之人
E: Memory Bubble: The Atonement

C: 挑战完成蓝光级的超链接对决
E: Challenge and clear the "Blue Light Level" in Hyperlink Match

C: 「无尽膨胀碎片」位面获得<unbreak>40000</unbreak>试炼点数
E: Obtain <unbreak>40,000</unbreak> trial points in the "Infinite Expansion Fragment" plane

C: 「无尽膨胀碎饵」位面获得<unbreak>30000</unbreak>试炼点数
E: Obtain <unbreak>30,000</unbreak> trial points in the "Infinite Expansion Bait" plane

C: 累计#4天完成所有「每日实训」
E: Complete #4 day(s) of Daily Training

C: 点亮了1位逐火者的命路
E: Light up 1 Flame-Chaser's Path

C: 阅读管理员批注
E: View Admin Notes

C: 在「虚境味探」活动的所有普通模式关卡中达到<unbreak>1000</unbreak>分
E: Attain <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> points in all Normal Mode stages in Virtual Scentventure

C: 在「日抛忆质留影计划」活动中，总计获得#4个奖杯
E: Win a total of #4 trophies in the "Operation Memoria Snapshot" event

C: 在「星天演武仪典」中累计获得#4个战术
E: Obtain a total of #4 Tactic(s) in the Luminary Wardance

C: 在「末日幻影」中累计击败#4个首领
E: Defeat a total of #4 bosses in Apocalyptic Shadow

C: 在「嗷呜嗷呜事务所」中获得#4只奇美拉
E: Obtain #4 Chimera(s) in The Awooo Firm.

C: 获得1次「白厄」的3级金血祝颂
E: Obtain Phainon's Level 3 Golden Blood's Boons 1 time

C: 在主控舱段拍摄「订餐机器人」的照片
E: Take a picture of a Food Order Robot in the Master Control Zone

C: 在主控舱段拍摄任意「三角桌」的照片
E: Take a picture of any triangular table in the Master Control Zone

C: 在#1轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within #1 cycles

C: 完成全部表演赛，且轮次数均不大于9轮次。
E: Complete all the exhibition matches within 9 cycles

C: 在本关卡中达到#1分
E: Earn #1 point(s) in this stage.

C: 在「终极挑战」阶段，积分达到#2
E: In the Final Showdown phase, reach #2 Point(s)

C: 在「终极挑战」阶段，积分达到#2
E: In the Final Showdown phase, reach #2 Point(s)

C: 收集章节「欢愉Ⅰ」

C:
成双之物间似乎会遥相感应，佚名之人所持的护腕虽仅有一只，指尖触碰下却隐隐能感受到另一只的温度。

他闭上眼，试图全力捕捉与另一只护腕若有似无的联系：它的位置，它的主人。

一只修长有力的手曾穿戴另一只腕甲，手执长枪与自己比武，枪尖寒芒坠如流星。腕甲的主人也曾与自己推杯换盅，望向冷月，彼此无言沉默；最后，也是那人和自己一意孤行，将挚爱变成了怪物，让所有人坠入无穷悔恨的渊薮。

成双之物总有一天会再度相逢，而此间绵长仇恨应如陈酒冰冷浓烈，慢慢啜饮，直至一切恩怨清偿为止。

另一只护腕的主人也有同感么？他不想知道。
E:
It seems that pairs of objects have telepathic connections with each other. Though the unnamed only had one bracer in his possession, his fingertips could still faintly feel the temperature from the other.

He closed his eyes, trying his best to extract any information about the other bracer from the tenuous connection, be it its location or master.

A slender yet strong hand once wore the other bracer. That owner, whose sharp spear glinted with a cold light and flourished like shooting stars, once sparred with the unnamed. That owner also once shared company and drinks with the unnamed, the two of them simply gazing at the moon with no words exchanged. However, in the end, it was also this person who stubbornly adhered to their plans with the unnamed, turned the beloved into a monstrosity, and pushed all into an abyss of eternal hatred and remorse.

Pairs of objects are destined for an eventual reunion. The long years of grudges and hatred between them should be savored, like ice-cold aged liquor, one slow sip after another until the bottle of resentment is finally empty.

Would the wearer of the other bracer feel the same? The unnamed didn't want to know.

C:
身材娇小的林赛以快速灵动的出拳风格而闻名，翩跹的步法轻快得如蝴蝶穿花。

尽管对手的快拳凌厉如雨，却始终只能与林赛擦肩而过，这便是招牌的「林赛舞步」。

为了训练林赛的特殊步伐，伊卡翠娜将街头少女带到上流的舞会里，手牵着手，旋转接着旋转……林赛从磕磕绊绊到逐渐跟上脚步，她好像明白了，这个自称是拳击教练的老人，似乎不仅是教练这样简单。在迷离的舞池里，林赛心中某处柔软的地方突然被一道奇妙的感觉击中。

「想再跳一支舞吗？」

街头出身的林赛从未想过会有这样的体验，她望着伊卡翠娜澄澈的双眼，无法拒绝。
E:
With a rather petite figure, Lindsay became famous for her fast punches and nimble footwork that allowed her to dance in the ring like a fluttering butterfly amidst flowers.

Regardless of how fast her opponents could throw a punch, all their strikes could never hit Lindsay. Such was the power of what was known as Lindsay's Dance.

To train Lindsay's unique footwork, Icaterina took the street urchin to a high-society ball, where they danced hand in hand, spin after spin... Though clumsy at first, Lindsay eventually got the hang of the refined dance steps. She realized that there was more to this old boxing coach than met the eye. Among the flowing sea of dancers, a soft spot in Lindsay's heart was suddenly struck by a magical feeling.

"One more dance?"

Lindsay's upbringing on the street did not at all prepare her for such experiences. Seeing the twinkle in Icaterina's eyes, how could Lindsay refuse?

C: 「进化乃是与智慧相悖的道路，唯有退化回最原始的姿态，才能掌握真理。」 是否存在一种完美的载体，作为智慧的存在形式？作为机械帝皇的无机仿生神经元集群，「权杖」理应具备承载智慧的特质。完美进化学派的学士一度怀疑，正是以「权杖」作为扩展思维的大脑延伸，#鲁珀特二世才能以血肉之躯企及摧毁半个宇宙的算能。虽然公司对无机生命的研究项目多有限制，但仍未能阻止学者们将研发重心逐渐从肉体转移向金属。 正如托克尔克学士所言，在小小的蛋白球和有限的寿命外，我们终将创造更具超越性的智慧。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: "Evolution is the antithesis of intellect. Only by devolving into the most fundamental state can one attain truth." Is there a perfect medium for wisdom to exist? As the inorganic bionic neuron clusters of the Mechanical Emperor, the Scepters should possess the property of bearing intelligence. The School of Evolutionary Perfection scholars once suspected that #Rubert II used the Scepters as a cerebral extension of thought expansion to generate enough computational power to destroy half the universe with his mortal body. Though the IPC has imposed many restrictions on inorganic lifeform research projects, that has not prevented scholars' academic efforts from being slowly diverted from flesh to metal. It is as Scholar Torkirk declared: Beyond minuscule protein balls and limited lifespans, we will eventually create intelligence that transcends all. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 臭名昭著的耶佩拉兄弟会曾在入侵林德嘉诺星系时动用活体生物武器，这种基因自毁病毒会令受感染的细胞在宿主体内相互啃食，惨状环生。但无休无止的增殖让巢都内的生物群很快超出了控制，它们以狂暴的姿态反过来吞没了兄弟会的阵地，令这群恶棍不得不放弃被卷入的同僚，断尾求生。有人称这起事件背后是永火官邸在作祟，证据则是日后两股势力永无宁日的死斗。
E: The infamous Jepella Brotherhood used live biological weapons when they invaded the Lindgano star system. The virus that causes genes to self-destruct makes infected cells consume each other within the host's body, creating appalling calamities. However, the endless multiplication made the horde of living beings within the Nest Capital soon go out of control. Driven berserk, they turned on the Brotherhood and devoured the invaders' camp, making these thugs have no chance but to give up the brethren embroiled in it, discarding what they could to stay alive. Some claimed the Ever-Flame Mansion was behind this event, with the evidence being the unending death feud between the two organizations that followed in days to come.

C: 与一众祸及寰宇的虚构史学家不同，卡利的王国只欢迎孩童的笑声，他们穿过菠萝果汁的洋流，和棉花糖气味的风暴，手持宝剑抵达苔草丛生的恶龙城堡，夺走它的宝藏。但虚构总归会消散，孩子们在哭闹中呼唤亲人，在长大后蔑视幻想，于是「神秘」不复存在，举剑的少年少女在自己的床上醒来。唯有身旁蒙尘的利剑，仍铭记着骑士们讨伐邪恶的荣耀。
E: Unlike the History Fictionologists who bring disaster across the cosmos, the kingdom of Kali only welcomes the laughter of children. They traverse the flux of pineapple juice, the storms of cotton candy whiffs, arriving at the moss-laden evil dragon's castle, trusty sword in hand, to wrest it of its treasures. But fiction will always fade away — The wails of children summon their guardians, and the children scorn imagination when they grow up. Thus, Enigmata ceases to exist. Young lads and lasses startle upright on their beds, waking from their dreams of brandished blades. Only the dusty-edged sword beside them remembers the glories of knights vanquishing evil.

C:
适逢夜幕将至，我来讲述些平日的见闻吧，愿真相长存不灭。
那些伟大的赐福者，以欧洛尼斯的谕示预见未来，
而受人恐惧且厌恶之人，揭开永夜之帷的面纱，去窥视往昔。
注定的过往被织入命运的纱布，剥开追忆的残像，
任何罪责都逃不过裁断的眼睛。
谋杀无处遁形，神明揭示的奇迹便是真理，
偷盗销声匿迹，岁月的绸缎揭示那些踪影。
可人们的恐惧胜过崇敬，没有什么秘密能逃过我们的眼睛，
怯弱混合杀意，爱意掺杂野心，我们被邀请而来，又被驱逐而去。
E:
As night descends, let me share some tales from my everyday life. May truth shine bright forever.
The great blessers foresee the future through the prophecies of Oronyx,
Whereas those who are feared and loathed lift the Veil of Evernight to glimpse into the past.
The predetermined past is woven into the fabric of fate, revealing the fragments of memories,
No sins can escape the piercing gaze of judgment.
Murderers have no place to hide, for the miracles revealed by the gods embody the very essence of truth.
Thieves vanish into the shadows, for the tapestry of time eventually unveils their hidden traces.
Yet people's fear outweighs their reverence, as no secret can escape our vigilant gaze.
Cowardice mingles with murderous intent, and love intertwines with ambition. We are summoned, yet we are expelled.

C:
墨托达罗斯，我们绳结学派的骄傲，也是耻辱。
骄傲，是因为这位学者流淌着金色的血液，
即使数百年过去，他的诸多奇思妙想仍启发着后来者。
生铁和绳子在他手里变成行走的机械，
工程学教科书因为他的出现而增厚一倍。
耻辱，是因为他不将发明用于造福社会，
却要跑去参加那黄金战争，
瑟希斯的智慧成了尼卡多利的枪戟，
多少城邦因为他的创造分崩离析，
而他本人，也与自己的发明一起化成灰烬。
如今只有从那些艰涩难懂的手稿中，
才能一睹他的惊世才学和勃勃野心。
E:
Metitalus, a dual emblem of pride and shame for us Nodists.
He is our pride, for this scholar has golden blood in his veins.
His ingenious ideas continue to inspire successors across generations, centuries after his time.
In his skilled hands, raw iron and ropes were transformed into walking machines.
Due to his contributions, engineering textbooks doubled in size.
He is also a shame as he did not use his creations to benefit society
And chose instead to engage in the Chrysos War.
The wisdom of Cerces forged the lethal spears of Nikador,
Destroying countless city-states to ruins with his inventions.
Ultimately, he and his creations were both consumed by flames.
Now, only by deciphering those cryptic, intricate manuscripts
Can one catch a glimpse of his astonishing talent and unyielding ambition.

C:
请聆听我们的故事吧，关于维图斯最后的学者。
别嘲笑我们懦弱，在逃离前，我们也曾举起武器，
可导师为一卷文献倒在血泊里，
兄弟因守卫城门死无葬身之地。
别露出这种表情，这已是黑潮到来前的事情。
有什么不同？黑潮与纷争，黄金世的诸多城邦，
死去的文明带走了故事，而知识却不朽。
我们咽下瑟希斯的垂语，
骨化作树木，肉溶为新叶，
维图斯曾创造的睿智，尽数在眉梢结成果实。
摘下这颗种子吧，在远处发芽，
待千年后，仍会有学者展开我们笔下的证明。
E:
Please listen to our story. A story about the last scholars of Vitus.
Do not mock us for our cowardice, for before we fled, we too raised our weapons.
But our mentor fell in a pool of blood over a scroll.
Our brothers perished defending the city gates, their bodies never found.
Don't look at us that way. It happened even before the black tide came.
What's the difference? The black tide, the conflicts, and the city-states of the Era Chrysea.
Extinct civilizations took stories with them, but knowledge endures.
We swallowed the whispered words of Cerces.
Our bones transformed into trees, our flesh into new leaves.
The wisdom once nurtured by Vitus all bore fruit on our branches.
Pick this seed and let it sprout somewhere far away.
A thousand years from now, scholars will still uncover the proofs we have left behind.

C:
你见过发光的海洋么？那是辉光水母在狂欢，
数量简直比天上的星星还要多，从眼前蔓延到天际。
它们丝毫不害怕人类，甚至会有人一起共舞。
有人说它们是法吉娜的眷属，
因为夜晚的大海太黑，
喝醉的法吉娜需要水母照亮回家的道路。
也有人说它们是墨涅塔的眷属，
金蝶飞入大海，就变成了水母，
因为翅膀没法在海洋里飞翔。
可也许这些水母压根就不是任何泰坦的眷属，
它们只是繁衍着，狂欢着，从遥远的古代一直到更遥远的未来。
E:
Ever seen the ocean glitter? That's the Radiant Jellyfish throwing an eternal rave.
More than stars in the sky, horizon-to-horizon,
they are not afraid of humankind, even daring swimmers to join their luminous waltz.
Whispers claim they're Phagousa's kins.
As the ocean was far too dark at night,
they lit the way home for the drunken Phagousa.
Others insist they belong to Mnestia.
Golden butterflies fluttered into the ocean and transformed into jellyfish,
for their wings could not take flight in the sea.
Or perhaps they answer to no Titan,
simply dancing, propagating, and partying through millennia, from ancient past to the endless future.

C:
那群疯癫的行为艺术家，简直是翁法罗斯最大的笑话，
他们奔走于各个城邦之间，就为了宣传愚蠢的理想。
领袖斯托芬托尼，是个三流的喜剧演员，
妄图用喜剧演出代替战争，引起更大的笑声者胜出。
他们参加悬锋城的竞技庆典，在对手面前妙语连珠，
没说几句就被一拳击晕，狼狈地抬下赛场。
他们还去拉冬城举办演出，摆出各种滑稽的造型，
拉冬人认为这是亵渎晨昏之眼，差点将其推下悬崖。
不过斯托芬托尼自己认为，失败原因是表演不够好笑，
哈哈，我看他们干的蠢事倒是挺好笑的。
E:
Those lunatic performance artists are Amphoreus' greatest disgrace.
They galavant city-to-city to spread clownish manifestos.
Stophantones, their ringleader, is a third-rate comedy actor
who delusively believes that wars could be substituted with comedies, and won based on who earns the loudest laughters.
At Castrum Kremnos' arena festival, they quipped at their opponents,
only to be met with a fist. Curtains closed before the punchline.
In Ladon, their preposterous poses during their performances
were seen as an insult to the Eye of Twilight, and nearly had them tossed off the cliff.
But Stophantones blames failure on "poor comedic timing."
Well, in my opinion, their existence is quite a fine comedy.

E: Under the colossal hammer of the Preservation, celestial bodies are processed into indestructible foundations, while the residue splattered by its immense force quickly cools, forming precious Celesticomet Alloy. These tiny shards, ejected when Qlipoth struck the Celestial Comet Wall, heralded the arrival of a new Amber Era from the moment they were created. Almost all Celesticomet Alloys are meticulously preserved by the Interastral Peace Corporation, with only employees ranked P<unbreak>45</unbreak> and above having the opportunity to catch a glimpse of their true form.

C: 「——日志 筑城纪元████年██月██日。」 「我自诞生之初便被输入了『存护』下层区的指令——即使下层区只能比上层区多留存哪怕一毫秒，我也会严格将之执行。若借贝洛伯格传统文化中的概念描述，或许也可以这样说：『毫无疑问地，我忠于自己被赋予的使命』。因此，我视自己的计算结果为铁律——任何人、任何事物都无法使我动摇——包括『外来者』在内。」 「但是，在大量演算结果中，我注意到这样一种可能性。」 「在该演算结果中，克拉拉改变了贝洛伯格的一切。我曾对她如此评价：『她的一切行为举止都更多出自真正的理性』。若以该演算结果为基础，重新审视这一结论，我不能将之视为错误，但我注意到它有失偏颇。」 「在该演算结果中，克拉拉同时证明了一点：具备『真正的理性』并非改变现状的关键，反而是她那真挚且热烈的『情感』将一切计算结果颠覆，彻底扭转了贝洛伯格注定灭亡的未来。然而，除非有新的外因介入，该演算结果触达概率不高于0.25272%，应归入小概率事件组，暂停对该演算结果的进一步研究。」 「如今，下层区的存续概率在过去五个周期内未见明显上升趋势，评估认为该事项允许暂缓执行，但我仍将对相关风险因子置于监控下。」 「在本周期内，我将专注于为克拉拉寻找家人一事。尽管克拉拉不断表示『自己已经找到了真正的家人』，我还是将持续搜集相关信息，以便尽早发现克拉拉真正的家人之所在。」
E: "— Log ██/██/████ AF." "Ever since I was created, I've been given the command to preserve the Underworld — Even if I can only preserve it for a millisecond longer than the Overworld, I will still carry out these orders. To borrow a phrase from traditional Belobog culture, perhaps it could be put like this: 'I am faithful without hesitation to the mission I've been given.' Therefore, I see my calculations as immutable laws — nobody and nothing can ever shake me, including any Outsiders." "However, I found this possible permutation among the calculation results." "In this calculation, Clara completely changed Belobog. I once said of her, 'her behavior is more based on pure rationality.' If we take this probable result as a base and revisit my conclusion, I cannot view it as an error — but I admit that it is biased." "With the results of this calculation, Clara has also proved one thing: Having true rationality is not the key to changing the status quo, but rather that her sincere and passionate emotion overturned all calculations and completely reversed Belobog's doomed fate. However, unless new external forces intervene, the probability of this is less than 0.25272%, which places it in the low probability category. Further research on these calculations are paused." "Today, the probability of survival in the Underworld has not seen a significant upward trend over the last five cycles. This means that implementation of this may be suspended, but I will still monitor all relevant risk factors." "During this cycle, I will focus on finding Clara's family. Despite Clara insisting that she has already found her real family, I will keep collecting any and all information to track down Clara's real family as soon as I can."

C: 「玲可，你也知道贝洛伯格外面有多冷……」 「…没关系，哥。厚衣服和暖炉我都带好了。」 「可是雪原还很危险——不光是极端气候，还有各种各样的可怕怪物……」 「…没事的，你们别担心。我先前已经跟着巡逻队出去见过几次了，能应付。」 「这是什么时候发生的事？」 「呃……」 「唉…姐姐，你也快来帮忙劝劝玲可啊。」 「啊？玲可想干什么就让她去呗。我们玲宝这么有主见，我这做姐姐的高兴还来不及呢～」 「…嘿嘿，谢谢姐。」 「不过，杰帕德说的也没错：你独自外出探险，一定要注意安全，千万别逞能！来，这些你都拿好了……」 「…这是？」 「这是你上个月说想买的登山镐『锋面行者』，不过姐姐我又稍微改装了下，保证好使；然后，这个是寻路者系列新上市的滑雪板，你哥哥买的；啊，还有这个水壶，歌德宾馆年庆限量版，肩带已经被我改到合适的尺寸了，顺便添了点装饰；还有还有，这些能量棒和罐头可以用来补充能量……」 「呃，不是说好不要告诉她滑雪板的事吗……」 「哎呀…这都什么时候了你还较劲，真没意思！ 「总之，玲宝——好好利用这些，在外面保护好自己…听明白了吗？拉钩！」 「…嗯，拉钩！」
E: "Lynx, you know how cold it is outside Belobog..." "...It's not a big deal, Gepard. I got warm clothes and a heater. I'm all ready." "But the Snow Plains aren't just dangerous because of the extreme weather. There are also all kinds of vicious monsters there..." "...That's not big deal. Don't worry. Ran into some of them a few times when I was with the patrols before. I can handle them." "Wait, when was that?" "Uh..." "Agh... Serval, give me a hand here. She's your sister too." "Huh? Oh, she should get to do what she wants to do. Seeing our little Lynxy be such a go-getter about what she wants makes me real proud to be her sister..." "...Hehe, thanks, sis." "But Gepard's right: You need to pay attention to your safety when you're exploring the outside alone. Don't! Push! Yourself! Here, take these things too..." "...What's this stuff?" "This is the 'Vanguard' climbing pick you said you wanted to get last month. But don't you worry, your sister's got your back. I might've made a small redesign to it, but I promise it works well. Also, this is new 'Pathfinder' series snowboard from your brother. And, oh, this water bottle — a Goethe Hotel annual exclusive make. I changed the shoulder strap to your appropriate measurements and added some decorations. Also — also! These energy bars and food cans can fill you right up..." "Uh, didn't you promise not to tell her about the snowboard." "Agh, this really isn't the time to be stuck on that!" "Anyway, remember to use these well and keep yourself protected out there. You hear me? I want to hear you promise!" "...Alright, I promise!"

C: 曜青，飞雨湖。 荇藻开着黄花，游鱼在雨丝中跳跃，菱角荷花肆意生长，湖边石滩常有老龟晒背。 湖中，他背着药篓，划着小舟，雨丝顺着他的耳廓流下，沾湿了他的衣裳。 他捞取荇菜，撷取荷花，剥开鲜嫩的茭白，随手往嘴里扔去。 「唉，太淡了……」他摇了摇头。 「先生，有一位老人在食馆找您，说是您的老相识——」 门童的声音从对岸传来。他叹了口气，撑船往回而去。 他岂不知来人何意，却早已厌倦了重操医业。 「师父今日前来，是要试试飞雨食馆的鼎镬吗？我可要提个醒，这里只有重辣和重重辣。」 老者坐在桌边，叹了口气。 「我记得在从军之前，你的口味还清淡得很。」 他端上鼎镬，眼中一抹怀念之色转瞬即逝。 「人…总是会变的。」 老者夹起一片紫鱼，在红油沸腾的锅里涮了涮。 「那我也试试罢。但此次前来，并非仅仅为了吃食。还记得你救下的那个女孩么？ 「那位始终跟在前任将军身边的少女，飞霄。她如今已接任了曜青将军，需要一个医生追随，没人比你更合适了。」 他无奈地笑了笑，那日口腔的刺痛不知为何又翻涌上来。「即便救下了，不过又是一条上阵蹈死的冤魂。这样的无用功，我不想再做。」 老者放下筷子，摇摇头。 「你误会了，我此次前来，并非劝你救治世人。我来，是想请这位将军…医好你的心死之病。 「她会告诉你…医者的意义，究竟是什么。」
E: Rainsoar Lake, the Yaoqing. In the misty rain, yellow floating heart foliage and blossoms decorated the lake as frolicking fishes leaped out of the water from time to time. This lakeside abounds with lotuses and water chestnuts, and old turtles basking on the pebbles were an everyday sight. With a herb basket on his back, he rowed a small boat out into the middle of the lake as the falling rain slid down the back of his ear, soaking his clothing wet. Scooping up floating heart plants, picking out lotus flowers, and peeling open wild rice shoots, sending them all into his mouth to taste. "Ugh, too bland..." He shook his head. "Mister, there's an elderly man looking for you over at the restaurant. He claimed to be an old friend of yours..." A disciple called out from the other side of the lake, to which he sighed and rowed his boat back to shore. He is of course aware of the visitor's intentions, but he had long grown weary of resuming his old profession as a healer. "Master, are you here today to try out the dishes cooked with Rainsoar Eatery's cauldron? I must warn you, though: We only serve very spicy and insanely spicy food here." The elderly man sighed from his seat at the table. "I remember you preferred bland food before joining the army." As he readied the cauldron, a glimmer of nostalgia flashed across his eyes. "People... tend to change." The elder picked up a slice of threadfin snapper, scalding it in the bubbling red broth. "I should try it then. But know that I did not come for that. Do you still remember the girl you saved?" "Feixiao, that's her name. The girl that followed the former general everywhere. She has since assumed the role of General of the Yaoqing and now requires a healer by her side. There's no one more suitable for that position than you." He smiled wryly, for some reason recalling the sharp pain he felt on his tongue that fateful day. "Those I saved only ended up as another dead soul when they dived head-in back into the battlefield. I prefer to no longer engage in such futile efforts." The elder placed his chopsticks down and shook his head. "You misunderstand me. This time, I'm not here to persuade you to heal the masses in this world. I'm here because I want this general ... to heal your despondent heart." "She will tell you... what the true purpose of a healer is."

C: 「关于那位新员工，我有一些情况要向您报告。」 「什么事让你这么担心，埃尔文？」 「关于他的投诉，不管是正式的还是非正式的，像纸片一样塞满了我的邮箱，我想…您或许可以重新考虑是否接纳他为战略投资部的一员。」 「他们都写了什么？」 「主要是他的身份，那双眼睛……」 「他曾欺骗市场开拓部，茨冈尼亚贫瘠的黄土藏着尚未被有效开发利用的能源。在他们投入巨额资金进行开采后，才发现根本是无稽之谈。」 「还有骇人听闻的『艾吉哈佐砂金案』，他哄骗博识学会相信那里埋藏着虫皇『塔伊兹育罗斯』的尸体——那帮学者谨慎又谨慎，却还是落入了对方的圈套。」 「还有茨冈尼亚酋长国议员来信，谴责他的部落曾破坏决议，祸乱人心，致使氏族间和平局势发生重大变化，茨冈尼亚与公司间协议条款的签订屡次延期。此人如今入职公司，其影响极为恶劣……」 「如果只是这些的话，就不必说了。」 「…您都知道？」 「每一种宝石都有独特的价值，而我们的工作就是『投资』。」 「也不用安抚那些来信的老顽固，这些风言风语迟早会传到——不，应该已经传到他耳边了。正好，就看看他到底能给我们带来多大的惊喜吧。」
E: "I have something to report to you about the new employee." "What makes you so worried, Erwin?" "It's complaints about him, both formal and informal. My mailbox has been flooded with them like countless pieces of paper. I wonder... if it's worth reconsidering his inclusion in the Strategic Investment Department." "What do these complaints say?" "Mostly about his origins. Those eyes of his..." "He once deceived the Marketing Development Department by falsely claiming that there were energy sources hidden in the barren land of Sigonia, not yet effectively developed and utilized. A huge amount of funds was invested into excavating it before we realized it was all a scam." "And then there's the notorious Egyhazo Aventurine Case. He misled the Intelligentsia Guild into believing that the remains of Tayzzyronth the Imperator Insectorum were buried there. Despite the scholars being extremely cautious, they ultimately still fell into the trap." "And let's not forget the letters from the councilors of the Sigonian Sovereignty. They denounce his tribe for once breaking agreements and sowing discord, leading to significant changes in the balance of peace between the tribes, resulting in repeated delays in the signing of agreements between Sigonia and IPC. Allowing such an employee to join at the IPC would be a severe detriment to public relations..." "If these are the extent of the complaints, there's no need to tell me." "...You already know it all?" "Each gemstone holds unique value, and our task is to make investments." "We don't need to appease those stubborn old-timers who sent in complaints, as these rumors will eventually reach... No, they would already have reached his ears. Well, let's take this chance and see how big of a surprise he can bring us."

C: 女孩是被遗弃的孤儿，活着，却不知自己在哪，从何而来，要往哪去——直到那个戏团路过，她跑去看，远远看到黑色双马尾少女像一条鱼，从舞台的这侧游到那侧。少女戴着面具，很多种面具，但这不妨碍她在舞台上的大笑与痛哭，即使与观众离得那么远，却像在他们眼皮底子下表演。游鱼也悄无声息地在女孩的面前跃起，再入水，泛起涟漪。 她才逐渐意识到自己的行为，是「自己」在「舞台下」观看「表演」。 她又去看了很多次，不分早晚。但她仍旧只是观众，舞台上的聚光灯不会落在自己身上。散场后，她去了后台，黑色双马尾少女递来一个面具。 「我可以吗？」 「为什么不呢？反正戴着面具，他们认为你是『花火』，那你就是。去吧。」 作为第四面墙的幕布拉开，灯光还没亮起，她看着台下，那儿只有一个黑洞，即使隔着面具也令人难安。她知道黑洞里坐着密密麻麻的人，他们看得到她，还听得到她说话，她总忍不住想着「花火」的表演，想调整自己的动作、声音、仪态，方方面面。 「就第一次来说，做得非常不错。」 「但那和你的『花火』…不一样。」 「这是个问题，但你不让别人知道，就不是问题…而且明天戏团就要走啦，所以只要你想，在这儿你就是花火，花火就是你。你想让她是什么样，就是什么样。」 她欲言又止，少女揉揉她的脑袋。 「除了你也没多少人来看我们，小戏团嘛，我们也不指望自己能扬名银河…偶尔能碰见你这样的孩子，能记住有这么个角色叫『花火』，就足够我高兴好一阵子啦…别哭，这个面具你留着，这就是你的面具。」 她点点头。 「听好了，只要戴上面具，你谁都是，也谁都不是…要是真想当演员，就别只盯着这个小小的台子，去更大的地方吧。」
E: The girl, an abandoned orphan, lived without knowledge of her origins or destination until she encountered a passing troupe. From a distance, she watched a black-haired lady with a double ponytail, gracefully moving across the stage like a fish. Despite donning various masks, they did not hinder her laughs and cries during her performance, captivating the audience even from afar. The fish leaped in front of her, then dove back down, creating ripples in the surface of the water. Gradually, she realized she was watching the performance from beneath the stage. Intrigued, she continued to watch the performances for countless days, but she remained an audience member, never stepping into the spotlight. After one of the shows ended, she went backstage, where the black-haired lady handed her a mask. "Can I perform, too?" "Why not? If others believe you are 'Sparkle,' then you are. Go, it's time for your show." As the curtain, serving as the fourth wall, was drawn, the stage remained dimly lit, revealing an unsettling black void. Though wearing a mask, she knew the audience could see and hear her. She kept recalling Sparkle's performance, imitating her movements, voice, and demeanor. "You've done very well for your first time." "But my imitation... Was not perfect." "That is a minor hiccup, but not a problem as long as nobody notices the difference... By the way, we are leaving tomorrow, so for as long as you want, you are the true Sparkle here, and you can make her whoever you want her to be." Sparkle wanted to say something, but the lady affectionately rubbed her head. "Not many people come to see us, except for you. We're just a small troupe, and we don't have grand aspirations of becoming famous in the cosmos... It brings me joy to meet someone like you who will remember an insignificant character named Sparkle... Don't cry, you can keep this mask. Now it's yours." Sparkle nodded. "When you don this mask, you have the power to become anyone and no one... If you truly aspire to be an actor, don't limit yourself to this small stage. Set your sights on the larger world and explore new horizons."

C: 「这条路并不适合你，赶紧出去。去找个工作或者…找个学上？」 小个子医生放下吃了一半的三明治，在明显大了几号的白大褂上擦了擦手。 男人不发一言，脱掉衣服，露出满身伤疤，医生依然没有停止絮叨。 「像你这样的年轻人，值得一个更好的未来。这条路属于那些走投无路的人，那些已经没有能力重新开始，却依然渴望向邪恶追索的人……」 冰冷的枪抵上医生的额头——或者说，姑且称之为额头的部位。 「我要是想听上课，就会去上学了。」男人威胁道。 「虽然你想威胁，但枪对我没用…算了，你躺下吧。」医生无奈道。 …… 手术台的无影灯打开。 他仿佛落入深海，肉体被包裹，与周围融为一体，然后逐渐远去，只余空洞的思维在原地挣扎。 奇怪的是，恐惧、不安、孤独、黑暗、愤怒…那些感情没有随着肉身消散，反而以另一种方式保留下来，愈发沉重。 他闻到烧焦的气味，他甚至能感受到医生轻盈的呼吸——她竟然还会呼吸？他不合时宜地想道。电机的嗡鸣在他耳边盘旋，蓝色的新血拒绝流向他饥渴的心脏。 他很想就这么睡去，不用醒来。 直到听见那粗粝的歌声，那温柔的叮嘱，过去的记忆再次浮现，刻骨的仇恨化作黑暗中的微光，他循着光亮朝尽头走去，用尽力气浮出水面。 …… 「恭喜，你还挺难杀的。」 医生在白大褂上蹭了蹭满手血污，又重新拿起那半个三明治。 「你以为我会死？」 他握紧双手，如今它们是钢铁的，冰冷的。 「大部分人会死。」医生坦率地说道，「可不是因为我手艺不精。」 「好消息：我早就死了。」 「你叫什么名字？」 他犹豫了一下，耳边温柔的、粗粝的声音都消失了，已经没有人会叫出那个清脆而响亮的名字了。 「波提欧。在我的家乡，这个名字被用来称呼那些被人打死的枪手。」 他转而一笑，露出满口的尖牙。 「但这只是个开始而已，医生。在为了复仇付出的所有代价之中，这是最轻的一个。」 他拖着新的身体，蹒跚走出大门。 「那就祝你『巡猎』愉快，『巡海游侠』波提欧！」 冲着他的背影，小个子医生大喊道。 门外夜色正浓，波提欧不禁抬起头——在繁星的阵列中，又有一颗被点亮了。
E: "This road doesn't suit you. Get out. Go find a job or... get an education." The short doctor put down the half-eaten sandwich and wiped her hands on a white coat that was evidently a few sizes too big. The man didn't say anything and took off his clothes instead, revealing skin completely covered in scars. The doctor didn't stop her pestering. "A young man like you deserves a better future. This road, on the other hand, belongs to those who have no other choice, people who can't start again anymore but still want to make evil pay..." The cold barrel of a gun pressed against the doctor's forehead — Rather, the part of her that could still be regarded as a forehead. "If I wanted a lecture, I would've gotten ma'self an education already." The man threatened. "I get what you're trying to do, but guns don't work against me... never mind. Go lie down." The doctor replied in resignation. ... The lights above the operation table lit up. He felt as if he had fallen into a deep sea. His flesh was wrapped up and then melted into everything around him. His body departed, leaving only his hollow thoughts struggling all alone. Strangely, the emotions — terror, anxiety, loneliness, darkness, rage — didn't dissipate with his physical body. They remained in a different manner — and they were even heavier than before. He smelled the scent of something being charred, and he even felt the doctor's soft breathing — She can breathe? He couldn't help but have that incongruous thought. The whirl of machinery buzzed around his ears and the new blue blood refused to flow towards his thirsty heart. He really wanted to just fall asleep like this and never wake up. Until he heard those crude songs and those gentle words, and memories of yore surfaced once again. The unforgettable hatred turned into a weak light in the darkness and he followed it to walk toward the end of it all, exerting every ounce of his strength to rise once again to the surface. ... "Congrats. You're pretty hard to kill." The doctor rubbed her blood-covered hands on her white coat and picked up the half-eaten sandwich again. "Ya thought I was gonna die?" He balled his hands into fists — hands that were now made of cold iron. "Most people would have died,", the doctor stated candidly, "and it won't be because I'm bad at my job." "Well I hav'a piece of good news for ya: I've been dead for a long time." "What's your name?" He briefly paused. Both the gentle and crude voices have disappeared. No one will ever call him by that crisp and resonating name again. "Boothill. Where I come from, that's what we call gunslingers who end up bite'n the dust..." He then smiled, revealing a mouth full of sharp teeth. "But this is just the start, doc. Of all the prices I hafta pay to get ma revenge, this here's the lightest toll." Dragging his new body, he shambled out of the door. "Then, happy 'Hunting', Boothill the Galaxy Ranger!" The short doctor yelled at his retreating back. Boothill couldn't help but look up at the night sky outside — Another star had been ignited in the arrays of stars above.

C: 银河忍法帖之缭乱破魔传•试炼节点：无慈悲的手里剑  >>系统初始化>> >>用户缭乱•忍侠接入完成>> >>忍者等级验证中>> >>欢迎进入属于你自己的忍者•游戏！>> 试炼系统：忍之都的街头，铺满了绿色的不祥月光。御猿屋内，碎裂的玻璃罐体流出恶臭的粘液，怪异的号叫不绝于耳。 试炼系统：你身携大师所赐缭乱•彩墨•忍具，穿梭在无情的酸雨之中，劈开脏污的空气，朝着御猿屋的核心奔去。 试炼系统：邪忍们发现了你，他们说着你听不懂的话朝你扑来。 ？？？：「试验品暴动了！」 ？？？：「天杀的，你把昂贵的仪器都弄坏了！」 ？？？：「谁把这该死的病毒灌进了她的脑子！」 缭乱•忍侠：「咿呀——」 系统消息：忍者释放了手中的异彩！ 缭乱•忍侠：「咕哇——」 系统消息：忍者利用地形甩开邪忍们的包围！ 系统消息：大般若神在上！忍者的生命值已降低到警戒值！实际危险！ 系统消息：忍者突破了包围圈！ 系统消息：忍者站到了忍之都的顶端！ 系统消息：忍者的光芒照亮了这座破败不堪的城市！ 缭乱•忍侠：「恶徒们，准备好吟诵辞世句吧——」 缭乱•忍侠：「忍法•奥义•缭乱灭破杀阵！」 试炼系统：御猿屋的阵法如雪花般崩裂，你终于推开了忍之都的大门。 试炼系统：你失望地发现门外没有始作俑者「御猿•邪忍」。 试炼系统：你惊讶地发现忍之都外的世界很大，大得有些令你害怕。 试炼系统：你回头看了一眼，心中默默地做出了决定。 选择：        1、往前走。        2、往后退。 系统消息：忍者还有五秒做出选择。 系统消息：5 系统消息：4 系统消息：忍者选择了【往前走】。 试炼系统：大岚神在上！忍者没有回头的道路！况且，没有一个人能拒绝拯救世界的英雄传奇。 试炼系统：开启属于你的《缭乱破魔传》吧！ 系统消息：用户【缭乱•忍侠】经验+10000，获得可大幅提升攻击力的【降魔•花弁】。
