There is no turning back for the ninja! Besides, no one can say no to a heroic adventure of saving the world. Trial System: Now, write your own Tale of Dazzling Evilbreaker! System Message: User "Dazzling Ninja Hero" has gained 10,000 XP and obtained an "Demonbane Petalblade" that provides a great ATK boost.

C: 「海瑟音，追随我，我会赐予你所求的一切。」 她对那从娇小身躯里发出的响亮声音印象深刻，却仍心有怀疑： 「她…又会在什么时候熄灭呢？」 然而这簇灯火像射入深海的天光，愈燃愈烈，持久不熄。 人们见蓝色的烈焰征战无数，次次凯旋，见巨浪如火燎原，见那卷起风浪的剑旗，也化作鲸鲨将腥风血雨尽数吞咽。 她听到炽烈的心跳，激昂的战鼓，雨点般的脚步，潮涌般的悲伤…纯粹如歌的心声自黄金裔的血中流淌，也同样拨动她尘封已久的心弦。 凯撒应许的盛宴在即，年轻的织者与孩童附耳私语，不知那淡漠的剑旗是否愿拨冗出席。 在众人的惊呼声中，织者踮起脚尖，屏住呼吸，想要将这一刻尽收眼底。 她鎏金的裙摆掠过地砖的光色，竟如阳光下的浪花般晶莹剔透。 火烛银花下，人们再次看见了大海的光晕。 「她应下我的心愿，为我们歌唱世界早已遗失的海湾。」 君王的话语落下，乐池亮起，灯光与人影在她眼前荡成海的涟漪。 乐声乘着杯盏中摇曳的泡影，人海中，她发现自己的声音不再空有回响。 拉比努斯和塞涅卡的比斗是清脆的鼓点，维吉妮娅暗藏心意的诗句是律动的词。 缇里西庇俄丝笑了，于是乐曲有了轻灵的复调，阿格莱雅的舞步扬起，那是最优美动人的和音…… 「此战胜利之后，剑旗爵，你可有想要之物？」 那冷静的君主竟也有些微醺。 她饮下蜜酿，向君主私语，笑声飞翔在宴会的角落。 这里多么悦耳，多么光亮。 世界旋转着，酒杯相撞的声音，冰块滑动的声音。 久未开口的海妖，她的歌声仍如蜜酿泼洒—— 「♫宴席的烛火如此耀眼 一片新的大海 它摇荡在我们举杯碰撞间……♫」
E: "Hysilens, follow me. I will grant you everything you seek." The voice, loud and clear despite the small frame it came from, left a deep impression. But doubt lingered in her heart: "And when... will her light go out?" But this flame burned like sunlight piercing the deep sea, brighter and steadier with every passing moment. She watched the blue blaze fight battle after battle, always emerging victorious. She saw waves rise like wildfire, saw the Gladius roar through wind and sea, swallowing every storm of carnage like a whale shark. She heard the thundering heartbeat, the pounding drums of war, the footsteps like falling rain, the sorrow swelling like a tide. The pure, song-like voice of the heart flowed through the blood of the Chrysos Heir, stirring the long-sealed strings in her mind. The feast Imperator had promised was drawing near. Young weaver whispered to the children at their side, wondering aloud if the cold, distant Gladius would grace them with her presence. Amidst the crowd's exclamations, the weaver rose on her tiptoes, holding her breath to capture the moment in full. Her gown, gilded and flowing, brushed the tiles like sunlight glinting on waves. And under candlelight and silver lanterns, people saw again the shimmer of the sea. "She answered my wish and sang to us of the sea bays the world had long forgotten." When the monarch finished speaking, the orchestra lit up. Light and shadows danced before her eyes, rippling like waves. Music rose with the bubbles in their cups, and in the swell of the crowd, she found her voice was no longer echoing in vain. The duel between Labienus and Seneca struck like crisp drumbeats. Verginia's hidden meanings pulsed through her verses. Tribios laughed, and the music gained a playful countermelody. Aglaea leapt into motion, her dance steps weaving the perfect harmony... "After this battle is won, Dux Gladiorum, is there anything you desire?" Even the composed monarch seemed slightly tipsy. She took a sip of honey brew, whispering to the monarch, her laughter dancing in the corner of the banquet. How bright it was here. How lovely it sounded. The world spun on, with the clink of glasses, the soft rattle of ice. The long-silent siren sang again, her voice spilling like the honey brew... "♫ The candlelight burns so bright at this feast. A brand-new sea. It sways between the clinking of our cups... ♫"

C: 空间站的外部危机似乎得到了控制，如果还有没去过的地方，也可以趁这个机会再去瞧瞧。\n搞定这一切后，就去向艾丝妲汇报情况吧。
E: The space station's external crisis seems to be under control. If there are places you haven't been to yet, now's the chance to go and take a look.\nOnce everything has been taken care of, go and report to Asta.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——她建议你尝试一下「艾迪恩公园」的各类娱乐设施。你已经领取了足够多的代币，是时候大玩特玩了。\n当然，如果你玩腻了，也可以找到流萤，和她一起在附近休息会儿。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — She suggests you try out the various amusement facilities in Aideen Park. You have collected plenty of tokens, so it's time to play to your heart's content!\nOf course, if you get bored with the games, you can find Firefly and rest with her for a while.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 黑天鹅言出法随，你们果然来到了一处被严重扭曲的空间——但好在这里有一扇门。如果不出意外，这扇门就是空间的出口（但你的冒险旅程中常常伴随意外）。\n也许你应该立刻打开门离开这里，而不是继续在小小的房间里兜圈子。
E: It seems that Black Swan's premonition was entirely correct. You've arrived in a severely distorted space —fortunately, there is a door here. If everything goes as expected, this door should be the exit from this space (though your adventure has been constantly plagued by the unexpected).\nPerhaps you should open the door and leave this place immediately instead of continuing to run in circles in this tiny room.

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n但在那以前，你们首先要和三月七与姬子会合才行。事不宜迟，跟上小米沙的脚步吧。
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nBefore this, however, you need to regroup with March 7th and Himeko. There is no time to lose. Better hurry after Misha.

C:
我是未来圈外的影子 在回忆的光辉之外闪烁
不必恒久地记住我 让我在消亡前静默
就此化为你的血肉 抑或
在你的灵魂中诉说

我从无限延伸的螺旋阶梯 向着未来缓缓坠落
不必恒久地记住我 或试图将我寻获
你心中我的轮廓
必将与其他经验交错

我留下难以察觉的痕迹 在一个静夜中走过
不必恒久地记住我 或追念梦的魂魄
属于我的必将衰落
而你会超越它的孱弱
E:
I am a shadow outside the future, glimmering beyond the light of memory
No need to remember me forever, allow me tranquility before I die
I shall become your body, or
Speak within your soul

I fall from the infinite spiral staircase that stretches out, slowly falling towards the future
No need to remember me forever, or attempt to catch me
My silhouette in your heart
Is bound to crisscross with other experiences

I pass in the silent night, leaving traces impossible to see
No need to remember me forever, or recall the soul of this dream
All that is mine are found to fall
And you will overcome its weakness

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 名为遐蝶与万敌的黄金裔为我们扫清沿途阻碍，我们即将与白厄一同直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利，成就英雄之名。
E: The Chrysos Heirs named Castorice and Mydei cleared the obstacles in our path. Now, alongside Phainon, we will face Nikador, Lance of Fury, and become heroes.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……
E: {NICKNAME} and I became separated in this illusion. {NICKNAME} told me that {F#she}{M#he} travelled with Mydei and had seen the man's deepest fear, which was the blood-soaked glory of the Kremnos...

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 怎么会有这么欠揍的人？
E: How can someone be such a pain in the neck?

C:
《钟表惊魂夜》
一二，被音符锁住梦境。
三四，恶狼最爱吃哭泣，
五六，左轮转动到眉心。
七八，钟表正滴答作响，
九十，恶灵马上要来袭。
E: A Haunting of Clocks One, two — notes trap your dreamscape. Three, four — wolves hunger for the tears' taste; Five, six — the revolver clicks between your brows. Seven, eight — the ticking clock won't wait; Nine, ten — the spirits are coming to your face.

C: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
E: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

C: 为什么父亲要献祭自己的女儿？为什么女儿要杀死自己的母亲？为什么神明在折磨凡人？为什么飞鹰要将龟壳掷向诗人的脑袋？\n在数不胜数的酒神诗歌中，人们愤恨、哀叹、无奈，因为那悲剧的起因总是无情无形的，无法被斩首或施以绞刑。就像水手杀不死海。
E: Why would a father sacrifice his daughter? Why would a daughter slay her mother? Why do gods torment mortals? Why would an eagle cast a tortoise shell upon a poet's head?\nIn countless poems of the wine god, people rage, grieve, and despair. It was because the roots of these tragedies are elusive and impassive, beyond the reach of blade or noose. Just as sailors cannot slay the sea.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 如果德谬歌无力改变实验结果，如果机器头计算的答案是自身毁灭……不，没有这些如果。\n与「智识」接轨的条件已经齐备，并非觐见，而是加冕。求解宇宙的未来，锚定名为黑塔的「时刻」。\n朝闻道，夕死可矣。
E: If Demiurge is powerless to alter the experiment's results... if Droidhead's calculations point to THEIR own Destruction... No, there are no "ifs."\nThe conditions for linking with Erudition are complete. It's not an audience, but a coronation. I will decipher the universe's future and anchor Herta's "Instant."\nIf one could know the Truth at dawn, one can die at dusk without regret.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 西风吹拂之地，有无垠的麦浪和蔺草的芬芳。这里就是少女的故乡，旅途开启的地方。如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
E: Where the west wind blows, unending waves of wheat fields and the fragrance of rush grass stretch far and wide. This is the girl's homeland, where the journey began. If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 「黑塔」特许通行认证失败、三重权限扼守的神秘舱门、三张散落各处的残破权限卡……\n破碎的拼图一旦还原，背后的谜底即会揭晓。
E: The Space Station Special Permit's failure, the mysterious hatch controlled by three separate access permissions, and three broken access cards found in different places...\nOnce all the puzzle pieces are put together, the mystery behind them will be revealed.

C: 你履行承诺，抵达希拉记忆中的房间，取得了《希拉的人物剧本》与一封由科员古恩撰写的《告罪书》。\n《剧本》记录着希拉的日常言论，《告罪书》中则提到了一项神秘实验，两相联结，令人不寒而栗。
E: You fulfill your promise, arriving at the room from Sheila's memories and getting Sheila's character script and a confession letter written by the researcher Gunn.\nThe script records Sheila's day-to-day thoughts, while the confession mentions a mysterious experiment. Connecting the dots between the two sends a shiver down your spine.

C: 原来匿名群中制造谣言的「瓜田里猹」，真名就叫理查。一想到这个名字，你就忍不住笑出声来。\n在和理查的交涉中，他义正严词地向你讲述了自己的推论，并坚称自己要向黑塔女士举报艾丝妲。\n你认真看了他所谓的证据，意识到此事只是一场闹剧。_
E: The real name of Richard_Knowitall — the rumor maker in the anonymous group — is Richard. You couldn't help but laugh when you consider the fact that he used his real name in an anonymous chat group.\nRichard righteously recounts his deductions to you and insists that he is going to report Asta to Madam Herta.\nLooking through the "evidence" he presented, you conclude that this is only a farce.

C: 已收集到足够的信标数据了，赶紧将它们交调查人员吧。
E: You've collected enough data from the beacons. Hurry and hand them over to the investigators.

C: 你在空间站里发现了一颗颗奇怪的泡泡。当接近时，它会提示你「没有权限」。既然如此，你就去找一个理论上拥有最高权限的人问问，看它还有什么话说。
E: You saw many strange bubbles in the space station. They gave you a notification about "no clearance" when you approached them. In that case, you can go ask the person who theoretically has the highest clearance and see what she has to say.

C: 你收到了阿兰的短信，他似乎想为初遇时的出手相救向你做正式道谢。准备好了就去基座舱段看看吧。
E: You received Arlan's message. He seems to want to formally thank you for helping him when you first met. Get ready and go to Base Zone.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 无名客们在银河中留下不少好名声，但这趟旅程的第一站该从哪里出发呢？或许可以问问小机器人，毕竟这家伙自称装载了导航系统。
E: The good name of the Nameless has spread far and wide throughout the Cosmos, but where should be your first stop on this journey? Maybe you should ask the little robot? They claim to be equipped with a navigation system, after all.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n结局圆满。人人都有光明的未来。完美。\n帕姆注：算了…我还是去看姬子的日报帕……
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHappy end. Everyone has a bright future. Perfection.\nPom-Pom's Notes: Never mind... I'm gonna go read Himeko's daily report...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 「互助会」的喽啰认出了你的身份，他们拒绝向你出售所谓的「特效药」。\n这些家伙的态度不禁引起了你的疑心，也许他们并非什么正经的患者关怀组织。\n你决定还是先回去找娜塔莎聊聊，将情况向她汇报清楚。
E: The hooligans from the mutual aid society recognize you and refuse to sell you the so-called wonder medicine.\nTheir attitude is so suspicious that it makes you think they're not taking patient care seriously.\nYou decide to talk to Natasha first and report the matter.

C: 娜塔莎告诉你诊所一直收到匿名的爱心包裹的隐秘。尽管娜塔莎并不知道背后的好心人是谁，但你和她还是决定把这位匿名人士的爱心，传递到更多有需要的人手里。
E: Natasha tells you that the clinic keeps receiving anonymous care packages. She doesn't know who is doing this, but you two decide to spread their love and care to those in need.

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 丹枢请你给一位小女孩送药…但话里话外，她似乎又需要你做一些「送药」之外的事情。
E: Dan Shu wants you to deliver medicine to a little girl, but laced between her words seems to be another request other than the medicine delivery.

C: 丹枢似乎要送你一份谢礼，但她需要一些时间来准备。晚点再来找她吧，不如先去三余书肆看看书。那家书店对「只看不买」还是挺宽容的。
E: Dan Shu wants to give you something as a thank-you, but she needs some time to prepare. Come back later, and look around for some books at the Spare Time Book Shop. The book store seems to be quite lenient toward those who display no interest in purchasing anything.

C: 按照陶德在短信里所说的位置，你决定前往海边，看看这家伙到底在干什么。
E: Following the location Todd mentioned in the message, you decide to go to the coast to see what he is up to.

C: 夕葵向你展示了机巧鸟抓拍的路口影像，仅从这些影像上很难判断具体的肇事星槎。和檀檀再对一次证言，从中推理出真正的肇事星槎吧。
E: Xikui shows you footage from the cycranes, and it's difficult to tell which starskiff was at fault from these images alone. Go over the testimonials with Tantan once again, and deduce the true culprit.

C: 神策府的侍卫彦卿在此留下了他的示迹玉扣，记录着他追捕刃这一路上所遇的情况。也许当务之急是将它交还神策府，令其知情。
E: Seat of Divine Foresight's retainer, Yanqing, left his jade tracer here that details his experience hunting down Blade. It should be returned to the Seat of Divine Foresight immediately so they know.

C: 机兵都修好了，该回罗浮找那几位大善人了。希望他们不要太较真……
E: The automatons have been repaired. You should head back to the Luofu and find those Benevolent Ones. Hopefully they won't take things too seriously...

C: 谜题解开了，游戏却并未结束。「捕头」告诉黑天鹅，花火即将再次行凶，而黑天鹅一定赶不及去阻止她。你感受到这段梦境中闪过了一段短暂但剧烈的情绪波动，大概因为黑天鹅并不享受这种被人牵着鼻子走的感觉吧。
E: You have solved the puzzle, but the game is not over. The "constable" has told Black Swan that Sparkle is about to commit another murder, and Black Swan definitely would not have enough time to stop her. You feel a brief but intense surge of emotion flash across the Dreamscape, likely because Black Swan dislikes this feeling of being led on a wild goose chase by others.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 对于统领猎群的父狼而言，每次狩猎都要将「空手而回」的结果计算在内……
E: For the Father Wolf who leads the pack, the possibility of returning empty-handed must always be taken into consideration when planning each and every hunt...

C: 你进入了莱斯利•迪恩的心绪空间。\n找到构建出这个联觉梦境的人们，然后解放他们吧。
E: You have entered Lesley Dean's Emoscape.\nFind the creators of this Synesthesia Dreamscape and free them from their obsessions.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去吧。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness fragments of this genius' past.

C: 惠特克爵士可能知道这张照片相关的事，继续问问他吧。
E: Sir Whittaker might know something related to this photo. Keep asking him about it.

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n曜青仙舟的飞霄将军、椒丘医士，还有鸦羽怪人…嗯，影卫貊泽悉数到场。他们即将回到曜青仙舟，能在离开之前见上一面真好。\n别惦记着你的苏打豆汁儿了，三月。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nGeneral Feixiao, Jiaoqiu the healer, and the crow-feather weirdo... Ahem, I mean, the shadow guard Moze... they are all present and correct. They are about to return to the Xianzhou Yaoqing. Fortunately, you get a chance to see them one more time before they do.\nDon't even think about your mung bean soda, March!

C: 虽然纷争的泰坦已陨，但纷争的余波并不会因此彻底消弭——城门前的喧哗证明了这点，作为天外的英雄，你或许还要继续进行荡除纷争的纷争……
E: Though the Strife Titan has fallen, the repercussions of war have yet to fully disappear — the commotion outside the city gates makes this perfectly clear. As a hero from beyond the sky, perhaps you may wish to continue your battle to eradicate all strife...

C: 不可曲解，不可动摇，不可违抗，不可更改，因为这就是命运命运命运命运命运！
E: It cannot be warped, it cannot be shaken, it cannot be defied, it cannot be changed. Why? Because this is destiny, destiny, destiny, destiny.

C: 铁卫禁区的吉尔伯特似乎有些烦恼，去和他聊聊看吧。
E: Gilbert from the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone seems troubled. Go talk to him.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 你从未见过健谈的老歌德如此讳莫如深——尤其当他言语间不经意流露出与某神秘「会社」的联系时，这神秘的老人与他掩藏的秘密彻底点燃了你的好奇心。\n完成老歌德的委托，解明真相吧！
E: Old Goethe is usually very chatty, and you have never seen him speak so enigmatically before... Your curiosity is totally piqued by this mysterious old man and his secrets when he casually lets slip hints of his connection with a secret society.\nComplete his assignment and find the truth!

C: 鼹鼠党的捉迷藏游戏马上就要开始了。与正在等待同伴的小女孩聊聊，加入这场惊险刺激的游戏吧！
E: The Moles' game of hide-and-seek is about to start. Talk with the girl waiting for her friends and join this exciting and exhilarating game!

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 佩佩找到了「管家」的下落，你与它再次汇合，调查当前舱段的可疑之处……
E: Peppy has discovered the butler. You join forces again and start investigating the suspicious area...

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 操纵机巧鸟起飞吧。工作固然重要，但也请不要忽略了周围的美景。
E: Control the cycrane and take off. Your job is important, but you also shouldn't ignore life's beautiful moments around you.

C: 「人们做不到一起死去。即使同时亡故，他们也只是各自面对了自己的死亡。」\n——见证珀里法斯的朋友们被黑潮杀死的最后时刻。
E: "People cannot manage to die together. Even if they die at the same time, they are simply facing their own respective deaths."\n— Witness Periphas' friends' final moments as the black tide killed them.

C: 黎明云崖作为供奉、景仰刻法勒的圣地，有许多令人印象深刻的景观，带希瑞雅四处逛逛、参观参观吧。
E: As a holy site dedicated to honoring Kephale, Dawncloud features many remarkable views. Show Serena around the place.

C: 柯库翁提出可以用散落各处的盾牌先搭出街垒的雏形。四处看看，收集盾牌、搭建壁垒吧。
E: Glykon stated that you can use the scattered shields to create the shape of prototypical fortress. Look around, collect shields, and build a fortification.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 随着故事的推进，事情也变得越来越离谱。现在龙尊造像竟然让你…为新任龙尊接生？\n你开始觉得，这个故事和你的冒险传奇已经没什么关系了，但西衍先生却认为，这是为了商业化所必须的妥协。
E: As the story progresses, the plot gets more and more outrageous. Now, the Statue of the High Elder is even asking you to... act as a midwife for the next high elder?\nYou are starting to feel this story has nothing to do with your own adventures anymore, but Mr. Xiyan thinks this is the compromise necessary for commercial success.

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 藿藿在幻障中再次体验「被人抛下的孤独体验」，尽管她知道这是假的，却难以独自克服困境。\n想必是尾巴大爷的离开又进一步加深了藿藿的孤独感受。\n尾巴大爷必须做点什么，比如「将每个人都带回来」。
E: Within the illusion, Huohuo once more experienced "the loneliness of being abandoned." Despite knowing that it is merely an illusion, she struggles to overcome it on her own.\nSurely, Mr. Tail's departure has only intensified Huohuo's feelings of being alone.\nMr. Tail must do something, such as "bring everyone back."

C: 你决心将这只幻化为人的岁阳带走。
E: You decide to take away this heliobus metamorphed into human form.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 错乱的梦境空间中散落着（在辛格勒看来）家族犯事的证据。\n最后一次进入错乱的迷梦空间，打开空间里的战利品宝箱，收集并拼凑所有线索。
E: According to Singler, evidence of The Family's "crimes" is scattered throughout the chaotic space.\nEnter the space one final time and open the treasure chests in the area to collect and assemble all the clues.

C: 和司令约好了去寻找舒翁，先在「黄金的时刻」里找找线索吧。
E: Meet up with Mr. Bigwig to search for Siobhan. Start by searching for clues in the Golden Hour.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n小星星向你提出了问题，你的回答是……
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nStarlet has asked you a question. Your answer is...

C: 交差之前，看看都有哪些文件吧。
E: Let's see what files there are before turning them in.

C: 待得再久也不会有新东西出现的，先离开吧。
E: Nothing new will pop up even if you stay longer. Let's leave first.

C: 反入侵装置把办公室变成了迷宫，想找到那些文件，可不算容易。
E: The security system has turned this office into a maze. It won't be easy to find those files.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 按照爱德华医生提供的地址，你来到了那座「雕琢自原始梦境的城市」。但彼处并没有看起来像是「合作伙伴」的人，而只有一尊形态诡异的人偶。难道…这就是爱德华医生的「合作伙伴」？
E: According to the address given by Dr. Edward, you arrive at "the city chiseled from the Primordial Dreamscape." However, there is no one here that looks like a "collaborative partner." The only thing here is a bizarre puppet. Could this be... Dr. Edward's "partner"?

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与藿藿一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向藿藿寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Huohuo during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Huohuo for some advice.

C: 听说星槎海有一位叫做伦道夫的化外民在找你，你决定一探究竟。
E: Apparently there's an outworlder named Randolph who's looking for you at Starskiff Haven. You decide to check it out.

C: 见习医师伦道夫已经准备好了今日的离散忆质收容计划，去帮伦道夫拍摄目标所在的位置吧。
E: Trainee Healer Randolph has prepared the retrieval plan for the scattered memoria today. Help him film the location of the target.

C: 卡美丽很害怕波提欧，因为他是公司的通缉犯。\n你肯定不怕波提欧——你们甚至一起经历过不少事。\n卢卡不知道你们谁对波提欧的描述更准确，只在潜意识中留下了一个朴素的认知——和公司对着干的人，应该不会是坏人。
E: Carmella is very scared of Boothill as he is a criminal wanted by the IPC.\nYou're definitely not scared of Boothill — You've even gone through a lot together.\nLuka doesn't know which version of your descriptions of Boothill is more accurate. He only walks away with a simple understanding in his subconsciousness — Those who go against the IPC probably aren't bad guys.

C: 重压之下，卢卡决定出门透透气，但周围却尽是些灼人的视线和刺耳的低语……
E: Luka decides to go outside and get some fresh air under this intense stress, but the burning glances and sharp whispers from other people surround him...

C: 探查善逝的历史记录，感染了反有机方程的智械，也会有「情感」留存吗？
E: Review Sugata's historical records. Would an Intellitron infected with the Anti-Organic Equation still have "emotions" remaining within?

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」简单模式I
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Easy Mode I

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在「黄金的时刻」到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around the Golden Hour to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 你们越走越深，来到了一片颇为空旷的房间…\n扎格列斯信徒将偷窃视为圣事。若要解开这里的封印，必须先完成「扒手」的试炼才行。
E: As you enter deeper and deeper, you find yourself in an open and spacious room...\nDisciples of Zagreus regard theft as a holy sacrament. If you wish to undo the seal here, you will have to complete the trial of "pickpocketing."

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 两位半神莅临，你的浴宫实在是蓬荜生辉。\n但可以确定的是，她们绝不是来参观的…问问她们前来的缘由吧。
E: The two demigods arrive at your bath chamber, elevating your humble abode.\nHowever, you are sure that they aren't here for a house tour... Ask them the reason for their visitation.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 空间站的角落里，属于造物们的定向越野大赛正在悄然举行。艾丝妲给了你一些点心，可以拿来为你支持的小家伙呐喊助威。\n与主持赛事的盹盹咪互动，参与到赛事应援中去吧！
E: In a corner of the space station, the exciting great obstacle race for creations is secretly underway. Asta has given you some snacks that you can use to cheer for your favorite little ones.\nGo interact with Dozing Meow, who's hosting the event, and join in supporting the contestants!

C: 唯一能确信的是，「星核」的坠临会带来文明和生态的剧变，还会产生裂界一类的空间扭曲现象。
E: The only thing we can say for sure is that their arrival causes massive changes to civilizations and ecosystems. They also generate distortions in space such as Fragmentums.

C: 但我…不能放着他们不管。我只怕…是我的负累终于追了上来，把大家都牵扯其中……
E: I... I can't leave them down there. It's just... I'm afraid my burden has finally caught up with me, and that everyone is about to be drawn in...

C: 嗯…帕姆明白，许多话不能通过说出口的方式来表达。
E: Mm... Pom-Pom understands. Not everything needs to be put into words.

C: 早上好，姬子。
E: And a wonderful morning to you, Himeko.

C: （她似乎完全忘了是下去执行任务的。）
E: (I wonder if she even remembers we've got a job to do down there...)

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，停靠站点的介绍拿到了吗？期待吗？
E: Ahem... {NICKNAME}, did you receive the destination overview? Excited?

C: 谢谢你的耐心，姬子。
E: Thanks for your patience, Himeko.

C: 星轨稳定率，<unbreak>56%</unbreak>…<unbreak>57%</unbreak>…持续回升中！
E: Star rail stability keeps rising... <unbreak>56%</unbreak>, <unbreak>57%</unbreak>...

C: 不过，下次你可就没有理由了帕！
E: But don't forget next time!

C: 可惜。
E: What a pity.

C: 如果您需要帮助，可以前往基座舱段的星语厅。
E: If you need help, go to the Galaxy Room in the base zone.

C: ……总感觉这个说法不是很靠谱的样子。
E: ... Something about that notice feels really fishy.

C: 说明你成长了，三月。
E: You've grown, March.

C: 「人总是要死的，但不是现在」…多么有哲理的话语，没错，当你愈接近「死」时，愈会意识到当下才是「生」的时刻！
E: Life is but a path to death, but not today... How insightful. Yes, of course! The closer you approach death, the more you appreciate life.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着停云：「<unbreak>13</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Tingyun: "<unbreak>13</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着星期日：「<unbreak>36</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Sunday: "<unbreak>36</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 嗨～
E: Hello there~

C: 之后呢？
E: And after that?

C: 我在月台等你，{NICKNAME}。你还有事情想做，有人想见吧？不用着急。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'll be waiting for you on the platform. It's no hurry if you still have things to do or someone to see.

C: 我觉得你需要一个机会，去发现自己与其他人相比有哪些不同之处。大家都告诉你你是多么的独特，你体内有颗「星核」……
E: I think you need a chance. A chance to discover just how different you really are from everyone else. Everybody keeps telling you about how special you are, and how you have a Stellaron inside you...

C: 可以这么说，但劝你不要把这事挂在嘴上——引来不必要的关注可不好。
E: You're not wrong, but be careful about blurting things out loud — it could attract unwanted attention.

C: 是我，{NICKNAME}
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 命途行者的力量超越凡人，但仍很弱小；比起完全执掌命途的星神，就像在汪洋大海中的一滴水一样。偶尔，星神会将命途的力量直接赐给凡人，让他们成为「令使」。
E: Pathstriders possess extraordinary power, but are still insignificant compared to the Aeons, like a drop of water in a vast ocean. Sometimes, Aeons will bestow a mortal with their power, making them an "Emanator" of that Aeon.

C: 说实话，我不记得帕姆什么时候出现了…好像在我来到列车之前？不，好像之后才出现的…奇怪。
E: To be honest, I don't know when Pom-Pom appeared... I think it was before I came to the Express? No wait, maybe it was after...

C: 但是直觉警告他，要他快走，于是他搭上「悲悼伶人」的船，逃离了公司，几经辗转来到列车。这是他待得最久的地方。
E: So he boarded the ship of a troupe called the "Mourning Actors" and escaped the IPC. After a while he made his way to the Express, and he's stayed here longer than anywhere else.

C: 列车长帕姆的玩偶，它不穿衣服原来长这个样子。
E: A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. So that's what they look like without clothes.

C: 「筑城者」牢记历史，方能坚定己心；我知道在遥远的过去，在寒潮降临，在「军团」入侵之前，这个世界曾经无比繁荣……
E: The Architects remember the history well, else we should forget it. I know that in the distant past, before the Eternal Freeze descended or the Legion invaded, this world was once prosperous beyond measure...

C: 你们知道裂界和侵蚀，那听说过「星核」这种东西吗？
E: If you know about corrosion and the Fragmentum, then you must have heard of Stellarons, right?

C: （跑太远的话，卫兵肯定会起疑心…还是跟上杰帕德吧。）
E: (The guards will notice if we stray too far off... We should stick close to Gepard.)

C: 不可能的，只要星核还在活动，侵蚀就会不断扩大。
E: No. As long as the Stellaron is active, the corrosion will continue to spread.

C: 看，那座冰雕的外形真奇特呀！感觉跟这座城市莫名地搭调呢。
E: Wow, look at the carved ice! It feels perfect for this city, somehow.

C: 这个问题应该去问科研部的专家，虽然他们可能也没法给出准确的答案。
E: That's a question for the Scientific Research Division, though they may not be able to give you a definitive answer.

C: 这么关心她，你们是很要好的朋友吗？
E: You care about her, huh. You must have become close friends.

C: 那个…这到底是什么杂志？会场又是什么？
E: So... what kind of magazine is this? What is the venue?

C: 当然没有啦，嘿嘿。
E: Of course not, hehe.

C: 这事因我而起，你没必要做到这份上…我只是需要发泄一下……
E: This happened all because of me. You don't have to do that... I just need to blow off some steam...

C: 你真的打算去帮我找「钥匙」吗？太感谢了…不过记得不要勉强，生命安全第一！
E: Are you really going to help me find the key? Thank you so much! But I don't wanna pressure you into this. Safety should always be the number one priority!

C: 下一次会是怎样的呢？
E: What will the next adventure be like?

C: 早上好呀，{NICKNAME}！睡得怎么样？我现在可是精神满满！
E: Morning, {NICKNAME}! How did you sleep? I'm full of energy myself!

C: 唉…咱就不该相信业余摄影师……
E: *sigh* We shouldn't have trusted an amateur...

C: …哦？没想到啊，过去这么长时间，居然还有人记着我的名字呢？
E: ...Huh? I didn't think anyone would still remember my name after all this time.

C: ——谢谢你们教会了我这些，开拓者。
E: ...Thank you for teaching me this, Trailblazers.

C: 好久不见，歌德大哥！
E: Mr. Goethe! Long time no see!

C: 你看，我留在这儿也没什么事可做。无非就是继续待在「机械屋」，修修设备、练练琴…演出的氛围是不错，不过听众来来回回也就那么几个。
E: You see, there's not much left for me here except to carry on repairing equipment in the workshop... I like practicing the guitar, and performances are fun, but the crowds are pretty small.

C: 这是布洛妮娅大人的请求……
E: This is Lady Bronya's request...

C: 姐姐，你就去和布洛妮娅大人聊聊吧。这毕竟是她亲自发出的邀请……
E: You should go and talk to Lady Bronya, Serval. It was her personal invite, after all...

C: 嘿，别这么委屈巴巴的嘛。
E: Hehe, come on, it isn't that difficult.

C: 「为自己的选择负责，为贝洛伯格的人民负责」…这就是驱动朗道家每一个人不断向前的动力。
E: Mm — "take responsibility for your choices and the people of Belobog..." Every Landau is driven by that ethos.

C: 不管它们。
E: Leave them be.

C: 小小的加热器伫立着，以微弱的力量抵抗大自然的寒冷气流。
E: The little heater stands alone, resisting nature's biting winds with its faint power.

C: 不知过了多久，你总算完成了这项伟业：无数纸片摇身变成了一张皱皱巴巴的纸，上面写着某位市民寄给另一位市民的有违伦常不被世俗所接受的信件。
E: After who knows how long, you finally complete your great undertaking: Countless paper scraps have become a wrinkled piece of paper. It was a letter from one citizen to another, but the radical content runs counter to standard notions of human hierarchy.

C: 你在翻垃圾领域遇到了竞争对手。
E: Seems like you've got yourself a real competitor when it comes to rooting through trashcans.

C: 有很多孩子在那里一起玩哦。
E: Loads of kids take part.

C: 胡说八道，银鬃铁卫早就集体撤走了，怎么可能突然回来一个。
E: Don't be ridiculous. The Silvermane Guards have been gone for ages. Why would one suddenly appear out of the blue?

C: ——兄弟姐妹们！接下来这场，将是今天最精彩，最刺激，最震撼的对决！
E: ...Brothers and sisters! Are you ready for today's most spectacular, spine-tingling, earth-shattering contest!?

C: 我们去帮她吧。
E: Let's help her.

C: 我们要去的这片矿区保留得相对完整，环境还算干净。一群老家被裂界吞了的流浪者跑去那儿安了新家。其实这伙人嘛，大部分还算老实……
E: The one we're heading into is relatively unaffected. A bunch of vagrants made it their home after their old turf was consumed by the Fragmentum. Actually, most of them are pretty honest folks...

C: 快去救人！
E: Let's save them!

C: 不知道地下能不能撑到它被挖空的那天……
E: I doubt the underground will ever see it fully excavated...

C: 我的任务是「存护」下层区，少数样本的信任在计算中是多余的。
E: My mission is the protection of the Underworld. The trust of the minority sample is redundant to my calculations.

C: 哈哈，抓到你啦！
E: Haha, I caught you!

C: 「千面尤利安」，伪装高手……
E: Julian of a Thousand Faces, master of disguise...

C: …可恶，要是没搭话就好了！我「千面尤利安」浪得虚名，愧对老大！
E: ...Argh! But I'm Julian of a Thousand Faces! *sigh* Why did you have to talk to me! My reputation is ruined... What will the boss think!

C: 下层区的地理？
E: How about the Underworld geography?

C: 这世界比你想的要复杂。
E: The world is more complicated than you think.

C: …没打什么坏主意吧？
E: ...Up to no good, perhaps?

C: 希儿，别急啊，他们也许能帮上你的忙。
E: Easy, Seele, maybe they can help.

C: 但抛开个中背景或苦衷，罪行就是罪行。唉，面对这么复杂的情况，执法者到底该如何在公义和情理之间找到平衡……
E: Still, whatever their situation, a crime is a crime. *sigh* How is the law supposed to find a balance between justice and compassion in the face of such complexity...

C: 我不是让你们抢着分锅啦！
E: I didn't mean for you guys to start beating yourselves up over it!

C: 起码比戳鼻孔带劲儿……
E: It'll be better than poking people's nostrils at least...

C: 走吧！终于能回到上面去了，我都要等不及啦。
E: Let's go! I can't wait to finally get back above ground!

C: 娜塔莎呢？她不在吗？
E: Where's Natasha? Is she here?

C: 说说杰帕德•朗道。
E: Tell me about Gepard Landau.

C: 没有什么要问的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 送给你吧。
E: Have it for free.

C: 没问题，您要是有想法了随时和我说！
E: No problem, come back any time!

C: 如果您想继续比赛就请随时和我说，我来为您安排！
E: If you want to continue fighting, please let me know and I will arrange a match for you!

C: 不对，不是地震…
E: No, it couldn't have been an earthquake...

C: 喂喂喂——兄弟姐妹、大爷大妈、男孩女孩们，都赶紧过来！客运缆车重新开始营运咯！
E: Brothers, sisters, ladies, gentlemen, boys, and girls of all ages — gather round! The cable car passenger service is about to restart!

C: 还好意思说我藏着掖着，明明你自己也一点都不坦率嘛！
E: Who's building that wall now?

C: 好主意。
E: Great idea.

C: 买了，很好看，我一晚上就看完了。
E: Yup, it's great. I read the whole thing in one night.

C: 真棒！——但说实话，不知道你答对了没有。毕竟这里是地下，这个垃圾桶已经很久没见过上面的亲戚了。这样吧，问一个确定有答案的问题！
E: Nice answer! Honestly, it is uncertain if your answer is correct. This is the Underworld, after all. This trashcan has not seen its Overworld relatives in a long time. You know what, here comes a question with a definite answer!

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 将损失数据呈报给景元将军，再把太卜司的人找来。这么大的乱子，他们岂能置身事外……
E: Report the losses to General Jing Yuan and find someone from the Divination Commission. They can't just stand there watching while we deal with this mess...

C: 星核猎手也许更有深意…
E: Maybe the Stellaron Hunters have other motives...

C: 不妨顺水推舟，也帮点忙。
E: Let's move with the current and help out.

C: 君如以赤诚待我，「罗浮」理当报以赤诚。
E: The Luofu never fails to reward that which is given.

C: 说来，下次「六御」议政，你该履行举荐我继任将军的诺言了吧……
E: On that note, perhaps it's about time you finally nominate me as your successor when the Six Charioteers next convene...

C: 你是我最信任的人，有些事，我只有交给你才放心。彦卿，有个差事……
E: You are my most trusted aide, and there are some things that I would only assign to you. Speaking of which, Yanqing...

C: 你知道我们等了多久吗！
E: Do you even know how long we've been waiting!?

C: 和啦！
E: Victory!

C: 叨扰了，请随意。
E: Sorry to bother you.

C: 谁知道呢？
E: Who knows?

C: 不会。
E: Of course.

C: 无所谓。
E: I don't mind.

C: 罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
E: How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?

C: 我带了一位帮手，定能帮助各位。搜捕卡芙卡兹事体大，天舶司担不起让她走脱了的责任。所以我使了些面子，从工造司那儿借来一个追逃的宝贝。
E: Now, what's a hunt without a hound? Kafka is still at large, and the Sky-Faring Commission wants this problem to go away. I made a few calls and managed to procure this from the Artisanship Commission — perfect for hunting down suspects.

C: 它只叫了一声，哪来这么多话？
E: That's a lot of words for one bark, don't you think?

C: 你俩是特地来消遣咱们的吧？
E: Are you two professional time-wasters or something?

C: 卡芙卡若真在迴星港，多少会留下痕迹。我们散开找找。任何看起来可疑的物件都别放过。
E: If Kafka is hiding in Stargazer Navalia, she'll have left behind traces. Let's spread out and look for them — leave no stone unturned.

C: 可恶，我们这不是完全被牵着鼻子走了吗？
E: Ugh, why do I get the feeling we're not the ones doing the hunting?

C: 我以为你有何高论，不过是些追求力量再不做人的老套说辞。
E: Hmph... Forgive me for thinking you might have harbored some profound enlightment. Yours is the same old talk of those who seek power... and give up on their humanity.

C: …我不这么认为。幻胧钟情于精神与物质双方面的毁灭，由心灵的溃败导向肉体的消亡。
E: I don't believe so. Phantylia revels in watching a corrupted mind eating away its host from inside out, until the obliteration of both is achieved.

C: 这位驻守的云骑战士面色铁青。看到你们靠近，他点头致礼。
E: There is a ghastly paleness in the face of this resident Cloud Knight. As you approach him, he nods his head in salute.

C: 感谢各位报知，我这就派人去察看。
E: Thanks for your intel. I'll dispatch someone immediately.

C: 一位云骑站在俘虏旁边。你们说明自己的身份和将军的命令后，他不再阻拦你的接近。
E: A Cloud Knight is standing next to the captive. He steps aside after you explain your identity and show him the general's order.

C: 住口吧，胡言妄语的鼠辈。云骑军用不了多久就会把你们连根拔起。
E: Shut it, rambling rodent. The Cloud Knights will root all of you out soon.

C: 好…好极了。本座这就率军前来汇合。
E: E—Excellent. I'll lead my troops to the rendezvous.

C: 只是一点准备工作，好迎接大人物的大驾光临——总不能让堂堂罗浮将军，看我家阿刃和你们两个的笑话呀。
E: I'm just clearing the stage for the grand entrance — can't have you three misbehaving in front of the Luofu's hotshot general.

C: 啊…是吗？抱歉。
E: Ah... is that so? Apologies.

C: 那么谨记，这一代不允许重蹈前代龙尊的覆辙。
E: Keep in mind, this generation cannot afford to repeat the failure of the previous high elder.

C: 很遗憾，「毁灭」的令使是不会轻易被毁灭的，不过……
E: It takes more than that to destroy an Emanator of Destruction. Still...

C: 诸位，尽力剿灭这些幻花，由我来击破她的肉身。
E: All of you — focus on destroying the phantom flowers — I'll go for the body.

C: 已知的信息虽然足够，逻辑也算得合理，但仍有一些细枝末节的碎处。
E: That we may, but as logical as things might seem, there are still many details about which we're uncertain.

C: …那就别说了？
E: ...Or you could just cut yourself off?

C: 唔，说起来，除了印鉴之外，这刀和弓…怎么看都不像是停云小姐会有的东西，她给我的感觉可一直都是被珠宝包围的精致丽人。
E: Huh, besides the seal, the knife, and the bow... None of this seems like something Miss Tingyun would've kept. I thought she was more about jewelry and beauty.

C: 等列车长准备完毕，咱们就可以出发前往下一站了。
E: When the conductor is ready, we can set off for the next stop.

C: 等列车长准备完毕，咱们就可以出发前往下一站了。
E: When the conductor is ready, we can set off for the next stop.

C: 这真是，余音袅袅虽不停～曲终人散终有时啊～
E: The lingering sound of bygone music plays, though groweth fainter with the parting ways.

C: 那咱们「罗浮三少」还……
E: Then as the Luofu Trio, we...

C: 根据乘员名册，当年下车的三位乘客分别叫铁尔南、拉格沃克和拉扎莉娜，曾是列车的护卫、机修工和测绘师。除此之外就没有别的信息了。
E: According to the passenger list, the three people who got off were Tiernan, Legwork, and Razalina — the Express's guard, mechanic, and surveyor, respectively. No supplementary details are available.

C: 收拾好行李，随时可以下车帕。记得去后面找三月乘客，她在等你一起出发。
E: ...Gear up and make sure you've got everything! And before you step out, swing by the back and grab March, she's waiting for you there.

C: 「盛会之星」匹诺康尼，全宇宙最大最豪华的游乐场，我们来咯！
E: Penacony, the Planet of Festivities, the universe's biggest and fanciest amusement park awaits!

C: 我们快到了。还走得动么？
E: We're almost there. Can you still walk?

C: 这匹诺康尼可是货真价实的梦想之地，全银河有多少人愿意花上半辈子时间，就为拿到一张白日梦酒店的入场券？
E: Penacony's a true-blue land of dreams. How many across the stars would spend half their lives, just to acquire an admission ticket into The Reverie?

C: 我为我的失礼道歉，拿去吧，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点——一点见面礼，算是我的补偿。
E: My apologies for any perceived slight. To show my sincerity, I offer you <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits as a gesture of goodwill.

C: 你一点都不了解朋友是什么。
E: You have no idea what friends are.

C: 没什么了，谢谢你。
E: I've nothing else to ask, thank you.

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: 不了，太贵了。
E: No way. It's too expensive.

C: 哦，原来如此……
E: Oh, I see...

C: 你的名字叫作「哈努兄弟」，耿直而沉默，是匹诺康尼最负盛名的长篇动画《钟表小子》里非常爱惜自己帽子的狼人老大哥，也是猎犬家系的吉祥物。
E: Your name is Hanu, a candid and taciturn figure — a lover of your hat and leader of the werewolves from Penacony's famous, long-form cartoon, Clockie. You're also the mascot of the Bloodhound Family.

C: 天哪，别盯着我珍贵的财宝了，也别看向它左边的管道！好吗？
E: Oh, just peel your eyes away from my treasures already. Also, don't look at the pipes on the left, alright?

C: 意犹未尽的梦……
E: A dream I wished I could have continued after waking up...

C: 哦，嗨，各位！请原谅我的冒昧，欢迎来到梦想之地匹诺康尼！
E: Hello, everyone! Please allow me to welcome all of you to Penacony, Land of the Dreams!

C: 呜呜…这不是您的错，我只是…突然想起了我母星的老妈……
E: *sob*... It isn't your fault. I just suddenly... thought about my mother on my home planet...

C: 多美啊…时光永远停驻在这黄金的时刻，一场金色的梦。酒馆的愚者和忆庭的忆者，流浪的游侠和公司的使节，星穹列车的无名客…和我。
E: How beautiful... Time is frozen at this golden hour, this golden dream shared by the Fool from the Tavern and the Memokeeper from the Garden of Recollection, the wandering Ranger and the IPC ambassador, the Astral Express Nameless... and me.

C: 果然瞒不住你呀。
E: I knew I couldn't hide it from you.

C: 气氛突然变得好沉重，抱歉，不该这样的…让我想想，怎么活跃气氛比较好？
E: I'm sorry things are getting all bleak and serious... Let me see what I can do to lighten the mood.

C: 到了到了——就是这里！
E: Here we are. This is the place.

C: 求你了…不要离开…
E: Please... don't go...

C: 朋友，现在让我们打开天窗说亮话吧，这个名叫「黄泉」的女人远没有你想象的那么简单，什么巡海游侠……
E: My friend, let's be honest. That woman named "Acheron" isn't as simple as you thought. Did she say she's a Galaxy Ranger?

C: 哥哥，我回来了。
E: Brother, I'm back.

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}，你怎么会落入那种地方…发生了什么？
E: So, {NICKNAME}, how did you end up there... and what the heck happened?

C: 你敲了敲门。她没有回应。
E: You knock, but there's no response...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>我的意思是，没问题。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I mean, no problem.</color>

C: 这只怪物的残骸表面切口窄而深，周围明显有剧烈灼烧形成的焦黑痕迹。几点星火在其中飞舞跃动，像是逐{RUBY_B#「虚无」的星神}Ⅸ{RUBY_E#}而去的破碎恒星。
E: The remains of this creature bears narrow and deep incisions, with evident traces of charring inflicted by intense burning. A few sparks dance and flicker within, resembling shattered stars departing towards {RUBY_B#Aeon of Nihility}IX{RUBY_E#}.

C: （看来这只怪物死于某种热能武器……）
E: (Looks like this monster was slain by a thermic weapon...)

C: 是。准确地说——在正下方。
E: Yes. More precisely, it's right below.

C: …不，应该说，隐瞒了全部的事。
E: ...No, in fact, I should say, she's hiding everything from us.

C: （去见砂金吧，或者…我还是可以选择拒绝……）
E: (Go and meet Aventurine, or... I could still choose not to help...)

C: 这实在…让人难以接受。
E: This really is... hard to take in.

C: 我也是很注重人情世故的…就把它当作我对你有所隐瞒的赔礼吧。
E: I also pay great attention to the ways of the world... Just think of this as an apology from me for hiding something from you.

C: 即便答案…可能是你自身的毁灭？
E: Even if the answer... turns out to be your own destruction?
You...

C: …就像你的外在一样，黄泉小姐。
E: ...An aesthetic you share, Miss Acheron.

C: 果然，这边只有个<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>的底座，空空如也。
E: Great. There's another <color=#dbc291ff>pinball machine</color> base here, and it's empty too.

C: 三枚「筹码」足矣。
E: Three chips are enough.

C: 但您也知道他是个疯狂的赌徒。愈是声势张扬，愈要细心提防。
E: But you know that he's a crazed gambler. The more vocal he is about it, the more cautious I must be.

C: 也只有带着「邀请函」的砂金被允许参加盛会，我们这些随行人员…连入梦资格都没有，只能在现实酒店停留。
E: Only Aventurine, who carries an invitation is allowed to attend the banquet. An entourage like us... We can only sit around in the reality Hotel, unauthorized to even enter dreams.

C: 请回吧，各位，我们真没必要这样为难彼此，对吧？
E: Everyone, please leave. There's really no need for us to make things difficult for each other, right?

C: 你们想聊案子？可以，跟我来吧，这地不适合说话，咱们挪个窝。
E: You want to discuss the case? Sure, come with me. This is not a good place to talk. Let's go elsewhere.

C: 你就是一枚筹码，被别人捏在手里丢出去的命，要么就帮主人带着更多筹码回来，要么…就再也别回来。
E: You're just a chip, a life thrown away in someone else's hands. Either you come back with more chips for your master, or... you never come back.

C: 也许我早疯了，谁知道呢？
E: Well, maybe I am. Who knows?

C: 说不定还没过期。
E: Maybe it hasn't expired yet.

C: ——敬金色的美梦。
E: ...To golden dreams.

C: 米哈伊尔老了，不能再保护他的孩子。我们离开家族，自寻出路，就成了「同谐」的叛徒…尽管真正的背叛者另有其人。
E: Mikhail was too old to protect his children anymore, so we left The Family to find our own path. We were branded traitors of the Harmony, even though the true traitors were someone else.

C: 治安官与无人问津的酒吧…有意思。
E: A security officer and a derelict lounge... Interesting.

C: 厉害啊，难怪酒馆会给你发邀请。你天生就是个好演员…不光擅长骗别人，更擅长骗自己。
E: It's a heck of an act. No wonder the tavern sent you an invite. You're a natural, kid. You don't stop at fooling the audience — you fool yourself too.

C: 死路…走错了么？
E: A dead end... Is this the wrong way?

C: 这是…什么地方？
E: What... is this place?

C: 这只代表一种结果……
E: This only represents one outcome...

C: 无赖、混混、酒鬼、流氓…这些垃圾话我可听过太多，但我真没想到，自己有朝一日还能被当作杀人魔的共犯。
E: Scoundrel, punk, drunk, hooligan... I've heard this trash talk all too often. But I have never once thought that I'd be treated as an accomplice to a murderer!

C: 哈？这是——他宝贝的，结盟玉兆？！仙舟真把这东西给你们了？！
E: Hah? It's a... muddle-fudger... the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath!? The Xianzhou really gave this to you guys!?

C: 我猜你是想问什么共同的「信念」吧？但巡海游侠用不着那种东西，我们聚在一起，靠的是共同的「底线」。
E: I'm guessing you're gonna ask about some form of shared faith, right? But us Galaxy Rangers don't need that sort of thing. What brings us together is a shared bottom line.

C: 即便是最纯粹的「巡猎」也有灯光下的仙舟联盟和阴影中的巡海游侠。命途终究是由人创造的概念，一定存在超出你我认知的外界。
E: Even in the purest Hunt, you'll find the Xianzhou Alliance under the spotlight and Galaxy Rangers lurking in the shadows. Paths are inevitably concepts created by people, and exist in planes beyond our understanding.

C: 可否帮我保守这个秘密呢？因为这片如梦似幻的筹码雨…原定是要在我的演出上使用的。
E: Can you help me keep this secret? The raining chips... were supposed to be part of my act.

C: 但还是帮人帮到底吧，没办法，谁叫我是出了名的乐•善•好•施呢？
E: Still, I suppose I should keep on helping everyone, I am the epitome of "joy, kindness, and goodness," after all.

C: 还记得我和你说过的「医疗舱」么？那就是「萨姆」——苍穹战线的格拉默铁骑，火萤IV型{RUBY_B#S.A.M.}战略强袭装甲{RUBY_E#}。
E: Do you still remember the medical cabin I told you about? Well, that's Sam — It belongs to the Iron Cavalry of Glamoth's Firmament Frontline, a Fyrefly Type-IV {RUBY_B#S.A.M.}Strategic Assault Mech{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你好，米沙，我叫瓦尔特，我们在入梦时见过……
E: Hello, Misha. I'm Welt, we met in a dream...

C: 嗯？瓦尔特先生，您是在和我说话么？
E: Hmm? Were you talking to me, Mr. Yang?

C: 哦！哦，好…其实，我是偷渡来匹诺康尼的。为了买到船票，我把家里能卖的全都卖了，房子，土地…还有，两个孩子……
E: Oh! Oh, great... you know, I... I arrived in Penacony as a stowaway. I sold everything to get a ticket... my house, my land... and... my two children...

C: 还有呢？战友全走了，故乡也在几场中子辐射轰炸里融化了。哼，全没了，实在是活不下去啊…但听说这地头还有人有法子，我就过来了。
E: And then? All my comrades died, and my hometown was wiped out by neutron bombardments. I couldn't bear to live with everything I knew gone... That's when I heard about a possible solution here, so I came.

C: ——活在梦里的人们，真的能够远离痛苦，收获真正的幸福吗？
E: ...Do you really believe those living in dreams can escape pain and find true happiness?

C: 呵…我倒是从未想过，这位无名客会直接将矛头指向本人，着实令人瞠目结舌。
E: Heh... I would've never thought that this Nameless would point the spear at me, quite astonishing indeed.

C: 「完美调和」…问题正在于此。在暗中潜移默化改变「同谐」的并非外敌，而是自这曲乐章中暗自诞生的…不协和音。
E: "Perfectly harmonize"... Therein lies the problem. It isn't an outsider lurking in the shadows who changed the Harmony, but a dissonance that has surreptitiously emerged from within this very symphony itself.

C: 别轻举妄动。兄弟，打劫过公司么？要是撒腿就跑，你会立马成为整条街上最亮眼的崽。
E: Not so fast. Have you ever robbed the IPC, bro? If you run away now, everyone will be chasing after you.

C: 咱兄弟俩在这儿干瞪眼大半天，一没水喝二没饭吃，宝了个贝的，家族就是这么招待人的？
E: We've been waitin' here forever, without any food or water! What the fork, man? Is this how The Family treats its guests?

C: 不过，别嫌我说话不好听，有斗志是好事，但米哈伊尔留给你们的路可不好走……
E: But, pardon me if I sound curt — it's good to have determination, but the path Mikhail left for you is not an easy one to tread...

C: 请走上舞台，用你真挚的表演打动评委！匹诺康尼下一位银河之星——就是你！
E: Step onto the stage and move the judges with your heartfelt performance! The next Cosmic Star of Penacony — could be you!

C: 你扑腾一声跪倒在地，向你的商界对手哐哐磕大头。人能平安活一世，无非就靠四个大字——「好汉饶命」！
E: You drop to your knees with a resounding thud and start to repeatedly bash your head hard against the floor, kowtowing enthusiastically to your business rival. The key to a peaceful life lies in these five powerful words — "Show me mercy, pretty please!"

C: 二位选手，现在由我来为您介绍这一关的规则。
E: Competitors, allow me to introduce the rules of this challenge to you.

C: 这红发选手…到底是谁呀？
E: That red-haired contestant... Who is that exactly?

C: 「天哪，我第一次看见你蹲下。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Gosh, this is the first time I've ever seen you crouch down." You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 据说，这些卡通人物的灵感都源于「钟表匠」的亲身经历。据钟表小子学家考证，现实中的哈努兄弟原型曾与「钟表匠」有着深厚的友谊，可谓是战友一般的存在。
E: It is said that these cartoon characters were inspired by the Watchmaker's own experiences. According to research by Clockie scholars, the original Hanu of reality shared a deep friendship with the Watchmaker, akin to comrades-in-arms.

C: 储藏室…就在置物架后边吧？
E: The storage room... It's behind the shelves, right?

C: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
E: <size=36>CUT!</size>

C: 难以置信，匹诺康尼竟然存在着…「秩序」的残党。
E: Unbelievable, to think that there would be... remnants of the Order on Penacony.

C: 我在窗前看了它很久，大概三天左右吧。在那漫长的三天里，小谐乐鸽一次又一次地试图展开翅膀，飞向天空，又落向地面…周而复始。
E: I watched it for a long while by the window, probably about three or so days. In those three long days, the little Charmony Dove tried again and again to spread its wings to fly into the sky, but fell to the ground... only to keep trying.

C: 「那颗星球爆发了战争。正因如此，知更鸟才会将那里选作目的地…为了传扬『同谐』，挽救星球上的生命，她亲自奔赴前线了。」
E: "A war has broken out on that planet. It is because of this very reason that Robin chose this destination... To spread the word of the Harmony, and to save the lives of that planet, she personally made for the frontlines."

C: 无需再承受现实之苦，唯有如此，人类才能以最高洁的姿态面对命中注定的结局，度过充满尊严的一生。这就是「幸福地活着」。
E: There would be no need to bear the hardships of reality. Only in this way can humanity face the inevitable end with the purest of spirit. Living a life of dignity — this is what it is to live in bliss.

C: 记得呀，不就是边上这位？可是在流梦礁，咱们不是都见着它了，杨叔也和它打过招呼呢。
E: Yeah, the little guy here, right? But we all saw him in Dreamflux Reef, right? And Mr. Yang even greeted him.

C: 米沙？你怎么了，今天的你好奇怪！如果不开心，我们可以像平时那样——施展「钟表把戏」！
E: Misha? You're acting weird today! If you're feeling down, we can just do what we usually do... with the clockwork!

C: 无论那是镇静的、欢欣的、愤怒的、还是悲伤的，他们需要的只是一道小小的推力，然后就能迈开步伐，走向属于自己的前方。
E: Whether it's calming, happy, angry, or sad, all they need is a little nudge to take that step toward where they truly belong.

C: 就算没有我，你也知道该如何向前了。勇敢的米沙船长，「罗盘号」在等着你呢，你不是一直都想成为比我更厉害的冒险家吗？
E: Even without me, you know how to proceed forward, brave Captain Misha. The "Compass" is waiting for you. Haven't you always wanted to be a better adventurer than me?

C: 回答我的问题，你想干嘛？
E: Answer my question. What are you up to?

C: 是啊，在每一个夜晚，我们都会登上「罗盘号」，一起扬帆起航！
E: Yeah, every night we boarded the Compass and set sail together!

C: 嗯。
E: Mhmm.

C: 然后米哈伊尔把自己的怀表给了我。那是他的宝物，出现在每一个扬帆远航的故事里。他说往后的日子不好走，但怀表的指针会为我指明方向。
E: Then he gave his pocket watch to me. It was his cherished treasure, appearing in every one of his adventure tales. He explained that difficult times were ahead but assured me that the watch would guide me.

C: 那味道算不上甜美，却令人记忆犹新。每当我回首时，总会发现串联起来时路的…不是刻骨铭心的起承转合，而是这么一个个难忘的瞬间。
E: The flavor wasn't exactly sweet, but it left a lasting impression. When I think back on my past, I realize that what's tying everything together... isn't the big events, but rather these small yet unforgettable moments.

C: 我想清楚了。我的伙伴们…也是一辈子只能拥有一次的。
E: I have considered it thoroughly. My companions are... They're also once-in-a-lifetime treasures.

C: 这是什么话，先生？
E: What do you mean, Master?

C: 「囚笼被粉碎了！狱卒被驱逐了！可我们…又该去哪里？」
E: "We've shattered the cages and expelled the guards! But... where shall we go?"

C: 「若主人不再归来，我便是自由的。但若没有主人的指引，我又该为谁歌唱？」
E: "In the absence of my master I am free, but without their guidance, for whom shall I sing?"

C: 因为我等都无法容忍——「不协和音」！
E: Because neither side could tolerate... discord.

C: 那砂金岂不是白挨了一刀？
E: Doesn't that mean Aventurine took a hit for nothing?

C: 哈哈，要是这样能为全宇宙带来和平，那也算值了。
E: Haha, if that's what it takes to bring peace to the entire universe, it's a price I'll gladly pay.

C: 什么叫碎碎念，我这叫祈祷！
E: Mumbling!? I'm praying!

C: 婴儿在诞生，恒星在熄灭。银轨在铺展。星穹列车的故事既告一段落，也重新开始。
E: Babies are born as stars extinguish. The silver rail unfolds. The story of the Astral Express comes to a close, yet it also embarks anew.

C: 我从「死亡」手中救下二位，可流萤小姐却没能返回现实。她察觉到真相，想要邀你入局，却促成了一起意外的「死亡」。而更可怕的是，你很快便撞上了另一起命案。
E: There, I rescued both of you from "Death," but Firefly didn't return to reality. She realized the truth and tried to involve you in her plan, but that resulted in an accidental "death." Even more unsettling, you soon encountered another "murder."

C: 在酒店与米沙初次相遇…
E: My first encounter with Misha at the hotel...

C: 他身为梦泡中的记忆，却因为心怀「开拓」之志离开了梦泡，竟然还在匹诺康尼开展了一段大冒险……
E: He is only a segment of memory in a dream bubble, but his ambition for the Trailblaze led him to leave the bubble and embark on a grand adventure in Penacony...

C: 花火
E: Sparkle

C: 而这片宇宙…也会记得它。
E: And this universe... will remember it as well.

C: 你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
E: The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.

C: 苜蓿草家系会公开美梦乐园的财报，让全宇宙看到：哪怕经历了劫难，匹诺康尼仍然充满了潜力和机遇，家族依然对未来信心满满。
E: The Alfalfa Family will publicize the financial results of Sweetdream Paradise, so that the entire universe can see that despite the catastrophe, Penacony still holds immense potential and opportunities, and that The Family remains confident in its future.

C: 很高兴能再见到各位。但重逢过后，也许就是道别了。
E: It's good to see you all again, although we might be saying goodbye again after this reunion.

C: 开始之前，要不要先去跟你的同伴们聊聊？我们有的是时间。
E: Before we start, would you like to talk to your friends? We have plenty of time.

C: 砂金所做的一切，最终成功让公司获得了上桌的权利。一位职级更高的使节也因此来到匹诺康尼，与家族展开交锋。
E: Aventurine's efforts finally earned the IPC a seat at the table. As a result, a more senior representative arrived in Penacony and initiated negotiations with The Family.

C: 好了，到此为止。你们还要去谈正事，别让氛围继续变得悲伤了。
E: Alright, enough with the heavy stuff. You guys have important things to take care of, so let's not dwell on things.

C: 呵，的确。要不是砂金拉我入局，我怎么也不会来这里的。
E: That's true. I wouldn't be here if it weren't for Aventurine.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，这么快就商量出对策了，翡翠女士？唔…托帕女士去哪了？
E: Ohohoho, figured out something already, Miss Jade? Hmm... but where is Miss Topaz?

C: 不要忘了，奥帝先生，公司掌握着星际间体量最大的宣传平台。全宇宙的新闻网络，有超过一半都是我们的喉舌。
E: Mr. Alfalfa, let's not forget that the IPC controls the biggest interstellar publicity platform. More than half the news networks in the universe take their orders from us.

C: 好，走吧！
E: Yeah, let's go!

C: 就像石心十人追随「钻石」，你们应当也有一位领袖。我好奇他是怎样的人，也好奇每一位星核猎手是否都像你一样……
E: Just as the Ten Stonehearts follow Diamond, you follow your own leader. I wonder what they are like, and if all Stellaron Hunters are like you...

C: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
E: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！两位聪明又美貌的女士，欢迎登上我的「晖长石号」！
E: Ohohohoho! Welcome aboard my ship, the Radiant Feldspar, smart and charming ladies!

C: 从这种视角出发，砂金不是什么好学生，但也绝不是块榆木疙瘩。可惜，他内心的空洞永远无法用天赋和知识填满…但愿他不会沦为哲学僵尸吧。
E: From this perspective, Aventurine isn't what you'd call an ideal student, yet he's also not utterly obtuse. Alas, the void within him can never be filled by talent and knowledge. Let's hope he doesn't turn into a philosophical zombie.

C: 我二呢？
E: Where's two?

C: 不过，看在你这么努力的份上，我就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里，有的只有我精心布置的恶作剧——时间不多了，快去找到真正的炸弹吧～
E: But, seeing as you've put in so much effort, I'll throw you a bone: The bomb's not here. This is only a prank I've craftily set up. Hurry, time's running out. You'd better find that real bomb quickly!

C: 美梦剧团。
E: Sweet Dreams Troupe.

C: 正在为您播放《不抛弃，不放弃》，来自艾普瑟隆Ⅻ星系流行巨星艾斯•里克利……
E: Now playing Never Give Up, Never Surrender by the trending superstar Ast Rickley from the Epsilon XII System...

C: 不是，但那又如何？我依旧危险又癫狂。以防你不信，给你表演一下：宝了个贝的！
E: I'm not, but so what? I'm still crazy and dangerous. In case you don't believe me, allow me to show you: Go fudge yourself, you muddle-fudger!

C: 你让我想起一位故人。
E: You remind me of an old acquaintance.

C: 我现在只想拆炸弹过剧情。
E: Right now, I just want to defuse the bomb and advance the plot.

C: 黄泉逃离家族围捕的动作戏呢？
E: What about the action scene where Acheron had to escape The Family?

C: 别担心，我相信这身{RUBY_B#S.A.M.}火萤装甲{RUBY_E#}足够在倒计时结束前送我到该去的地方…甚至有机会平安返回。
E: Don't worry. I believe that this {RUBY_B#S.A.M.}Fyrefly Armor{RUBY_E#} will be enough to take me to where I need to go before the countdown ends... and maybe even make it back safely.

C: 这么说来，我甚至都没能做个正式的自我介绍……
E: Come to think of it, I didn't even get a chance to formally introduce myself...

C: 开拓连阿基维利都没去过的世界…这真的能做到吗？
E: Trailblazing to a world that even Akivili has never been to... Is that possible?

C: 星什么车？别给我推销，我就这点儿工资，买不起车！
E: The what Express now? Don't try to sell me anything. My miserable pay can't afford to buy an Express of any sorts!

C: 嗨！新同学们！你们好啊！
E: Hello, new students! How are you?

C: 这场戏决定了学生们的未来，可贵校竟然采用这种无聊的摄制方案，难怪鸢尾花几百年来都没拍出过一部好片。
E: This scene will determine the students' very futures, yet your academy would have me produce such slop? It's no wonder the Iris Family hasn't produced a good film in centuries.

C: 哎呀，丹恒，没想到你心里也有一场明星梦。
E: Oh my, I didn't know you had dreams of stardom, Dan Heng.

C: 好像在群里看到过这个名字…
E: I think I've seen your name in the group chat.

C: 大声点，听不见！
E: Sorry, come again?

C: 啊…真是美味的甜品，感觉浑身都放松下来了……
E: Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. I can feel my whole body relaxing...

C: 唉算了，再去别的摊位看看吧。
E: Forget it. Let's visit the other booths.

C: 七杯？
E: Seven drinks?

C: 睡蕉社…不等那忍者姐们了，我自个儿去探探路。
E: The Slumbernana Association... I ain't waiting for that ninja gal. I'll find my own way.

C: 这可没法给你行方便啊。
E: You're not making things easy here.

C: 像刚才那姐们一样？进这道门还要对暗号？
E: Like that gal from just now? Gotta give a passphrase just to get through this door?

C: …波提欧先生，继续结伴恐怕不是最好的选择。
E: ...I'm afraid it won't be wise for us to continue our investigations together, Mr. Boothill.

C: 怎么说？
E: What do you mean?

C: 但向您求助也就意味着，最坏的情况下，流梦礁和家族的界线将不复存在。这里之后会变得如何…我需要一个承诺。
E: But if we were to ask for your help, we have to be prepared for the worst-case scenario where the boundary between Dreamflux Reef and The Family will no longer exist. I... will need your promise regarding the future of this place.

C: 哎，我还没说完呢！
E: Hey, I'm not done yet!

C: 他们中有很多人不信任我，更不信任谐乐的力量。但…他们愿意相信米凯先生。
E: Most of them are unwilling to trust me, much less the power of Charmony. But... they chose to put their faith in Mr. Micah.

C: 所有人都认为，在经历了那种剧变之后，我的生活理应产生变化。
E: Everyone expected my life to change after going through something huge like that.

C: 这面洁白的墙壁即将被你改变，染上属于你的颜色。一想到这里，你紧握筑梦颜料的小手就开始兴奋地颤抖。
E: This pristine wall is about to change, taking on your colors. Just thinking about it makes your tiny hand, clutching the dream paint, tremble with excitement.

C: 蕉？已经画好了吗？时间也差不多了，让我们开始点评吧——
E: Bana? Completed already? Well, it's just in time. Let's assess your work—

C: 助蕉们，跟我上！给这群差生好好上一课蕉！
E: Give it to them, Assistananas! Show those unruly students what it means to be disciplined, bana!

C: 为什么叫「能人」？
E: What's with Denisovan?

C: 我当然知道，你想赚钱、赚很多钱。毕竟折纸大学的学费是笔天文数字，对普通中产家庭还是太过高昂了蕉。
E: I get it. You're aiming to make a lot of money. After all, the sky-high tuition fees at Paperfold University can really take a toll on the average middle-class family.
...Bana?

C: 对、对不起蕉，我重来一遍——蕉，蕉蕉……
E: S—Sorry, bana... I'll try again... B—Bana, bana...

C: 这番气势…银枪•修罗殿下的言语未被封印时，也当如阁下一般勇猛吧。
E: This assertive aggression... Silvergun Shura's words, before they were sealed, must have been just as fierce as yours.

C: 我还以为这堂课能拖得再久一些。
E: I had thought this class would last a little longer than this.

C: 就像金黄睡蕉一样，一成不变、一触即溃、最后一无是处。
E: Following the exact path of the golden Slumbernana, stubbornly holding onto the status quo, creating fatal vulnerabilities for themselves, and ultimately becoming useless.

C: 这不对啊。我费尽心力帮各位混入学校，妨碍家族监视，又解决了你们最头疼的游侠，现在你还要我交出演员的所有权？
E: But that's not our deal! I went to great lengths to help you infiltrate the school, disrupted The Family's surveillance, and even dealt with the Ranger who was causing you the most trouble. And now you want me to give up ownership of the actors?

C: 这就是蒙塔娜说的显圣，说是什么…见到睡蕉小猴的唯一方法，就是和助蕉链接起来。
E: This is the theophany that Montana told us about. The only way to see Slumbernana Monkey is apparently through forming some kind of connection with the Assistanana.

C: 噫——又想浑水摸鱼，不够了解睡蕉小猴可是链接不上的哦。
E: Tsk, trying to worm your way in again, huh? But you won't be able to establish a connection if you know nothing about Slumbernana Monkey~
Bam—

C: 证明我的观点……
E: To prove that my viewpoint...

C: 这可不奇怪，人总得学着安慰自己，其中就包括怎么看淡生死。
E: Ain't nothin' strange about that, people gotta find ways to soothe their souls, part of that is comin' to terms with life and death.

C: 没错，各位社员，接下来将要发生的一切并非终结。
E: That's right, fellow members. Everything that's about to happen next isn't the end for us.

C: 所以，我们来设想一种现实中不存在的情境——
E: With that, let's go on to imagine a scenario that doesn't hold true in reality...

C: 服用忍•药
E: Swallow the Ninja Pill.

C: 美梦多彩，理想自由！
E: Color your dreams, free your ideals!

C: 再熟悉不过的*蕉声*响起，你脑海中本就蠢蠢欲动的小猴们开始鸣叫……
E: The familiar Banagibberish rings out, and the monkeys in your mind start making noise...

C: 暴力即是原初的「智识」——这就是*蕉育*的力量！
E: Violence is the most primitive form of Erudition — this is the power of Bananenlightenment!

C: 根据苦茶大师的指示，乱破踏入了忍•科学的玄妙器皿中……
E: Following Master Kucha's instructions, Rappa ventures into the magical vessel made of ninja tech...

C: 我名为帕狄卡斯…前来为我同胞复仇。
E: My name is Perdikkas... And I am here to avenge my people.

C: 风堇小姐，这位伤者是……
E: Miss Hyacine, this man was—

C: 不应该…吧。毕竟，风堇小姐也没有提到过这件事。
E: That doesn't seem likely... Miss Hyacine didn't mention anything about it.

C: 或许，大家只是因为还没上课，在睡大觉！怕别人打扰，就把门关上了。
E: Maybe everybody's still asleep because classes haven't started yet! They don't want to be disturbed, so they shut the entrance.

C: 呵呵，张牙舞爪…真可爱。
E: Hehe, baring your fangs at me... How cute.

C: 水车纹丝不动。
E: The waterwheel didn't even move an inch...

C: 在那漫天繁星中，一道声音，一道来自过去的声音直刺入你的脑海：「无名客，就照你的意思去做吧！」——那是谁？原来（疑似）是阿基维利，列车永远的航标！
E: Amidst the vast expanse of stars, a voice, a voice from the past pierces your mind: "Nameless, do as you intend!" — Who could it be? It is (seemingly) Akivili, the eternal beacon of the Express!

C: 一个在树庭游荡的…幽灵？
E: A spirit... wandering around the Grove?

C: 缇安大人，到底发生什么了？
E: Lady Trianne, what exactly happened just now?

C: （恢复得如何了，朋友？）
E: (How's your recovery coming along, my friend?)

C: 但因为种种原因，*我们*接过{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神职，得到了「门径」的力量……
E: Then, because of reasons... we inherited {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' divinity and gained the power of "Passage"...

C: 如今，悬锋的新王要降临了。丈夫的仇债，我自会用手中的长枪问黑潮怪物们讨回。
E: With the coming coronation of the new king of Kremnos, I'll take up my lance against the creatures of the black tide and seek vengeance for my husband.

C: 吵了那么多回，愣是不肯听话…老犟种！
E: Still wouldn't budge after all those arguments... That stubborn old thing!

C: 而你，你已病入膏肓了，父亲。将我抛入冥海的人是你，妄图奴役{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}泰坦{RUBY_E#}、亵渎神体的人也是你……
E: As for you, you already stand at death's door, father. You were the one who threw me into the Sea of Souls, the one who tried in vain to enslave a {RUBY_B#Nikador}Titan{RUBY_E#}, and the one who desecrated the body of a god...

C: 我听说了，你的事。前进的方向，你在寻找；疑问，有许多。
E: Your matters, I've heard. The path forward, you seek. Many questions, you have.

C: 这不是一件好事，你认为。
E: This is not a good thing, you believe.

C: 若要我接受这命运，成为「纷争」的图腾，并带领我的族人重蹈覆辙…那我的确会感到恐惧，对「成王」的恐惧。
E: If I accept that fate and become the totem of Strife, then lead my people into repeating the same mistakes... then of course I would be terrified. I'd be terrified of becoming king.

C: 好吧！虽然我的脑瓜已经特别特别聪明了，但我还是会努力！
E: Alright! Even though my brain is already super-duper smart, I'll still try my very best!

C: 咦，真的什么都没有？不可能，刚刚还看到了……
E: Huh? There's really nothing here? That can't be! I swear I saw it...

C: 先说第一条论据：它那造型古怪的「仪式剑」能和火种相互作用——刺入我胸口时的引力就是证明。我猜测那柄剑具备感应、吸收…甚至容纳火种的能力。
E: Let's start with the first premise. Its peculiar "ceremonial blade" can interact with the Coreflame, as evidenced by the pull I felt when it stabbed into my chest. I hypothesize that the blade can sense, absorb... or even retain Coreflames.

C: ——缇宝失踪了！她们最后一次被人目击到是在……
E: — Tribbie is missing! The last time the three of them were seen was in...

C: 边走边摸索，找找看吧。
E: Let's be on the lookout as we go.

C: 缇安……
E: Trianne...

C: 就快到了……
E: We're almost there...

C: 就知道，还得是我。
E: I knew it. Of course it's got to be me.

C: 你果然在这里。
E: I knew you'd be here.

C: 与众人一同，我将在此，聆听悬锋城…那道惊雷。
E: Together with everyone, I shall remain here. That thunder... from Castrum Kremnos, we wait to hear.

C: 最后一个要求，代我照顾好悬锋的战士们。
E: I have a final favor to ask: Please look after the Kremnoan warriors in my absence.

C: 那时我才发现，自己信奉的一切都脆弱不堪。也许悬锋精神真的存在过…但随着贪欲之花绽放，它早已随我们的荣耀一同凋零了。
E: It was at that moment I realized how everything I believed in was utterly hollow. Perhaps the spirit of Kremnos had once existed... but as greed bloomed in the hearts of humanity over the years, such spirit had long faded alongside our glory.

C: 但现在…我似乎明白了。这便是她想对我表达的全部。
E: But now... I think I have finally come to understand. That is all she wished to tell me.

C: 荣耀属于神盾旅！
E: Glory to the Godshield Brigade!

C: 明白了。那我们先走了，保重。
E: I see. We'll be off, then. Take care.

C: 「那十年」是指？
E: Those ten years?

C: 从来没有什么「半神」与「人」的差别，每个人所面对的烦恼，都只能靠未来的自己解决。
E: There's no difference between demigods and mortals. The troubles we encounter can only be resolved by our future selves.

C: 奇怪，迷迷不在你身边？
E: It's unusual to see Mem isn't with you.

C: 不知道，我也管不了它…
E: No idea. I can't control Mem...

C: 我本就打算返回圣城，与阿格莱雅共议战略。这是一场围剿，我们需要更多人的帮助。
E: I have indeed planned to return to the holy city and discuss the strategy with Aglaea. We'll need all the help we can get for this encirclement.

C: 该死的野蛮人…
E: Cursed brutes...

C: 虽然还记得我们一起经历了这场冒险，但事后回想起来，有些细节却变得模糊起来了。
E: Even though I still recall that adventure we went through together, some of the details get a bit hazy when I think back on it.

C: 各位…想必一定曾听说过关于「圣杯」的传说吧？
E: Ladies and gentlemen... I'm sure you've all heard the legend of the Holy Grail, haven't you?

C: 当然要在乎规则了！不顾规则乱搞一气是很过瘾，但如果被人事后找麻烦，吃亏的可还是自己！
E: You bet I care about the rules! It's fun to break them in the heat of the moment, but if trouble comes knocking afterward, we're the ones who get hurt!

C: 真是巧妙的故事回环，往日狭路相逢的角色注定要在「圣杯战争」的舞台上分出胜负。
E: What a poetic twist... Old rivals now destined to settle the score on the Holy Grail War's stage.

C: 啧，让御主也灵体化了吗？Assassin这个职阶，怎么总是有些让人不快的本领。
E: Hmph. So he put his Master into spirit form too. Assassin-class... always such a pain in the neck.

C: 你似乎…并不属于这个世界。
E: You don't... seem to be from this world.

C: 明白了，我们是被你连累的。
E: Ah, I see. So it's your fault we're all stuck here.

C: 那可不行！骑士怎么能做这种吃白食的行为！
E: No way! A knight would never stoop to that!

C: 请原谅我问个最幼稚的问题：你们这些「英灵」究竟是什么？真的是历史名人死后的灵魂吗？
E: Forgive me for asking such a naive question, but... what exactly are you Heroic Spirits? Are you truly the souls of historical figures who have passed?

C: 我也有此意。
E: Count me in too.

C: …真是怀念这一切。作为骑士离开村子后，我就再也没回来过。眼前的景色，是我还是个无名小卒时，那幼小、稚嫩的梦。
E: ...How I miss all this. I never returned here after I left as a knight. What we see before us is the childish dream I had when I was still just a nameless nobody.

C: 和你的造型有些相似。
E: It looks a bit like you.

C: 不，和他相同的各个部族的王，他们的名字都没能流传下去。
E: No. The names of kings from other tribes, kings equal to his stature, have all been forgotten.

C: 不知不觉间说了些大道理，虽然只是对梅林的蹩脚模仿。
E: Look at me. Talking big all of a sudden and doing a bad imitation of Merlin.

C: 你在哪儿？
E: Where are you?

C: 说起来，{F#姐们儿}{M#小哥}，你对钓鱼有兴趣吗？别看外面都是一片真空，能钓起来的玩意儿可不少。
E: You ever tried fishing, {M#buddy?}{F#lass?} Don't be fooled by the vacuum outside. There's still plenty to catch.

C: 你知道地球吗？在丹恒离开后不久，瓦尔特如愿以偿找到了回家的路，但愿他能平安抵达那里。
E: Have you ever heard of the planet called Earth? Soon after Dan Heng left us, Welt found the way back home just as he had hoped. Let's pray he makes it there safely.

C: 我不知道该去哪儿。
E: I don't know where to go.

C: 我渴望平凡的生活。
E: I long for a quiet, ordinary life.

C: 如果你真觉得自己是无名客，那你要做的只有一件事情。
E: If you truly believe you are a Nameless, then there is only one thing left for you to do.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！看来阿斯娜女士也失败了。可惜，只差一步，她就能将各位从者和梦的火焰剥离下来，作为燃料投入圣杯。
E: Ohohoho! Looks like Lady Asna has failed. What a shame. She was just one step away from tearing the flame of dreams off the Servants, and tossing them into the Holy Grail as fuel.

C: 在加入圣杯战争时，御主应当召唤一位历史名人作为从者…这是定例。但我该召唤谁呢？这个问题让我为难了许久……
E: The rules said a Master is supposed to summon a historical figure as their Servant to enter the Holy Grail War, but... who should I summon? This question has haunted me for quite some time...

C: 所以，我以自己为召唤触媒…想看看投射在匹诺康尼历史中的商业巨头奥帝，会以怎样一番从者的形象回应我的召唤？在历史中人们到底是如何看待我的？
E: I used myself as the catalyst... I wanted to see how the business magnate Oti, reflected in the history of Penacony, would respond to my call as a Servant. I wanted to see how people truly view me in history.

C: 还有你们两个，哎，真是的，每次都不能和你们痛痛快快地打上一场。
E: And you two... Seriously, why can I never get a proper fight with you?

C: 那就够了，你们这些艺术家，总想着在自己信奉的艺术丰碑上不惜一切代价凿下自己的名字…嚯嗬嗬嗬，可惜啊，如愿以偿者就像圣杯战争的胜利者一样少之又少吧？
E: That'd be enough for me. You artists always aim to carve your names into art's annals no matter the cost... Too bad those who actually succeed are as rare as the winners of the Holy Grail War.

C: 听好了！欠爱的小可爱们，不管你们是谁，打算做什么，你们已经被我包围了！立刻现身，别等投胎时再后悔自己的反应慢了半拍！
E: Listen up, forkin' shirtbags! Ain't no matter who you are and what you wanna do, I've got you surrounded! Pop out now, or don't say I didn't warn ya when you stub your toe on the way to the underworld!

C: 这…哪有恶灵在恐怖片被受害者打得满地打滚的…算了，制片人，你先退场吧，之后还有用得着你的时候。
