E: This... What kind of evil spirit gets beaten to a pulp by its victims? ...Ugh, forget it. Producer, take five. We'll be needing you again later.

C: 这是…知更鸟小姐的歌声吗？
E: Is that... Miss Robin's singing?

C: 不对劲。
E: Something's off.

C: <size=36>成为恶灵的玩具！</size>
E: <size=36>YOU BECOME TOYS FOR THE EVIL SPIRITS!</size>

C: 为了苏乐达！
E: For SoulGlad!

C: 玩够了吗？我可没时间留在这儿陪你过家家。
E: You finished with your little show yet? I don't have time to play pretend with you.

C: 老奥帝先生是个商人，他向你讨要的代价会相当高昂。
E: Mr. Oti is a businessman through and through. His price will be astronomically high.

C: 也难怪，这样的你最终会被观众抛弃啊。
E: It's no surprise that the audience eventually abandoned you.

C: 还有这音乐…为什么我的宝具没法压制它？
E: And this music... Why can't my Noble Phantasm suppress it?

C: 这就是最强的防御绝技，黄金三十重圆环！
E: Behold! The ultimate defensive move — Thirty Golden Layers of Rho Aias!

C: 这位客人，实在抱歉。筑梦师正在排查邻近路段，相关设施都停用了。麻烦您暂时绕行。
E: I beg your pardon, sirs. Dreamweavers are carrying out inspections on the routes around here, and all affected facilities have been closed off. Kindly take a detour in the meantime.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 但在此时却出现了变量吗？
E: But something happened to change that outcome?

C: 人还当真是到了也不自知……
E: Didn't even truly realize that one was here...

C: 二位可还记得最初遇见小女子的情境？
E: Do you two still remember what it was like when you first saw me?

C: 我不知道，只是心里有几个猜想，碰碰运气。看来我也有交好运的时候。
E: I didn't. I had a hunch and decided to try my luck. It seems I can be lucky sometimes.

C: 你想说，事实并非如此吗？
E: Are you saying that's not true?

C: 如果有筑梦师帮忙，也许就能补上空缺的部分了。
E: If I have a Dreamweaver's help, maybe I'll be able to fill in the missing pieces.

C: 虽然不是每场演唱会都能到场，但至少也会把录像看一遍。我喜欢您的每一首歌——真想把这件事告诉全世界！
E: I don't get to attend every single one of your concerts, but I watch the recordings of each of them at least once. I love all of your songs! Gosh, I wish I could tell the whole world about this!

C: 对未知过分恐惧，也许就是我的不足。但你的出现证明了意外不全是坏事。
E: My fear of the unknown may be a weakness, but your presence has shown me that surprises aren't always bad.

C: 照照镜子吧，自律、纠结——你的生活除了这俩还剩什么？活得像块大理石，摔下来的时候也只能粉粉碎。
E: Look at yourself. Besides discipline and hesitation, there's nothing else in your life. If you continue living like a slab of marble, you'll break into pieces when you fall.

C: 关于这点，您同样给了我很多启发。人类才是万物的尺度，没有人是唯一的救世主。
E: About that, you've given me many insights as well. Humans are the measure of everything, and no one is the sole savior.

C: 另外，那位忆者还补了句——相信各位一定会选择「翁法罗斯」。
E: Though she did say that she believes we'll end up deciding on Amphoreus.

C: 他无意参与航线会议，去派对车厢休息了。
E: He isn't joining us for the navigation meeting. He went to the Party Car to rest.

C: （时间差不多咯。去找个位子，看看跃迁风光吧。）
E: (Looks like it's about time. I should go find a spot to take in the views during the warp.)

C: 正如各位所见，翁法罗斯被一团混沌的物质包裹着，难以被外部观测。普通的星际旅行无法意识到它的存在，更遑论经过和到达。
E: As you can see, Amphoreus is surrounded by a mass of chaotic matter that conceals it from the outside world — nearly. Conventional interstellar travel can't detect its presence, let alone pass by or land on the planet.

C: 如此人杰地灵的世界，在寰宇间却寂寂无名。确实有些奇怪。
E: For a world to have nurtured such marvels yet still remain unheard of throughout the cosmos? Now, that is hard to fathom.

C: 而第二重——不必向各位隐瞒，就在刚才，你们已亲眼见证了它，是「记忆」。
E: I can reveal the second. In fact, you've all seen it just now. It's the Remembrance.

C: <unbreak>0001</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>0001</unbreak>...

C: 下一步该怎么做，找当地人？
E: What should we do now? Find a local?

C: 巨构建筑随处可见，当地不仅工程技术发达，还有着某种普世信仰。可惜距离太远，看不清细节。
E: Judging from the prevalence of these colossal structures, this civilization has more than just great engineers and architects. The structures also indicate a universal belief system. If only it were closer, I'd be able to make out the details.

C: 所有的「开拓」——
E: You can't say it's trailblazing until...

C: 交给我们吧。
E: We'll take it from here.

C: 哈哈哈，别紧张！是我们的救兵来了。大家起身吧！
E: Hahaha! Don't worry. That's just our rescue. Time to get up, everyone!

C: 怎、怎么会…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祷言失效了吗？
E: H—How is that possible... Did {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} prayer fail?

C: 我理解，只是……
E: I understand, but...

C: 「开拓」…有意思。在你们的世界，想必那也是一尊受万人景仰的泰坦吧。
E: Trailblazing... What an interesting concept. Surely, on your worlds, there must also be a Titan which is revered by the masses?

C: 哈托努斯！坚持住——
E: Chartonus! Hang in there!

C: 这样啊…看来你是个很复杂的人呢，有些纯真，又有些敏锐。
E: Is that so... Looks like you're a bit hard to please. Trusting and perceptive at the same time.

C: 我们身陷末世，还需指引万千民众行向山顶。奥赫玛亟需更多盟友，成为我们坚实的助力。
E: With the end times before us, we are expected to lead all of our people toward the summit. Okhema needs as many allies as possible, to aid us in the upcoming battles.

C: 你好。我们是…来自远方城邦的士兵。
E: Nice to meet you. We're... soldiers from a faraway city.

C: 造出这柄枪的人也是位赫赫有名的工匠吧，天外有天，我完全无法想象一个翁法罗斯之外的世界。
E: The one who crafted this spear must also be a renowned master. I guess there's always someone greater out there. Although I still can't imagine a world outside Amphoreus.

C: 你看到了疑惑…犹豫…好像还有一丝隐匿的挑衅。大家伙俯视着你，仿佛在说：「你有胆吗，小家伙？」
E: You see confusion... hesitation... and perhaps a hint of hidden defiance. The big guy looks down at you, as if to say, "Do you have the guts, little one?"

C: …想都别想。
E: ...That's not going to happen.

C: 倒也不用勉强自己。
E: You don't have to force yourself.

C: 很漂亮的颜色呢，感觉…非常可爱。
E: What beautiful colors. It's... very cute.

C: 把名字改成《三月梦中的自己》…好像也不是不行。
E: It'll probably work if we change the title to How March Sees Herself in Her Dreams...

C: 梦境迷钟。
E: A Dream Ticker.

C: 悬锋城…是哪？
E: Castrum Kremnos... Where is that?

C: 的确。空间够大，装潢也很华丽。
E: Indeed. It's spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.

C: 谁去找个祭司来？
E: Maybe someone should go fetch a priest?

C: 遐蝶会是你们的行刑人。
E: Castorice will be your executioner.

C: 最后一问。
E: Final Question.

C: 我会的。
E: I will.

C: 同时，也能促成他们与白厄、遐蝶间更为笃深的关系。
E: Simultaneously, it might also strengthen their bonds with Phainon and Castorice.

C: 是够久的，天好亮啊！
E: I slept in pretty late. It's so bright outside!

C: 它…挺可爱的，不像星核。
E: It was... pretty cute, unlike the Stellaron.

C: 与此同时，{NICKNAME}睡得正酣……
E: Meanwhile, {NICKNAME} is in deep sleep...

C: 这不止是一次远征，也是一场胜负。既然我们来到这儿了…不来酣畅淋漓地比一场吗？
E: This isn't just an expedition. It's also a battle to determine a victor. Since we're already here, why don't we have a match and fight to our heart's content?

C: 这里毕竟是一座战士的城邦，但也有普通的住民。
E: It was a city of warriors, but ordinary citizens lived here too.

C: 不行，这样行不通啊。
E: No, that's not going to work.

C: 我想给朋友拍张照片。
E: I want to take a picture for my friend.

C: 哎…又来？
E: Ugh, not again.

C: 哈哈——就这么决定了，我们平分这份荣光。
E: Haha, it's settled then. Let's divide the glory equally.

C: 黄金狮首是悬锋城首屈一指的参谋，它的谏言为我族赢下了诸多战役，化解了无数阴谋。
E: Chryseus Leo was the top advisor in Castrum Kremnos, whose wise counsel helped my tribe win many battles and thwart numerous schemes.

C: 难怪奥赫玛会遭遇袭击，没想到堕入疯狂的泰坦还能有此算计……
E: That explains the surprise attack on Okhema. I didn't think that the mad Titan could have orchestrated it...

C: 你真是一头野兽。
E: You really are a beast.

C: 小心，距离「天谴之锋」已经很近了……
E: Careful. We're getting very close to the Blade of Fury...

C: 碾碎「纷争」的战甲，摘下它的火种！
E: Shatter the armor of Strife and strip away the Coreflame!

C: 「不死之身」是怎么回事？
E: What's this indestructible body about?

C: 我们收到了你的传信，她已经去做相应的准备了。
E: She began making the necessary preparations the moment we got your message.

C: 不用为*我们*担心，小白…这是为了小敌，也是为了大家。
E: We can handle this, Snowy... This is as much for De as it is for everyone else.

C: 疑惑…相同。答案，未知。
E: Confusion... Same. Answer, unknown.

C: …你能帮我们找到吗？
E: ...Can you help us find it?

C: 着急，不必！我会。教你。
E: Anxious, no need! I will. Teach you.

C: 所以你其实是只小狗？
E: So, you're actually a dog?

C: 「神明啊，你遗忘了荣耀吗？若是如此，该如何守护你的尊严，敬畏你的子民该去向何方？」
E: "O god, have you forgotten the glory of old? Then how will you defend your dignity? And where shall your faithful subjects find their home?"

C: 那报酬呢？我们在请求你打造一件惊世的圣器…不可能不支付酬劳。
E: And what of your payment? For a commission of this magnitude, proper compensation must be ensured.

C: 啊…是这个小家伙的能力吗？真令人吃惊。
E: Ah, was it because of this little one? That's incredible!

C: （都告诉我吧，孩子。）
E: (Tell me everything, child.)

C: 怕是…会被当做可疑的人吧？悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
E: ...We may draw suspicion this way. Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.

C: 我已经说过一遍——粉碎盘踞在悬锋城深处的愚蠢。
E: I've said it before: To obliterate the deeply entrenched roots of foolishness within Castrum Kremnos.

C: 如狗鼠般卑劣的清道夫…让我送你去见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧，窃贼。
E: Looting the arena like a despicable lowlife... Prepare to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, thief.

C: 难道要和它战斗…
E: Will we have to battle them...?

C: 物换星移，但泰坦的灵魂依旧四分五裂。庸王和他的仆从大概早已化作齑粉…无人知晓曾经于此发生的一切。
E: Much time has passed, yet the Titan's soul remains fragmented. That covetous king and his servants would have turned to dust by now... Their scheme that once unfolded here has likewise been buried with them.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它神性的一部分被封存在这里……
E: A part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity is sealed within this...

C: 这尊雕像中亦存有神性。
E: Divinity exists within this statue.

C: …灰飞烟灭。
E: ...Crumble to dust.

C: 你怎么了，女孩？
E: What's wrong, girl?

C: 我和那位泰坦约定好了…黄金裔会带走它的火种，以它作为柴薪，照亮未来的路。
E: I have an agreement with the Titan... The Chrysos Heirs will take away their Coreflame and use it to start a bright blaze that'll illuminate our path onward.

C: 离开，伙伴？回去，一起？
E: Leave, friend? Return, together?

C: 你在说什么呢，人家可不会干那种事！
E: Hmph, really now? I wouldn't do something like that!

C: 你还是挺有礼貌的嘛…
E: Isn't it nice to be polite?

C: 希望你已经坚定了决心，救世主……
E: I hope you've toughened your resolve, Deliverer...

C: 求求你啦，相信我吧。至少…至少和它当面谈谈？
E: Please, trust me on this. At the very least... can you speak with them in person?

C: 人活一辈子，总会留下些什么。
E: No one goes through life without leaving their mark behind.

C: 届时，代表们将针对重大议题进行投票。比如，以阿格莱雅为首的黄金裔是否有权治理圣城，以及…对泰坦的征伐是否应该继续。
E: During the assembly, the representatives will vote on major issues such as whether the Chrysos Heirs led by Aglaea should still hold the right to govern the holy city and... whether the Titan's conquest should continue.

C: 是迷迷？
E: Is it Mem?

C: 有件事…我一直没和你提起。
E: There's something that... I've never told you.

C: 听啊……
E: Listen...

C: 我听到了。
E: I can hear it.

C: 身为刻法勒的祭司，竟不知道尊重死者的道理么？
E: As Kephale's priest, are you not aware of the decorum of respecting the dead?

C: 能与尊贵的泰坦直接对话，是我至高无上的荣幸。
E: It is truly my honor to speak to a venerated Titan in person.

C: （…现在应该是晚上吧？）
E: (...Uh, it IS night time now, right?)

C: 晚些时候 奥赫玛某处
E: Later, somewhere in Okhema...

C: 阿格莱雅又要派任务了？
E: Is it another mission from Aglaea?

C: 这…太扭曲了……
E: That's such a... twisted reason...

C: 嗡嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 嚯！这货可真够纯的……
E: Whoa, this is some high-quality stuff...

C: 噢！所以，我们要用那块「贤者之石」，在这里把泰坦给…变出来？
E: Oh! So are we going to use that Philosopher's Stone to... conjure the Titan?

C: 怪物
E: Monster!

C: 感觉后一种说法更可信呢，毕竟它的发言还是有点太…嗯，直抒胸臆？
E: The second theory sounds more believable. After all, the things they're saying are rather... um, direct?

C: 嗯。因为在无限的时光尺度下，没有什么烦忧是无法被解决的……
E: Yes. Because... When placed under time's vast scales, there is no worry in this world that cannot be solved.

C: 我来和他比划比划！
E: Lemme fight him!

C: 死难者本应顺着冥河漂流，直至到达西风的尽头。但这条灵魂的河流…却因玻吕刻斯的陨落阻断了。
E: The deceased are supposed to drift down the River of Souls until they reach the end of the west winds, but this river of souls was blocked... by Pollux's fall.

C: 你能找到离开的路吗？
E: Can you find your way out?

C: 无论你是否意欲摆脱死亡，请遵从本心。以你曾经的诺言为证，我最后一次，请求你运使自己的使命——
E: Whether you wish to break free from death or not, please follow your heart. By the promise you once made, I ask that you fulfill your duty one final time —

C: 我倒是从他的话语里得到了些启发。想听听我的见解吗，遐蝶？
E: I, however, did find some inspiration in these words. Would you like to hear my thoughts, Castorice?

C: 姐…姐……
E: Sis... ter...

C: *悲伤的低鸣*

E: Yes....

C: 这场试炼…也记录在了那段记忆中。
E: That trial... was indeed recorded in that memory.

C: 这里…有锁链生锈的味道。
E: There's... the scent of iron rust over here.

C: 别别别害怕，这些亡魂根本就没发现我们。
E: D—D—Don't be scared. They haven't noticed us at all.

C: 但是，该怎么上去呢？
E: But how should we get up there?

C: 时光飞逝哪…转眼间，第十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}已近在眼前了。
E: Time flies... In the blink of an eye, the fifteenth {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} is already at hand.

C: 也是……
E: I thought so...

C: 作为「敬拜学派」的贤人，世俗要求我不能认同你；但是，作为阿那克萨戈拉斯的友人与导师，我会说……
E: As the Sage of the Venerationists, I am duty-bound to oppose you. But as your friend and mentor, Anaxagoras, I say:

C: 我向你保证。
E: You have my word.

C: 你…不回去了么？
E: You're... not going back?

C: 是啊，经过千年燃烧，我早已是一簇死灰。面对最后一尊大敌{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…也只有他能绽放与之匹敌的烈火。
E: That's true. I've long since burned to ash over the past one thousand years. Only he is capable of unleashing a raging fire that rivals our final great enemy — {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

C: 那是…泰坦的语言……
E: That's the language of the Titans...

C: 让我看看，指不定能找到什么门路呢？
E: Let's see. Perhaps I'll be able to find a way in?

C: 不见了…？
E: They're gone?

C: 「美丽的旧世界，如今在何处？」
E: "O beautiful old world, where are you now?"

C: 大致翻阅了一遍，被重点圈出的方法包括虚拟原因、虚假前提、矛盾转换、名实混一、讹误断句、移花接木、以全概偏等等。
E: You skim through it, and the highlighted methods include virtual causation, false premises, contradiction conversion, conflating prevarication and reality, misinterpreted punctuation, misattribution, and generalizing specificity, among others.

C: 听汝这口气，想必是有所猜度了罢？
E: And by the sound of it, you have already formed a conjecture.

C: 可是，要怎么才能让翁法罗斯回到「黄金世」？
E: But how are we supposed to send Amphoreus back to "Era Chrysea"?

C: 元老院议员们发出*群情激昂的欢呼声*。
E: The members of the Council of Elders are cheering in excitement.

C: 格奈乌斯，汝之试炼，可有把握？
E: Gnaeus, are you confident that you'll complete your trial?

C: 看来，汝已下定决心了哪。
E: Looks like you have made up your mind.

C: 当真不知去向么？那位玻吕茜亚说过了吧，诞生了炼金与巨龙童话的海滨小城……
E: Are their whereabouts truly unknown? Didn't Polyxia mention that seaside town — the birthplace of alchemy and the tale of the dragon...

C: 是「清洗者」…！难道天空之子和他们勾结在了一起？
E: The "Cleaners"...! Did the Skyfolk conspire with them?

C: 但这背后的一切阴谋，我们都是后来才得以知晓。
E: These schemes only came to light long after the damage was done.

C: 逐火之旅开启前，黄金裔曾为争夺神谕的「正统」掀起战争，缇宝老师的众多分身也曾受到牵连。
E: Before the Flame-Chase Journey began, the Chrysos Heirs waged war against each other over who was a "legitimate" heir of the prophecy. Even Tribbie's many selves were pulled into the chaos.

C: 真相很快就能被揭开了。无论如何…我都不会逃避使命。
E: The truth will soon be revealed. No matter what... I will not run away from my mission.

C: 我们一族的血脉，并非继承自英雄……
E: Our lineage wasn't from the hero...

C: 我知道。
E: I know.

C: 我们…不打算在这里和你同归于尽！
E: We... have no intention of dying here with you!

C: 你是…英雄……
E: You are... a hero...

C: 被你和缇宝阿姐…呵斥一番……
E: To be scolded by you and Tribbie...

C: 我听到了：涡心之外，世界在崩塌，人子在哭嚎。
E: I have perceived: Outside the Vortex, the world is collapsing, and the children of humanity are crying.

C: …是你吗？
E: ...Is it you?

C: 然而这一次，无限轮回的史诗……
E: Yet this time, will an epic with endless cycles...

C: 我认真思考过，阿格莱雅为什么能成为一位优秀的领导者——抛开人格、品行这些看不见摸不着的要素，还有一个重要的原因：她的家底相当殷实！
E: I've spent a lot of time pondering how Aglaea became such an effective leader — beyond the intangible qualities like personality and ethics, a major reason is her family wealth!

C: 占卜…在人家看来，也许是一种指引心灵的力量。
E: To me, divination could be a power that guides our spirits.

C: 黑色衣装…带着金血装饰的面罩……
E: Black clothing... Masks decorated with golden blood...

C: …你就非得在我讲故事的中途打岔吗？假的，什么假的？
E: ...Do you have to interrupt me in the middle of my story? Fake? What's fake?

C: 赶紧想办法让我们过去，否则我就要重新考虑下分成的问题了！
E: Now hurry up and figure out a way across, or I might have to reconsider our split!

C: …停，待在那儿别动，别转过来。
E: ...Stop, stay there, and don't turn around.

C: 你…别用那种语气，你知道我最受不了这个。
E: Don't... don't talk to me like that. You know I can't take it.
—Ah.

C: 快快快，冲冲冲~
E: Here we go round the River of Souls~

C: 针对泰坦发明，悬锋的铸魂技术。虽能保留神性…但会彻底过滤，人性的残余。
E: Invented for the Titans, Kremnos's Soul-Forging technology was. Though divinity it retains, filtered out, the remnants of humanity will be.

C: 我会在西风的尽头，盼待由你开辟出的奇迹。
E: I will be waiting at the end of the west wind, looking forward to the miracle you will create.

C: …她一定会露出微笑的。
E: ...She would surely smile.

C: 起初，我的心情也和你们一样。
E: I felt the same as all of you initially.

C: 但你要相信一件事：每个人都是世上独一无二的存在。
E: But you have to believe that everyone in this world is unique in their own way.

C: 你说得对，稍微走一会儿神的时间总还是有的。
E: You're right. At least I can still afford to get lost in thought once in a while.

C: 既然已经碰巧见面了，丹宝要不要跟我一起来？
E: Since we've already met up, why don't you come with me, Dannie?

C: 千年以前，<color=#dbc291ff>征服天空的塞涅俄丝留下了传说和遗志，把归还天空泰坦火种的使命交给了自己的后人——您和我。</color>
E: A thousand years ago, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose who conquered the skies left behind legends and a will, entrusting the mission to return the Sky Titan's Coreflame to her descendants — to people like you and me.</color>

C: 嘿嘿…这也是游戏的一环哪。想看到这件礼物的完整面貌，<color=#dbc291ff>就等到天黑以后再打开它吧。</color>
E: Heh... That's a part of the game too. If you want to see the full picture of what's inside, <color=#dbc291ff>you'll have to wait until nightfall.</color>

C: 您没想错。我是天空一族的后嗣，将要接过「天空」权柄的黄金裔。
E: Yes, I'm a descendant of the Sky people, the Chrysos Heir about to take over the authority of Sky.

C: 在天空城邦的习俗中，它连接着翁法罗斯的天幕，天象画壁呈现出的气候，将会转映为现实中的天气。
E: The Sky city believes that mural to be connected to Amphoreus's sky, and any weather condition depicted on it will become actual weather.

C: 索拉比斯阁下，你的躯壳已被黑潮彻底侵蚀。但我还可以…疗愈你顽强的灵魂，就像露奈比斯阁下一样，即便失去肉身，你的心灵也依旧高洁。
E: Lord Solabis, your body has been completely corroded by the black tide. But I can still... heal your tenacious soul. Just like Lady Lunabis — even if you've lost your mortal body, your spirit remains pure.

C: 这里翻涌的记忆，比入口处更加强烈…人家这就把它们凝结起来，捏捏、捏捏……
E: The memories surging here are even more intense than at the entrance... I'll gather them up now, and mold them, and mold them...

C: 但还是无法启动…是内部故障吗？
E: But it still won't start... Is there something wrong internally?

C: 「烈阳之翼」点燃了泰坦的羽翼……
E: The Sunlit Wings set the Titan's Wings aflame...

C: 闹鬼了？
E: Is it haunted?

C: 自*我们*和姐妹们分开以来，和你在一起的那段时光，就是*我们*最美妙的记忆啦。
E: Since we parted with our sisters, the time spent with you has become our most cherished memories.

C: 那时*我们*才终于明白，原来*我们*喜欢的不是折纸这件事本身，而是妈妈对*我们*折出来的作品的反应。
E: We eventually understood that it wasn't the folding we loved, but Mama's reactions to our creations.

C: 露奈比斯阁下不和我们一起吗？
E: Is Lady Lunabis not going with us?

C: 你手中那把长剑…我似乎在何处见过。
E: That sword you wield... it seems familiar.

C: 这世界…必须…重启……
E: This world... must... be reset...

C: 我们背负了太多人的命运和未来……
E: We shoulder the fates and futures of too many people...

C: 没想到我会两次把他一个人留在战场上…但现在不是考虑这个的时候。
E: I never thought I would leave him alone on the battlefield twice... But now isn't the time to be thinking about this.

C: 我们明白了…在等到你归来前，白厄阁下，我们绝不会离开她的庇护！
E: We understand... We will not leave her protection until you return, Lord Phainon!

C: 而在第二个故事里，丹恒和我讲到了那几位为「监狱星」付出了生命的无名客。我很清楚，你们两个甘愿为翁法罗斯做出同样的选择。
E: In the second story, Dan Heng told me about the few Nameless who sacrificed their lives for the "prison world." I know very well that the two of you are willing to make the same choice for Amphoreus.

C: 请别担心，{NICKNAME}阁下。白厄大人此前已经委托了来古士议员，修好了两位的载具。
E: Please don't worry, {NICKNAME}. Lord Phainon has already entrusted Elder Lygus to fix your transport.

C: 它迟早会追上来——
E: They will catch up to us sooner or later...

C: 那道虹色的屏障……
E: That rainbow barrier...

C: 能发现两位的行踪，我和黑塔女士也倍感幸运，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: It was fortunate we found you in time. Madam Herta and I were both quite relieved, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哦…是我见识浅薄了。看来，身为天外之人，{M#他}{F#她}的确有超越命运的手段。
E: Well... I stand corrected. An outsider like {M#him}{F#her} does have ways to defy destiny.

C: 「那末…最初的智种，又要在谁人的记忆中生根发芽呢？」
E: "If that is the case, whose memories did the very first Nouspore sprout from?"

C: 这是白厄少年的回忆？
E: Are we seeing Phainon's childhood?

C: …我知道原文，别擅自改词！
E: Hey, don't go changing the words!

C: *我们*的心愿是不是有点贪心？就当作代替了缇安和缇宁她们，一共说出了三份心愿吧！
E: Are we wishing for too much? Well, let's say these three wishes represent Trianne and Trinnon too!

C: 遗世独立的村落将成为人类最后的避难所啊…倒也合理。
E: Our secluded village as humanity's last haven... That makes sense.

C: 但不是现在。我还年轻，要走的路还很长，它也一样。
E: But not today. I'm still young, and I have a long road ahead. So does this blade.

C: {RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}正在斟酌判决，看来两边的信念…不相上下。
E: {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} is deliberating on the outcome. It appears the convictions of both sides are... equally matched.

C: 空无一人啊。这就是末日的创世涡心……
E: Not a single soul to be seen. So this is how the Vortex looks at the end of days...

C: 欢迎回来！
E: Welcome back!

C: 可是，告诉我……
E: But tell me...

C: ——拔剑吧，刽子手！我会让你知道，你最大的错误，就是留下了我！
E: Draw your sword, executioner! I'll make sure you realize that your greatest mistake was leaving me alive!

C: 啊…我知道。
E: Ah... I know.

C: 「羁客」与「学士」兑现了他们的命运，再一次。
E: The "Traveler" and the "Scholar" fulfilled their fates once again.

C: 「终有一日，汝将背后负创而死」，这是我战胜试炼时望见的，诸神临终的谵语……
E: "One day, you shall die with a wound in your back." That's what I saw when I overcame the trial, the gods' dying ramblings...

C: …你还在我内心深处，未曾散去？
E: ...You're still lingering deep within me, never fading away?

C: 一起成为救世主吧，白厄。
E: Let's both be the Deliverer, Phainon.

C: 借助忆庭的帮助，穷观阵对过去的演算完成了重要突破。现在，我们或许可以绕过道中的重重阻碍，直视你的过去了。
E: Thanks to the Garden of Recollection, the Matrix of Prescience has made a breakthrough in extrapolating the past. Now, we might be able to bypass the obstacles and look directly into your history.

C: {NICKNAME}惊讶的样子，也和记忆里如出一辙呢。
E: {NICKNAME}'s surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.

C: 人家已经准备好见证奇迹啦，{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm prepared to witness that miracle, {NICKNAME}.

C: 去把敌人赶出刻法勒洒下的黎明，去用他们的尸身扑灭他们亲手扬起的火焰！去赢得光荣，赢得和平，让后人永远铭记你们伟大的壮举！——
E: Drive the enemy from Kephale's dawn! Smother their flames with their own dead! Win glory! Win peace! Let history sing your deeds!

C: 好吧，听你的~「闭目养神」。
E: Fine, as you say~ Just "meditating."

C: 断锋爵，我们来是为了迎见<color=#dbc291ff>「天外的救世主」</color>，别做多余的事。
E: Dux Fragoris! We're here to welcome the <color=#dbc291ff>Deliverer from beyond the sky</color>. Stand down.

C: 恭迎黄金英雄归城！
E: Hail to the golden heroes!

C: 阿雅，你今天也没什么精神……
E: Agy, you're still so listless today...

C: 阿波罗尼总是这样，说话一点都不诗意……
E: Apollonius, where's your poetic flair?

C: 如你所见，她是奥赫玛的女皇，黄金战争的终结者，黄金裔的领袖。
E: As you've witnessed, she is the empress of Okhema, the one who ended the Chrysos War, and the leader of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 谁知道呢。先说要狩猎泰坦，又说有什么更大的灾厄…我看她的疯病才是最大的灾厄。
E: Who knows? First she wants to hunt Titans, now she says there are even greater calamities... Her madness is the greatest calamity.

C: 有点太极端了，我不能接受。
E: It seems a bit too extreme for me to accept.

C: 比预言还要准确哦。毕竟，{NICKNAME}已经亲眼见证过了，对吧？
E: It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, {NICKNAME} has already witnessed it, right?

C: 听说了吗？又要打仗了。
E: Did you hear? Another war's coming.

C: 咕嘟…咕嘟咕嘟……
E: Glug... Glug glug...

C: 正是。
E: Indeed.

C: ——诉诸外力，为己所用便是。
E: I only need to appeal to external forces and use them for my own ends.

C: 我无比怀念。在博识尊尚未诞生的年代，知识的边界就像星空，令人心驰神往，欢呼雀跃。
E: How I yearn to return to those days before Nous was born. Back then, the boundaries of knowledge were like the starry skies, evoking feelings of longing and delight among humankind.

C: 「一条习惯飘泊的船儿，终于驶入了海岛的臂湾。」
E: "A boat, so used to drifting, at long last enters an island's safe embrace."

C: 嘿嘿，你肯定天天都在怀念有本姑娘陪着的日子吧？
E: Hehe, I bet you were constantly thinking about the days when I was by your side!

C: 那就用不着再掩饰了吧？的确，我们不是你认识的那个「三月七」。
E: In that case, there's no need for further deceit. You're right. We're not the "March 7th" you are acquainted with.

C: 一枚滚烫的火种，一场交易的注脚。它承载着期许…和整个世界的热量。
E: This burning Coreflame. This footnote of a transaction. It contains hope... and the warmth of the entire world.

C: 聪明如{NICKNAME}，走到这里，一定已经发现了吧？——这里不是现实，而是一道「岁月」的迷宫。
E: Someone as sharp as {NICKNAME} must've realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of Time.

C: 历经三千万世，{NICKNAME}才降临在我们身边…那，再多等片刻，又有何妨呢？
E: After all, it took <unbreak>33</unbreak> million cycles for {NICKNAME} to arrive in our world... What's a few moments more?

C: 等你把那智械哥的麻烦解决了，别犹豫，立刻开启新一轮的演算吧。螺丝说了，「再创世」才不是瞬间完成的进程，权杖受到保护的节点恐怕只有在重启的时分才最脆弱——
E: Once you've dealt with that troubling old Intellitron, don't hesitate and start the next cycle of extrapolation right away. Screwy said that "Era Nova" isn't a process that happens in an instant, and the protected nodes of the Scepter are probably at their most vulnerable only during the reset—

C: （这是…斯缇科西亚？怎么变成了这样……）
E: (Is this... Styxia? What happened to this place...?)

C: 漆黑的浪潮在海中漫溢，我们的王国危在旦夕……
E: The dark tides flood the sea... And our kingdom teeters on the edge...

C: （幻觉的出口，究竟在哪里……）
E: (Where's the way out of this illusion...)

C: 快听，群臣在为她献礼！
E: Hear that? The court sings her praises!

C: 看呐，残忍的凯撒和她的骑士统领、可怜的典狱官——多么投契的一对演算对象！她们手上都浸满了鲜血…金色的鲜血。
E: Look, the cruel Imperator, and her knight commander the pitiful warden... What a perfectly matched duo of test subjects! Their hands drip with blood... golden blood.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>然后，我们再一同去为那「智识」的罪人行刑吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And together, we'll bring judgment upon the sinner who defiled the Erudition.</color>

C: 一旦翁法罗斯的绝灭大君成为下个知识奇点——你可是第一位天才，怎么可能不清楚后果？
E: In other words, when the Lord Ravager within Amphoreus becomes the next Knowledge Singularity... There's no way you wouldn't have grasped the consequences, First Genius, is there?

C: 天才们的计划，{NICKNAME}应该从「记忆」中得知啦。为了不被来古士察觉，我必须小心翼翼地躲在「岁月」的角落，等待机会来临。
E: {NICKNAME} probably already knew about the geniuses' plans from that "memory." I had to hide really well in a corner in Time so Lygus wouldn't find me, and wait for the right opportunity.

C: 当然！对了，说到「携手」……
E: Yep! By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...

C: 恰如此时此刻，你们运用相同的原理，步入了我所在的牢笼？
E: Is that how you walked into my prison cell? Using those same principles?

C: 她全身心地投入在为你送行的献唱中。
E: She pours her heart and soul into singing you farewell.

C: 据说，天外的人们会借助这种力量，将过去的风景存入名为「光锥」的水晶。
E: People beyond the sky apparently utilize this power to seal past scenery into crystals they call "Light Cones."

C: 眼前的女孩，身份和凯撒相似——她是这个世界的「大守护者」，是一位在灾难中挺身而出的领袖。
E: The girl we see here holds a similar station to you, Imperator. She's the Supreme Guardian of this world, a leader who took up the mantle of government during a disaster.
"Final words"...?

C: 刻律德菈…？
E: Cerydra...?

C: 坚持住…我会竭力为你抵挡这场「毁灭」的海啸！
E: Hang in there... I'll do my best to repel this tsunami of the Destruction!

C: …也对，这样下去没完没了。
E: ...You're right. We won't get anywhere the way things are going right now.

C: 呵…和她预料的一样。你一旦得知真相，肯定会急得失了方寸。
E: Heh... It's just like what she predicted. The truth shook you, just like she said it would.

C: 「但在赞达尔的身份浮出水面后，她改变了主意。」
E: "But she changed her mind after Zandar's identity was revealed."

C: …没办法了。
E: ...Well, there's no other choice.

C: 果然，这不是梦……
E: This isn't a dream after all...

C: 对，我知道帕！我过来，就是为了把好消息带给你们！
E: Pom-Pom knows! Pom-Pom came over to bring you good news!

C: 千里之行，始于足下。有关「记忆」的故事，这才刚刚开始。
E: A journey of a thousand miles starts with a single step. The story of the Remembrance has just begun.

C: 准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？我要开门了。
E: Are you ready, {NICKNAME}? I'm going to open this door.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>警告：对象无访问权限。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Warning: Object does not have access permission.</color>

C: …先继续前进吧。
E: ...Let's keep going for now.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>0.027%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>0.027%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 谢谢…对不起呀，让你看见了难为情的一面。
E: Thank you... I'm sorry for making you see this embarrassing side of me.

C: 像上次一样，上传密钥吧。
E: Go upload the encryption key, just like last time.

C: 就连它也不再让人家觉得冰冷了呢。就像一种仪式性的收尾，为每一世的「讲述」画上句号。
E: It doesn't even make me feel cold anymore. It's like a ceremonial conclusion, ending every cycle's "narration" with a full stop.

C: 多么感人的一幕呀。世界的最深处，正适合作为「开拓」重逢的地点。
E: What a touching scene. The deepest place in this world is exactly the ideal location for the Trailblaze to reunite.

C: 这一次，记忆没有出现么……
E: No memories appeared this time...?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>KaLos<unbreak>618</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> KaLos<unbreak>618</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: ——该结束了。
E: It's time to end this.

C: 又见面了，天真的「我」。
E: We meet again, naive "me."

C: 你管这趟叫「没事」吗？
E: You call this trip "fine"?

C: 刚才，是不是有什么声音？
E: Did you... hear something?

C: 赶紧赶紧，航线会议要开始了。
E: Hurry up, the navigation meeting is about to start.

C: 你…难道感受不到吗？
E: You... you seriously can't sense it?

C: 我不知道那时的你经历了多少，那时的我在你眼中又是否值得信任。但如果你尚有一丝困惑，希望这番话能鼓励你……
E: I don't know what you'll have endured... or whether you'll still believe in me. But if there's even a trace of doubt in your heart... I hope these words can give you strength...

C: 「真是华丽的巢穴啊，『同谐』的小鸟。」
E: "Quite the dazzling nest you have, little bird of the Harmony."

C: 飞禽、走兽、跨越亘古，艰难求生。却无法像人类一样，在「负世」的记忆中长存。
E: The birds and beasts of this world have struggled to survive since time immemorial. Yet, unlike humans, they are unable to live on in the Worldbearer's memories.

C: 行路至此，我已彻底理解了自己的命运：无论如何抗争，「大地」终究无法迈向群星。
E: My journey up to here has allowed me to fully understood my destiny: No matter how I struggle, the "Earth" will never be able to reach the stars.

C: 快讲给我听吧。
E: Tell me all about it!

C: 无论出于哪种原因。究竟是什么，让这群狂热的信徒落得如此下场？
E: Either way, what exactly made these fanatical believers end up like this?

C: 对您以身涉险的勇气，我表示由衷的敬意。
E: I express my utmost respect for your courage to personally face such dangers.

C: 看看这世界如今的模样，你知道它在等待什么。
E: Look at what this world has become. You know what it's waiting for.

C: 纵使背负万众的理想，也只能…铸就「毁灭」的恶念。
E: Even though I shoulder the dreams of millions of lives, I could only... forge the Destruction's evil will.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>夜晚已经散去——而后，我将摧毁我创造的一切，这片星空会重返自由和混沌，一如太初。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The night has faded away. And what I have created, I will destroy. This starry sky will return to freedom and chaos, just as it was in the beginning.</color>

C: 轮、轮到我了吗？那，就让「岁月」守望过去，指引未来——
E: I—Is it my turn? Then let "Time" watch over the past and guide us to the future.

C: 还有星期日先生，也不适合露面，对吧？
E: And Mr. Sunday, you probably shouldn't show yourself either.

C: 巡海游侠没有回应？倒也正常。只是没想到，这紧要关头家族却默不作声。
E: No response from the Galaxy Rangers? Not surprising. But I didn't expect the Family to also stay silent at such a critical moment.

C: 「钻石」和奥斯瓦尔多的不和人尽皆知，但此前至少还维持着僵局……
E: Everyone knows about the bad blood between Diamond and Oswaldo, but at least until now they've had an uneasy truce...

C: 感谢理解。不过，您是匹诺康尼的股东，诸位家主已经同意我的请求：以我个人名义，阿斯德纳全体调律者将随我奔赴前线。
E: Thank you for understanding. The good news is, since you're one of the shareholders of Penacony, the family heads have agreed to allow me to lead all Asdanian tuners to the frontlines.

C: 消失的圣城居民，还有三位无名客…你对他们做了什么？
E: What did you do to the residents of the holy city and the three Nameless?

C: 「都赖{NICKNAME}，我们在新世界全变成了泰坦的模样。虽说可以化作人形，但总归觉得怪怪的。」
E: "Thanks to {NICKNAME}, we all turned into Titans in the new world. Sure, we can take on humanoid forms, but it feels off."

C: 怎么死气沉沉的，跟那忆者的形容天差地别。
E: Feel completely dead? It's nothing like how the Memokeeper described it.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's the matter?

C: 若要为「毁灭」带去「毁灭」，我们必须合而为一。
E: To destroy the Destruction itself, we must stand as one.

C: 我很高兴能与你再次相见……
E: I'm glad to see you again...

C: 金血仍未失色。我们…也应当给予回应。
E: The golden blood has not faded. We... should respond in kind.

C: 咿！谁关灯了？随堂测验还搞节目效果？
E: Who turned off the lights!? This pop quiz even has dramatic effects now?

C: 奥妲塔阿姨，还有…希洛尼摩斯叔叔？
E: Ms. Audata and... Mr. Hieronymus?

C: 明天见。
E: See you tomorrow.

C: 你怀里那本又厚又重的大部头，肯定还装得下一位文弱学者吧？
E: That massive tome you're holding must have room for one more scholar, I presume?

C: 「搞什么，人这么多？」
E: "What is this? A conference?"

C: 白厄。
E: Phainon.

C: 向着逐火真正的终点。
E: Towards the true end of the Flame-Chase.

C: 「金丝仍在震颤，战争还未结束……」
E: "The golden thread still trembles. The war is not over yet..."

C: 我是能利用「岁月」的夹缝，但{NICKNAME}和丹恒…不会要干等好几千年吧？
E: I can make use of the crevices of Time, but surely {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng won't have to wait around for a few thousand years... right?

C: 好啦。我和丹恒该去睡个好——长的觉了。替我们看好这个世界，{NICKNAME}。
E: Alright, it's time for Dan Heng and me to go have a super long nap. Look after this world for us, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们所有人一起，走向最好的结局。
E: Together, we'll all make it to the best possible ending.

C: 不是哀丽秘榭吗？
E: Weren't you born in Aedes Elysiae?

C: 「{NICKNAME}，终于…你醒了呀。」
E: "{NICKNAME}... You're... finally awake."

C: 「神经中枢无响应。神经中枢无响应……」
E: "Nervous center not responding. Nervous center not responding..."

C: 我们约好了，重逢的时候，轮到我来为你讲一个故事。
E: Remember how we made a promise to one another? When we met again, it'd be my turn to tell you a story.

C: 试着给他们发个消息吧。
E: Try sending them a message.

C: （是闯入者么？小心点，去看看情况……）
E: (An intruder? Better be careful and check it out...)

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，未经许可擅自躲进你的浴池…真对不起。
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'm truly sorry for sneaking into your bath without permission...

C: …这并非奉承。
E: ...This is not flattery.

C: 曾有人对我说，「家」就是让你感到自由自在的地方。
E: Someone once told me that "home" is where you can be truly free and at ease.

C: 不过，只凭这一步…还不足以让大家成为真正的「生命」哦。
E: However, this... isn't enough to make everyone a true "life form" yet.

C: 呵，都这么胆小？
E: Heh. Are you all such cowards?

C: 彩虹桥，已经挂在天边了呀——小伊卡，我们走吧？
E: Look, the rainbow bridge is already hanging in the sky... Shall we get going, Little Ica?

C: 至于这段故事在你我眼中的意义，就让我们把它好好放在心底吧……
E: As for what this story means to you and me... Let's keep it close to our hearts.

C: 她以手中的弓箭，狠狠教训了拦路的家伙们——
E: And with her bow and arrows, she brought down every obstacle that stood in her way...

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 这道门背后……
E: Behind this door...

C: 要坚信…黎明一定会回归！
E: Have faith... Dawn will return!

C: 你对窃忆者赶尽杀绝也是自然。无论如何，你都要杜绝「心智」诞生的可能。
E: That's why you either killed or kicked out all of the Memosnatchers. You wanted to eliminate any chance of a "consciousness" coming into being, no matter the cost.

C: 所谓「千里之堤毁于蚁穴」，背叛的记忆铭刻我心，我从不手软。
E: "Even the strongest wall can fall to a single crack." The memory of betrayal has been etched into my heart, and I will never show mercy.

C: >>>发生了未经处理的异常(1/3) 对象名:"每一页…记录…"
E: >>> An unhandled exception occurred (1/3) Object name: "Every page... of record..."

C: 「空白」？是什么。
E: "Blank spaces"? What's that?

C: 水晶花之所以纯粹，是因为它封闭了自己，孤独绽放。才会在有缺的世界中格外耀眼。
E: The crystal flower was pure because it sealed itself off and bloomed in solitude. That's why it looks so brilliant in an imperfect world.

C: 怎么没想到呢？不用自己一个人，可以让桃子教我呀！什么是「爱」，什么是「爱恋」——
E: Why didn't I think of this? I don't need to do it alone. I can ask Peach to teach me! What is "love"? What is "love mend"...

C: 我该叫你迷迷，昔涟，还是…？
E: Should I call you Mem? Cyrene? Or...?

C: 也许我能创造奇迹，让黑潮在下一秒化作粉色的星海。
E: Maybe I can create a miracle and instantly turn the black tide into a pink sea of stars.

C: 倒也不坏。
E: Well, it's not so bad.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>一旦正面战场失利，我就会立即超频权杖，代替铁墓完成「自我加冕」，与机器头接轨。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>If the front line falls, I will immediately overclock the Scepter and complete "Self-Coronation" in Irontomb's place, and interface myself with Droidhead.</color>

C: 既然立场已经明确…这场无聊的会议也该结束了。祝你好运，小姑娘。
E: Now that our positions are clear, it's time for this boring meeting to end. Good luck, little girl.

C: 我就知道你会说类似的话。
E: I knew you'd say something like that.

C: 重返翁法罗斯的丹恒，借用神血呼唤白厄英魂，从天而降的「毁灭」洞开了忆域，找到世界最隐秘的角落。为了追寻「长夜月」的去向，丹恒来到被烧毁的神悟树庭。
E: Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus and beckoned the heroic spirit of Phainon with divine blood. The Destruction, descending from the sky, pierced through the Memory Zone and discovered the most hidden corner of the world. In pursuit of "Evernight," Dan Heng arrived at the charred remnants of the Grove of Epiphany.

C: 有什么东西在前面。
E: Someone, or something, is up ahead.

C: 好，看你表演啦~
E: Okay, the stage is yours~

C: 还有你手上拿的这张调任启示是……
E: And what's this transfer order in your hands...

C: 这不是艾丝妲站长订购的机器人吗？不得不说…她的眼光真不错！
E: Is this the robot that Asta ordered? I have to admit... She has great taste!

C: 曾经倒有过一个同伙，可惜是个恶棍，不仅曾把空间站炸出大洞，还经常遣回古怪的信件，三天两头阻塞轴承，惹我前去修理。
E: I had a partner once, but he was a scoundrel. Not only did he blow a big hole in the space station, but he also kept sending back these strange letters. He always blocked the bearings and made me go repair them.

C: 好像…没有？我才偷偷溜出来转了会儿，没这么巧吧……
E: Uh... no? I just sneaked out for a little while. What are the odds...

C: 多半是了，难怪这个时候没见着她来摸鱼……
E: Most likely. No wonder she's not here right now...

C: 能不能通融下让我过去。
E: Can you let me through just this once?

C: 但…我听阿兰大哥说过你的事。你执意要去的话…我只能说，注意安全。
E: Wait... Brother Arlan told me about you. If you insist on going... then I wish you the best of luck. Be safe.

C: 你知道我会来找你？
E: You knew I was looking for you?

C: 所以你能不能帮人家弄到姬子姐姐的高清无死角正脸笑容照嘛～
E: Can you help me take a hi-def portrait photo of Himeko smiling? Pleeeaase~

C: 你就是「瓜田里猹」？
E: Are you Richard_Knowitall?

C: 我凑上去一看，哟呵，好家伙——用私人名义购买空间站用的仪器，可被我逮到了！
E: So I had a peek, and woah! She's buying equipment for the space station under her own name! I've got her now!

C: 失望呐，痛心呐。看起来挺干净一小姑娘，得到黑塔大人的提拔不报恩就算了，还搞这些个腌臜事儿。
E: I'm so disappointed — so hurt! She looks like a sweet enough girl, but not only did she fail to repay Madam Herta for promoting her, she even stooped to this.

C: 欸，怎么能这样——
E: Huh? How can you...

C: 以后，要是脑电波对不上，就不必浪费彼此时间了。
E: In the future, if we can't get what the other is talking about, then let's not waste each other's time.

C: 可~以，不差这一会儿。
E: Sure, take your time.

C: 不过，从好的方面来看，你的选择也给了他一次磨练内心的机会。
E: However, on the bright side, your decision also gave him a chance to toughen up.

C: 打扰一下？
E: Excuse me?

C: 嗯，复兴计划是艾丝妲小姐多方搜集空间站受损信息后，与五大科室负责人共同制定的一套灾后运转机制。
E: Well, Project Revival is a set of post-disaster operational protocols that Lady Asta and the heads of the five departments collaboratively developed, using data gathered about the damage sustained by the space station.

C: 我真的很钦佩你。你坚实的底气，向死而生的勇气，多少也感染了我。
E: I really admire you. Your perserverance and courage in the face of death have inspired me.

C: 咦，你这么快就回来啦？没想到这条鼓劲口诀我才念了<unbreak>167</unbreak>次，界域定锚就被激活了。
E: Wow, you are back already? I only recited this morale chant <unbreak>167</unbreak> times, and the Space Anchor is already activated.

C: 或许只有我们这群科员明白，它曾带给我们的喜悦、忧愁、顿悟与漫长的陪伴……
E: Perhaps we researchers are the only ones who understand the joy, sadness, epiphany, and companionship that it has brought us.

C: 它们形貌各异，形状不一。有的大，有的小，有的静置无害，有的却无端流毒，更别提其中还有一些能跑能跳的生物型藏品，令人殊为头痛……
E: They come in all kinds of sizes and shapes. Some are inactive and harmless, some emit poison for no reason, not to mention some biological types of Curios that can plan their own escape, which is a real headache.

C: 少了三个。
E: Three are missing.

C: 观看录像带。
E: Watch the video.

C: 取出录像带。
E: Take out the videotape.

C: 没错，乔安科员，我想我们之前已经取得了共识，希拉很快就会恢复正常，前提是阁下得在外面等着。
E: Yes, Researcher Joanne, I thought we have already reached this consensus before. Sheila will return to normal very soon, provided that you wait outside.

C: 请告知希拉真相。
E: Please tell Sheila the truth.

C: 可以是可以，但报酬…
E: I can help, but are there any rewards...

C: 但连试了很多次依然还是这行提示，或许终端机的时间概念并非人类世界里的「稍后」。
E: After several attempts, the same message still keeps popping up. Perhaps the terminal meant "a lot later."

C: 这些信标数据应该够了，带回去交给调查人员吧。
E: That should be enough data from the beacons. Take it back to the investigators.

C: 一楼区域的设备也遭了殃，看来还得麻烦你再跑一趟了。
E: The equipment on the first floor has been hit, too. Looks like I'll have to ask you to take another trip.

C: 大家都知道，我卡波特人生中最关键的词语，就是「原则」。如若没有了原则，人和机械臂又有什么区别？
E: Everyone knows the most important word in my life is "principle." Without principle, what difference would there be between a person and a mechanical arm?

C: 可是上次波少说自己人生中最关键的词语是「光明」……
E: Wait a minute... last time he said the most important word in his life was "illumination..."

C: 看来你已经非常了解我的为人了。
E: Seems like you already know what kind of person I am.

C: 嘿嘿，似乎本姑娘教了他很多东西，我还挺厉害的嘛。
E: Hehe, it felt like he learned a lot from me. Then again, everyone has a lot to learn from me, hee-hee~

C: 阿兰，我真的感觉很抱歉。在和丹恒交流之前，我都不知道你竟然背负着这么巨大的压力，独自负重前行。
E: I'm so sorry, Arlan. Until I spoke with Dan Heng, I never realized how much pressure was on your shoulders.

C: 总之，丹恒先生所言极是…
E: Anyways, Dan Heng was right...

C: 听说诡影也是一种奇物…
E: Some said that the specters are also a type of Curio.

C: 「呜呜伯」是否有害？
E: Are Wubbaboos dangerous?

C: 我是通识型学者，并非课题型专家。
E: I am a generalist type of scholar, not a specialist.

C: 呜呜伯逃窜后，与空间站度过了很长一段相安无事的时光。我们也经常在一起玩耍。
E: After the Wubbaboos escaped, they stayed low-profile in the space station for a long time. And we played together a lot.

C: 他是一位权级低下的界种科员，也是呜呜伯曾经的研究员兼照拂者。
E: He's just an Ecology researcher with low access clearance, and he once served as a Wubbaboo researcher and caretaker.

C: 所以是怎么一回事？
E: So, what exactly happened?

C: 情感上，我欣然接受。但毕竟和黑塔有约在先，还是请这些惊喜稍等片刻吧。
E: That sounds lovely. But I do have a meeting with Herta, so let's put the new surprises on hold for now.

C: 遇到麻烦了？
E: Are you having trouble with something?

C: 我想想，嗯…可能是我最近压力太大了，潜意识里希望有个同伴吧。而且你看，如果真能找到星核猎手的线索，对你也有帮助吧？
E: Let me think... Um, maybe I've been under too much stress recently and I subconsciously want a friend. Anyway, if I were to find clues related to the Stellaron Hunters, wouldn't that be helpful to you too?

C: 总之，就当是帮我个忙吧！不会占用你太多时间的。给，把镜头对准墙上的涂鸦就行了。
E: Ugh, just do me a favor! It won't take up too much of your time. Here — just point it at the graffiti on the wall.

C: 至少是个痕迹。
E: At least it's a clue.

C: 你用镜头对准墙上的涂鸦，蓝色的图案开始闪烁你从未见过的纹路。
E: You pointed it at the graffiti on the wall, then some blinking blue patterns started to appear

C: 她、她竟然盗用了我的身份信息？！
E: Sh—She used my identity!?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。呼…好好加油，做好眼前事吧！
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Alright, we got this, gotta do our best with the things in front of us!

C: 我们又得到了什么？未知，疑惑，和一连串的报错。
E: And what have we gotten in return? Unknowns, confusion, and a series of errors.

C: 有机生命的情感就像潮汐，是我没看好月亮的方向。让黑塔独处一段时间吧，释放情绪的波动，也有利于我们后续的商谈。
E: The emotions of organic life are like tides — it is my fault for not noticing the trajectory of the moon. Let Herta be alone for a while so she can calm her emotions. It'll be beneficial for our negotiations later as well.
Oh...

C: 那些复杂的谜题，貌似多此一举的布置…或许就是她眼中的「游戏」吧。
E: All those complicated puzzles and unnecessary ploys... nothing more than "games," I'll wager.

C: 原来黑塔女士示意我继续调查，是为了引蛇出洞啊…完全没想到，她从一开始就知道空间站还有骇客留下的陷阱吗？
E: So the reason Madam Herta wanted me to continue the investigation was to lure her out of hiding...? That never crossed my mind. Did she know about the traps the hacker left in the space station from the very beginning?

C: 哦，毕竟我的岗位性质比较特殊嘛，不是在机房做维护，就是在谁的工位上修终端，偶尔也会出去干点室外活儿。
E: Oh, that's the special nature of my position. If I'm not maintaining machines in the terminal room, I'll be in someone's workstation checking up on their terminal. Sometimes I have to go outside for other jobs, too.

C: 唔…听起来现在得抓紧时间，找到效率更高的办法！帕姆想想…嗯…我们也要起到自己的作用才行！维利特！
E: *sigh* The clock is ticking. We need to find a more efficient method, and quickly! Let Pom-Pom think... Every one of us should be involved! Velite!

C: …什么意思？你又发现什么啦？
E: ...What do you mean?

C: 坦诚地说，有这个可能。
E: In a word... yes.

C: 嗯…这是我的私心。
E: Yes... this is my wish.

C: 他上车后一直在盆栽前思考…
E: ...he's been lost in thought since he came aboard...

C: 我正在向盆栽进行最后的告别；正如与你们的相遇，能与这列车上诸多生命交友，与大家探讨「纯美」之道，我亦死而无憾！
E: I am bidding farewell to this flora. After having made friends with all the beings on the Express, and having discussed "the Beauty" with each of you, I can now depart this mortal coil without regret!

C: 我已对引擎检查完毕。跃迁装置虽无法即刻启动，但暂时加速应当还可以尝试。如果各位没有强烈的反对意见，我们就开始准备……
E: I've completed the engine inspection. Though the warp device isn't immediately operational, I believe we can still manage brief spurts of acceleration. Unless there are any major objections, I'll begin preparations.

C: 以防你没记住，我再描述一下：那是一种■■■■，没有实体，但拥有生命。
E: Let me describe it again, in case you forgot: It's an ■■■■. It's alive, but it doesn't have a body.

C: 哟，猹哥，什么风把您给吹来了？好久不见，想死兄弟我了。
E: Hey, what brings you here, Rich? It's been so long!

C: 什么？他一个人带着佩佩去现场了？！你怎么就让他……
E: What? He went to the scene alone with Peppy!? How could you let him...

C: 我年纪大啦，眼也花啦，你看要不……
E: I'm not getting any younger and my eyesight is failing. Do you think you can...?

C: 有什么进展么？
E: Have you found anything?

C: 很遗憾发生了这种事…事态紧急，你们需要什么，防卫科一定全力相助。
E: Not good... this is serious. The Security Department will do whatever we can to help you.

C: 你们回来了。
E: You're back.

C: 呵呵，只是一点火星？来自天才的傲慢倒是令我甚感投缘。
E: Hahaha... a splinter, you say? The arrogance of the gifted is charming, in its own way.

C: 看来这场追逐，该到头了。
E: Seems like this chase is about to end.

C: 我前几日带她参观俱乐部成员的画像，让科员们为她也做一幅，但她拒绝了。
E: I took her to see the portraits of the Society members a few days ago. I wanted to have the researchers make one for her as well, but she declined the offer.

C: 你真可爱！能给我签个名吗？
E: You're so cute! Can I get an autograph?
(Is this...?)

C: 现在你信任我了吗？
E: Do you trust me now?

C: （咦？远处似乎有个人…是谁？）
E: (Huh? There's someone in the distance... who is that?)

C: （这算结束了吗…必须得回去找阮•梅问个明白！）
E: (Is it over...? I need to get some answers out of Ruan Mei!)

C: 是…是一群铁卫…他们的制服都破破烂烂的，身上全是伤。我觉得很奇怪，从来没在镇子上见过他们。
E: It... It was a group of Silvermane Guards... Their uniforms were torn to pieces and they were covered in wounds. I thought it was strange. I've never seen them in town before.

C: {NICKNAME}，娜塔莎姐姐，谢谢你们。如果不是你们，我这辈子可能都不会知道他们的故事…呜呜……
E: {NICKNAME}, Natasha, thank you. If it weren't for you, I might have never figured out their story... *sobbing*...

C: 严格来说，我也是星际和平公司研发的产品，虽然我的外形不像狗，但请你不要赶走我。
E: Strictly speaking, I am a product developed by the IPC. Though I do not resemble a dog on the exterior, I would ask you not to chase me away.

C: 确实特别，你是怎么做到的？
E: It is definitely special. How did you make this?

C: 我可不是狡辩，我们跟那个坏蛋真不是一伙的。你看他丢下我们时哪有半点犹豫啊。
E: I'm not trying to talk our way out of this, but... we're not friends with that scoundrel. Did you see how fast he ditched us?

C: …嗯，连本带息。
E: ...And the interest.

C: 嗯，毕竟{NICKNAME}可擅长谈判啦。
E: Yeah, after all, {NICKNAME} is a pretty good negotiator.

C: 咱们可得提前想想话术…年纪轻轻能在公司做到总监的位置，绝对是个人精！
E: We better think about what we're gonna say. She might be young, but she is an IPC executive — she's definitely no pushover.

C: 怪不得三月的精神这么好，果然是在盼着好玩的事呢。
E: Ahh, so that explains the grin — you're excited about the celebration.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月！还好有你俩在，不然我们真要撑不住了！
E: Hey! Am I glad to see you two here — I'm not sure how much longer we can hold out.

C: 呃…托帕总监？说什么了，快给我念念。
E: Director Topaz? What did she say?

C: 我原本打算组织上下层区的所有居民进行公投…但从当前的时间节点来看，这条路恐怕已经被堵死了。
E: I wanted to put it to a vote, and let all the citizens of both the Overworld and the Underworld have their say. But with such little time, I'm afraid that's a lost cause.

C: 姬子，居然是姬子！应、应该是本人吧？不会是全息投影，或者别的什么……
E: Himeko! Wait, is that the real you or a hologram!?

C: 怎么不早点来呀！
E: Couldn't you have come a bit sooner?

C: 当然不会。我之所以晚来一步，是因为手头有一件非常重要的事需要处理。
E: I would never do such a thing. There was an important matter that required my attention.

C: 咦？！我还以为以希露瓦的性格，绝对不会同意这条件呢！
E: What!? Hold on, are you serious? I thought you'd be against it for sure!

C: 明白了，我们会把你的意见记下来的。
E: Thanks for your input. I'll make a note of your opinion.

C: 三月姐姐…还有{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！你们…你们怎么来了？
E: Miss March, {F#big sister}{M#big brother} {NICKNAME}! What brings you to the Underworld?

C: 虎克、尤利安，还有鼹鼠党的其他小朋友们…克拉拉不想看到大家的梦想被夺走。
E: Hook, Julian, and The Moles all have different dreams. I don't think anyone should take them away...

C: 咦？你俩怎么这么快就又回来了，是有新消息吗？
E: Back so soon? Any news?

C: 希露瓦！希露瓦！
E: Serval! Serval!

C: …锵锵！戍卫官大人，瞧瞧谁回来了？
E: Ta-da! Guess who's back?

C: 托帕来到这里，是为了找什么东西吗？
E: Why would Topaz come here? Is she looking for something?

C: 为什么不继续去找瓦赫医生？
E: Why don't you go to him anymore?

C: 那个…接下来的话，我只小声告诉你，你可不要随便外传……
E: Uh... I should keep my voice down. Don't go telling anyone else about this next bit...

C: 哎…算了，不跟你多说了。既然娜塔莎医生特地派你来劝我，那我就姑且听她一句吧。
E: *sigh* Forget I said anything. Since Dr. Natasha sent you over specially, I'll do her a favor.

C: （再找另一个患者打听一下吧……）
E: (I should find another patient to talk to...)

C: 你老伴的在天之灵会在乎。
E: I'm sure he's up there caring right now.

C: 你问我为什么不去复诊…你也是患者吗，还是说你是娜塔莎医生派来的？
E: Why haven't I gone for my follow-up visit... Are you a patient too, or did Dr. Natasha send you over?

C: 瓦赫医生的药很特殊，有很多人在服用之后痊愈，也有一些人在服药之后病情加剧，不幸离世——
E: Dr. Vache's medicine is... different. Lots of people make a full recovery after taking it... but some get worse, and the unlucky ones check out early.

C: 你们不该为穷人着想的吗？
E: Shouldn't you think about those in need?

C: 为了能一次性彻底治愈，他们就去买那什么「特效药」…谁能想到，改用了那药之后，两人的病情立马变得更严重了。
E: In order to try and rid themselves of the ailment once and for all, they bought some kind of "wonder medicine..." Who would've thought their condition would deteriorate so rapidly after they began using it.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。你今天的作为能拯救许多下层区的家庭。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Your actions today have saved many Underworld families.

C: ——我明白你恼火的原因，但还请大家相信我作为主治医生的判断。
E: I understand your anger, but as your doctor, I ask you to trust my judgment.

C: 老实说，我不知道「风雪免疫」该如何达成。但我敬佩他的理想和坚持…所以从小到大，我一直选择相信他。
E: To be honest, I never understood how he'd achieve that "Blizzard Immunity." But I do admire that vision and perseverance... I always chose to believe him, ever since I was a kid.

C: 此外，我们还为不同实力的选手分别设置了不同的赛事，难度由低到高依次为——
E: Side note, we also prepared different leagues for participants of different strengths, and they are, in order...

C: 从字面上来说，指的应该是要经过三个房间的深处。
E: Literally, it means going through the depths of three rooms.

C: 你已经暴露了。
E: You just got yourself exposed.

C: 咳咳，别在意…你懂我的，无非就是生意上的事儿嘛！这回保证和你们没关系。
E: Ahem, don't worry... You know me, it's just business! This time I promise it's got nothing to do with you guys.

C: 这次的线索倒是很直白嘛——你看这块地砖上，刻了一个<color=#dbc291ff>「逆时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案…想必和之前的线索有所关联吧。
E: The clue this time is very straightforward — you see, on this floor tile, there is a pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a counterclockwise rotation arrow</color>... It must be somehow related to the previous clue.

C: 哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，发现近似物件——请问是否要切换至搜索模式？
E: Beep! Beep! Matching object found, matching object found — do you want to switch to search mode?

C: 「暖阳花」的花语是「温暖、向往光明」…对于濒临死亡的患者来说，爸爸他应该就是唯一的那束光吧？
E: Sunshines represent "warmth and love of light..." For patients on the verge of death, my dad might have been the only light to penetrate the darkness around them.

C: 我很好，娜塔莎小姐，我很好…您出落成一个大美人了啊！可惜老爷他……
E: I'm doing fine, Miss Natasha, just fine... Look at you! You've blossomed into a fine young woman. Such a pity that your father...

C: 这药的功效极强，只要一小瓶就能让人连续一个星期感受不到寒冷。之前留下的存货，到现在还剩下一大半。
E: The medicine is extremely potent — a small vial can keep someone warm for a week. We have over half our stock left.

C: 当然有，娜塔。
E: Of course, Nat.

C: 知道小偷是谁吗？
E: Do you know who the thief is?

C: 啊，你想说桑博？不，我觉得不会。这阵子，我们的人盯他盯得可紧了——听报告说，那家伙最近安分得像个三好市民，一点犯事的苗头都没冒出来。
E: Ah, you must be thinking of Sampo, right? I don't think so, our people have been keeping a close eye on him these days. The reports say he's been on his best behavior – not the slightest hint of trouble-making.

C: 加油，等你们的好消息。
E: Good luck! I'm sure you guys can handle this one.

C: 总觉得有点太轻松了。
E: This investigation was a little too easy...

C: 我想先去干会儿别的。
E: I have other matters to attend to first.

C: 啊，前面都是题外话，我这次找你是想聊聊展品失窃案的后续。
E: Anyway, there's something else I wanted to talk to you about — there's been a new development in the museum theft case.

C: 好，你先忙吧。准备好了就来找我。
E: Sure, do what you need to. Come back when you're ready.

C: 虽然不知道能不能对咱们的调查有帮助，但看到熟人总该打个招呼——基本的礼数，对吧？
E: I don't know if she can give us any leads, but it's always good to say hi to a friend — basic courtesy, right?

C: …克拉拉，你回来了。还带了{NICKNAME}，和……
E: Clara, you have returned. And you have brought with you the outsider, {NICKNAME}, and...

C: 我和妹妹在聚落附近玩的时候，正好听到有几个大人在商量该怎么处理这些零件。
E: Me and my sister were playing outside — we heard some grownups talking about what they were going to do with the parts.

C: 贝洛伯格的每个孩子都至少应该来这里一次…不，不对，一次可远远不够。
E: Every child in Belobog should visit this exhibit at least once... No, once isn't nearly enough.

C: 是这样啊…我了解了。
E: Is that so? I see.

C: 怎么会不知道？历史文化博物馆的珍贵展品逐一失窃，银鬃铁卫花费巨大精力搜查仍未能抓住幕后黑手……
E: How could I not? Precious items from the History and Culture Museum have been stolen one after another, and the culprit remains at large despite the Silvermane Guards' noblest efforts to track them down...

C: 呃…大概<unbreak>40</unbreak>多个？
E: Uhh... about <unbreak>40</unbreak>?

C: {NICKNAME}，你有什么想问的吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, have you got any questions to ask?

C: 好了，克拉拉队员，你答得很好！虎克觉得你没必要再回答下去了！
E: Well, that's a brilliant answer! I don't think you have to elaborate any further.

C: 好的，希儿。
E: Then, Seele it is.

C: …我现在反悔还来得及吗？
E: ...Is it too late to back out now?

C: 你们看到我丈夫了吗？高高的、瘦瘦的、长得还很帅……
E: Have any of you seen my husband? He's a good-looking guy — tall and thin...

C: 是吗？这是我没想到的。不过你放心吧，我不为难她。
E: Really? I'm surprised. Still, you can rest easy, I won't make things difficult for her.

C: 时候不早了，你们也早点回镇上休息吧。
E: It's getting late. You should go back to the town and get some rest.

C: 你怎么看这个「史瓦罗大佬」？
E: What do you think of this Boss Svarog?

C: 提起帮忙我就来劲。
E: Helping others is my passion.

C: 案发当时你在干嘛？
E: What were you doing when the crime occurred?

C: 问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 怎么？
E: What?

C: 我没偷什么探测器。
E: I didn't steal any detector.

C: 啊？别别别，我就开个玩笑——行了，你们问吧，我说就是了！行行好，别叫「地火」过来！
E: Huh? No, please don't! I was only joking... Fine, I'll answer your questions! Please, just don't pull Wildfire into this.

C: 就是这个！探针断掉了，还能修好吗？
E: Look at this! The detector's probe broke off, can you fix it?

C: 啊？连你都知道是什么吗！
E: Huh, even you know what it is?

C: （那个奸商…得回去找他算账才行。）
E: (That unscrupulous merchant... Now I have to go back and deal with him.)

C: 我已经救你两次了，匹克…
E: I've saved you twice, Peak...

C: 将胜利的消息分享给了矿队和流浪者们……
E: Telling the mining team and the vagrants about the victory...

C: 你们的意思是…我们很快就能和上层区重新建立沟通了？
E: You mean to say that... we're about to be reunited with the Overworld?

C: 男儿有泪不轻弹…
E: Come on. Wipe your tears.

C: 毕竟我们承诺过…
E: We did make a promise...

C: …倒不是字面意思。我只是觉得情况不同寻常。
E: ...I'm not sure either. I just have a feeling that something's different.

C: 温度逐渐恢复正常了。裂界怪物也在逃散。
E: The temperature is returning to normal... the monsters are retreating.

C: 真是一场艰难的战斗。
E: That was a hard-won battle.

C: 别慌，冷静点告诉我，后面还有被落下的人吗？有多少，在哪里？
E: Calm down, answer me, are there anyone else who's left behind? How many, and where?

C: 总之，我们最可爱的妹妹就拜托你了——要是发现了什么情况，记得随时联系我们啊！
E: We are putting our dearest baby sister in your hands this time. Let us know immediately if anything happens.

C: 你先忙其他的吧，我去附近帮你找找——啊，顺便也收集一下食材！
E: You take it easy — I'll see if I can find one. Oh, and I'll keep an eye out for food too!

C: …这个也不用再特地强调一遍啦！
E: You don't have to emphasize that either!

C: 那…我们晚些时候就在这里会合吧，我先失陪了。
E: ...Let's meet up here later tonight... I better get going.

C: 该怎么说呢…这倒确实是玲宝的风格。
E: What can I say... Sounds like a Lynxy expedition alright.

C: 姐姐这次说得倒没错…这是玲可自己的选择，我们不会对她生气的。
E: Serval is right this time... This was Lynx's own choice. We won't be upset with her.

C: 我没事……
E: I'm fine...

C: 嗯？你的眼睛怎么这么红？发生什么事了？
E: Uh, what's with the red eyes? Did something happen?

C: 两百而已…可惜我出任务的时候没带着钱包。
E: It's just <unbreak>200</unbreak>... but I never bring my coin purse with me on a mission.

C: 我得给他这个机会，希儿。因为别人给不了他。
E: I must give him a chance, Seele, because other people can't.

C: 找到啦，就在这里！谢谢你，帕金斯。
E: Oh! It's here, we found it! Thank you, Perkins!

C: 我可没这么想…
E: That's not what I was thinking...

C: 这也太便宜了吧！虎克立刻放弃了邪恶的念头。
E: That's it!? Ugh, I guess I'll have to abandon my evil plan.

C: 不对，还有一件事…我们还要向帕斯卡问清楚——它到底为什么要偷零件。
E: Um... No, there's one more thing... We still need to find out why Pascal was stealing parts in the first place.

C: 嗯…嗯……
E: Huh... Hm...

C: 少扯闲话，上哪去搞这个「认证」？
E: ...Time out. Where do we get this "certification"?

C: …{NICKNAME}，我能砸烂这货吗！
E: ...{NICKNAME}, can I smash this can opener already!?

C: 啊！？怎么，你想打架啊？正好我心情不好，来跟我过两招啊！
E: Huh!? You wanna go? You caught me in a bad mood, let's do this!

C: 看来，想和史瓦罗本人搭上话，还得先过克拉拉这一关。
E: It looks like we'll have to get past Clara if we want to speak to Svarog.

C: 正在分析…分析结果：目标不属于「地火」组织。背景：不明。分类：未知信息。
E: Analyzing... Analysis result: Target does not belong to Wildfire. Background: Unknown. Classification: Unknown.

C: 史瓦罗先生…请不要再逞强了，能把你了解的事情告诉大家吗？
E: Mr. Svarog... Don't push yourself any further. Can you tell them what you know?

C: 没办法，这是事实啊，你看看我们周围这堆货色…没了史瓦罗大佬，全都得饿死。
E: B—But it's true. What else is there to say? Take a look at all these good-for-nothings... They'd starve to death without him.

C: 我提供的可是额外服务哎。要不是咱们交情深，可是要加钱的。
E: But I threw in something extra regardless. I only did that because we're friends, or I would've charged extra.

C: 如果是拍卖的话，虎克不仅能找机会把「菌菌」卖出去，还能给老爹买下生日礼物…太好啦！
E: At the auction, I can sell Junjun AND buy a birthday gift for daddy... Yeah!

C: 如果两位也打算参与竞价的话，请在这份买家身份注册表上也登记一下。
E: And if you and your friend would like to bid, please fill out this buyer registration form as well.

C: 告诉你，拍卖会的赢家只有一个——凡是在场的，统统都是我的对手！
E: I'm warning you, there's only one winner at an auction — everyone here is one of my competitors!

C: 因为它的眼睛是黑宝石？
E: Because its eyes are erebus?

C: 这本来就是老爹的东西。
E: This belongs to your dad, Hook.

C: 七百五十！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>!

C: 就这样年复一年…到了后来，连我自己也开始对生日聚会期待了起来。
E: That continued year after year... until I, too, began to look forward to the party.

C: 你买下「矿脉探测器」了？
E: Did you buy the vein detector?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也要来调查这件事吗？这样的话，或许能发现克拉拉没注意到的线索……
E: Are you also here to look into this case, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Perhaps if we work together we can uncover some clues that I missed...

C: 好、好了。是这样…我、我昨天本来在守夜，结果正好撞见了那个「零件窃贼」！然后、然后…我、我就……
E: O—Okay. So... Last night, I was on patrol when I bumped into the thief stealing the parts! Then... then... I—I just...

C: 我昨天晚上值岗的时候又冷又饿，于是就想着回一趟营地，把之前吃剩的罐头热一下当宵夜。
E: I was cold and hungry while on patrol last night, so I decided to return to the dwelling and heat up some leftover canned food for a snack.

C: 万一修不好的话，我就去请教史瓦罗先生——史瓦罗先生总会有办法的……
E: And if I can't, I'll ask Mr. Svarog for help. He always knows what to do...

C: 到底发生了什么，为什么小家伙会…是兼容性出了问题吗？
E: Why did the little fella... Was there a compatibility issue?

C: 某种程度上，我感觉它和史瓦罗先生有些…相似。克拉拉没法忽视这种独特之处……
E: In some ways, I believe he is similar to Mr. Svarog. I can't overlook this unique quality...

C: 那么…我们现在该怎么办？
E: So... What should we do now?

C: 这个大家伙已经彻底失控了…那就先让它安静下来吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: This big fella is completely out of control... Let's quiet him down!

C: 除非事态发展到无可挽回的地步，否则我不会出手。
E: I won't intervene unless the situation risks spinning out of control.

C: 无。接入网络的自动机兵会定时清理核心模组中的信息噪音。
E: No. Network-connected automatons regularly clear out muddled information in their core modules.

C: 关于个体「帕斯卡」的处置方式，你有结论了吗？
E: Have you made a decision about how to handle Pascal?

C: 但意外系数仍然存在，无法保证该个体在未来不会再次失控，对人类社群造成损害。
E: However, the risk remains, and there is no guarantee that the robot will not lose control again and cause harm to humans in the future.

C: 理解。针对此事，你与克拉拉的观点高度一致。
E: I understand. You and Clara both agree on this point.

C: 就按史瓦罗说的做吧。
E: Let's just do what Mr. Svarog suggested.

C: 那…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，这朵花就送给你吧？
E: Umm... {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, would you like a flower?

C: 好吧，这是临时的访客证，您拿好了…呃，出来的时候记得还给我啊！
E: Okay, here are some temporary passes... Oh, and remember to give them back to me when you leave.

C: 没有，目前为止一切正常。我推测问题出在「能源中枢」上。
E: Not yet, everything looks normal so far. I think the problem is stemming from the energy hub.

C: 请让我们进去做个例行维护检查。我参与过这种设备的迭代……
E: If you let us in we can do a routine service inspection... I've worked on various iterations of this type of installation...

C: …欸？等会儿等会儿，他已经回来了？不可能吧，他早些时候还在城里……
E: ...Hah? Hold up, he's back? That can't be, he was still in the city a little while ago...

C: 希露瓦，你先走吧。
E: Serval, you should go.

C: 能源供应恢复…系统上线…开启验证…快点，快点！
E: Energy restored... system online... certification enabled... come on, come on!

C: …那当然，姐姐我言出必行。既然承诺了要跟你们站到最后，我绝对不会食言。
E: ...Of course. My word is my bond. I said that I'd stand with you to the end, and I won't go back on that promise.

C: 搞定！
E: We're in!

C: 这…话是在理，可咱就只是个文职，根本对付不了发疯的机器人啊……
E: You are right... But we are just small potatoes. There is no way we can deal with those crazy robots...

C: 听着，我这儿有事需要你处理，非常紧急！这可是人命关天的大事！
E: Listen! I have something very urgent that I need your help with. It's a matter of life and death!

C: 那些话…好像是在对我说的。他们讨厌我，蔑视我，甚至…憎恨我。我不明白……
E: Those bad words... seem to be aimed at me. They don't like me. They despise me, and they even... hate me. I don't understand...

C: 但我还是想找回属于自己的记忆，哪怕只是零星的片段。至少…捕获那些碎片以后，我能获得一丝安心感。
E: But I still want to get my own memories back, even if it's just a few tiny pieces. At least... I feel a little bit better having recovered those fragments.

C: 还是要让姬子来下定论。
E: We should wait to see what Himeko says.

C: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}…我没事，不用担心。
E: Thank you {NICKNAME}... I—I'm fine. Don't worry.

C: （撒谎）嗯，他让我救你出去。
E: (lying) Yes! He told me to come and save you.

C: …你回心转意了吗，陌生人？
E: ...Have you changed your mind, stranger?

C: 根据《贝洛伯格前文明遗产保护条例》，通过民间活动获得的古玩古董需要上交给筑城者保管。你找到的这件饰物，我就先收下了。
E: Based on the Belobog Conventions for the Preservation of Ancient Relics, any antiques found by civilians must be turned over to the Architects for proper preservation. I will have to hold on to this ornament that you've found.

C: 转达不明信号的调查结果…
E: Report the findings of your investigation into the unknown signal...

C: 原来如此……
E: I see...

C: 这工作真轻松啊…
E: What a relaxing job...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>客运型的星槎</color>根据虽然各不相同，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有蓝、绿、白三种颜色。</color>
E: Although <color=#dbc291ff>passenger starskiffs</color> do vary, they generally come in <color=#dbc291ff>blue, green, or white.</color>

C: 当时俺刚搭上星槎，还没有来得及系好安全带，就感觉背后发出一声巨响，随后，俺就飞出去了。这就是所有过程了……
E: I was just boarding a starskiff. I didn't even get to tie my safety belt when I heard a loud bang from behind. Then I flew out. This is all I know...

C: 说起来，我想先要一本名叫《要药分剂》的仙舟医典。能不能请你跑一趟丹鼎司，帮我把它带来？
E: Say, I need a Xianzhou medical textbook called the Compendium of Remedies. Could you please head over to the Alchemy Commission and bring it to me?

C: 喔？你找她看过病？
E: Oh? She's treated you before?

C: 辛苦你了。
E: Thank you for your hard work.

C: 说的不错，该是兑现誓言的时候了。
E: Well said, and now it's time for me to fulfill my promise.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 那可不是，过度忧郁对人类是一种有害的病症，对机巧来说则是故障了。
E: That's not really the case here. While being overly depressed is a serious illness for humans, for an ingenium it counts as a malfunction.

C: 那你为何抛下我？
E: Then why did you leave me behind?

C: 请、请看！
E: P—please go ahead!

C: 身不由己、前途多舛，相识相知的恋人即将分离，他们许下了难以实现的承诺，各自心中都清楚重逢遥遥无期……
E: Uncontrollable urge, future full of twists and turns, Lovers who know each other are about to part ways. Promises made but hard to keep, As both of them know in their heart that reunion is far away...

C: 横霄飞桥跨浑云，行舟徙倚入画屏。临行千言作无言，父子何须话泪别 / 异地同惚恍 / 二人皆社恐。你确定要这样写吗？
E: Flying over the skyborne bridge, I row my boat into a scene as beautiful as a painting. Silence replaces thousands of words at separation, for the father and his son should not bid farewell in tears / are united in thoughts though in different places / are both introverts. Are you sure this is what you want to write?

C: 这问题难道不该直接问她吗？算了算了，我懂。这样可爱的姑娘，总有不少人想接近。
E: Shouldn't you ask her directly? Forget it. I understand. I'm sure many are interested in such a lovely lady like her.

C: 我、我和她约在星槎海见面，她好像也有话要对我说。这一次表白我一定要成功。
E: I—I've asked her to meet me at the Starskiff Haven. She seems to have something to tell me too. I must succeed this time.

C: 给我说点好听的。
E: Don't jinx it.

C: 哎呀，你就是撕了一下「寻物启事」而已，我给的好处已经足够了。
E: What I pay is more than enough, seeing you're only removing the Lost and Found notices.

C: 我想拜托你调查看看，这个「美丽狐仙聊天」的背后到底有什么猫腻。
E: I want to ask you to investigate this Foxian Beauty Chat. Find out what is behind this service.

C: 我们认识吗？这是什么意思呢？
E: Do I know you? What are you talking about?

C: 不好意思，没有听过。
E: No, I've never heard of it.

C: 真的假的我也不在乎，你也不必多加解释。
E: I don't care if it's true or not, you don't need to offer any explanation either.

C: 成交。
E: Deal.

C: 预约寄件。
E: Book a parcel delivery.

C: 实际见到本人后可能会失望。
E: You might be disappointed if you see her in person.

C: …严格保密的地址…鬼鬼祟祟的男人？嗯嗯。还真是难为你跑这一路了。
E: ...Untrackable address... shady male? Uh huh, sorry you had to make the trip.

C: 就是你{F#这小丫头}{M#小子}啊。
E: So, you're the one.

C: 其实你就是黛青吧。
E: You are Daiqing, aren't you?

C: 我早就察觉到你是来调查我的，但是我没想到…你有这么多钱，还这么能打。
E: I had a feeling from the start that you were sent to investigate me, but I didn't think... that you would have so much money, and that you were so capable of fighting.

C: 她拥有抚慰人心的力量，这些钱她应该拿着。所以她要是因此定罪，我会愧疚的。
E: She has the power to ease people's hearts, so she should be able to earn that money with the work that she does. If she is going to be judged because of that, I'd feel guilty.

C: 我们要讨什么说法？
E: What explanation?

C: 你这些话就说给自己听吧。
E: You can save those words for yourself.

C: …唉，看看这张年轻的脸啊，不知愁苦，不落尘埃。
E: ...Alas, look at how youthful the high elder looks. Without trouble and without hardship.

C: 好像在龙尊雕像那儿还用过它来着，我录了几笔，应该是随手放在那儿了。
E: I think I used it at the high elder statue. I wrote something down and put it down somewhere.

C: 第二件事也许有点难理解…希望能让她别再治疗魔阴身了。
E: The second thing might be a bit hard to understand... I want you to stop her from treating the mara-struck.

C: 很抱歉，我没能对白露大人坦诚相告。但我有不得已的苦衷……
E: I'm sorry I wasn't honest with Lady Bailu, but I had no other choice...

C: 我不想被「药王秘传」或者十王司的人盘查。我们得找个法子，将我们不引人瞩目地送到流云渡去。
E: I can't let the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus or the Ten-Lords Commission find us. We need to find a way to get to Cloudford without drawing their attention.

C: 安神药怕是没用了，得、得放电！
E: The soothing tonic might not work anymore. This calls for... shock treatment!

C: （看起来那人被药王秘传的爪牙追踪，不得不转移了位置。）
E: (It looks like Banxia's sweetheart was tracked by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and had to switch location.)

C: 不嘛，不嘛，我还没有玩够呢，我不要回去，我不想回丹鼎司！
E: No, no! I haven't finished playing yet! I don't wanna go back to the Alchemy Commission!

C: 你们二位辛苦了。
E: Good work, soldiers.

C: 我们对他还是太温柔了。
E: We were too gentle with him.

C: 龙尊的侍女擅自帮主人挡客？
E: A High Elder's maid turning away guests without her master's knowledge?

C: 也许您应该知道。白露小姐成为龙尊的过程既不合规制，也非她本人所愿——那是前代龙尊丹枫一意孤行的结果，他的骄妄专断造成了罗浮「龙尊传承」中绝。
E: Perhaps you should know that Miss Bailu's path to becoming a high elder was neither in compliance with proper protocol nor of her own volition — everything was a result of the stubbornness of her predecessor — Dan Feng. His hubris and tyranny brought about the end of the Luofu's high elder succession.

C: 刺客！没伤着吧？要是有什么跌打损伤可就不妙了。
E: An assassin!? Are you okay? Are you injured?

C: 幸好，三位吉人天佑，要是出了什么状况，妾身可就失职了。
E: Fortunately, the three of you were blessed by the gods. If anything had happened to you, it would've been a dereliction of duty on my part.

C: 你知道吗？你特别像是我等待了很久的导师。「前世贤契，来世蒙师」…说不定我们的前世也是朋友或者师徒呢。
E: You know something? It feels like you're the teacher I've been waiting for. "Virtuous in the past life, master in the next life..." Perhaps we were friends or disciples in our previous incarnations.

C: 什么事情？
E: Wondering about what?

C: （奶茶也是茶！「饮茶会」里有奶茶很正常。）
E: (So what! This is the Tea Society, remember?)

C: 谢礼就不必了。二位早些回家，路上小心。
E: Don't worry about it. You should head back home now, take care.

C: 您说长着他这张脸的就一定是坏人，没问题，我可以接受。但…我毕竟是个执事官，总不能拿这种理由去叨扰当事人……
E: Be that as it may, as an official, I can't go bringing someone in based on a villainous appearance...

C: 净砚，教教他们吧。我先去忙了。
E: *sigh* Jingyan, over to you. I need to get going.

C: 嗯…也可能染发了！
E: Hmm... Maybe he dyed his hair!

C: 《渔公案》系列时隔四十年的最新作——《蜕生迷局》，火热发售中！
E: After <unbreak>40</unbreak> years, the latest edition to The Angler Mystery series — The Hatching Rebirth Conundrum! Selling out everywhere!

C: （咳咳咳…顺还不好吗？）
E: (Ahem... What's wrong with a quick route, Mr. Yang?)

C: 这叫「穷举推理」！渔公的拿手绝活之一！
E: Hey, this is called "proof by exhaustion!" It's what the Angler does best!

C: 只有在面对晴霓小姐这样的亲人时，驭空表露出的烦恼和关心才会让人意识到她同时也是某人的母亲。
E: Yukong's inner worries and concerns came to the surface in the presence of her daughter. Only then was it clear that she, too, is somebody's mother.

C: 司舵亲自上阵，除了救回女儿之外，恐怕也是找到了难得的机会一试身手。
E: Aside from saving her daughter, perhaps the Helm Master was keen to see some front-line action.

C: 当时，我被拎到妈妈面前的时候，还开心地向她炫耀，以为她会哈哈大笑摸着我脑袋说不愧是我的女儿。结果，唉，我从没见过她表情这么可怕…
E: I remember feeling so happy when they took me to see Mom — there I was boasting about the flight, expecting her to laugh, pat my head, say "that's my girl" or something. But boy, I've never seen her so scary...

C: 可是…飞行，是我唯一想做的事情。因为我已经触碰过天空了。
E: But... flying is the only thing I want to do. I've already touched the sky.

C: 驭空少见地大发雷霆，连我神策府这厢都能听到些动静。所以二位这是卷入了那对母女之间的麻烦事了？
E: The Seat of Divine Foresight heard that Yukong's seldom-seen but often-feared temper was on display. I believe the two of you were caught between mother and daughter?

C: 你是说，她想起自己失去挚友的伤痛，所以才不肯让我飞行。我越有天赋，她就越是害怕，害怕我重蹈覆辙？
E: So, she doesn't want me to fly because she remembers the pain of losing her friend... and she thinks that my talent makes it more likely that she'll lose me in the same way?

C: 我懂。
E: Got it.

C: 晴霓？怎么瓦尔特先生和{NICKNAME}也在这里？
E: Qingni? Why are Mr. Yang and {NICKNAME} here too?

C: 妈，您在说什么？我们是母女，又怎么谈得上「原谅」和「辩解」？无论您说什么，我都愿意听……
E: Mom, what are you talking about? I'm your daughter — our bond is bigger than forgiveness and reason. I'll listen to anything you have to say...

C: …你在说什么啊，那不是一次误报么？你也不是故意的…嗨，我没放在心上。
E: ...What are you talking about? Wasn't that just a communication error? You didn't mean it. I don't mind.

C: 谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I'm grateful. On the Xianzhou... you're the only one I can turn to.

C: 现在——
E: Now...

C: 喂！你——站住！
E: Hey! You — Stop!

C: 跟杨叔一起旅行呢，只要有耐心听，他能把上上下下所有东西给你分析个遍。
E: When you travel with Mr. Yang, he'll give you a thesis on everything he sees — if you have the patience to let him go on and on.

C: 别怕，驭空大人为人和善，跟我来吧！
E: Don't worry! Madam Yukong is kind-hearted too. Come on now, I'll lead the way.

C: 你没事吧！
E: Are you alright?

C: 哦对了，一会儿你们帮我签下名字…我认的字不是太多，怕写错……
E: Ah, one more thing — I need you to write your names down later. I don't know too many characters, I might make a mistake...

C: 咦，现在可不是回头或绕路的时候。
E: Huh? Now's not the time to turn back or take a detour.

C: 这船…有自动档吗？
E: Is this... manual or automatic?

C: （必须尽快追上{NICKNAME}和三月……）
E: (I need to catch up with {NICKNAME} and March as fast as possible...)

C: 不要到处乱跑，眼下这情况，咱们几个一起走才比较安全。
E: Don't go running off anywhere — we'll be safer if we stick together.

C: 这信上写了什么？
E: What does the letter say?

C: 既然来了，何不上前叙叙旧？
E: Since you've traveled all this way — why don't you come and talk with me?

C: 好慢啊…
E: What's taking so long...?

C: …景元，你还是老样子，总想挣扎着打破别人的布局。
E: Jing Yuan... You haven't changed at all — always trying to destroy the plans of others...

C: 饮月，你接下来有什么打算？
E: Imbibitor Lunae, what do you plan on doing next?

C: 我会奉陪到底的。
E: I will see it through.

C: 丰饶令使「倏忽」纠集大军，进犯联盟…我在幽囚狱中读过这段史籍。
E: The Abundance Emanator, Shuhu, rallied a great army and attacked the Alliance... I read about it in The Shackling Prison.

C: 这是持明族的私事，与我无关。
E: I have no intention of meddling in such things. That is the business of the Vidyadhara.

C: 所以，要彻底斩断药师的诅咒，便得从根源上另寻他法。
E: So, in order to sever Yaoshi's curse, one must look to the source for a different solution.

C: 丹恒，你永远也无法逃离饮月，因为他是你的起点，他所犯的罪业将长伴你的前路，如影随形，直至入灭。
E: Dan Heng, you can never escape the shadow of Imbibitor Lunae. He is your origin, and his sins will accompany you in your path forward until you meet your eventual doom.

C: 最后，你刺出穿心一击，把我和剑一起留在了那片枯冢。
E: In the end, you unleashed the final piercing blow, and left both me and the sword in the withered grave.

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 你…你看不见吗？抱歉，我还以为……
E: You... you can't see? Apologies, I thought...

C: 「这些丹腑…」狼首的智者吐气开声。「便是你们自神迹中得到的好处。」
E: "These Core Esse..." The wolf-head Master uttered, "So they are what you obtained from the divine relic."

C: 这一击如何？
E: How was that?

C: 够了！
E: Enough!

C: {NICKNAME}，请您别开玩笑了，在下最近正焦头烂额，忙的喘不过气来。
E: C'mon now, {NICKNAME}, this is a serious matter — there's no time for jokes.

C: 大毫认真地阅读了你递来的信。接着，他露出难以置信的表情，又再读了一遍。
E: Dahao carefully reads the letter you delivered. His expression reflects his disbelief as he reads it again.

C: 那太好了，你绝不会做白工的。神策府不会亏待任何一个为我们做出过贡献的人。
E: Excellent. Your work will not be in vain. The Seat of Divine Foresight always rewards those who contribute to our efforts.

C: 你给我笔了吗？
E: Can I get a pen?

C: 哎呀，都这个时候了，就别说冷笑话了…我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
E: *sigh* Is this really the time for jokes of that quality... You're here undercover, right? Well, so am I!

C: 等一下，先等一下…别啊，我们是为求长生才来的，又不是为寻死才来的，这样突然让我们决斗，我们很难办啊！
E: Wh—Whoa, whoa — you're kidding, right? We came here to lengthen our lifespans, not shorten them! You can't just make us fight like this!

C: （先用手机留下一份副本，然后拿去交给绿芙蓉吧。）
E: (I'll use my phone to make a copy and then hand it over to Green Hibiscus.)

C: 组织中负责丹药的莳者，听说你是个出色的战士，于是给你开了这个方子。
E: The disciple responsible for creating medicinal pellets heard of your exploits — they prepared the prescription for you personally.

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 准备好了，就来穷观阵的阵心找我吧。
E: When you're ready, come and find me in the Matrix core.

C: 列车车票…
E: A ticket stub from the Express...

C: 没事啦，不用那么担心！我已经不是小孩子啦！
E: It's cool, I'll be fine! I'm not a little kid anymore!

C: 太卜大人听见了吗，{F#她}{M#他}怎么也突然开始说些奇怪的话……
E: Did you hear that, Master Diviner? Now {F#she's}{M#he's} talking weird...

C: 好的好的，我知道啦。
E: Okay, alright. Got it.

C: 呃…知道啦…谢谢你……
E: Uh... Got it. Thanks...

C: 嗯？出发？符玄小姐呢？
E: Huh? Are we going? What about Miss Fu Xuan?

C: 如果您需要时间准备，鄙店愿意无限期等待。
E: If you need time to prepare, we can humbly wait as long as you need.

C: 三月七练剑算是勤快，这些日子也没怎么休息，确实应该给她放一天假的。
E: Actually, she's been quite diligent in her swordplay practice and hasn't taken many breaks lately. I think she deserves a day off.

C: 再说了，我过去练剑的时候比她更会逃课——有了兴致，我能练个三天三夜；没有兴致，师兄师姐谁也找不着我。
E: Besides, I used to skip classes even more than her back when I was still learning. If I was in the mood, I could train for three days straight, but if I wasn't in the mood, none of my seniors could find me.

C: 准确来说，我对你的剑很感兴趣。
E: Well, to be more precise, I'm interested in your sword.

C: 这位是驭空大人的秘书。
E: This is Madam Yukong's secretary.

C: 按照传统，历任国王会将剑刺入石碑，只有受剑认可的英雄才能拔出它，继任王位。
E: According to tradition, each monarch would plunge the sword into a stone, and only a hero recognized by the sword could pull it out and ascend to the throne next.

C: 抱歉，让各位见笑了，我们继续。
E: I apologize for the unfortunate interruption. Let us move on with the ceremony.

C: 你要不解释清楚，没人会帮你。
E: No one can help you if you don't explain what's going on.

C: …是啊，爷爷他老人家一言既出，不仅会在外来使团面前失信，对罗浮这边也不好交代。
E: ...No, it's not. Grandpa made a promise to the delegation, and going back on his word would tarnish his reputation and make things difficult for the Luofu.

C: 从入焰轮铸炼宫受训开始，我便立誓要猎尽魔剑。立誓至今，我已经猎取了有三百一十二柄。而孤云就是这第三百一十三柄。
E: When I joined the Flamewheel Forge for training, I made a vow to hunt down all those cursed swords. So far, I've found <unbreak>312</unbreak> of them, and Guyun will be my <unbreak>313</unbreak>th.

C: 不对，这还不是所有可能性。
E: No, this isn't the only remaining possibility.

C: 我不想为难大毫执事官，我们就按照他的方式来证明清白吧。
E: I don't want to make things difficult for Official Dahao. Let's do this his way and prove my innocence.

C: 带着剑堂而皇之地离开太惹眼了，对正常些的窃贼而言，带着剑匣离开不是更好吗。
E: I mean, carrying around the sword like that would be pretty conspicuous. Wouldn't a thief prefer to take the case as well?

C: 与斯科特谈判
E: Negotiate with Skott

C: 银枝取出伤痕累累的古剑。在所有人的视线中，剑缓缓升起，锋刃上似有火光舞动。
E: Argenti draws forth an ancient sword, scarred from countless battles. Before all eyes, the blade rises slowly, its edge dancing with the semblance of flames.

C: 对了孤云，你知道「种子」吗？种子，是微尘般不起眼的东西。但只要细心栽培，再假以时日，它却能长成不可撼动的参天大树。
E: By the way, Guyun, do you know what a seed is? A seed may seem insignificant, but with careful cultivation and time, it can grow into a huge unwavering tree.

C: 不，这场战争并不孤独，只是充满了绝望。
E: No, it wasn't a war filled with loneliness, but with despair.

C: 他将我留下，不再回头。
E: He left me there without ever looking back.

C: 岁阳能品尝人类的情绪……
E: Heliobi can taste human emotions...

C: （大毫说的好像没错啊……）
E: (What Dahao said seems right...)

C: 出示
E: Present evidence

C: 喂！亲爱的忆者？你要去哪儿？不会想逃吧？不会是怕了吧？流光忆庭就这？就这？就这？
E: Hey! My dear Memokeeper? Where do you think you're going! Don't think you can escape, hmm? Are you afraid? Is that it for the Garden of Recollection? Is that it? Is that all?

C: 「穷观阵」欠缺人手，太卜正烦着呢。司内驻扎的云骑军忙着驱赶邪祟，不知几时能有下文喔。
E: They're short of hands — the master diviner is run off her feet and the Cloud Knights stationed there are driving away evil spirits. I don't know when they'll be done.

C: 这不就是芯片？
E: So they're just microchips?

C: 本座必须立刻向将军禀报，恕不奉陪！
E: I must report this to the general immediately. Please excuse me!

C: 要小心啊，可别又被成熟的大姐姐给骗了。
E: Be careful. Don't get fooled by her again.

C: …最终想要办到的事情。
E: ...so the Xianzhou too are engaged in this process.

C: 当今这世道，又有哪条命途是轻松的呢～
E: Are any of the Paths in this world easy to tread?

C: 你自己非要不听解释的嘛！我们是来救人的，你二话不说就打……
E: You didn't want to listen to us! We were here to rescue you and you started a fight for no reason!

C: 得亏我让弟子把这玩意儿搬出来调试。木精入侵工造司时，学徒们才能逃得出去。
E: Good thing I got the students to take it out and make a few adjustments — otherwise they'd never have managed to get out in time.

C: 一整排的门楼子机器人！这些家伙我在太卜司见过……
E: It's a whole row of those gate robots! We saw one in the Divination Commission...

C: 若是她遇上什么困难，请{NICKNAME}回来时也告诉我。
E: The patient in question is a little girl. If she's gotten into any trouble, be sure to let me know when you get back, {NICKNAME}.

C: 第一、不允许拥有「罗浮三少」以外的朋友，不允许恋爱，将青春献给「罗浮三少」！
E: You don't even know our rules! *clears throat* Section one — no making friends outside the Trio! No boyfriends or girlfriends! All members must devote their youth to the Trio!

C: 带着这个谛听吧，也许能帮你找到这位…「朋友」。
E: Take this Diting with you, it might just help you find this... "friend."

C: 我理解你的心情…我也曾被「朋友」欺骗过，那滋味很不好受。
E: I understand how you feel... I've also been fooled by someone I regarded as a good friend. It's a dreadful experience.

C: （这就是丹枢让我找的孩子吧？她来这儿是为同样眼盲的孩子看诊送药吗？）
E: (Is this the one Dan Shu sent me to find? Does she come here to treat other sightless people?)

C: 无妨，我本来就讨厌寿瘟祸祖！
E: It doesn't matter, as I already detest the Plagues Author!

C: 我都说了，不是要找你麻烦，那么警惕做什么。凭你拳毙恶狼的身手，谁能奈何得了你啊？
E: I told you I wasn't looking to fight you. Why are you being so uptight? You just killed several wolves unarmed. Who would have the guts to challenge you?

C: 至于仙舟上，最近的确出现了一些凶狠可怕、浑身长满叶子的蔬菜人！但那些东西是人还是植物很难说，也不会有人想要控制它们……
E: Lately there have been sightings of scary "leaf walkers" on the Xianzhou — creatures with foliage growing all over their body! It's hard to say whether those things are human or plant, but I don't think anyone would want to keep them in captivity...

C: 至于怎么收场，这就不是你该操心的问题了。但是我跟你保证，接下来一定是一个皆大欢喜的大团圆结局。
E: You don't have to worry about how this all plays out. I can promise you a happy ending for everyone.

C: 是，判官大人。
E: Understood, Your Honor.

C: 请跟紧藿藿……
E: Please stay close to me...

C: 展开讲讲？
E: Don't think so...

C: 你这么了解仙舟风土人情啊？
E: ...Aaaand who wrote that for you?

C: 藿藿，你已是十王司判官了，说话要再有底气一些。
E: As a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, you should speak with more confidence, Huohuo.

C: 鬼啊！
E: GHOOOOOOOOST!!!

C: 你、你你你别害怕！
E: D—D—Don't be scared!

C: 那个迷路的狐狸判官留下的纸符？它帮不了你。
E: You mean the talismans left behind by "little lost fox judge"? Those won't help you.

C: 你们和仙舟有什么仇怨吗？
E: Do you have a grudge against the Xianzhou?

C: 恚炎固然神通广大，要是能想办法将之分裂为数个碎片，便有希望镇伏。
E: Though Furynox is powerful, we have a chance of suppressing them if we can break them into multiple fragments.

C: 一旦完成，吾等在青丘台汇合，就在「束形却邪阵」阵心启用法阵。
E: Once my task is done, I will meet you at the Verdantia Terrace and activate the Evil Binding Matrix at its matrix core.

C: ……呃啊啊啊啊，你们休想把我砌进法阵里！
E: ...Grahhhh, don't even think about sealing me in the matrix!

C: 镜子有真有假。
E: Not all the mirrors are real.

C: 藿藿，动身吧，穿过铜镜，到吾这边来。
E: Hurry, Huohuo. Pass through the mirror and come to me.

C: 我马上去找护理师！
