E: I'll go get the dream nurse right now!

C: 我想从事和音乐相关的工作。
E: I'd like to work in something related to music.

C: 学习…你还想学几年呐？你都多大了，别整天像个小孩子那么天真……
E: Learn... How many more years do you want to study? You're not young anymore. Stop acting like a naive child...

C: 你的声音还是那么好听。我没记错的话，你喜欢唱歌对吧？我儿子也是学声乐的，你们有空可以一起聊聊。
E: Your voice is ever so melodious. If I recall correctly, you love to sing, right? My son studies music too, and you two should talk when you're free.

C: …补救？您不理解…这就是我补救的办法，我的解脱。
E: ...Saving? You don't understand... This is how I will save myself, and this is my salvation.

C: 所以您才会觉得，一切困境都能靠着朋友间的亲密沟通来化解。
E: That's why you think that all hardships can be overcome through talking. Talking to your closest friends about your most innermost truths.

C: 我受够了…我已经受够了！你们一个接一个地出现在我的生命里，一个接一个地送给我虚假的希望——
E: I've had enough... I've had enough! All of you keep showing up in my life one after another, giving me false hope time and again...

C: …我隐约感觉，我能继续站在这里…都是多亏了您。
E: ...I somewhat feel that the reason I'm standing here... is all thanks to you.

C: 我就知道你没有离开！
E: I knew you hadn't left us!

C: 有人在呼救？快去看看。
E: Someone is calling for help? Let's go and take a look.

C: …啊，这位{F#女士}{M#先生}…抱歉，我刚才在忙别的事，没有注意到您。
E: ...Ah! My apologies... I was preoccupied and did not notice you there.

C: 我不想一直沉浸在梦里，卖力地扮演一个他人的影子…这未免太可悲了。
E: I do not wish to spend the rest of my days submerged in a dream, giving my all to play the part of someone else's shadow... I can imagine nothing more tragic.

C: （糟了…得去阻止他们！）
E: (This is bad... I have to stop them!)

C: 尝试自己开门。
E: Try to open the door.

C: 那位先生已经离开匹诺康尼了，他……
E: This gentleman has already left Penacony. He...

C: 你替罗伯特感到有些寂寞。但为了他的生活，这份寂寥只能由他自己背负、消化。
E: You feel a little lonely on Robert's behalf. But, for the sake of his life, he must bear and process this loneliness by himself.

C: 构成我的是莱斯利•迪恩本人的记忆，辅以人们对他的印象和追思。我开始觉得…只这两点已经足够使人为人，使我为我——我不再需要一副空洞的躯壳作为佐证。
E: I am composed of Lesley Dean's memories, along with people's ideas and impressions of him. I have started to feel... That these two things are enough to form a person, to make me, me... I no longer need this hollow body to prove my existence.

C: 不，让我再想想
E: No, let me think about it.

C: 不过，由于预算有限，目前只按照您的喜好，做了三种主题的设计，请您见谅。
E: But we have a limited budget, so we could only produce three design themes according to your preferences. I hope you won't mind.

C: 感谢您的信任。
E: Thank you for your trust.

C: 基于我的过往经验，这会大大提升了大家的工作效率，还能增强团队的凝聚力——船员们因为感受到被信任，通常会展现出更高的责任感和工作热情。
E: From my own experiences, this will immensely increase productivity for the crew as well as team bonding — from the trust given to them, they will often perform with elevated enthusiasm and show a greater sense of responsibility.

C: 星穹列车的列车长吗？在尾翼上涂上帕姆的模样，是个不错的选择。
E: The Astral Express' conductor? It'll be a nice touch to paint a Pom-Pom lookalike on the airship's empennage.

C: 星穹列车的列车长吗？可以可以，看到它的脸，大家就会知道这是无名客的地盘！
E: The Conductor of the Astral Express? Not a problem. Looking at this face, everyone will know that this is the turf of the Nameless!

C: 搞定，不过…这梦泡装置空间有限，只记录了您方才脑海中所构思的三种预案。
E: Done, but... This dream bubble has limited space. It's only able to record three ideas you have in your mind.

C: …好险，你差点就让本能的冲动占了上风。幸好你对钱财的贪恋依旧凌驾于内心难以控制的破坏欲之上——你好像隐约听到腰间的球棍发出了一声叹息。
E: ...That was close. You almost let your impulsive instincts get the better of you. Good thing your love for money kept your destructive tendencies in check. You think you hear the baseball bat at your waist sigh in resignation.

C: 稍等，我来查询一下系统……
E: Hang on a minute. Let me check the system...

C: 不、不会吧，奥帝叔叔明明亲自和我确认过的！要不我联系一下他……
E: No... no way! Uncle Oti personally confirmed that with me. Why don't I give him a buzz...

C: 我与波提欧兄弟在晖长石号上相识。起初，我只认为他言语粗鄙，是个配不上伊德莉拉祝福的横蛮之人……
E: I met dear Boothill aboard the Radiant Feldspar. At first, I took him for a potty-mouthed brute unworthy of Idrila's blessing...

C: 我来之前仔细量了下自己的净身高——早上<unbreak>141.2</unbreak>，傍晚<unbreak>140.3</unbreak>，简直完美！
E: I carefully measured my height before I came: <unbreak>141.2</unbreak>cm in the morning, and <unbreak>140.3</unbreak>cm in the evening. Just perfect!

C: 这入住手续还真繁琐啊…多谢你啦，{NICKNAME}！
E: This check-in process is highly arduous... Thank you very much, {NICKNAME}!

C: 您好啊，{F#美丽的女士}{M#英俊的先生}，今天想要喝点什么呢？
E: Greetings, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome sir}. What would you like today?

C: 呃，那是因为…这很难解释，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: Er, well that's because... This is really hard to explain, {F#madam}{M#sir}...

C: 我能理解。
E: I get you.

C: 现在，跟着我重复——
E: Now, repeat after me...

C: 愣着干嘛？还不跟着{RUBY_B#音同「霸」：短，矮}{RUBY_E#}矲主大人念！
E: What are you waiting for? Repeat after the {RUBY_B#short and stout}{RUBY_E#} master!

C: 焦虑地等待了一阵之后，波提欧和银枝来到了你的面前……
E: After waiting anxiously for a while, Boothill and Argenti arrive...

C: 好好好，你说的都对，谨慎{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Alright, alright. You're totally right about that, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Cautious.

C: …拍照？行，但是记得拍完了别到大街上招摇，我的大头照可还在公司的通缉令上呢！
E: ...Photo? No problem, but just don't show it around in public. My photo is still on the IPC's wanted posters!

C: 发出一声轻蔑的「哼」。
E: Let out a disdainful "Hmph."

C: ——哎哟，原来是{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}！真不好意思，我刚才打牌打得入神了，没注意到是您。
E: ...Ooooh! It's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! I'm so sorry! I was so absorbed in the game that I didn't realize it was you.

C: 拜别飞霄将军。
E: Farewell, General Feixiao.

C: ……我可没有。
E: ...I wasn't.

C: …说实话，彦卿也有搭乘列车四处巡游磨砺自己的打算。不知老师们意下如何？
E: ...Honestly, I also intend to board the Express and set off on my own adventure of self-improvement. I wonder what you would all say to that?

C: 生前？公输师傅死了？
E: During his lifetime? Do you mean Master Gongshu is dead?

C: 就是这份设计稿了！
E: That's the one!

C: 你就说早就被怪物给破坏了。
E: Just say it got wrecked by some monsters long ago.

C: 对的对的，去星槎海如何，那里有好吃的、好玩的，人也很多。
E: Yes, yes. Let's go to Starskiff Haven. There's good food, fun stuff, and lots of people there.

C: 多谢青雀小姐的好意，我不想喝茶，也不想吃东西。
E: Thanks, Miss Qingque. That's very generous. But I don't want any tea or snacks.

C: 总之先来一杯仙人快乐茶吧！
E: Anyway, let's get a cup of Immortal's Delight!

C: 您太高看我了，我可不敢将自己看得这么重要…非要说的话，手稿是师傅和仙舟之间的最后联系。
E: You think too highly of me. I don't dare see myself as that important... If anything, the manuscript is what's left of my master's bond with the Xianzhou.

C: 时间对每个人都是不公平的。他的时间停滞了，我却还在庸庸碌碌地浪费着时光……
E: Time is unfair to everyone. His time has ended, yet here I am, wasting away my mediocre days...

C: 没错，有一些快速生长的坏品星槎甚至能冲破培养舱，导致培养液泄露事故。一般来说，这些培养舱就只能废弃掉了。
E: That's right. Some fast-growing anomalies can even burst through the incubator, causing the culture medium to leak out. When that happens, the incubator basically just gets trashed.

C: 星槎还真是厉害呢。
E: Starskiffs really are a miracle of nature.

C: 你说的没错，我在来之前也在怀疑自己，我无比熟悉星槎制造的每一步，真的有必要来这里实地看一看吗？
E: You're right. I doubted myself before coming here. Since my knowledge about every step of the starskiff manufacturing process is top-notch, was it really necessary to come here to take a look at things for myself?

C: 糟糕，中了跑腿陷阱了…
E: Oh, no. We've been tricked into running errands...

C: （我其实也这样觉得。）
E: (I think so too.)

C: 我第一次见到你的时候，你满腔热情，就像是当初来到仙舟求学的自己一样。
E: When I first met you, you were full of passion. You reminded me of myself when I first came to Xianzhou to learn.

C: 当初是为什么要去做工匠呢？不会也像我一样，是家里逼着我去找个铁饭碗的吧。
E: What motivated you to become a craftsman back then? Did your parents urge you to find a stable job like mine?

C: 汝师作古已逾百年，要将他的神识自因果殿深处带回，要劳烦太卜以穷观阵索引定位……
E: Your master has been dead for more than a century. Therefore, the master diviner will need to locate your master using the Matrix of Prescience to bring him out from the depth of the Hall of Karma.

C: 逝者已经回到了因果殿，还阳一事还请守秘。
E: The deceased has returned to the Hall of Karma. Please don't tell anyone about what happened earlier.

C: 这样也好，谢谢你。
E: That's great too. Thank you.

C: 我们刚才在聊我徒弟，卢卡。
E: We were talking about my student, Luka.

C: 主角的宿命就是当工具人…
E: Protagonist, at your service...

C: 据我了解，卢卡那孩子虽然有时会热情过了头…但他绝对不是个莽撞的人。他这次的行为…确实有些反常。
E: It's easy for Luka to get ahead of himself sometimes... but I've never seen him this headstrong. It does make me wonder...

C: 没想到，原来你不止四肢发达啊。
E: So, you do have a brain somewhere in all that muscle.

C: ——你的第二个试炼也就算完成了，是吧？
E: ...And trial two will be complete.

C: 哈哈哈，没错！怎么，你这不是也热血沸腾了吗，希儿？
E: Hahaha, that's right! What's up? Starting to get into it, Seele?

C: 检索完成。卢卡，熔锤镇出身，磐岩镇搏击擂台赛二十八届冠军得主，「地火」代理首领奥列格的爱徒。
E: Query complete. Luka, born in Moltammerville, winner of the <unbreak>28</unbreak>th Boulder Town Fight King Challenge. Beloved student of Oleg, acting chief of Wildfire.

C: 这是…什么？笔记本？
E: Is this a... notebook?

C: 今天我们就先回镇上吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's head back to town for today, {NICKNAME}.

C: 如此容易满足，我们好可怜啊…
E: We're so easily pleased. I actually feel sorry for us...

C: 好久不见，彦卿！
E: Long time no see, Yanqing!

C: 事出突然，要耽搁几位一会儿工夫了。容我探问一下刚才到底是什么情况。
E: I'm sorry, but I'm afraid we'll have to put our plans on hold for now. I need to find out what's going on.

C: 那个…刚刚出现的那个姑娘…把我的剑顺走了。我打算去地衡司报个失物案，看看能不能找回……
E: By the way... that young lady who just appeared... she took my sword. I'm thinking of filing a lost property report at the Realm-Keeping Commission to see if I can get it back...

C: 罗浮仙舟压制许久的寿瘟祸迹再度重生，是不争的事实。但究竟是反物质军团的阴谋策动，还是罗浮内部起了叛心，连景元本人也涉入其中？
E: Yes, it's undeniable that the plaguemark, which was subdued by the Xianzhou Luofu, has resurfaced. But was it really a conspiracy instigated by the Antimatter Legion, or does it indicate a traitorous intent from within the Luofu, implicating Jing Yuan himself?

C: 他们遇到了点麻烦？哼，是我！我遇到了麻烦！
E: They're in trouble? No, it's me! I'm the one in trouble!

C: 之前在金人巷你面对的是民间商会，你可以抬出公司来吓唬他们。
E: Back in Aurum Alley, you were dealing with civilian merchants, where you could use the IPC's name to scare them.

C: 笑话，我拿走过黑塔的奇物，打死过阮•梅的试验品，我赔过一分钱了吗？你两张嘴皮子一碰，就敢来问我要钱？
E: Hah! I've taken Herta's curios, and even destroyed Ruan Mei's experimental subjects, but have I ever paid a penny for them? And now you think you can just come and ask me for compensation?

C: 哎！要执行安全检查也不是不可以。只是…得给我几天时间，毕竟事关重大，让我和公司总部沟通一番。
E: Fine! I'll allow you to do the security inspection. It's just that... I need some time to sort things out. This is a big deal. Let me talk to headquarters first.

C: （做个鬼脸）
E: (Pull a funny face at her.)

C: 走起！
E: Let's do it!

C: 罗浮仙舟治军最久的将军，他的敌人，还会少吗？
E: The longest-serving general of the Xianzhou Luofu. Do you think he'd have only a few enemies?

C: 招数花哨多，又没怎么击中要害。你的剑被这么滥用，真是浪费了。
E: You've got style with those moves, but you're not striking where it counts. It's such a shame to see you misuse your sword like that.

C: 谢谢你们。
E: Thank you, everyone.

C: 可是那几个小崽子…
E: But those little brats...

C: 看得出来，他真的是急了…
E: Seems like he just got offended...

C: 失敬失敬。既然如此，你们也该知道演武仪典不过是争个赛场热闹，为何如此上心。
E: Well, well, then you should know that the Wardance is nothing more than a contest. So, why are you so focused on it?

C: …给我记好了，我是医士。
E: ...Need I repeat myself again? I'm a healer.

C: 要窒息了。
E: I can hardly breathe.

C: 这些步离人是怎么渗透进仙舟的？
E: How did the borisin manage to infiltrate the Xianzhou?

C: 可是那几个小崽子…
E: But those little brats...

C: 至于演武仪典…景元岂会不知道开门揖盗的风险？不过风险亦是转机，罗浮这潭池水沉寂久了，也是时候该搅和搅和，让沉渣泛起，激浊扬清了。
E: And as for the Wardance... Do you think I'm unaware of the risks? However, risks can also be opportunities. The Luofu has lain low for too long. I believe it's time to stir up the dregs hidden in the depths and wash them away once and for all.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 关于呼雷的探视禁忌事宜，吾已交付二位，<color=#dbc291ff>请认真阅读</color>。
E: I've given you the instructions regarding Hoolay's visitation. Please make sure you <color=#dbc291ff>read them carefully</color>.

C: …好冷。
E: ...It's freezing.

C: 让我看看怎么回事。
E: Let me check it out.

C: 等等，不对劲，有什么东西在靠近我们。
E: Wait, something feels off. Something is approaching us.

C: （挑拨，分裂末度与呼雷）
E: (Sow discord between Mok Tok and Hoolay)

C: 如今他们被曜青的「天击将军」…被一个狐人碾成一盘散沙，躲藏在银河角落里瑟瑟发抖。像一头快要溺死的伤兽，绝望地伸手去抓任何一根幻想中的救命稻草，也就是你。
E: Now they're being crushed by the Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing... by a foxian. They're hiding in remote corners of the cosmos, trembling with fear, like a wounded beast on its last legs, reaching out desperately for any fake hope of salvation, which in this case is you.

C: 能坐下多少位客人呢？
E: How many passengers can you accommodate?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>有步离人躲在这里。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Borisin are hiding nearby.</color>

C: 建木也是荒诞不经的神话。但你们仙舟人明白，它真实不虚。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is also an absurd myth, but you Xianzhou folk know it's true.

C: 这地方可不是云骑执勤的位置吧？
E: This is not a location for a Cloud Knight on guard duty, is it?

C: 喂，你们三位，如果不是官方人员，请不要在迴星港里随便转悠。啊…是彦卿骁卫。
E: Hey, you there! Please refrain from wandering around Stargazer Navalia if you're not... Oh, it's you, Lieutenant Yanqing.

C: 欸…连谛听也要问？
E: Uhh... You're even asking Diting?

C: 将军应当对我有信心。若他敢登上竞锋舰，彦卿以手中之剑起誓，绝不让他逃离！
E: Please rest assured, General. If he dares step foot on the Skysplitter, I, Yanqing, swear on the blade in my hands that he shall not escape!

C: 与此同时，金人巷中\n\n飞霄自天降下的风之箭矢精准地将步离人尽数击倒——
E: At the same time, in the Aurum Alley\n\nFeixiao's skyborne wind arrows accurately find their mark in the borisin...

C: 这家伙是…
E: That's...

C: 仙舟人真够胆，竟然放任一个流着步离之血的狐人战奴攀上将军的宝座。
E: The people of the Xianzhou must be quite brave to allow a foxian war slave with borisin blood to ascend to the position of general.

C: 然后我会驾驭这艘舰船，冲破一切封锁和阻拦，踏上归乡的道路，让它成为步离人再兴的旗舰。
E: Then, I will pilot this ship through every blockade and barrier you have prepared and begin my journey home. This ship shall be the flagship for the borisin resurgence!

C: 三！二！
E: Three! Two!

C: 你们也应该和他们躺在一起……
E: And you should be lying alongside them...

C: 咱也一样，祝你们…算了，还是祝大家旗开得胜吧！
E: May your blades... Ah forget it. Let's go and make this a quick victory!

C: 虽然有些不甘心，但如果你能教我，我可以勉为其难地承认你的水平比我高那么一丁点儿……
E: I hate to say it, but if you can teach me that move, I'll maybe admit that you're just a tiny little bit stronger than me...

C: 步离人…受死！
E: Die, borisin!

C: 古之所谓「圣人不仁」，龙尊放下了维系一族存续的职责，便只能由我将天下大恶归于己身！
E: The sages show no mercy, as the old wisdom goes. When the high elder abandoned our people's survival, I had to shoulder the world's sins alone!

C: …敌人基本被飞霄将军解决了。
E: ...The enemies were mostly taken care of by General Feixiao.

C: 我就知道…你一向是个停不下来的急性子啊。
E: I knew it... You've always been so impatient.

C: 景元，我要借神策府那方「棋盘」一用。
E: Jing Yuan, I'd like to borrow the Seat of Divine Foresight's "chess board" for this purpose.

C: 他们自认的罪行中，「将星核送入罗浮」这一项与景元先生的推测一致，不过是子虚乌有、自编自造的障眼法。
E: Mr. Jing Yuan's speculations were correct. Of the crimes they confessed to, planting a Stellaron on the Luofu was a complete fabrication, meant to mislead.

C: 你回来了，灰骑士。有什么事需要朕帮助吗？或者你只是想和朕聊聊天？
E: You're back, Gray Knight. Is there something you need my help with? Or perhaps you would like to chat?

C: 伊里潘，先住手。{F#小姐}{M#先生}，这件事和你没有关系。麻烦你先离开这里，这对大家都好。
E: Illifan, stop. {F#Miss}{M#Dude}, this has nothing to do with you. Please leave now, as it's in everyone's best interests.

C: *普普沙粗口*，看来你真是一点都不记得了。
E: *Pupsha profanity*, looks like you really don't remember a thing.

C: 够了！侍卫，把他拿下！
E: Enough! Retainers, take him away!

C: 你被指控涉嫌<unbreak>70</unbreak>余项战争罪、<unbreak>1312</unbreak>万项谋杀罪、<unbreak>127</unbreak>项…算了，太长了。这是逮捕令，你自己看吧。
E: You have been charged with over <unbreak>70</unbreak> war crimes, <unbreak>13.12</unbreak> million murders, <unbreak>127</unbreak>... Forget it. They're too many. This is an arrest warrant. Take a look yourself.
Mmm...

C: 你知道「先皇」是怎样的人吗？
E: Do you know what kind of person is the late Emperor like?

C: 那你为什么会在这里？
E: If so, why are you here?

C: 卡尔德隆•查德威克，天才俱乐部#79。专精领域包括固体物理、虚数应用理论和轨道力学。
E: Calderon Chadwick, Genius Society #79. His expertise includes solid-state physics, applied theory of imaginary numbers, and ballistics.

C: 螺丝咕姆犹豫了片刻，没有接上「因为」二字的后话。
E: Screwllum hesitates and trails off after the sentence.

C: 还记得螺丝咕姆吗？
E: Do you remember Screwllum?

C: 作为物理学家，我们别无选择，唯有成功。
E: As physicists, we must succeed.

C: 一百种…不，你们有一千种办法阻止他们，还能付出更小的代价、波及更少的无辜者。
E: You have a hundred... no, a thousand other ways to stop them that can incur lower costs and affect fewer innocents.

C: 别骗自己了，查——你打一开始就知道自己趟的是哪滩浑水。你只是选择性地视而不见而已。
E: Stop lying to yourself, Chad. You knew what you were getting into right from the beginning, but you chose to ignore it.

C: （但这段回忆还没结束…去看看接下来在他身上发生了什么吧。）
E: (But this memory isn't over yet... Let's take a look at what happened to him after.)

C: 对于「梦」，我向来抱怀敬畏，因而不常光顾匹诺康尼那所谓的「盛会之梦」。
E: I've always regarded dreams with awe, hence I rarely frequent Penacony, that Planet of Festivities.

C: 让我看看…我这集的「戏份」是督促美梦的来客，去寻找「小镇背后的秘密」。
E: Let's see... My role in this episode is to urge Dreamville's visitors to search for "the town's hidden secret."

C: 我？我是折纸小鸟，懂吗？只能出现在梦里的那种。
E: Me? I'm an origami bird, don't you get it? The sort that can only appear in dreams.

C: 总有些学生，走出折纸大学后就把课上的内容抛在脑后…筑梦学以建筑为技术基底，既然如此，安全与合理就是最关键的问题。
E: There are always students who forget what they learned in Paperfold University after graduating... Dreamweaving is based on architecture as its technical foundation, so safety and practicality are the utmost concerns.

C: 晚上好，逐梦客{F#小姐}{M#先生}。找我有什么事？
E: Good evening, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Dreamchaser. How can I help you?

C: 等下！数量对不上！
E: Hang on! The numbers don't add up!

C: 时间会让过往的故事消磨褪色，被纸醉金迷掩埋…年轻人，我很高兴你还能记得他们。
E: Time will cause the colors of past tales to fade, buried by extravagance and embellishment... Young one, I'm very glad that you still remember them.

C: 他们是「最初的筑梦师」格拉克斯教授的学徒，更是创造十二时刻的传奇筑梦师。如今你目之可及的每一片梦境都留下了他们的手笔。
E: They were students of the first Dreamweaver, Professor Glaux, and legendary Dreamweavers who created the Twelve Hours. What you witness in each Dreamscape is their legacy.

C: 我面前就有四只。
E: I see four standing before me.

C: 那帮老古董非说这又是什么爆炸装备——不过就是外形有那么一点点与众不同嘛…
E: That antiquated bunch claimed this was something explosive... It just looks a bit odd is all...

C: ——<color=#dbc291ff>奥尔拉</color>。我的名字，就叫我奥尔拉吧。
E: ...<color=#dbc291ff>Orla</color>. My name... just call me Orla.

C: 虚构的鸟儿并非湛蓝爵士真正的家人，但……
E: The fake birds aren't Dr. Blues' real family, but...

C: 我…我们奥赫玛自己的驯养方针，什么时候轮到你个外邦人指手画脚了？难道你不尊重我们的习俗？
E: H—How we rear our livestock in Okhema will not be dictated by an ignorant outlander such as you! Are you disrespecting our customs?

C: 拉莱德大人，这位{F#姑娘}{M#青年}是出于善意才提此建议，你若真接受，只怕是内心过于强大了。
E: Lord Liluder, the suggestion from this {F#lass}{M#lad} came from a place of goodwill. If you really do accept it, being overly compassionate would be your only fault.

C: 或许你自恃受到尊敬，不会被凡人的纠纷困扰。但奥赫玛并没有表面上那么欢迎外邦人……
E: Perhaps because you are respected, therefore undisturbed by the woes of the common folk. But Okhema is not as welcoming of outlanders as it appears...

C: 就拿我自己来说吧。我有一家面包店，平时也赚不了几个钱，勉强能维持生活。
E: Take me, for example. I have a bakery, it doesn't earn much most days, but I can make ends meet.

C: 不过缇宝大人前些日子带回了一队雅努斯的祭司，不用抽签就直接进城了…特殊时期，人才总是最珍贵的啊。
E: But Lady Tribbie brought back a group of Janus priests some days ago, and they didn't have to draw lots to enter the city... Talented individuals are a precious commodity in times of need.

C: 我习惯一边感受水流，一边思考。有时我们距离真理只差这一点小小的灵感。你也该试一试。
E: I'm used to thinking with the flow of water. Sometimes we are but a miniscule spark of inspiration away from the truth. You ought to give it a try too.

C: 还没等你看清细节，商贩就重新把木箱拖回角落，用一块麻布罩住了。
E: Before you even get a glance at the intricacies, she drags the crate back to its corner and covers it with a cloth.

C: 您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
E: What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

C: 我看看…钱数没错。稍等，我帮你打包一下。
E: Let's see... This is the right amount. Hold on, I'll help you pack the food.

C: 呼…呼…好，冷静了。你仔细听我说……
E: Fuu... Hooo... All right, I'm calm. You have to listen carefully...

C: 多亏吾师恰是时候地引开了卫兵的注意…你是和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄，求你帮吾师做做解释吧，卫兵们肯定会听的！
E: It was fortunate that Master distracted the guards when he had the chance... You're the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. Please, you have to explain Master's case to them. I'm sure the guards will listen!

C: 帕拉滕说他被关在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的上层</color>，应该不难找。
E: Palaten said he's being detained on the <color=#dbc291ff>upper floors of Marmoreal Palace</color>, so he shouldn't be hard to find.

C: 你这番话点燃了现场的气氛。人们高喊着你的名字，仿佛回到了刀光剑影的战场。
E: Your words ignite the atmosphere in the area. The crowd shouts your name, as if they have returned to a battlefield clashing with swords.

C: 这样食物的事就算解决了，去找外邦人领队吧。
E: Now that the food is settled, it's time to find the outlander leader.

C: 你听说过阿卡迪亚吗？
E: Have you heard of Arcadia?

C: 你认识帕里斯吗？
E: Do you know Paris?

C: 走吧，伙伴，让我们看看阿卡迪亚和那位帕里斯到底在哪——
E: Let's go, partner. Let's find out just where this Paris guy and this Arcadia place are.

C: 说得好！看你的语气肯定不是泛泛之辈！就靠你对付他了，英雄！
E: That's the spirit! That is not the tongue of a mere citizen! Take them out for us, hero!

C: 好一个卖撤溜。
E: Talk about bailing.

C: 放心吧，帕里斯。我会让你远离那个灾星，帮你去往你理想中的地方，忘掉那骗子吧，好吗？
E: Fear not, Paris. I will keep you away from that bringer of catastrophe and help you find the land of your dreams. Forget that liar, okay?

C: 辛苦了，贵客，真没想到这份委托会劳烦到你。
E: Thank you for your hard work, dear guest. I had never expected that this task would have fallen to you.

C: 我有问题想问你…
E: Can I ask a question...?

C: 你们怎么跟剧团似的？
E: You sound a lot like a drama troupe.

C: 哼，又一个被那骗子糊弄来的傻子，在你被她耍得晕头转向前，我奉劝你一句——还是去洗把脸，清醒清醒为好。
E: Hmph, another fool misled by that charlatan. Before you get scammed upside down by her, a word of advice — go wash your face and clear your mind.

C: 我已经洗过脸了。
E: I've already washed my face.

C: 我特殊召唤迷迷登场。
E: I will Special Summon Mem to the battlefield.

C: 是啊，即使永夜覆盖了我的眼睛，我也仍能在这里听见它的呓语，远方的欧洛尼斯。
E: Yes. Even if the Evernight covers my eyes, I still can hear the murmurs of distant Oronyx from here.

C: 我试过了，我真的什么都试过了，但根本就没有意义，什么都不会改变。黑潮，黑潮，我还是能看见它朝着我们涌来。
E: I've tried everything. I really have, but it's no use. Nothing will change. Black tide. The black tide. I still see it surging towards us.

C: 她为了自己能活下来，把你「卖」给了那些祭司。你自此再也没能离开命运三相殿一步，也许从那时起，你就已经死了。
E: She sold you to these priests so that she could live. You were never able to step foot outside the Temple of the Three Fates after that day. Perhaps, from the moment that happened, you were already dead.

C: 装疯卖傻。
E: Feign madness and ignorance.

C: 在记忆外的世界，帕西提亚正聆听着这里的声音，你能听到她愈发急促的喘息声。
E: In the world beyond memories, Pasithea is listening to the sounds here. You can hear her breaths become increasingly frantic.

C: 塔兰顿在上，你已领悟平衡的法则，愿公正永伴你身。
E: By Talanton, you have learned the law of balance. May justice stay forever with you.

C: 呵…别发出这么老气横秋的感慨，瓦尔特——我们都还年轻呢。
E: Heh... Don't sound so world-weary, Welt. We've got plenty of youth left.

C: 荣誉队员，你会帮虎克的，对吧？
E: Honorary member, you'll help Hook out, right?

C: 我早就说过，天外好玩的东西多了去，尤利安他们还不信！我这就去告诉他们！
E: I knew there are so many interesting things beyond the sky, but Julian and others wouldn't believe me! I'm gonna tell them right now!

C: 我作证，我就背过。
E: I can testify. I carried that Sun myself once.

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 你走近控制台，四根操控杆激动地来回摆弄，仿佛在向你招手。
E: You approach the control console, and the four control levers wiggle excitedly back and forth, as if waving at you.

C: 要修改内容吗……
E: Should I make some changes...?

C: 呵呵，看看你心率抬升的斜率吧，我从来没在你的研究报表里见过如此激动人心的数据。
E: Heh, look at your heart rate spike! I've never seen such exciting data in any of your research reports.

C: 还有影视、动漫、运动…运动…目前身体机能已达到人类同等力量最佳均衡比配置，无法继续升级。
E: Also, films, television, animation shows, and sports... Sports... My physical fitness has already reached optimal ratio compared to humans, unable to upgrade further.

C: 我虽掌握了许多深奥的知识，但和普通人类之间还有很大的差距。我想和大家一样，成为真正的人类。
E: Although I have mastered a lot of advanced knowledge, there is still a big gap between me and ordinary humans. I want to be a real human like everyone else.

C: 很抱歉，我还没有和其他仿生人同类接触过的经验。不过你能把我和正常人类放一起，我很开心。
E: Sorry, I have never been in contact with other androids. But I am glad you have put me in the same category with other normal humans.

C: 嗨呀，不提这个了，我还有不少法政科的文件要处理，这下破大防了。
E: Hiya, forget about this. I still have a lot of reports from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics to deal with. Oof.

C: 晚饭吃什么？
E: What's for dinner?

C: 老师你可真厉害！放心吧，这些内容我都做好笔记了！之后我会勤加练习的。
E: Teacher, you're amazing! Don't worry. I've made notes on everything you've said! I'll practice lots.

C: 还好我带着营养剂，不然今天就得饿晕了。
E: Thank goodness I brought some nutrient gel with me today. Otherwise, I'd have fainted from an empty stomach.

C: 我检查过终端上的总控制台，我怀疑有一部分机器人是电力不足，或是和控制台断开了连接，才导致配送行为出错。
E: I checked the main control panel on the terminal. I suspect some robots didn't have enough power or got disconnected from the control panel, and that was why they couldn't execute the deliveries.

C: 我听说售后人员来了？
E: I heard the after-sales services sent staff over?

C: 我们科室的那呆头鹅！到处跟人说什么科室大门在讲话！
E: That silly man from our department! He keeps telling everyone that the main doors of the department are talking!

C: 就是那个没错！
E: That's the one!

C: 呵，没想到你还挺有志气！
E: Hah, I didn't take you to be so spirited!

C: 听说现在最流行的发色是蓝色和棕色，可两种发色都各有亮点，实在太难选了。
E: Apparently, the most fashionable colors these days are blue and brown, but both colors have their pros and cons. It's so hard to choose.

C: 万一它们真的灭绝了…
E: What if they already went extinct...

C: 听说你有事求人？
E: I heard you need help?

C: 哦，你居然是为了这个来的？实在是件小事，不足挂齿……
E: Oh, you came all the way just for this? It's but a trivial matter.

C: 不管花多少钱都行，我一定要得到「朋友」这样东西。
E: I would pay anything to acquire this thing they call a "friend."

C: 马马虎虎。
E: I'm not a pro, my skills are mediocre.

C: 如果真的如你所说，你的摄影技术加上我本人的气质和镜头感，一定能营造出足以俘获众生的摄影作品。
E: If you are as good as you say, then your photography skills coupled with my charisma and photogenic face will surely make photos that can captivate all sentient beings.

C: …这也要我来？
E: I need to do that for you?

C: 啊，我亲爱的孩子们。我听老朋友说起，你们找到了来自过去的歌德老宅，这些神奇造化，一定都是圣贤的安排。
E: Ah, my dear children. An old friend told me you found the Goethe Mansion from the past. These miracles must have been arranged by the Sage.

C: 我只找到了这些。
E: I only found these.

C: 太棒了，荣誉队员！这次秘密行动执行得非常完美，值得褒奖！
E: Great job, honorary member! This secret mission was executed perfectly! You deserve some kudos!

C: 你怎么总是被流浪者盯上…
E: Why are you always targeted by vagrants...

C: 刚才那个小鬼…是叫尤利安对吧？这几天来真是有劳你们俩了，哈哈哈。
E: That kid just now... is called Julian, right? The two of you have been really helpful these past few days, hahaha.

C: 这都是「地火」的阴谋…
E: This is all a scheme by Wildfire...

C: 收件地址是大矿区…哇，他今天居然去干活了？真是难得一见。
E: The delivery address is the Great Mine... So he went to work today for real? How peculiar.

C: 晕…好晕……
E: Dizzy... I feel so dizzy...

C: 拜托了，年轻人！我认识的人里，能自由出入这禁区的就你这一个。要是连你都不肯帮忙，那我就真要绝望了！
E: Please, youngster! You're the only person I know who is able to freely move in and out of the restricted zone. If you don't help, then there is no hope for me to get this letter delivered!

C: 你答应了？谢谢！
E: You will? Thank you so much!

C: 呵呵，你有这个资格吗？别担心，不是什么大事。
E: Humph. Are you even qualified to make any sacrifice? Anyway, don't worry about it. It's no big deal at all.

C: 请听题：质数和自然数哪个比较多？
E: Here it is. Which are there more of: Prime numbers, or natural numbers?

C: 哎…果然。请回吧，等你能答出这个问题，再来提交你的大作吧。你也不要怪我，这都是规章制度，要是破例给你放进去，我是要吃处分的。抱歉了。
E: I see... I thought as much... Come back when you can actually answer this question, and after that, you can show me your masterpiece. Don't even bother complaining, since I don't make the rules. If I make an exception for you, I'm the one getting punished.

C: 我被难题拦在了科学门外…
E: They're gate-keeping me with a stupid riddle.

C: 啊对对对，你说的都对——
E: Ah, yes yes yes. You're correct—

C: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
E: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.

C: …这题到底是谁出的？我要去跟波瓦大臣告状！
E: ...Who came up with this question? I'm going to have a word with Minister Bova about all this!

C: 咦？您的意思是……
E: Hmm? Do you mean...

C: 她使用加热器的习惯？问这个做什么？
E: How does she use her heater? What are you asking about that for?

C: 哎，你这么一说，我倒是记起来了——前几天她的加热器确实坏了，吭哧吭哧地拖着个坏加热器来我这里维修。
E: Ah, it's coming back to me now that you mention it. Her heater broke a few days back, and she dragged it here for me to take a look at it.

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 想象中的氛围？
E: What did you expect?

C: 关于塔米拉的一切…
E: Everything about Tamila...

C: 嗐，其实我刚才正等人来送书呢——我想看的那册《奇谭》家里正好没有，非得从别人手里借才行……
E: Heh, I was actually waiting for someone to give me the book — I don't have the specific book in the Tales series that I wanted to read, so I had to burrow it...

C: 行了行了，咱们先等着吧。我看他们马上就开门咯——再不开门我可要饿坏了……
E: Whatever, let's just wait. I reckon they're about to open up. I'll be starving if they don't...

C: 这么说…是我已经死了呗？
E: So... I'm dead?

C: 后来我才发现老爹他说得对啊——我根本就不是那块料。但活人总不能让饿死吧？我就四处打听求人想混口饭吃……
E: Then I realized Dad was right — I'm never gonna be good enough for those kinds of jobs. But I can't just starve, can I? So I begged and asked everyone to give me a job...

C: 啧啧…前线的数字不容乐观啊。要是能再发明些什么东西，降低伤亡率就好了……
E: The casualty figures are discouraging. If only we could invent something to reduce the casualty rate...

C: 面前的铁卫手扶脑袋作思考状。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他虬曲的眉头。
E: The guard in front of you puts his hand on his head in thought. You fancy you can see his deep frown even under his full-face helmet.

C: 看你好像很发愁的样子。
E: It seems like something's bothering you.

C: 这会不会是放生帮干的呢？
E: Do you think this could be the work of The Unshackled?

C: 「但是前面的惨状不过是轻描淡写。社会人都早早学会了伪装，没有时间留给悲伤，只有表里不一的煎熬——不等你崩溃掉，就立刻会被他人代替……」
E: "However, the preceding tragedy is, if anything, an understatement. People in human society have learned to mask their true emotions and have no time to process their sorrows. All there is, is a chain of suffering from the inability to show their true selves... and you'll get replaced by someone else before you've even broken down..."

C: 你翻开了这本书。书本内部被掏出方格空间，一把漂亮的手枪静静躺在其中。
E: As you open the book, you realize that the contents have been hollowed out into a square storage space, where a beautiful pistol lies silently.

C: （漂流瓶也不知道去哪了。看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (I have no idea where the drift bottle went. It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 算你狠。
E: Fine. You win.

C: 灯神似乎已经离开，愿望似乎也已经实现。
E: It seems that the Genie has left and your wish has been granted.

C: 我最近在研究「烈焰浓茶」的新口味，这店开了这么久，总归要让客人们有些新鲜感。
E: Lately, I've been working on new flavors for my Flaming Potent Tea. Innovation is the key to business, you know.

C: 「忘情」是一种怎么样的体验…
E: What's it like to experience "Unsen"...?

C: 最近的确一直在熬夜，每天梳头都看到掉一大把头发——且慢，你、你怎么知道的？
E: That's true. I have been staying up late these days, and I've been experiencing terrible hair loss every day when I... W—wait! H—How did you find it out?

C: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
E: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

C: 壁画
E: Mural

C: 莫非有人躲在墙壁后面轮班演奏——纵横星间的球棒侠，自然不会有这么幼稚的想法。
E: Could musicians be hiding behind the wall and taking turns to play it? The baseballer hero who has traversed stars would naturally not entertain such juvenile conjecture.

C: 雕塑的外形和「黎明机器」有几分相似，难怪有人说奥赫玛的每一寸墙砖都在模仿那位背负光明的泰坦。
E: The sculpture looks rather similar to the Dawn Device. No wonder people say that every single wall tile in Okhema is an imitation of the light-bearing Titan.

C: 近日，绝灭大君「星啸」的行迹于赛杜尼拉默星群边缘显露。
E: Recently, traces of the Lord Ravager Celenova have appeared at the edges of the Sedounirama star cluster.

C: 分崩的靛石溅起粉尘，混杂熔岩滚过的烟气。
E: The air is filled with dust from the shattered indigo stones, and mixed with the smoke from the lava.

C: 献身拱心
E: Dome of Devotion

C: 死龙的骸骨
E: The Bones of Netherwing

C: 真严苛，就像公正之秤仍在看着我们一样。
E: The rules are so harsh. It's as if the Scale of Justice is still watching over us.

C: 咳，说笑，说笑。克拉特鲁斯，督战勇士中的魁首，今后你就是迈德漠斯的师傅了。必要时候，你可忠于他胜过忠于我。
E: Ahem, I was kidding, just kidding! Krateros, master primus of the Watchers. From this day forward, you shall be Mydeimos' mentor. When the time calls, your loyalty to him shall supersede your loyalty to even me.

C: 歌耳戈王后将她的孩子，迈德漠斯，托付给了我，我曾在尼卡多利的目光下发誓要用性命守护悬锋的王子……
E: Queen Gorgo entrusted her child, Mydeimos, to me. I vowed under the light of Nikador that I would protect the Prince of Kremnos with my life...

C: 树庭的学者们说，这是他们最后一次得到瑟希斯恩赐时的景象。
E: Scholars of the Grove say this image depicts the last time they received Cerces' blessing.

C: （洗洗手再来查看结果）
E: (Wash your hands first)

C: 小机灵鬼——看来，下次要少给你讲些扎格列斯的故事了。
E: You sneaky thing... Looks like I won't be reading any more stories of Zagreus for a while!

C: 黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。
E: The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.

C: 嘿，这个我懂，「再创世」对吧！无可救药的旧世界不值得眷恋，人们应该另起炉灶，从头构建出自己的天堂…等等，我好像说的太夸张了，呼呼。
E: Hey, I get it! "Era Nova," right? The old world, hopeless as it is, isn't worth mourning. People should start fresh and build their own paradise... Wait, did I just get carried away? Phew.

C: 你注意到底座一侧似乎有可以触碰的机关。
E: You notice that there seems to be an interactive mechanism on the side of the base.

C: 身着绣金长袍的史官无动于衷，无人可知此刻你眼中的奇迹。
E: The scribe in gilded robe appears indifferent. No one else knows the miracle before your eyes at this moment.

C: 多谢…安全…拿着……
E: Thank you... Safe... Take...

C: 嗯…有位织者热爱聊天。金丝带来消息，它正蹲守在<color=#dbc291ff>神殿的某条走廊</color>，等待有谁能路过跟它说说话呢。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who loves chatting. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's lingering <color=#dbc291ff>in a temple corridor</color>, waiting for someone to pass by and have a conversation.

C: o((-'ω´- )っ「有救了欧有救了欧！资金链补上了，流水线又能重新开工了，本豹再也不用拿沐浴皂抵工资了欧！」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )っ "At last, we're saved! Cash flow is positive again and the assembly line is back in action. I don't have to take soap as payment-in-kind anymore!" )∋

C: o((-'ω´-  )o「哦哦？有所领悟！这样的话，就可以拥有——」)∋
E: o((-'ω´-  )o "Ooh? I get it! That way, I will have—" )∋

C: 但愿如此吧。可万一真出了意外……
E: I sure hope so... But if something does happen...

C: 您这是什么话！不，当务之急，先和我一起去安全的地方躲一躲吧。
E: What? No! The priority is for us to find shelter in a safe place.

C: 嘿，就知道你会这么说。来吧，按照我们的计划——你可要好好留在缇宝和缇宁阿姐的身边哪。
E: Heh, I knew you'd say that. Come on, just follow our plan — you have to stay with big sis Tribbie and Trinnon.

C: 我…一定不会辜负你的信任，大姐头！
E: I... I won't disappoint you, Boss!

C: 在那星光之下，涡流仿佛被一股宁静而浩大的力量牵引，沉默地吞吐着水面的波澜。它未曾回应你的目光，更从未被你的思绪打动。
E: Under that starlight, the vortex seems to be quietly pulled by a vast and tranquil force, silently swallowing the waves on the water's surface. It never responds to your gaze, nor is it ever moved by your thoughts.

C: 这冥河水真像故事中描绘的那么神奇？实践是检验真理的唯一标准，这里没有欧洛尼斯的奇迹保护你，你决定——
E: Is this river truly as miraculous as the legends say? There's only one way to find out — experimentation. After all, truth is tested through practice, and here, no miracle of Oronyx will protect you. You decide to —

C: 这些怪物真是倒了大霉了，成天自己吓自己，终于是被你吓到了。
E: Those monsters are seriously unlucky — scaring themselves all day long, only to end up getting scared by you instead.

C: 瀑布的流水急流而下，其中好似夹杂着过去的星辰。传闻中，翁法罗斯的一切水流都是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的血液。它们从四面八方汇集，流入真正的大海。
E: Water rushes down the waterfall, as if carrying with it stars of the past. Some say all the rivers of Amphoreus are the very lifeblood of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, flowing ever onward to the true ocean.

C: 它为何会出现在这里？木马与艾格勒之间是否存在着些许渊源？呵，要想寻见真理，只有一个方法——
E: So why is it here? Could there be some connection between the wooden horse and Aquila? Heh, to uncover the truth, there's only one way—

C: 是时候启程了，去做英雄该做的事。
E: It's time to depart — to do what heroes must.

C: 但…她却还没有…
E: She hasn't though...

C: 我会选自己的路。
E: I'll choose my own path.

C: 和我一同，成为人类吧！
E: Stick with me, and become a human!

C: 但它要跑就跑，蹬我一脚干什么！害得我摔在这里，被乱石压住了骄傲的脊梁！
E: That's not all! It wants to run, fine, why kick me down!? Now I'm stuck here, my pride crushed beneath these rocks!

C: 嘿，旅者，准备好成为英雄了吗？
E: Hey traveler, ready to become a hero?

C: 这只若虫静立于一座圆环旁，仿佛星际航路的收费员。
E: The nymph stands motionless next to a circular ring, like a toll collector on an interstellar highway.

C: 你的眼神竟染上了几分踌躇与迷茫…这与你很不相称呢。
E: There's a hint of hesitation and uncertainty in your eyes... That's so unlike you.

C: 不知道，但就在列车里帕！没有人比帕姆更熟悉阿基维利的列车了，车里有奇怪的东西，帕姆就是能感觉到！
E: Pom-Pom doesn't know, but it's in the Express! No one knows Akivili's Express better than Pom-Pom. There is something strange in here, Pom-Pom can feel it!

C: 嗯，它对星穹列车有很深的感情，会危害这辆列车的事情总是让列车长特别焦虑呢。
E: Yep, Pom-Pom has a deep connection with the Astral Express. Anything that could harm the Express always stresses out the conductor.

C: 让我解释一下——
E: Let me explain—

C: 你们有什么崇高的目的？
E: What is your noble cause?

C: 怎么里面还要战斗啊。
E: Why do we still have to fight inside?

C: 我幻听了？
E: Am I hearing things?

C: 开启同步模式。
E: Activate sync mode.

C: （{NICKNAME}，要过去看看吗？）
E: ({NICKNAME}, wanna have a look?)

C: （等等，先别急着进去，它们好像看到我们了，都在盯着你呢。）
E: (Wait, don't rush in. I think they've seen us — they are all staring at you.)

C: 其实，她很关心大家，她说在离开之后，一直很想我们。
E: Actually, she cares a lot. Since she left, she's been missing everyone.
(Woof?)

C: 哎呀，你的表情好严肃！
E: Hey, lighten up! What's got you so serious?

C: 难分伯仲呢…此外，坊间似乎还流传着「万敌是王座级强者」的说法。虽然不明白是什么意思，但某种程度上，也说明他的实力深不可测吧。
E: It's really too close to call... oh, and there's another rumor that "Mydei is a throne-tier warrior." I don't quite know what that means, but it sure sounds like he's a force to be reckoned with.

C: 是…魔法少男！也配合你一下，嘻嘻！
E: It's... magical boy! I'll just play along, tee hee!

C: 她做了应该做的每一件事。
E: She did everything she was meant to do.

C: 或许还没有结束呢。
E: Maybe it's not over yet.

C: 你醒啦？一千年过去了。
E: You're awake? A thousand years have passed.

C: 这么直接，不愧是你。
E: Very straightforward... That's so you.

C: 圣城的未来。
E: The future of the holy city.

C: 我相信重逢总会到来。
E: I believe we will meet again someday.

C: 哎呀，那就不多想啦。无论之后会发生什么，无论{NICKNAME}作出怎样的决定，人家都会一直站在你身边的。
E: Ah, then there's no need to dwell on it. No matter what happens next, no matter what you decide, {NICKNAME}, I will always stand by your side.

C: 失眠总是身不由己…
E: Insomnia is not something I can control...

C: 嘎咕嘎，是不是很炫！
E: Cuckoo, isn't this cool?

C: 能吗？
E: Can it?

C: 哎，不知道你是否听说过「亚伯南安星系大乐透」？
E: Ah, have you by any chance heard of the Abelane Galaxy Lottery?

C: 大乐透早就定好了谁会中奖吧。
E: They've already picked out the next lottery winner, right?

C: 请随我来。
E: Come with me.

C: 是啊，又有活来了。{NICKNAME}你也对这一套熟门熟路了。
E: Yes, there's another job on. {NICKNAME}, you're an old hand at this now.

C: 咦，你怎么看起来这么眼熟。
E: Hm. Why do you look so familiar...

C: 咱这是益智游戏。人不都说吗——「智商高的人情商都低」。我们是高智商游戏圈子，素质当然差了。
E: This is a mind-training game. People always say, "Those with high IQs have low EQs." We are a high-IQ gaming community, so of course the atmosphere would suck.

C: 上前去问问吧。
E: Let's go up and ask.

C: 我想换成*简单难度*。
E: I'd like to change to *Easy Difficulty*.

C: 进入「心静空间」。
E: Enter the Calmscape.

C: 呵呵，可惜我的神性并不能分成那么多份，而且我也没理由毁掉自己守护的城邦。
E: Hehe, unfortunately, my divinity cannot be divided into so many pieces, and I have no reason to destroy the city I protect.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人无法同时阅读两本书。」
E: Thank you, my esteemed guest. But a wise man once said, "No man can read two books at the same time."

C: 我不想举…
E: I don't want to hold it...

C: 什么，您竟然不信？！看来我非得和您较量一番不可了！
E: What? You don't believe me!? Looks like I'm going to have to prove my strength to you!

C: 哦？你这糟老东西坏得很呐……
E: Oh? You crafty old devil...

C: 最喜欢揍你了，快点来罢！
E: There's nothing I love more than pummeling you — bring it on!

C: 话说，曾经有那么一次，我在雅努萨波利斯和人玩过这么个游戏……
E: See, there was this one time back in Janusopolis, I played a neat little game...

C: …你还记得我多少？
E: ...How much do you still remember about me?

C: 咳咳。不管怎么说，无人关爱的脚不够长的老巴特鲁斯，这下也算是参与上了娱乐活动。可喜可贺，可喜可贺！
E: Ahem! Anyway, the poor old Bartholos, unloved and tragically short-legged, has now participated in a real recreational activity. What a joy! Congrats to me!

C: 我不喜欢回忆过去的事。
E: I don't like talking about the past.

C: 蚊子腿再小也是肉。
E: Even crumbs are worth grabbing.

C: 话虽如此，但我们还是放不下那些无人发掘的财宝，对吧？
E: Still, we can't help chasing after unclaimed treasures, can we?

C: 如果不算那些留着金血的英雄豪杰，毫无疑问——咱巴特鲁斯，就是在这{RUBY_B#翁法罗斯}方寸果壳{RUBY_E#}里陪伴了您最久的朋友。
E: If you don't count those heroes with golden blood, then without a doubt: I, Bartholos, have been your longest companion in this little {RUBY_B#Amphoreus}nutshell{RUBY_E#}.

C: 紫色的大胃袋包裹了你……
E: The purple stomach pouch engulfs you...

C: 果然是阴谋论啊。
E: What a conspiracy.

C: 恩维尔像一溜烟似的跑得无影无踪。
E: Avilius quickly disappears.

C: 呃。
E: Um.

C: 构造出我的人说，他希望你喜欢这句话——虽然这不是他的创作。他还说，我应该问你，你是否想知道他的名字——因为你可能会不喜欢。
E: The one who built me said he hoped you'd enjoy this line, though it was not his own. He also said I should ask if you wish to know his name... for you may not like it.

C: 「黄金替罪羊」的记录就到此为止了。再见。
E: Thus ends the record of the Golden Scapegoat. Farewell.

C: 辅祭，石板托付于你了，去交给那个孩子吧。愿门径…指引我们的方向。
E: Acolyte, please deliver the slate to that child. May the Passage guide us.

C: 我也想向迷津提问。
E: I'd like to ask the Maze a question myself.

C: 开玩笑的，其实我会。
E: Just kidding, I actually know how to use it.

C: 你知道吗，曾经我也向往泰坦的伟力，直到我听说老祭司也记不起昨天是哪只脚先迈进的神殿，我就对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹产生了怀疑。
E: You know, I once admired the power of the Titans — until I heard that the old priest couldn't even remember which foot stepped into the temple first yesterday. That's when I began doubting the miracles of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 书卷和水果都保存得相当完好，仿佛房间的主人只是临时有事出门，随时可能回来继续手头的工作。
E: Both scrolls and fruits remain in pristine condition, suggesting the room's occupant merely stepped out briefly and might return at any time to resume their work.

C: 好欣慰，你成长了。
E: Glad to see you've grown.

C: 好家伙，「闷葫芦」先生开腔啦。
E: What do you know? Silent but deadly speaks.

C: 「丰饶」？
E: The Abundance?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「是啊，『丰饶』药师。」</color>黑塔冷漠地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「全宇宙最大的善神，要么是个怪物。祂治愈看见的一切，小到一个原子，大到一个星系。没准祂能帮你解决星核的问题呢。」</color>她玩笑般地补了一句。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yeah, Yaoshi the Abundance,"</color> Herta answers indifferently. <color=#dbc291ff>"The kindest being in the whole universe, probably also a monster. THEY would heal everything THEY see, be it as small as an atom or as large as a star system. Perhaps THEY can solve your Stellaron problem for you."</color> She adds sardonically.

C: 你这家伙怎么做到控制我的脑子的？
E: How did you manage to control my mind?

C: 「一个可悲的家伙，目前的记载看来是这样。被仇恨与宿命束缚，永远得不到片刻的停歇。」从她的语气里，你倒并没有听出可悲的意味，「不过活着就是这样。」
E: "A tragic being, according to our record. They are bound by hatred and destiny, never to have even a moment's rest." You don't hear any hint of sympathy for said tragedy in her voice, "But that's life."

C: [得到些好东西。]
E: "Get some good stuff."

C: 我和螺丝咕姆有个初步共识：首先，他会想办法削减虚拟阿哈的倾向性，甚至屏蔽祂的自我认知部分，但那有些危险，没准会引来真正的「欢愉」……
E: I have a basic consensus with Screwllum. First, he'll try reducing the partiality values of the simulated Aha, even going as far as blocking THEIR Intra-Cognition — but that's a little dangerous and may attract the real Elation...

C: 我自己体验吧。
E: I'll figure it out myself.

C: 「显然。」黑塔开始敷衍，「不过你也不会白费力气，模拟宇宙可能会推演出一些历史上不存在的命途痕迹。虽然祂不会来了…」
E: "Obviously so." Herta explains perfunctorily, "Your effort won't go to waste, as the Simulated Universe might reveal some traces of the Path that aren't recorded in history. Still, Lan won't be coming..."

C: 「秩序」消失后，「均衡」将归还太阳；正如寰宇蝗灾褪去，虫群却从未断绝。
E: After the disappearance of the Order, the Equilibrium will return the Sun, just like how the Swarm never went extinct even after the Swarm Disaster has receded.

C: 你的目光落到废墟中央的石柜上——总有些愣头青还活在过去。
E: Your gaze falls upon a stone cabinet at the center of the ruins: Some stubborn souls are still clinging to the past.

C: 「结论：他具有不错的饮食品味，对一位普通人来说难能可贵。」
E: "Conclusion: He had a taste for food, which is extraordinary for an ordinary person."

C: 「结论：有机生命的思想十分复杂，这正是可敬之处。」螺丝咕姆仍风度翩翩，「他用拳头锤炼面皮，当灶台因地震而坍塌时，他也不愿离开它。」
E: "Conclusion: Organic beings can be complex in their minds, which is highly commendable," states Screwllum, in his refined demeanor. "He pounded the crust and refused to leave his bakery shop, even when it collapsed from an earthquake."

C: 「非常抱歉。这真是…出乎意料。」螺丝咕姆来不及解释，立刻关掉了你的界面。
E: "I apologize. This was truly... beyond my expectations." Screwllum doesn't finish the sentence before closing your screen.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了求药使的祷告。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into a prayer from an Elixir Seeker.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 他以为在玩游戏呢。
E: He thinks he's playing a video game.

C: 「这不是通常意义上的『觐见』。我们是被祂『选中』的。」阮•梅轻描淡写地提醒，「在祂的计算中，我们将于这个系统时的第三分四十一秒开始研究。」
E: "It's not your typical rite of respect either. We were chosen by THEM." Ruan Mei nonchalantly reminds. "Within THEIR calculations, we will start our research at the third minute and forty-first second of this system's time."

C: 你心怀一丝庄严的绝望，这感受很复杂，但依然在*祂*的计算之中。你可以向祂发问，祂不吝啬回答。但此刻，你仍然感到绝望——祂已知道你的问题，也已算出了答复，你对此一清二楚。
E: You feel a tinge of solemn despair, and it is a complex feeling. But even that is still within THEIR calculations. You can ask THEM questions, and THEY will answer generously. But even then, you are still awash with despair — THEY already know your question, and have already come to an answer. You are absolutely certain of that.

C: 「我想我们该走了，{NICKNAME}。」黑塔停了下来，等待了一会，在片刻鸦雀无声后，她接着说，「祂的数据消失了…推演就是这么不稳定。可惜，这次没能把握机会向祂提问。不过也无妨，下次你抓紧点就是。」
E: "I think we should go, {NICKNAME}." Herta stops, waits for a while in pin-drop silence, then continues. "Their data is gone... That's how unstable extrapolation is. Shame, we missed a chance yet again to question THEM. But no matter, just get it right next time."

C: 「逻辑：阻止。」螺丝咕姆想调控数据，但斯蒂芬先出手了。
E: "Affirmation: Prevention." Screwllum tries to adjust the data, but Stephen is way ahead of him.

C: 「我修改了一串代码——调低了{NICKNAME}的头脑温度。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德从电脑屏幕中探出头，「呃，你还好吗，{NICKNAME}？」
E: "I modified a string of code and lowered {NICKNAME}'s brain temperature." Stephen Lloyd peeks over the monitor. "Hey, are you all right, {NICKNAME}?"

C: 「我帮{NICKNAME}强制降温了…」斯蒂芬•劳艾德果断按下了退出键，然后才反应过来，「呃…我不确定…刚刚那一刻，我觉得必须要让{NICKNAME}退出了…」
E: "I lowered {NICKNAME}'s temperature..." Stephen Lloyd decisively presses the exit button, then realizes. "Uh... I'm not sure... but at that moment just now, I feel we need to extract {NICKNAME}..."

C: 祂的光辉如冰冷的射线，贯穿你的身躯，并且毫无征兆。祂的眼睛凝视茫茫宇宙，你无法触及任何一条在祂数算之中的根系——祂向你宣判：这是第三个时刻，#27鲁珀特死了。
E: THEIR radiance pierces through your body like icy beams without warning. As THEY gaze into the vast universe, you find yourself unable to touch any of the roots within THEIR calculations. A verdict is given: This is the third moment, and #27 Rubert is dead.

C: 「我？」斯蒂芬•劳艾德开始吞吞吐吐，「呃…我不敢…」
E: "Me?" Stephen Lloyd stammers, "Um... I can't do it..."

C: 天平发生了倾斜，每个生灵都知道。富有和贫穷不再均衡——接着，不出所料，引线被点燃了——贸易战争在最边远、最贫穷的星域打响。一些跌入信用泥沼的世界，开始为*财富*而战。
E: The scales have tipped, and every living being is aware of it. Wealth and poverty are no longer in equilibrium. As expected, a trade war is triggered in the furthest and poorest segmenta. Some worlds, mired in the quicksand of debt, start fighting for *wealth*.

C: 在#27鲁珀特逝去多年后，一位普通的人类——有机生命——来到它的坟茔前。
E: Many years following #27 Rubert's death, a human — an organic life — visited his grave.

C: 恶魔的暴行。
E: Violence from the demons.

C: 不过，这都是过去式了。
E: However, that's all in the past.

C: 把钱全散出去！
E: Take all your money and make it rain!

C: 好饿。
E: I'm starving.

C: 泯灭帮的进攻越来越凶狠，但你知道，他们已无力再消耗下去，只能投入全部的资源进行殊死一搏。
E: The attacks of the Annihilation Gang grow ever fierce — but you know they have hardly anything left to give and have been forced to go all-in on this desperate battle for survival.

C: 你们过来呀！
E: Bring it on!

C: 「在我祖父的祖父还在巨行星漂游的时候，曾捡到一个带着水晶瓶塞的玻璃瓶。自此以后，财富便一直伴随他左右。」
E: "When my grandfather's grandfather was still floating along the giant planet, he came across a glass bottle with a crystal stopper. From that moment, fortune followed him wherever he roamed."

C: 早在瓶塞打开的刹那，被诱拐的上千个意识体就已从瓶中逃走，而这便是内卡齐齐家族的秘密。
E: The moment that the stopper was unplugged, thousands of kidnapped consciousnesses had already escaped from the bottle. This was the secret of the Nekar Chichi family.

C: 几只触手争抢着把食物递到你的面前，作为仅有的报酬，可你的视线却一直停留在天际，云层中有道裂缝越来越大，直到被梭子的舰群撕开。
E: A number of tentacles clamber forth to offer you food, and this is the only payment they can offer you. However, your eyes never move from the skies. The split in the clouds grows ever more vast, until it is finally torn asunder by a fleet of ships.

C: 这是一场悲剧。
E: This is a tragedy.

C: 「而且是仅存的一份。」
E: "Plus, it's the only one that exists."

C: 在这片数据之海中，文明兴盛又衰亡，国家建立又毁灭，英雄诞生又死去。一个个时代，一张张面孔，共同书写了这颗星球的文明史。
E: Within this sea of data, civilizations flourish and perish, countries are founded and destroyed, and heroes are born and die. Generation after generation, face after face, they all write their page in the history of this planet's civilization.

C: 「也许不一定要生产新血，输入新血就可以了。」克丝黛拉的语气忽然缓和下来，「诸位前辈可曾听说『伊斯梅尔』游行之后，那群籍籍无名的年轻学者？」
E: "Perhaps we do not need to completely drain this school of its blood. Maybe we just need a little transfusion." Chrystella's tone began to soften: "Seniors, have you heard of the unknown young scholars that appeared after the parade of Izmael?"

C: 「你亲眼见过星神么？」所有学生的目光都指向了你。提问者的嘴角上扬，你意识到这是一次挑衅。
E: "Have you personally seen an Aeon before?" The students' gazes fix on you. The student who asked the question starts to smirk as you realize that this is a taunt.

C: 不情愿地摘下。
E: Remove your ring reluctantly.

C: 你们用了十年时间才完成首座试验巨帆的建造，现在你和齐奥尔科夫学士站在它的表面，进行最后的验收工作。
E: It took ten years to complete the creation of the first giant sail. Now, you and Scholar Cholkov stand at its surface, preparing for the final inspection.

C: 「但是恒星终究有熄灭的那一天，在无数个琥珀纪之后，那时的人们不得不面对一片真正黑暗的夜空，而虚数能量捕捉技术是他们唯一的希望。」
E: "But, there shall come a day when the stars will be extinguished. In countless Amber Eras from now, the people will be forced to face a sky of true darkness. When that time comes, the Imaginary Energy containment technology will become their only hope."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>就好像，有一个声音，它同时存在于所有地方，以及所有的时间。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's as if there's a voice, omnipresent across all time and space.</color>

C: 所以，这信号到底是什么？
E: So, what exactly is this signal?

C: 他们「征用」你们的配额，占据你们的实验室。他们说，那万分之一的使用权，发出的声音不比宇宙中的尘埃更大。
E: They have "expropriated" your allocation and occupied your lab. They say that the sound made by your one ten-thousandth authority is no more than dust drifting through the cosmos.

C: 有机体在帝皇战争中展现的颓势，印证了智械在竞争智慧上的优越性。两次战争中有机体的胜利，则展现出有机体在生存智慧上的先进性。
E: The disadvantages that organic beings displayed during the Emperor's War only proved the superiority of Intellitrons in the intelligence race, yet the victory of organic life in both wars demonstrated how advanced organic life is in terms of survival wisdom.

C: 返老还童的身躯。
E: A body that has de-aged.

C: 在书页状的图书馆前，学士们相互簇拥，齐声高唱。从高处仰望，如同一群蚂蚁，它们将撼动屹立了数百个琥珀纪的河堤。
E: In front of the library shaped like pages of a book, scholars are huddled together, singing loudly in unison. Looking from above, they resemble a colony of ants, poised to shake the riverbanks that have stood resolute for hundreds of Amber Eras.

C: 「而这『不可知域』……」
E: "And this 'Unknowable Domain'..."

C: 回溯。
E: Backtrack.

C: 我没想到，如今一个小小机器人的「自由意志」…也会发展到这种程度。
E: I'm surprised by how developed the... "free will" of a robot is nowadays.

C: 「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我正在研究『等价交换』原则的起源。」螺丝咕姆气质彬彬，向你鞠了一躬，「尝试解析：奇物可与祝福进行等量的『数据兑换』。」
E: "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I am studying the origins of the equivalent exchange." Screwllum gracefully bows to you and says, "Analysis: Curios can be traded in equal amounts with Blessings via 'Data Exchange.'"

C: 无数记忆在你的脑内涌现，你感到精神开始过热。你回想起第一个掰手指数数的下午，第一次看太空蚂蚁排队走路，你为什么记得这些？
E: Waves of memories gush into your mind, overloading your psyche. You recall the afternoon when you counted with your fingers for the first time in your life, and the first time you saw space ants walking in a straight line. Why do you remember these?

C: 「我们更换了节目单。『阿基维利』的时代落幕，古典艺术就已死去。今天大家都爱看动作片。告诉我你的选择。」一个男子声音传来。
E: "We've changed the program. The era of Akivili has ended, and classical arts are dead. Nowadays, action movies are the crowd-pleasers. Tell me your choice." A man's voice says.

C: 阳光烤灼大地，你嚼着草叶，迎面走来一群壮汉——他们是肆意作乱的街头强盗，身后跟着一群雇佣军队。
E: You are grazing grass on the sun-baked earth when a bunch of beefy guys comes your way. They are the street bandits who wreak havoc wherever they go. They are followed by a team of mercenaries.

C: 你骑在斯诺德兰野猪背上遍游草原！它正发疯驰骋，你在它的背上咯咯发笑，它想甩开你，这令你更开心！你俯身拉紧牵绳，却发现它驮的布袋里有不少好宝贝…
E: You are traveling across a grassland on the back of a Snowland Wildboar! You laugh giddily while it gallops at full tilt. The harder it tries to get rid of you, the more delighted you are! As you lean down to pull the rein, you notice a satchel full of little treasures...

C: 你睁开眼，发现眼前仍然是熟悉景象。「你翻开了一张空白牌，虽然概率不高，但也是结果中的一种。」荷官说道。
E: You open your eyes and find that nothing has changed. "You've drawn a blank card. The chance of drawing one is low, but it is still one of the possible outcomes," The dealer explains.

C: 「咔擦…咔擦……」
E: "Click... Click..."

C: 没有大人物回应你！你突然认清了现实…你对着空地吸了一口烟，沿着空旷的街道一直往后走…最终你靠在了水泥柱前，你的面容变得颓唐、忧愁。
E: None of the big shots responds to you! Suddenly, you come to terms with reality... You take a puff of cigarette while staring at empty space, then walk back along the deserted street... At last, you lean on a cement pillar, looking low-spirited and crestfallen.

C: 你淡然地瞥向身边的挑战者，塔塔洛夫的宫廷大厨埃罗琳，尝遍一千种垃圾的分子食客瑞赛可，还有举世闻名的垃圾美食家贾克佛，全都是些难缠的家伙。
E: You casually glance around at the challengers: Tatalov's palace chef, Erolyn, the molecular eater Risaac, who's tasted a thousand kinds of garbage, and the world-famous garbage gourmand Jacques Feaux. Every one of them is a demanding prospect.

C: 区区一个垃圾桶也敢命令你？你挥舞起球棒，冲向冉比希三世，准备夺了这皇帝的鸟位。
E: A mere trashcan dares to order you around? You swing your bat and charge at Rumbas the Third, ready to snatch this emperor's perch.

C: 杜威特博士的警世名言，杜威特博士的笑话与冷笑话全集，杜威特博士给毕业生的寄语。难道博识学会联名款只联名了杜威特博士不成？
E: Doctor DeWitt's cautionary maxims. Doctor DeWitt's full collection of jokes and dry jokes. Doctor DeWitt's speech to graduates. What, did the Intelligentsia Guild only use Doctor DeWitt in this collaboration?

C: 他们的目光从你的发梢滑落，待到你重新睁开眼睛，身前唯余数只羽翼斑斓的蝴蝶。
E: Their gazes fall from the ends of your hair, waiting for you to open your eyes once more, where only a few butterflies with iridescent wings are left.

C: 颜料七倒八斜地落在画纸上，宛如陈年的污垢，撒在沉眠的妖怪脸上。看来，它并不认可你的后宇宙主义抽象派艺术。
E: Paint falls haphazardly on the paper, sprinkling across the face of the sleeping monster like grime accumulated across many long years. It seems like it does not approve of your postcosmic style of abstract art.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 众神在道路中迷失了整整一日，世间失去秩序。日历在末尾多出不存在的、名为幽灵日的一页。虫子吃鸟，大地兽在海面奔跑，陷入疯狂的场景。
E: The gods lost their way for a day, and the world fell into chaos. The calendar now has an extra, nonexistent "Spirit Day," a day of mad scenes such as insects devouring birds and dromases running madly in the seas.

C: 「其实，那位来去无踪的半神少女，就是扎格列斯的化身。她不也在多洛斯说过吗？因为扎格列斯从不说谎，所以这一定是真的。」
E: "That elusive demigod is none other than Zagreus' incarnation. She proclaimed it in Dolos — since Zagreus never lies, it must be true."

C: 当塔兰顿兴师问罪，海洋也只能乖乖交出藏在怀里的群星。作为惩罚，海洋将永远照映星空，提防贪玩的泰坦再度逃离。
E: When Talanton comes to exact justice, the ocean has no choice but to reluctantly hand over the stars they harbored. As punishment, the ocean will forever mirror the night sky, guarding against the playful Titan escaping once again.

C: 圣树为族亲敞开道路，枝桠与友亲血脉交融。墨涅塔将自己的所有献给瑟希斯，终于在黄金之茧中，等来爱的垂语。
E: The sacred tree opens their path to kin, their branches intertwining with family and friends. Mnestia gives all of themself to Cerces and finally, within the Chrysalis of Gold, receives the whispers of love.

C: 爱将跨越诡计。
E: Love will transcend deception.

C: 刚才的战斗你已经勉为其难，你只想快点结束战斗。
E: The last fight had already drained you. You just want this over with.

C: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的喜报「恭喜您通过学术成果筛选，我们诚邀您前往神悟树庭进行面试。」
E: A week later, the unthinkable happens — an acceptance letter from the Grove of Epiphany. "Congratulations! Your research has successfully passed the selection process. We are pleased to invite you for an interview at the Grove of Epiphany."

C: 你握紧门把手，卯足了劲推开门，这门的重量却如羽毛一样轻，你摔了进去。
E: You grip the handle tightly, plant your feet, and shove with all your strength. But the moment the door moves, it swings open effortlessly, sending you tumbling inside.

C: 欧洛尼斯又帮了人类。
E: Oronyx helped humanity again.

C: 好一招以退为进。
E: An impressive demonstration of a feigned retreat.

C: 但也有诗人说，这是法吉娜偷偷怂恿云朵们挠动艾格勒的鼻子，才让它不停在天空中打起喷嚏。
E: But some poets claim this happened because Phagousa secretly encouraged the clouds to tickle Aquila's nose, causing them to constantly sneeze in the sky.

C: 他们的争斗不会就此休止，仍将延绵于后日。
E: Their struggle would not end here. It would carry on, stretching into the days yet to come.

C: 谢谢你，我收下了。
E: Thank you, I'll take good care of it.

C: 可以帮我看看体检报告吗？
E: Can you help me check my medical report?

C: 没哦，我感觉好得很。
E: No, I feel fine.

C: 你正准备打开宝箱，耳畔却突然响起一句呵斥——
E: You are about to open the chest when suddenly a reprimand rings in your ears —

C: 「我看第1版就挺好的呀？你们自己看是不是符合现在的全部需求？」
E: "I think the Version 1 is quite satisfactory. You all can see very well for yourselves whether it meets all the current requirements."

C: 让我找找看…
E: Let me have a look...

C: 你可算来了，知不知道昨天你走了后，我这儿路过了多少科员？那叫一个数不胜数啊！我听到了好多小道消息！谁都不把我当外人，一个劲儿在我面前讲。
E: Can you guess how many researchers passed me by yesterday after you left? Way too many to count! I got to hear tons of gossip. I'm an insider for everyone's secret conversations.

C: 你耳朵真灵。
E: Your ears must be really good.

C: 轻盈的气流将你托起，柔软的羽毛包围着躯干，眼前出现的星光点点也开始左右摇摆……
E: A light breeze lifts you up and soft feathers surround your body as the stars before you begin to sway from side to side...

C: 啊，这东西可是机密，千万不能让外人知道我有这么个玩意。你得先签个保密协议。
E: Oh, this is a top secret. Outsiders can never know that I own this thing. You must sign a non-disclosure agreement first.

C: 你没签保密协议前，我一个字也不能说。
E: I won't tell you a thing before you sign the agreement.

C: 他们还有更高级的技术，叫做「光锥」，那东西捕捉的可不止是记忆了…唉，我没有星神浮黎的祝福，光锥的技术始终搞不定。
E: They have an even more advanced technology called Light Cones. With that, they can capture more than just memories... It's a shame that I can never master the Light Cone technology without the Blessing of the Aeon Fuli.

C: 现在我能触碰气泡了吗？
E: Can I touch the bubble now?

C: 哦…原来如此…我明白了，谢谢。
E: Oh... So that's how it is then... I got it. Thank you.

C: 最近「地火」在忙什么呢？
E: What has Wildfire been up to recently?

C: 你端坐在华美的祭坛中央。你见到许多人身披缀着金丝的白袍，而另一些人顶盔掼甲，肃穆地围立四周，喃喃低语，不带感情的嗡鸣充斥整个空旷的岩窟。
E: You sit upright in the center of a splendid altar. You see many people wearing white robes embroidered with gold threads, while others are standing solemnly around the altar in armor and helmets. Their monotonous murmurs fill up the empty rocky cavern.

C: 这时，离你最近的那位白袍猛然抬头。难道他们能感知你的*思想*？你开始恐慌：进一步地，他们会如何处置你？话说回来，他们从一开始就请你登上了祭坛——
E: At that moment, the one in the white robe closest to you suddenly looks up. Can they sense your THOUGHTS? Anxiety seizes you as you wonder what they will do to you. But then again, it was them who invited you to the altar in the first place —

C: 「接住那颗星星。」她仰头，见星光自全周天驾驶舱外流溢，落入海平面之下，被波浪揉碎。你闷哼一声，想不通她为何如此镇定。
E: "Catch that star." She looks up at the light of the star that glides downward outside the cockpit and falls into the ocean, where it is crushed by the waves. You let out a muffled grunt, unable to figure out why she appears so calm.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 你的视野中是一片粘稠的、起伏的、毫无美感可言的红泥——其中一些甚至在蠕动。你反应过来那是一群大头矮脚的红泥黏土人，凯尔萨斯星的真正统治者。
E: In your view is a stretch of sticky, unruly, and unattractive red mud — some part of it is even squirming. It occurs to you that it is a group of Claymen with big heads and short legs. They are the true rulers of the planet of Kalsas.

C: 「中午十二时起，」电视上的迭瓦戎女性声音很是甜蜜，「孔泰主城区大部将有持续性重金属降雪，建议各位市民尽可能停止户外活动……」
E: "Starting at noon," the Dyvaron female on the TV has a sweet voice, "forecasts show that heavy metal snowfall will continue throughout most of the Comte metropolitan area. Residents are advised to avoid outdoor activities as much as possible..."

C: 你是来吃土的吗？不如来吃蝶吧嗡！
E: Are you here to eat dirt? Why not try a bit of butterfly?

C: 据说这种乐器受到了迷糊姐姐的赐福…没想到能弹奏出如此清晰的旋律嗡~
E: Apparently, this instrument was blessed by the Miss Daze... I never expected it to sound so crisp~

C: 我的使命，应该已经完成了喀？
E: My mission should now be complete, right?

C: 墙上刻着的这家伙居然没有鼻子，岂不是得一直憋气，也太可怜了喀！
E: This wall carving here doesn't even have a nose. Don't tell me the poor guy has to hold his breath the whole time!

C: 额…有关挣外快的那件事……
E: Umm... So about making some extra dough...

C: 咱这儿有杂菜汤，炸岩居蟹，盐烧洞螈，宝石蜥肉串……
E: We have Wild Herb Soup, Deep-fried Rock Crab, Salt Grilled Olm, Crystal Lizard Satay...

C: 采光？什么光？早上醒来的客人在下床时恐怕都看不到自己的脚趾。
E: Light? What light? I'm afraid guests getting out of bed in this room would scarcely be able to see their own toes.

C: 哇，{NICKNAME}队员！我们怎么也找不到你，都准备回家了！你也太会藏了吧！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! We can't find you. We're getting ready to leave! You've hidden yourself too well!

C: 出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
E: Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...

C: 好听！你可以继续弹奏它。
E: It sounds nice! You can keep playing it.

C: …哈哈哈，开个玩笑～知道你们列车组忙，我不会逼你的。
E: ...Hahaha. I'm just kidding. I know the Crew is busy. I won't force you to join.

C: 啊！没想到竟能在这里遇见同好……
E: Ah! I never imagined to meet another fan here...

C: 可你根本不会动啊。
E: But you can't move at all.

C: 那些吟游诗人的故事里都是这么讲的喀！
E: That's how all the bards' stories go, right!?

C: 金苹果有着许多象征，在崇尚智慧的树庭，它便代表着智慧；但这枚苹果只是一件装饰。
E: The golden apple bears many symbolic meanings. In the wisdom-worshiping Grove, it represents intellect. However, this apple is merely ornamental.

C: 当你想要问清他「后巷」究竟是什么时，却发现这名怪异的男性竟在眨眼间消失了。
E: But when you raise your head to ask him what exactly is going on with this "back alley," this eccentric man has already vanished.

C: 好在你只是三天没吃饭而已。现在看来恢复得也差不多了，恭喜你。
E: Luckily, it was just because you hadn't eaten for three days. It looks like you've pretty much bounced back. Congratulations.

C: 一定要照顾好自己的身体——记好了哦。
E: You need to take care of yourself. Don't forget.

C: （还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
E: (Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)
Three... two... one...

C: 这或许是个不错的藏身点…比较传统的那种。你可以躲在板条箱后、桌子下，或者如果你另有想法——全都由你决定。
E: This might be a good place to hide... a more traditional spot. You can hide behind the crates or under the table. Or, you might have something else in mind. It's all up to you.

C: 板条箱后面吧。
E: Behind the crates.
Three...
Buzz—

C: 每天进步一点点…
E: Making progress day by day...

C: 嗨休、嗨休——
E: Hi-ho, hi-ho—

C: ｢我给你一个久久地望着孤月的人的悲哀。｣
E: "I give you the sorrow of one who gazes at the lonely moon for too long."

C: 桀桀桀，没见过吧？有一座房间被人藏在了「岁月」的水面之下，是我最先发现的。我称之为「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」。
E: Hehehe, never seen one before? There's a room hidden beneath the surface of "time," and I was the first to discover it. I call it "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos."

C: 你说什么？是因为火炬已经熄灭了…？那种话本蝶听不懂啦。
E: What did you say? It's because the torch has been extinguished...? Nah, I don't know what you're talking about.

C: 别、别吃我，本蝶还很年轻，还有很多梦想没有实现…唔，原来你不是黑潮怪物！真是吓死蝶了！
E: N—No, don't eat me! I'm still young, with so many dreams left to chase! Oh... you're not a black tide monster? You nearly scared me to death!

C: 一只蝶独享！
E: A butterfly's exclusive treat!

C: 好惊险，刚才脚下的拱环忽然变成了蓝色的虚影，害得本蝶差点摔下山崖嗡！
E: That was close! The arch under my feet suddenly turned into a blue phantom, and I almost tumbled off the cliff!

C: 啾！
E: Tweet!

C: 我一句话都还没有说呢…
E: I haven't even said anything yet...

C: …其实我也没打算买下来。
E: ...Actually I have no plan on buying it.

C: 不能帮助需要帮助之人，这样的「强大」有什么意义？
E: What's the point in having power if I can't even help out those in need?

C: 你就体会了这么一次，这算哪门子的痛苦。不过，一次也好……
E: This was just one time. What pain could you have felt... Then again, once is better than none...

C: 什么规矩？我来听你讲讲。
E: What rules? Please enlighten me.

C: 呼呼，比起他们居住的天空堡垒，这里实在是酷热难耐喀。
E: Phew, compared to their sky fortress, this place is unbearably hot!

C: 呕！有、有点虫脑过载了喀！
E: Ugh! B—Brain overload! Too much data!

C: 好奇的旅人，这破碎的玻璃巨樽不代表法吉娜女士，而是若虫们存放蜜汁、举办宴饮的宴会场。
E: Curious traveler, this shattered glass goblet does not represent Lady Phagousa, but rather the grand hall where nymphs stored their nectar and held their feasts.

C: 哈哈，好问题！您或许有所不知，云骑兵书有云：「上兵伐谋，其次伐交，其次伐兵，此谋攻之法也」……
E: Haha, what a great question! You may not be aware, but the Cloud Knights Compendium has a quote: "The best offense prevails by strategy, then by diplomacy, then finally by force. This is the art of attacking"...

C: …那么，{NICKNAME}选手宣告退赛！
E: ...Then {NICKNAME} has withdrawn from the contest!

C: 谢谢你，我得赶快把雷力送去医馆。
E: Thank you. I have to send Leili to the apothecary now.

C: …好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金——去做你想做的事吧。
E: ... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.

C: 这家伙也来仙舟了？！
E: He came to the Xianzhou!?

C: 有人说《光荣之梦》过度美化了家族在历史中扮演的角色，甚至许多情节都是杜撰捏造。
E: Some people say that Dreams of Glory overly idealizes the role that The Family played in history and that many of the storylines are completely fabricated.

C: 好一双涂鸦圣手，好一杠霸道的红！只添上一笔，便让同谐的标语成为了一件讽刺艺术，哪怕是朋克洛德最朋克的骇客也当甘拜下风。
E: This graffiti artist of this piece stands out among their contemporaries through their Aeonic skill! The red is so domineering! With a single stroke, they have turned Harmony's slogan into a work of satirical art. Even the most punk of the Punklordian hackers would have no choice but to bow to their rebellious superiority.

C: 有什么怕的，看我给你演示——嘶，看着不像善茬啊…
E: What are you so scared of? Look, I'll give you a demonstration... Man, they sure look kinda tough...

C: 破破烂烂的站牌，带着一个几乎不可见的投币孔。
E: A dilapidated sign with an obscure coin slot.

C: 「前有隐藏区域，请按秩序候车。注：本站仅支持艾迪恩游戏币进行支付」，你眯着眼，在投币孔下面发现了这行小字。
E: "A concealed area is up ahead. Please line up to wait for your ride. Note: This stop only accepts Aideen Tokens." You squint your eyes and notice this line of fine print below the coin slot.

C: 这是一场试炼，一座难以翻越的「高山」横亘在你的面前。
E: This is a test. An impregnable "mountain" towers before you.

C: 你大步流星地迈入了丹恒的房间，以一种大人物巡逻般的姿态。
E: You stride into Dan Heng's room like a big shot on patrol.

C: 只要别是贼灵就好…
E: Better not be the Spirithief...

C: *叫声*
E: *yelling*

C: 我们的相遇是有意义的。
E: Our paths crossed for a reason.

C: 快了，就快了……
E: Almost there... Just a little longer...

C: 谁管你？谁管我？
E: Who cares about you? Who cares about me?

C: 别瞎想，老头子。
E: Quit overthinking, old man.

C: 怪物，别想，靠近一步。
E: Monster, don't even think about taking another step.

C: 不好意思，你能让一下吗？你这个站位有点妨碍我瞄准。
E: Excuse me, can you step aside? You're blocking my aim.

C: 帕姆左顾右盼地四处张望，确认没人看向自己这边后，这才松了口气，使劲压低着自己的声线。
E: Pom-Pom glanced around and, once sure nobody was looking in that direction, let out a sigh of relief. They lowered their voice.

C: 糟糕了，糟糕了…要是再找不到纽扣的话，就会被乘客看到如此失态的样子了……
E: Darn it, darn it... If Pom-Pom can't find the button soon, Pom-Pom'll look all disheveled in front of the passengers...

C: 车厢里一直都是这么「风平浪静」，你是不是还有点不习惯？
E: The coach has always been so peaceful and quiet. Are you not used to it?

C: 是加入蓝莓。
E: Add the blueberries.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，正好你回来了。
E: {NICKNAME}! You're back.

C: 好了，意见先收集到这儿帕，不管怎么样，还是要谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客的配合！
E: Alright, that's enough opinion-gathering for now. Whatever happens, Pom-Pom has to thank you {NICKNAME} for your cooperation!

C: 不然帕姆会很生气的！要记住哦！
E: Or I'll flip out! Please bear that in mind!

C: 这位乘客，你什么眼神？！
E: What's that look in your eyes?

C: 为了下次的冒险…要保证充足的补给，就得要……
E: For the next adventure... To ensure sufficient supplies, you have to...

C: 代理人{NICKNAME}，委托人帕姆。好的，识别通过。之后我会安排科员把你们需要的东西运输过去。
E: Agent: {NICKNAME}, Consignor: Pom-Pom. OK, identification passed. I will arrange for staff to transport the things you need for you later.

C: 我问他要不要关掉舱灯和「拟态」，让他回房间好好睡一觉。但他却坚持说他没有睡着，「拟态」和灯都别关，说什么他还要看的。
E: I asked him if he wanted to turn off the cabin lights and his mimicry broadcast so he could go to his room and get a good night's sleep. But he insisted that he didn't fall asleep, and that the show must go on.

C: 但在整理相册和写日记的时候，她好像会格外地安静。有时候帕姆会看到她望向窗外出神，也不知道她到底在想什么帕。
E: March does seem to quiet down suddenly whenever she's organizing photo albums or writing in her diary. Sometimes Pom-Pom sees her gazing out the window. Pom-Pom wonders what she's thinking about.

C: 我听邓恩指挥官提及过你的实力。实不相瞒，我早就摩拳擦掌，想与你一较高下了！
E: I've heard Commander Dunn mention your strength. To tell the truth, I've been itching to test my might against yours for a long time now!

C: 看来我的能力还有很多上升空间！哈！哈！哈！
E: Looks like I've still got plenty of room for improvement! Bwahaha!

C: 还有一点！我听说杰帕德戍卫官也打算参与这次演习……
E: One more thing! I heard Captain Gepard plans on joining this drill, too...

C: 杰帕德戍卫官也不知道什么时候会加入战斗，你可要小心了！哈！哈！哈！
E: Captain Gepard could join the fray any time, so please be careful! Bwahaha!

C: （大门紧闭着……）
E: (The door is closed...)

C: 夸人的事我不太会，可能还是那个叫威廉的小伙比较擅长。不过，我还是得让你知道，贝洛伯格所有人都欠你一句谢谢。
E: William might be better than I at giving compliments. Still, I must let you know that every citizen of Belobog owes you one.

C: （看我先下手为强）
E: (Seize the upper hand and strike first!)

C: *电波滤音*请继续狩猎！加油！
E: *electronic voice* Keep hunting! You will get it!

C: 言尽于此，是时候开始真正的表演了！你开始讲述自己堪称传奇的人生轨迹——
E: Let's get the show started with your own legendary life story...

C: 神秘的孩子
E: Mysterious Kid

C: 看来，我们的汤姆选手已经准备好了！那么，听我口令！三、二——
E: It looks like Tom is ready. On my signal... One, two...

C: 窗后的暖光依旧如薄暮般昏暗。
E: The warm light behind the window is still dim as dusk.

C: …这是我们的八音盒……
E: ...This is our music box...

C: …再大胆点，发挥你的想象力！
E: Go wild. Use your imagination!

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。毕竟你知道画中人物的原型是谁——你明白，爱是要分对象的。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. After all, you know who it's a portrait of — and love must always have an object of its desires.

C: 当然啦，我怎么可能知道啊……
E: Of course, how would I...

C: 你情绪高涨，信心满满。动手吧，让地理学再次伟大！
E: You now feel energized and confident. Give it a go and make geography great again!

C: 东南方有什么？
E: What is in the southeast?

C: 再看看有没有其他好玩的…
E: Let's see if there's anything else fun...

C: 你放弃了许愿。就这样吧，喷泉欢迎你之后再来拜访。
E: You've given up on wishes. That's it. You're welcome to visit the fountain again.

C: 打捞喷泉里的宝藏。
E: Fish the treasure out of the fountain.

C: 训练模式已结束，请稍后再试。
E: Training module finished. Please try again later.

C: 喔哦！看来你真的不只是运气好而已。继续，不要停！一鼓作气，输入第四个数字，打开这个该死的手提箱吧——
E: Wow, guess it's not just luck, after all! Now get the fourth number right and open the darn box!

C: 他再次搜肠刮肚，老半天才回过神来。
E: He racks his brains once again, and eventually comes up with a solution after what seems like ages.

C: 当然没问题！你想看几遍都可以。
E: No problem! Read it as many times as you need.

C: 这间破旧的杂货铺依旧冷冷地立在此处。自你上一次在这里以「逍遥先生」的名义，为寻求解惑的来信者送出答复已过去了一段时间。
E: The musty old newsstand is still standing there, impassive as ever. It's been a while since you've played the role of Mr. Carefree here, replying to correspondents writing letters in search of help.

C: 我是被天舶司绑架来的。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission kidnapped me here.

C: 你这活给多少钱我也干不了…
E: I cannot do this job no matter how much you pay me...

C: 我要去干什么来着？
E: What am I here to do again?

C: …不过，你要是真的有空，随时都可以来找我！
E: ...Still, you are welcome to come find me anytime if you are free!

C: 为什么选在这么偏僻的地方？
E: Why did you choose such an out-of-the-way place like this?

C: 反而变得更不好玩了。
E: Just the opposite — it's less fun now.

C: 很多来宾已经成功了。
E: Lots of guests have already succeeded.

C: 冷静下来之后，我感觉自己体内的某个结解开了。但不知为什么，我似乎还是对一切提不起兴趣……
E: After I calmed down, I felt as though this almighty knot was untying inside me. And I'm not sure why, but I can't seem to arouse any interest in anything...

C: 对！戴着面具，做工很精致的面具。
E: Yes! He wears a mask, one with exquisite craftsmanship.

C: 这个嘛…酒店的空间似乎变得异常混乱，还出现了不少看起来不那么友好的…生物？
E: Oh, that... The hotel space seems to be unusually chaotic, and there are a few not very friendly-looking... creatures?

C: 不过嘛…你要是实在想自找麻烦，倒是可以问问M——当然，如果你不怕之后被他像狗皮膏药一样缠上的话！
E: But... if you really want to get yourself in a pickle, you can always ask M — of course, only if you don't mind him sticking to you like a piece of chewing gum in the future!

C: 那么，您想要聊聊吗——
E: So, would you like to talk...?

C: 没错！匹诺康尼著名影评杂志——《银幕冲击波》，听过吗？没听过就是你孤陋寡闻。
E: That's right! Ever heard of the famous Penacony film mag, Silver Screen Shockwave? If not, you must be ill-read.

C: 为什么？听我给你讲讲做前台的「好处」就知道了——
E: Why? Just let me tell you about the "benefits" of working as a hotel receptionist...

C: 行啊，反正我这会儿也闲着没事。你想聊什么？
E: Sure, in any case, there's nothing going on right now. What do you want to chat about?

C: ——忘不了当年她是怎么把自己的亲生妹妹推下楼梯的。嘻嘻……
E: ...never forget how she pushed her own sister down the stairs. Heehee...

C: 星核出现了？
E: A stellaron has appeared?

C: 可以想象，他们是这颗星球的幸存者，不知用什么手段逃离了灭顶之灾，却注定因资源耗尽走向死亡。
E: It's possible that they are the survivors of this planet, escaping utter catastrophe through some means but doomed to ultimately die due to exhaustion of resources.

C: 我要考虑一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 咳咳！这个数倒是挺有诚意，但还不足以让我们放弃调查……
E: *coughs* This amount is not bad, but it's still not enough to make us give up the investigation...

C: 数目确认无误…居然真能一下子掏出这么多钱来。
E: The amount is right... You have that much money on hand?

C: 我就知道，不管在宇宙的哪个角落都能遇到我们的玩家！
E: I knew it! We've got players from every corner of the universe!

C: 抱歉，我只玩手游。
E: I'm sorry. I only play mobile games.

C: …就是他们对「门」的执着。
E: ...Their obsession with doors.

C: 这样的合作方式绝对行不通。我要去找家族管事的聊聊，看看他们究竟有什么高见！
E: This kind of collaboration isn't healthy. I need to talk to their supervisor and see what he has to say!

C: 班尼的嘴角开始不自然地抽搐。看得出来，他平日里大概是个随和的人，不常发火。
E: The corners of Benny's mouth start twitching. You can tell he's an easygoing guy who rarely loses his cool.

C: 在开始之前，先看看我现在有什么可以谈论的*话题*吧。
E: Before I start, let's see what "topics" I can talk about.

C: 你发现波奇对待你的态度似乎比之前随意了许多。
E: You notice that Bocchi's attitude toward you is much less uptight than before.

C: …没关系，即便这次被他抢了功劳，凭我的聪明才智，一定还能想出更好的企划。
E: ...Yes, he takes the credit this time, but I'm going to let it go. As brilliant as I am, I'm sure I can come up with a better project.

C: 说走咱就走。
E: Alright, let's go.

C: 正是如此。
E: Indeed.

C: 我第一次知道，练武术还讲究元素反应……
E: I never really thought that you had to consider elemental reactions when practicing martial arts...

C: 这个宝箱是怎么回事？
E: What's up with this chest?

C: 谢谢你啊好心人，在下无以为报，这点礼品就当是我的一点心意了。
E: Thank you, kind one. There's nothing I can do to repay this good deed. All I have is this as a token of my gratitude.

C: 附近的商人们喜欢在圣烛烛光下签订合约，以求得泰坦的祝福。
E: The merchants nearby like to sign contracts under the holy candle's light to gain the Titans' blessings.

C: 晚安，星穹列车。
E: Goodnight, Astral Express.

C: 领衔主演\n {NICKNAME}
E: Lead Actor\n {NICKNAME}

C: 这头长相粗野的狮子，竟然出了个文绉绉的谜语。不过这可难不倒见多识广的你，对吧？
E: Who knew this seemingly distasteful lion actually came up with a good riddle. But this should be pretty easy for one like you, who has seen the broader horizons of the universe, no?

C: 再想想吧。
E: Let's think about it.

C: 万敌的数学真的比你好吗？直到消息发送成功的时候，你仍有些怀疑。
E: Is Mydei's math really better than yours? You still feel apprehensive even as you send the message.

C: 你带走了大地兽，还找大地兽商人借了<unbreak>20</unbreak>万，加起来当然是<unbreak>40</unbreak>万利衡币…什么？那商人还敢要涨价的5万？
E: You took away the dromas, and borrowed <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> from the dromas merchant. Add them all up, it's <unbreak>400,000</unbreak> Balance Coins obviously... What? That weasely merchant hiked the price another <unbreak>50,000</unbreak>?

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 谜底就是——
E: The answer is...

C: 趁本狮冻僵了的功夫，快把手拿出去吧！
E: While I'm recovering from that bad joke, hurry and take your hand away!

C: 上班的人。
E: People going to work.

C: 不知道猫头鹰老师听见「可爱」这个形容，究竟会作何反应…总之，完全符合题目描述，真是个妙答。
E: I don't know how Professor Owl would react if he was described as "adorable"... In any case, it fits the riddle perfectly — you're a total genius.

C: 吼？妙啊。在这历史悠久的奥赫玛，要想收集到过去使用的古币可得花费一大笔开销，而穷人们手里正巧有许多…不对吼？
E: Ho? Wonderful. In a land like Okhema, steeped in history, one would have to spend a pretty penny to collect ancient coins. Yet the poor probably have plenty of them jingling in their pockets... Isn't that so?

C: 众所周知——时间，就是金钱。珍惜时间的人，时间才会青睐你。
E: Everyone knows time is money. One must treasure time for it to favor you.

C: 求人不如求己！
E: Titans help those who help themselves!

C: 什么时候中招的？
E: When did the computer get a virus?

C: …这一路颠沛流离，我已有好久没吃过一顿饱饭了。我的第一个愿望，就是希望能拿些你用不着的垃圾文件给我填填肚子。可以吗？
E: ...It's been a long time since I ate a full meal in this vagrant life. My first wish is to fill my belly with some trash files of no use to you. Is that okay?

C: 耕耘必有收获，这是亘古不变的道理。呼呼，别担心，我会有好东西给你。
E: Hard work will always be rewarded. *crackle* Don't worry. I'll have something good for you.

C: 只对了后半句——正确答案是垃圾袋！
E: Well, this only matches the second half. The correct answer is: A trash bag!

C: 我要去别处继续钻研了，你也要记得保持思考。
E: I'll continue my research elsewhere. As for you, don't forget to keep thinking.

C: 话又说回来了，做什么事最容易吃到天上掉的馅饼呢？
E: Well, what's the easiest way to get a windfall?

C: 放几颗卫星上去。
E: Send a couple of satellites up there.

C: 什么？伟大的哈努兄弟从不背对敌人。你、你竟敢侮辱他！
E: What? The great Hanu would never show his back to his enemies. H—How dare you insult him!

C: 你…真是朽木不可雕也。家族的脸面都被你给丢尽了！
E: You... are hopeless. You'd be such a disgrace to The Family!

C: 礼仪日渐凋敝…
E: Nobody cares about etiquette anymore...

C: 只有汗水与泪水才能给人刻骨铭心的教训——匹诺康尼还有你这样的人物存在，我很欣慰。
E: People only remember something when it makes them sweat and cry. I'm glad there's someone like you in Penacony.

C: 看不出来，你挺上道啊，想建立帮派，就必须和街坊邻里搞好关系。
E: You don't look it, but you're pretty sharp. We must forge cordial relations with the people living here if we're to establish a gang.

C: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
E: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

C: 没错！建好之后，不用我们出来，垃圾就会源源不断地送到肚子里。
E: That's right! When it's done, we won't even have to come out ourselves, and the trash will keep coming on its own.

C: 嘎嘎加班！
E: Overtime it is!

C: 我听闻有位不世出的高手受邀来到「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」，{F#她}{M#他}继承了塔塔洛夫的衣钵， 身手了得……
E: I heard that a supreme master has been invited to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand. Having inherited Tatalov's mantle, {F#she}{M#he} must be a skilled fighter...

C: 啥都不干。
E: Don't do anything.

C: 让我先歇歇。
E: Let me take a breather first.

C: 回忆第二封来信。
E: Recall the second letter received.

C: 瞧你睡得，都犯迷糊啦，是不是连人家都不认得了？
E: Look at you, still half-asleep. Can't even tell who I am anymore, huh?

C: 无所事事。
E: To do absolutely nothing.

C: 于是，你们骑着大地兽，迎着夕阳，行向远方……
E: And so, the two of you ride the dromas, wandering into the distance beneath the sunset...

C: 哎呀，怎么露出惊讶的神情了？值得被铭记的瞬间里，怎么可能没有你呢？
E: Huh? What's with that surprised look? How could a moment worth remembering not include you?

C: 人类…太重了迷！
E: Humans... are so heavy mem!

C: {NICKNAME}呢，习惯了讲述故事，这次作为听众感觉如何？
E: What about you, {NICKNAME}? How does it feel to be an audience after being a narrator for so long?

C: 不如去亲眼看看。
