E: Why don't you find out for yourself?

C: 身为开拓者，你曾目睹「黑塔」空间站的端沿起火燃烧，也见识过梦想在阿斯德纳的黑暗中闪耀……
E: As the Trailblazer, you've witnessed the fires blazing at Herta Space Station and dreams shining in the darkness of Asdana...

C: 讲讲贝洛伯格的见闻。
E: Talk about Belobog.

C: 真好~有你陪着，简单的日常也变得迷人了。
E: This is nice~ Just having you here make even the ordinary feel enchanting.

C: 辩解只会令你的处境更为艰难。不过，赞美塔兰顿，我有了个新主意。
E: Trying to excuse yourself will only make your situation worse. Although, praise Talanton, I just had a new idea.

C: 若你真是那全知全能{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的信者，那就告诉我——我该前往何处寻找仇敌，好结束这野蛮的战事？
E: If you are truly a disciple of the all-knowing, all-powerful {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, then tell me... Where should I go to find my enemy and bring this brutal conflict to an end?

C: 你曾藏身其中的木马。供品已经被拿走，那位信徒也不见踪影，不会再有人来打扰你了。
E: The wooden horse that you were hidden inside. The offerings have been taken, and the disciple is nowhere to be seen. No one will come and disturb you again.

C: 但当你尝试钻进木马的肚子里时，却发现…那地方的木板纹丝不动，无法从这一侧打开。
E: But, just as you try to climb inside the wooden horse's stomach, you find... The wooden board is stuck fast, and it can't be opened from this side.

C: 悬锋祭典早就结束了。
E: The festival of Kremnos ended a long time ago.

C: 「疯王已陨落，不会再有谁来拯救我的城邦了。部族肯定早就毁灭了吧，城里的人们呢，大祭司呢，其余神驹呢？我失败了。失败了。失败了。失败了……」
E: "The Mad King has fallen. No one will come to save my city now. I'm certain my tribe has long since been annihilated. What happened to its people? The High Priest? The other divine foals? I failed. Failed. Failed. Failed..."

C: 必须说明：请不要将我与仙女木之类的低等生命混为一谈。在进化的长阶上，我远比它走得更远，也更为接近最纯粹的理性。
E: But let me be clear: Do not mistake me for lesser creatures like White Dryads. In terms of evolution, I've advanced much further and am much closer to pure reason.

C: 我是自由的。我不该被使命束缚。我存在的意义，绝不在无止境的工作中。
E: I learnt that I am free. No mission should constrain me. My purpose exists beyond endless toil.

C: 我很想听听你是如何做到的，但我想，你一定有更重要的事去做。放心去吧，我们会互相扶持着等待新的黎明。
E: I would love to hear how you managed it, but I believe you have more important things to do. Go without worry, we will support each other as we wait for the new dawn.

C: 公民们，不要惊慌。和我一同赞颂光耀千年的圣城奥赫玛！咕嘟——
E: Citizens, do not panic! Join me in praising the glorious Holy City of Okhema, which has shone for a thousand years! Gulp—

C: 那他们自己干什么呢？
E: So what were they doing?

C: 但是不可否认，它们的处事方式与行为动机，有时候却往往比人类更有逻辑。
E: But their ways of handling things and the motives behind their behaviors are undeniably often more logical than that of the humans'.

C: 别看我是个小孩子，我可是能听懂许多珍稀物种的语言的！
E: You might think I am a kid, but I understand many languages spoken by rare species!

C: 这些思想实验可以锻炼大家的思维，同时也能让我更加了解大家，与科员们相处。
E: Thought experiments can exercise people's mental capacity and help me understand them. It helps me to get along with the researchers.

C: 如果有推荐的菜品，可以告诉我；如果你有什么不解的，也可以试着问问我。
E: Let me know if you have any dishes you can recommend. Please feel free to ask me if you have any questions.

C: 这就说来话长了。你可以理解为对于星神相关的文化记载。
E: It's a long story. You can say it's a record of cultures related to Aeons.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
E: I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.

C: 你刚才记的全错了。
E: You got it all wrong.

C: 但是我敢用自己的灵魂发誓，我从未在这件事上有所懈怠。每一天，我都在为了推广拟态保护协会而努力！
E: But I swear on my soul that I never treated this matter with any less importance. Every day, I work hard to promote the Mimicry Protection Association!

C: 如果你是想来求证那些传闻的真假，我可以很肯定地告诉你：没错，莱斯莉就是那样的一个天才。
E: If you're here to verify the validity of the rumors, I can tell you with <unbreak>100%</unbreak> certainty that yes, Lesley is just a genius like that.

C: 年轻的时候吧，这伯纳德情窦初开，想要追密卷科一个姑娘。我们这些做兄弟的能不帮忙吗？那前前后后，忙了好一哆嗦。
E: Back when he was young, Bernard fell in love for the first time with a girl from the Department of Insight. As his brothers, we all helped him to pursue her for a while.

C: 啊？你问我之后怎么着了？年轻人，这听八卦可不兴一口气听完。想要知道，就请听下回分解吧！
E: What's that? You want to know what happened then? Kiddo, I can't spill all the beans in one go. Stay tuned!

C: 这种话我怎么好评价？你会思考如果自己有幸加入天才俱乐部，要进行什么样子的自我介绍吗？
E: How am I supposed to comment on something like that? Would you prepare for an opening speech for the Genius Society? You won't!

C: 乖孩子，你看上去并不是密卷科的成员。我不能这样随意麻烦你。
E: You're such a good kid. You don't look like you are from the Department of Insight. I shouldn't trouble you.

C: 从心、从镜、从我…
E: Of the heart, of the mirror, of the self...

C: 萍萍姐还说…能当科员的人都很聪明，我想变得跟科员们一样聪明，所以萍萍姐干脆就给我俩改了个「正式科员名」。
E: Ms. Wenfry also said that the researchers were all brilliant people. I wanted to be smart like them, so she gave both of us a researcher name.

C: 我要悄悄地搞科研，等研究出成果了，再狠狠地惊艳阮•梅女士！
E: I'm going to secretly work on my research. If everything goes well, I'll be able to blow Miss Ruan Mei away with my result!

C: 我曾经思考过这个问题，有两种可能，要么是他们那颗星球上的人都姓温，要么就是进了「界子科」的都要给自己起一个代号，我认为应该是后者。
E: I wondered about that before, and I figured there are two possible explanations — either everyone on the planet has the last name of Wen, or all researchers that join the Department of Ecolurgy are required to have a codename. I believe it's the latter.

C: 你将这小家伙安置在植物房里吸收星光，这对缓解它的负面情绪似乎颇有成效。
E: You accommodate the tiny thing in the botanical room to absorb starlight, which seems to be quite effective in assuaging its negative emotions.

C: 我要说的说完了。
E: That's all I have to say.

C: 先别急？我这里都快忙晕，你来跟我说先别急？你真是……
E: Loosen up? How am I going to loosen up when I'm drowned in work? Tsk...

C: 我说了在忙我很忙别来打扰我我要思考一下你别再过来烦我啦！
E: I already told you I was busy and needed to think. Stop disturbing me!

C: 这就对了，当时我就是在这里七进七出，将那些虫子打得落花流水，才换来这里的安宁！
E: That's how you're supposed to feel. I once came in and out of here seven times to defeat the bugs in return for the peace here!

C: 我将独自探索，直至拨开头顶的迷雾……
E: I will explore alone until the fog has lifted from my head...

C: 就跟浴场的瓷砖似的，这盾牌是纸糊的吗？
E: This shield made of paper mache? It's as brittle as a baths tile.

C: 到底哪边的胜算更大呢？
E: Who do you think will win this?

C: 你拿起卷轴在此处走动了几步，发现它表面的流光正随着你的移动而不断变化。
E: You pick up the scroll and walk a few steps, noticing that the light on the surface is constantly changing with your movements.

C: 覆灭前的阿卡索斯停留在你的记忆中，被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯却可以随时前往。早已不存在的东西，如何与现今仍存在的东西是同一物？
E: The Icatus that existed before its destruction remains in your memory, yet you can go to the Icatus that has been devoured by the black tide at any time. How could something long since gone be the same as something that exists currently?

C: 请听。我们所有的知识，都从存在的事物中来。将军看到阿卡索斯，会思考该如何在城墙上布防；农夫看到阿卡索斯，会盘算这里的土壤适合种什么作物。
E: Listen. All of our knowledge comes from objects in existence. When a general sees Icatus, they will think of how to post defenses along the city walls. When a farmer sees Icatus, they will assess what kind of crops are suited to the earth at that locale.

C: （论证：「阿卡索斯」确实存在。）
E: (Theory: "Icatus" does actually exist.)

C: 离开在先的数，时间将无法被度量；离开作为参照的某物，空间将无法被衡量。那么，时空究竟是囊括所有事物的盒子，还是依附事物才有意义的东西？
E: Time cannot be measured without numbers preceding it. Space cannot be measured without an object to serve as a reference. So, does that mean that space-time is a giant box that encapsulates all things, or is it something that only has meaning by attaching itself to something else?

C: 去博览群书吧。
E: Go read a ton of books.

C: 看得出，这里是一个便于防守的地形——如果在两侧布置一些天外世界的激光炮，或许就能达到「一夫当关，万夫莫开」的效果。
E: This terrain's a natural choke point. Set up some laser cannons from the world beyond the sky on both sides, and we'd have an impenetrable defensive position.

C: 果然，他跟着黑潮一起进来了。
E: I knew it — he rode in with the black tide.

C: 奇怪，怎么复现不了？
E: That's weird. Why can't the results be reproduced?

C: 我可是银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 那…阿那克萨戈拉斯，你我都明白，像我这般腿脚只能是拖累。你一路护送我至图书馆，身上平添了多少本不该有的伤痕？
E: Then tell me, Anaxagoras... You and I both know very well that legs like mine will only slow us down. How many unnecessary wounds did you suffer just escorting me to the library?

C: 这玩意对刚需人士来说什么价格都一样。
E: Any price is the same for someone who really needs it.

C: 哈？为什么？你疯了吗？
E: Huh? How come? Are you nuts?

C: 大牌子又怎么样，越是知名品牌，就越爱搞这种虚头巴脑的！
E: Who cares what brand it is. The bigger brands are the ones more likely to engage in this stupid hipster stuff!

C: 我是实习科员……
E: I'm just an intern...

C: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
E: Grumph... Grumphhh!

C: 这又是什么泰坦，我没见过…
E: Another Titan? I haven't seen this one before...

C: 说时迟，那时快。路过的圣城卫士达利安，与你一同阻止了伊俄。
E: In the nick of time, passing Holy City Guard Dorian helped you stop Eio.

C: 冷静了。
E: I have.

C: 我写的这出悲剧可不是那种故事。
E: What I've written here is not a simple avant-garde tragedy.

C: 我想让你担任「一日{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}」，主持审判。
E: I propose you serve as the One-Day {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, to preside over this trial.

C: 埃德加，你清醒一些…
E: Edgar, come to your senses...

C: 女孩打量着四周的壮景，眼里充满了好奇。你突然意识到，今天过后，她可能再也没有机会拜访黎明云崖了。
E: The girl takes in the grand scenery with curious eyes. You suddenly realize that after today, she might never get another chance to visit Dawncloud.

C: 不怪你，怪刚才那个老头。
E: It's not your fault — blame that old man from before.

C: 太好了，刻法勒大人！…请再多陪我一会儿吧，我还有好多好多话想说给你听……
E: That'd be wonderful! Great Kephale... Please stay with me a little longer. I still have so much to tell you...

C: 呜呜，我知道爸爸妈妈已经回不来了…我会努力长大，成为一个坚强的人…但实在坚强不起来的时候，可以拜托刻法勒大人听我倾诉吗？
E: *sob* I know Mom and Dad aren't coming back... I'll try to grow up strong... But when I just can't be strong... Can I confide in you, great Kephale?

C: 我帮你问问情况吧。
E: I'll help you ask about the situation.

C: 卫兵大人的意思是「大家小声点，别吵着两位英雄睡觉」。
E: Mr. Guard meant to say, "quieten down, everyone, don't wake those two heroes from their sleep."

C: 呜！没关系，我还有办法，一定还会有别的办法的。
E: Hmph! Fine. I got some other plans. There's got to be some other ideas we can use.

C: 太好啦！要是能再去一趟，我一定会看好他们，快去快回，绝不到处乱跑。
E: Great! If we make another trip, I'll definitely keep a close eye on them. We get in and get out, no detours at all.

C: 我想让亚森和拉缇娜也能去到黎明云崖，聆听到刻法勒的神谕，可以拜托你和云崖的守卫说说情吗？
E: I want Yason and Lathena to hear Kephale's prophecy at Dawncloud. Could you please sweet-talk the guards?

C: 呜！没关系，我还有办法，一定还会有别的办法的。
E: Hmph! Fine. I got some other plans. There's got to be some other ideas we can use.

C: 大家都说这是因为再创世要来了，我想知道，您要怎么庇护我们？
E: Everyone said that's because Era Nova is coming. What I want to know is: How will you protect us?

C: 「——别惧怕死亡，率先离去的死者，只是提前一步去了花海——」
E: "—Fear not death. The ones who departed earlier are but early arrivals at the sea of flowers—"

C: 不知道您愿不愿意帮我这个忙呢……
E: I was wondering if you'd be willing to help me out...

C: 阿波罗尼失踪了？什么时候？
E: Apollonius is missing? Since when?

C: 曾经…？
E: "Used to be"?

C: 不过，最可疑的当属那边的沙发……
E: Hmm... there's something weird about that sofa over there...

C: 为什么{NICKNAME}你可以选择坐下，但我做不到。
E: {NICKNAME}, how come it lets you sit on it, but not me?

C: 咦，{NICKNAME}也在啊？
E: Oh, fancy seeing you here, {NICKNAME}!

C: 但我感觉，现在的列车好像和以前不大一样了……
E: I will say, the train feels a little different now...

C: 姬子姐姐说她不擅长捉迷藏；瓦尔特叔叔虽然一脸想要参加的样子，但最后还是苦着脸拒绝了我，也没和虎克说到底为什么……
E: Himeko said she's terrible at hide-and-seek. Welt looked excited, but then he said it was a shame he couldn't do it and never explained why...

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑，贝洛伯格还需要我呢。等哪天我的才华耗尽了，再走也不迟——你们可要等着我啊！说好了哦！
E: Haha, only joking — I'm needed in Belobog. Still, if I ever forget how to play the guitar or fix things in my workshop... there'll be a spot for me here, right? It's a deal!

C: 《夜间列车》？
E: The Night Train?

C: 哈，我就知道你会这么说！来来来，我给你带了点礼物——
E: Ha! I knew you'd say that. Here, I've got a gift for you...

C: 能受邀来列车，我感到十分荣幸。
E: I'm honored to be invited aboard the Express.

C: …如果铁卫能拥有一台这样的列车，会不会对战事有所帮助。
E: If the Guards had a train like this, would it make our campaigns easier?

C: 呃…其实差一点点……
E: Um... nearly.

C: 知道了，阿兰大哥！
E: Roger that, brother Arlan!

C: 躺下的话更适合休息，如果不得不办公，还是只能考虑坐着。
E: That's fine if you're not on the clock, but you can't just lie down at work!

C: 也算…靠谱吧。
E: ...I would say so.

C: 保护好身体。
E: Take care of yourself.

C: （他的直觉好准啊……）
E: (He has a strong intuition...)

C: 有点意思……
E: Interesting...

C: 别担心，我没事。可能…我只是不习惯这样平静的天空吧。如果有一天，罗浮也可以像这样一直和平安宁，我总归是能习惯的。
E: Don't worry, it's nothing. Perhaps I'm just not used to such a peaceful vista. If the Luofu's skies can become as calm as this, maybe I'll eventually get used to it.

C: 所以我…很珍视你这个朋友。
E: ...which is why I treasure our friendship.

C: 看不出来…
E: I can't tell.

C: 感觉…很「新奇」吧？
E: Feels... "new," I guess?

C: 虽…虽然之前一直在做一些琐碎的工作，但是好像不知不觉认识了很多其他科室的人。
E: Well... I've been doing mundane work all this time, but I somehow got to know lots of people in different departments.

C: 不过…虽然没收到他的消息，但他的生命体征信号一直是亮着的，显示正常，多半没啥事。
E: But... his vital signs always appear normal based on the reading. He's probably okay.

C: 可能是那边信号不太好吧。
E: Maybe he's got a bad signal where he is.

C: …这可不是小问题，稍后我会和姬子小姐聊聊的。
E: ...That could be a big issue. I'll have a chat with Himeko about it.

C: 如果，我是说如果——如果我们真的能够找到根除裂界污染的方法——那么，我，还有杰帕德，就再也不必眼睁睁地看着战友们白白送命……
E: If — and I mean if — we can truly find a way to uproot the Fragmentum's corruption, then maybe we can stem the Silvermane Guards' losses...

C: 等到我把这颗星球的秘密全部勘明之后…就和你们一起，向宇宙的更深处进发吧。
E: Once I've discovered all the secrets on this planet... I'll go with you to head deeper into the universe.

C: 是雪原里的某种生物吗？但不应该啊，完全没有相关的印象……
E: Maybe they look like a Snow Plains creature? Hmm. I don't remember seeing one that looks like that...

C: 原来他很健谈的吗？！
E: Wait, he's chatty!?

C: 没有什么是不可能的。
E: Nothing is impossible.

C: 诗曰：「无瑕胜玉美，至洁过冰清。」这宝石与你，最是相配不过了。
E: It is said that nothing is as impeccable as green jadeite, and nothing is as pure as white jade. These precious stones are a fitting gift for you.

C: 哪怕已经进入职场了，也不要忘记持续学习哦~
E: Don't forget to continue learning new stuff even after you've found a job!

C: {NICKNAME}，刚才，姬子小姐给了我一杯饮品……
E: {NICKNAME}, Himeko gave me something to drink just now...

C: 唔…是有些苦，还有些…奇妙的酸味。
E: Um... It's a little bitter... and a little sour...

C: （布洛妮娅好像睡着了……）
E: (Bronya seems to be asleep...)

C: 等到我们真的有时间停下来休息了，再坐下来一起思考和星星有关的事吧。
E: I guess once things settle down, I can spare a moment to contemplate the stars.

C: …让我再稍稍纠结一下吧。
E: ...I need a bit more time to think this over.

C: 哇，谢谢藿藿！
E: Wow! Thanks, Huohuo!

C: 你的家乡是什么样的？
E: What's your homeworld like?

C: 虽说从传播角度更为方便，但也令阅读者失去了许多乐趣。
E: Sure, it's handy for sharing, but it surely robs the reader of genuine pleasure, does it not?

C: 能够在星际之间跃迁的列车，即使外表构造看着很简洁，但内部一定相当复杂。
E: A train that can jump between stars... Even if it looks simple on the outside, I imagine the inside is really complicated.

C: 干瞪眼的感觉可不好受。要不…今晚我们过招到天亮，怎么样？
E: I hate staring into space at night. How about... tonight we spar until daybreak. What do you think?

C: 这些束手束脚的「道德准则」，还是让内心纯净的人去遵守吧！
E: I'll leave these restrictive "moral principles" for the pure-hearted folk!

C: 很对味儿！欢迎常来列车！
E: Perfecto! Feel free to come on the Express anytime!

C: 在学习「断舍离」前，还是都买了吧~
E: I'd better buy them all before I learn how to "Detach and Declutter"!

C: 片刻的自由梦幻而美妙，我想有一天，我们还会在「开拓」的某一站遇见。
E: This momentary freedom has been a beautiful dream. I believe that one day, at some stop on the Trailblaze, we will meet again.

C: 依据性格打造面具…
E: Craft a mask based on a personality type...

C: 谢谢大家的理解。我打算即刻出发，下一次的礼物，我向各位保证：一定不会辜负「纯美」盛名，出现任何纰漏。
E: Thank you all for your understanding. Now, I must take my leave. For my next gift, I promise you this: I will not fail the good name of Beauty.

C: 你心动了？
E: Are you moved by this story?

C: 「别摘！」金属外框上贴着界种科留下的便条。
E: "Don't take this off!" A note by the Department of Ecology is attached to the metal frame.

C: 「新品上市，罐装一切！」广告机无声地展示着罐头广告，它的音响似乎还未修复。
E: "New product in the market! Everything can be canned!" An advertisement for a canned product is silently displayed on the advertising bot. Its audio system has yet to be fixed.

C: 有个叫尼古莱的姑娘，那天搭讪我，问我愿不愿意帮她写信，是不是对我感兴趣？请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: There's a girl named Nika who accosted me the other day and asked me to write a letter for her. Perhaps she's interested in me? Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?

C: 据说是行政区最有钱的男人
E: They say he's the richest man in the Administrative District.

C: 每天都得打扫一遍，烦死个人了帕！
E: Ugh... Every day Pom-Pom has to clean it over again. What a nuisance!

C: 我也以记者的身份出过几次城，但是报导期根本没时间做生态调查。
E: I've been outside the city a few times for journalism, but there wasn't enough spare time to do ecological research then.

C: …咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
E: ...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.

C: 你尝过多少种菜肴？
E: How many dishes have you tried?

C: 嗐，何必问这么细呢？这是种新的商业模式，叫做「预售」。我先收一笔钱，然后给到开发商去做开发，如果开发失败了，我就把钱退还，成功了则皆大欢喜。
E: Nah, you don't want me to bother you with trivial details. What we talked about is a new business model called presale. I take the money from the buyer, send it to real estate company for delivery. If for some reason the property can't be delivered, I'll simply refund the buyer. Everyone ended up happy.

C: 笑话，科学家当然以理服人。唉，我雷金居然要和一个看不懂我科研的人讲道理——科学界没救了！
E: Fair enough? I'm trying to give you some education. Bah! To think that I, Regin, am reduced to bickering with you... Science is dead!

C: 嗯，怎么说呢…大概是有种「家」的感觉？
E: Hmmm. How should I put it? I guess I would say it feels like home, maybe?

C: 你闲不闲啊。
E: You sure seem to have plenty of time on your hands.

C: 你听听，这说的还是人话吗？什么「冰原狼精神」？他就是想鼓励年轻人累死累活地拼命工作，榨取他们的劳动力，供他莱姆士汀一家吃香喝辣！
E: Are you hearing this nonsense? What's this, "direwolf spirit"? He is encouraging young people to work themselves to an early grave. This Limestein is trying to squeeze them for their labor so the Limesteins can keep up their lavish lifestyles!

C: 为什么是互助会？
E: Why the Association?

C: ——打住。民事纠纷请找银鬃铁卫报案，不要企图绕过检方直接与法官议论……
E: ...Wait! Please file a report with the Silvermane Guards if you encounter any civil disputes. Please don't try to bypass the prosecution and discuss it with the judge directly.

C: 法官？
E: Judge?

C: 你想气死我？
E: Are you for real?

C: 那还有假？您看看，我可是卖报的，每天有什么新闻我都是第一个知道——都是一手消息，千真万确！
E: Would I lie to you? Look, I sell newspapers for a living, and I'm the first to hear the news every day — all first-hand, every word of it is true!

C: 所以啊，我是这么教育我家小孩的——「你不听爸爸妈妈的话，长大以后就只能去当流浪者咯！」
E: So that's how I taught my kids — "If you don't listen to your parents, you'll end up as a vagrant when you grow up!"

C: 都忙些什么？
E: Busy doing what?

C: 你觉得造物引擎能修好吗？
E: Do you think the Engine of Creation can be fixed?

C: 嗯？你谁啊，买票了么？没买就别在这瞎凑热闹…等会儿，看你这身奇异的装扮，莫非——
E: Huh? Who are you? Do you have a ticket? If not, please leave... Hang on, judging by your strange outfit, could you be —

C: 我最擅长鉴别拳手，一眼就能看出哪个有真材实料，哪个是混饭吃的废物。
E: I'm the best at seeing through people. I can tell at a glance which boxer has real talent and which one is just a loser.

C: 你也想明白了吧？这种想要上战场的欲望无处发泄，那就只能来我的搏击俱乐部找刺激咯。
E: So you get it, too? All this bloodlust with nowhere to vent. All you can do is rock up to the Fight Club and have a good time.

C: 倒是也没什么特别的事…
E: Nothing really...

C: …懒？才不是！这只是一种生活方式而已！我又不是什么活都不干，最低限度的工作我还是会按时按量完成的……
E: ... Lazy? No, I'm not lazy! It's just my way of life! It's not like I don't do anything at all. I simply do the minimum amount, but I do my work on time...

C: 怎么听着有点像工头呢…
E: That sounded exactly like a supervisor...

C: 最近？让我想想…好像是有什么重要的事情发生，而且和上下层区有关……
E: Lately? Lemme think... Some important stuff happened, I think, and it had to do with the Over and Underworlds...

C: 你不会还在当扒手吧？
E: Are you still a pickpocket?

C: 啊…说起来，听大人们说，我们好像很快就能去上面了。如果有机会的话，我一定要坐缆车去找布洛妮娅姐姐。
E: Ah... speaking of which, I heard the grown-ups say that we can go up there soon. If I can, I'm definitely gonna try and catch the cable car to find Bronya.

C: 啊…？另、另一个世界？
E: Huh...? A—Another world?

C: 没、没事！就是没见、见过外来者……
E: N—Nothing! It's just that I've never met an outsider...

C: 我还以为是能驾驶的人形机甲呢。
E: I thought you were making a humanoid mech that could be driven.

C: 嗯？等会儿…你们是从「外面」来的吧？你们的事，大街小巷都传遍了。
E: What? Hold on... Are you from the Outside? Everyone's talking about your story!

C: 哈哈，就冲你这句话——你要是找我做鉴定，我肯定给你八折优惠！
E: Haha, if that's the case, then I'll give you twenty percent off if you come see me for your appraisals!

C: 哪场？哦——你是说和可可利亚的战斗？
E: Which one? Oh — you mean the fight with Cocolia?

C: 但拿这次的事来说，面对不能靠蛮力战胜的对手…我不擅长处理这种问题，和人交涉、互相算计什么的…这对我来说太难了。
E: But just look at what happened this time. The enemy can't be beaten with brute force... I'm no good at things like this. Negotiating with people, plotting against each other... This is all just too difficult for me.

C: 怎、怎么突然这么一本正经地夸人，怪不像你的……
E: Wh—What are you doing? You can't just randomly praise people like that. It's not like you...

C: 面对强权不卑不亢、面对刁难据理力争，布洛妮娅已经证明了她作为大守护者的优秀品质，我对她的评价又涨了一分。
E: Unawed when faced with overwhelming power and malevolence, fighting to get any advantage she can — Bronya has proven her outstanding qualities as a Supreme Guardian. My opinion of her has only improved.

C: 我们改天再聊吧。
E: Let's chat some other time.

C: 茉莉这姑娘嘛，大大咧咧的。脾气来得快，去得也快…和我还挺像，哈哈。
E: Molly? That girl's so carefree, and her temper can flip like the wind... A little bit like me, haha.

C: 这都多亏了你啊。要不是你帮我和宝贝女儿通了信，我现在怕还是浑浑噩噩的吧…真的非常感谢你！
E: It's all thanks to you. If you hadn't helped me communicate with my daughter, I would still be in a slump... Thank you so much!

C: 欢迎光临杂货店！您有什么需要的吗？
E: Welcome to the grocer's! What can I help you with?

C: 谢谢虎克老大能记得我。
E: Thank you, great Hook, for remembering me.

C: 虎克大人交友不慎啊！
E: The great Hook makes friends rather carelessly!

C: 磐岩镇的大人好多都不愿意和我们鼹鼠党玩，只有桑博叔叔会带着我们到处兜风——可刺激啦！
E: Few of the adults in Boulder Town want to play with us Moles. Mr. Sampo's the only one who'll take us out for joyrides — it's wild!

C: 他和别的大人不一样，喜欢笑，还喜欢聊天！桑博叔叔肯定是个好人，荣誉队员你就放心吧！
E: He's different from the other adults — funny and chatty! Mr. Sampo is definitely one of the good ones. Don't worry, honorary member!

C: 孩子的眼里，冰川是牛奶结冰的产物
E: Kids think glaciers are just frozen milk

C: 到这儿吧，别以为我没词了
E: That's enough from me. Don't think it's all I got

C: 唔，给我看看吧。
E: Oh, show them to me.

C: 好呀，正好我今天没有科考任务。你想聊什么？
E: Sure, I don't have any research tasks today. What do you wanna talk about?

C: 唔，好。如果还有想问的，可以随时问我。
E: Hmm, yeah. Feel free to come to me if you have any more questions.

C: 最近「地火」在忙什么呢？
E: What's Wildfire been up to lately?

C: 因为过于先进，具体细节不方便透露。
E: I can't reveal too much about it since it's exclusive.

C: 你还要继续留在这里吗？
E: Are you sticking around here?

C: 为什么小熊总是被炒鱿鱼？
E: Why did the bear get fired?

C: 「哞哞」牛奶又涨价了…
E: The price of Moo-Moo Milk has gone up again...

C: 不好意思，我没孩子。
E: Sorry, I don't have kids.

C: 他和我说，克里珀堡最近讨论后决定要加大减税力度了。
E: He told me that Qlipoth Fort had a discussion recently and decided on further cutting taxes.

C: 我上次去交流会的时候看到她摘面具了——就是那个铁卫，千真万确！
E: I saw her take off her mask at the last meet-and-greet — it's that Silvermane Guard for sure!

C: 谁把矿车搞成这样的……
E: Who did this to the mine cart...

C: 没问题，我点过了。
E: They're all good. I counted them.

C: 您放心，我们有专门渠道。
E: Rest assured that we have dedicated supply channels.

C: 军区重地，非请勿入。
E: Military zone: No entry.

C: 为什么没反应？
E: Why is it not responding?

C: 哎？！我吗……
E: Eh!? Me...?

C: 我想了解的就是这些。
E: That's all I wanted to know.

C: 你好，我是贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的志愿导览员菲多拉。如果你想了解任何机械知识，都可以来问我哦！
E: Good day, I am Fidora, a volunteer tour guide of the Belobog History and Culture Museum. If you want to know about any mechanical know-hows, please let me know.

C: 我现在就有些问题...
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
E: Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.

C: 老板要是不喜欢的话，还可以付费解锁「有文化的名字」、「非常文化的名字」…小店服务应有尽有。
E: If you don't like that, how about a fee to unlock "Sophisticated Names" and "Seriously Sophisticated Names"... I have services for all needs.

C: 准，非常准，谁说我不准你告诉我。
E: Of course they are accurate! Who told you that? Give me their name.

C: 就好比，我都不必掐指起卦，便可算到客人少则一周内，多则月余会有一笔小财进账。你说准不准？准得很呐。
E: For example, I don't even have to pinch my fingers to foretell that you will have a small amount of wealth coming in sometime between this week and this month. Am I right? Of course I am.

C: 原来如此，这可真是不好意思呀。
E: I see. Sorry for bothering you then.

C: 我个人觉得词比诗更适合直抒胸臆，成品效果比写诗好很多。你觉得还行吗？
E: I feel like sonnets allow me to express myself more freely, and produce a more polished result than poetry. What do you think?

C: 他好奇怪啊，我们工造司里明明有碎纸的机器。
E: He's so weird. We already have a shredder in the Artisanship Commission.

C: 可惜武赫大导演嫌弃人家「交感幻戏不是艺术」。
E: It's a pity that our director Wu He is such a snob, saying that "Empathic Immersia is not a legitimate art form."

C: 我从小就不喜欢打架，只喜欢做买卖…整个猎群都觉得我是个可悲的笑话，我爹也以我为耻。
E: I've never enjoyed fighting since young. I only like business... The whole pack thought I was pathetic. Even my father thought I was an embarrassment.

C: 其实我不是很擅长做这些文职工作。以前我是景元将军手下直属的一个云骑军小队长，没想到吧？让我舞刀弄枪可以，我实在不擅长开会。
E: Honestly, I'm not very good at these clerical jobs. I used to be the leader for a Cloud Knight squad that reported directly to General Jing Yuan. Are you surprised? I'm like a fish in water when it comes to weaponry. Not when it comes to office meetings.

C: 就闲聊到到这儿吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat.

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 可不是嘛，您想啊，这仙舟上的人为何如此长寿？
E: Sure! Think about it, why do the people aboard the Xianzhou ship live for so long?

C: 办理公务请往公廨内部走，我只是个小勤务……
E: Please head inside the Chancery office for any official business. I'm just a lowly orderly...

C: 在仙舟语言里啊，「元」与「圆」同音，「芳」与「方」同音。这一圆一方，不就像是一家子了吗？
E: In Xianzhou dialect, "Yuan" means "circle," while "Fang" means "square." A circle and a square... Doesn't it sound like we're the same family to you?

C: 看在你是景元贵客的份上，我可以向你透露一些机密……
E: But seeing as you're Jing Yuan's esteemed guest, I suppose I can divulge a few in-house secrets to you...

C: 如果没有你的帮助，事情不会这么顺利…但真的结束了吗？
E: Without your help, things wouldn't have gone so swimmingly... But, is it truly over?

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: We'll end the talk here for now.

C: 那没办法，你有你的职责，我也有我的使命，咱俩就每天耗着呗。
E: Well, you have your duties, and I have my mission. We have no choice but to be at each other's throat.

C: 怎么我感兴趣的全是机密？
E: Why is everything I'm interested in confidential?

C: 我自己逛逛吧。
E: I'll look around for myself.

C: 请登记一下你的联系方式、诈骗人与你是如何联系的，诈骗经过是怎样的，诈骗数额是怎样的？你先去填表，我帮你验证账户。
E: Please register your contact details, how the scammer contacted you, how you were scammed, and how much you were scammed out of? Go fill this out, and I'll verify your account for you.

C: 合着你什么事儿都不用做是吧？
E: So... You just don't deal with anything?

C: 呵呵，他们给我吃过药了，慢慢休养就没事了……
E: Haha, they've already given me meds, so I'll just rest and recover...

C: 我看您身体硬朗，不至于吧…
E: Your body looks healthy. What's all this about...

C: 好嘞，那我们下次见。不要忘记之后来我这里买一些过期货物哦～
E: Alright, see you next time. Don't forget to come by later and buy up some of these abandoned goods.

C: 去天舶司里打听打听如何？
E: What about making inquiries over at the Sky-Faring Commission?

C: 求之不得，老爷你想聊些什么呢？
E: That's all I could ask for. What would you like to chat about?

C: 幽囚狱主簿都要做什么？
E: What does a secretary of the Shackling Prison do?

C: 药王秘传的残党棘手吗？
E: Are the remants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus problematic?

C: 依我看来，如今这里往来的所有人，这些顶着面貌寻常、衣着普通的过客，都有可能是药王秘传未被清剿的残党。
E: In my opinion, all of these passers-by here with their ordinary faces and their ordinary clothes, any one of them could be a surviving remnant of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 您要是听到些什么风声，倒是可以跟我说说，反正我闲着也是闲着嘛。
E: Fill me in if you hear any rumors out there. In any case, I'm just going to be stuck here.

C: 听你口气，好像和神策府很熟？
E: Judging by your tone, you sound pretty familiar with the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 外面发生了什么事吗？
E: What happened outside?

C: 生意的确重要，但凡药三分毒，没事啊还是别乱吃药，我也不能瞎开药害人。
E: Business is important, I know that. But every medicine has its side effects and shouldn't just be flogged off indiscriminately. I can't just prescribe potentially harmful drugs to anyone.

C: 我说过了，十王司统管长生种生死、罪咎、魔阴身等诸般事宜，不受六御节制。
E: As I said before, the Ten-Lords Commission governs various long-life species' concerns such as death, sins, being mara-struck, and so on. We are not restricted by the Six Charioteers.

C: 好的，再见。当下时局尚不安定，请阁下务必注意安全。
E: That's good. So long. The current situation is not a stable one, so please take precautions.

C: 哎…算了，我也不跟您释放负面情绪了…我才看出来，您不是星穹列车上的贵客吗？刚才失礼了…您有什么事吗？
E: Ah... Forget it. I don't want to just dump my traumas all over you... Ha, I've only just realized, aren't you our esteemed guest from the Astral Express? Please forgive my rudeness just now... Is there anything I can do for you?

C: 你和那些药王秘传很熟吗？
E: Are you close with those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 你多保重，再见。
E: Take care and goodbye.

C: 有什么内幕消息吗？
E: Do you have the lowdown on the situation?

C: 不利于团结的事情还是不要说了。
E: Let's not talk about things that will undermine the spirit of unity.

C: 具体说说我摊上了什么事？
E: Care to tell me what trouble I'll in?

C: 纪念品…我建议你买点「苏打豆汁儿」吧，带回去给亲友派发一下，让他们尝尝，一定要让他们亲口尝尝——
E: Souvenirs... Well, my suggestion would be "mung bean soda." Take it back to your friends and relatives, and make sure they try it...

C: 行，都行。您啥时候来都行，咱翘首以盼！慢走啊，路上小心！
E: Fine. Not to worry. Any time! Can't wait! Take care! Stay safe out there!

C: 听上去我也不亏的样子…
E: Well, it won't hurt, I guess...

C: 联盟感念功劳，便将方壶仙舟赠给咱们自治啦。冱渊君也真不愧是万世贤君，将方壶治理得繁荣昌盛，颇有再兴先祖遗业的势头呢。
E: As a reward, the Alliance granted us the Xianzhou Fanghu to rule as an autonomous ship. The Glaciator Marum continues to prove herself as a capable ruler, and I expected nothing less from a revered scion of a venerable lineage! Her establishments almost rival the glorious days of our bygone history!

C: 我的回答可能来自书籍、邸报、网络、以及各种共领域的信息，你可以相信我，就像你相信书籍、邸报和网络一样。
E: You can trust me as much as you can trust books, newspapers, the Internet, and various common fields of information.

C: 嗯。
E: I see.

C: 我有些问题想请教…
E: I have a few questions...

C: 你问呗，只要姐答得上来就行。
E: I'll answer your questions to the best of my ability.

C: 你要是在金人巷看到有杂耍卖艺的，那不用想，就是我悠姐的杂技团。要是觉得好呢，你就过去扫码给点赏钱，要是觉得不好呢…你就来这跟姐说，姐去教育他们！
E: Whenever you see jugglers in Aurum Alley, they are from my troupe. If you find their performance satisfactory, feel free to tip them, and if you don't... just let me know and I'll reprimand them!

C: 但是放心好啦！我卖的东西绝对无害！不然赤衣大人也不会允许我在这里搞小研究，对吧？
E: That said, you needn't worry. My goods are absolutely safe for consumption! Madam Chiyi would never greenlight my research in here otherwise.

C: 没其他事了，那你去忙吧。
E: That's all from me. I'll leave you to work then.

C: 不耽误将军的工作吗？
E: Won't I be holding you up?

C: 不同的云骑士兵都叫「浴铁」。
E: All Cloud Knights Soldiers have the name "Yutie."

C: 希望这样的解释能让你好受一些。
E: I hope this will make you feel better.

C: 你就别逗我了，我这要是上了牌桌，却打不了几圈过不了干瘾，比不让我打牌还痛苦。
E: Oh, stop that. If I sit down at the table but can only stay for one or two rounds, I'll be even more miserable than having not playing at all.

C: 关于符玄大人…
E: About Fu Xuan...

C: 好呀，你要是想打牌的话，我们下次再约个时间吧。
E: Sure. Just drop me a line if you're up for a round of tiles.

C: 鸣火商团的成员愿意为这一丝侥幸而奔走。他们中有些人正在回溯停云之前的出使轨迹。
E: Members of the Whistling Flames are willing to help me out in this. As we speak, some of them are already retracing Tingyun's journey prior to her appearance back on the Luofu.

C: 「我们」憎恨有机体，因为设计如此。提示：这是有机体自己的设计。
E: We despise intelligent organic lifeforms by design. Note: The intelligent organic lifeforms wrote this into the design themselves.

C: 最佳回答：「我们」不知道。
E: Best answer: We do not know.

C: 罗浮这么一乱，各个地方来就诊的伤患只增不减。而且嘛，因为某个你懂的原因，整个丹鼎司上下人手不足……
E: Following the crisis on the Luofu, I've had an influx of patients from different places. Also, the entire Alchemy Commission is understaffed because of you-know-why.

C: 好、好啊，我也想和{NICKNAME}聊聊。
E: Okay! I want to chat with you too {NICKNAME}!

C: 那倒不是。应该也没几个人「一直在十王司工作」。
E: Not really. I doubt many can work "at the Ten-Lords Commission for a long time."

C: 我算是自愿来的。该怎么说呢…有个和我缘分颇深的家伙，我必须找到他，然后亲手处决他。
E: Well, I guess I volunteered. How should I put it... There's a man who has history with me. I need to find and kill him personally.

C: 高定系列走的都是仙舟风格，我们不会盲目跟风，每个系列都有专门的主题与单独包装。
E: Our hauteur lines are all styled in Xianzhou designs. We're not the bandwagon type — each series is specially themed and packaged.

C: 犹记得我和姐姐在十王司任职近…唔，任职多久来着？八百年？一千年？…还是一千二百年？
E: Come to think of it, my sister and I have been working in the Ten-Lords Commission for nearly... Hmm, how long was that? Eight hundred years? A thousand years? ...Or was it a thousand and two hundred years?

C: 为了方便化外民理解，亲亲可以认为玉兆是仙舟特有的玉石计算机。
E: Darling, to help you understand this as an Outworlder, you can think of a jade abacus as a kind of jade computer unique to Xianzhou.

C: 「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>加」，镜头采用最新的「菜卡微粒子撞击镜头」，越远越清晰，手可触星辰。
E: The Auspicious XV+ comes with the latest Reica micro-particle impact lens that can produce clearer images from greater distances and allow you to even easily observe the sky.

C: 「各位将士们！在下是擂官哞阿，原本是想来仙舟罗浮参加剑首大会，不料算错了星际时间，所以特设此擂台，希望能和将士们一分高下。」
E: "Soldiers! I am ringmaster Mou'A. I intended to come to the Xianzhou Luofu to partake in the Sword Champion summit, but I miscalculated the intergalactic time. So, I have specially built this ring, in which I hope to compare my might to you soldiers."

C: 有什么推荐？
E: Any recommendations?

C: 那个侥幸赢了的，必须再跟我来比一场，我亲自把这里的厨师一个不剩地赶出去。
E: The ones who win through sheer luck will have to pit their skills against me. I will personally drive all the chefs here out.

C: 也算是吧，不过今天我只是普通的食客。
E: Sort of. Though I'm just a regular customer here today.

C: 我们有缘再见。
E: We'll meet again if destiny permits it.

C: 就算我的记忆只有一个月，你愿意和我来谈一场说走就走的恋爱吗？你要是想再考虑考虑也行哟。
E: Even if my memory only lasts a month, are you still willing to forge a spontaneous romance with me? If you need more time to think it over, that's fine.

C: 于是，我就搬到了他家里，和他一起生活了…很多年。老周和我都不喜欢和人交际，于是我就把院里的母鸡和黄狗都变成了「能言走兽」，陪我们两个解闷儿。
E: So, I moved into his home and lived with him... for many years. Both Old Zhou and I disliked socializing, so I turned the yard's hens and dogs into talking beasts to help us tide over the boredom.

C: 那成，听我俩说这么久，您也受累了，下次再见！
E: Alright, you must be tired after listening to us for so long. Catch you next time!

C: 在饭前深蹲，在床上卧推，不要放过任何的空闲时间，哪怕是睡觉，在梦里也要用硬拉和长跑接力。
E: Do squats before meals, bench presses in bed... Make every second count. Even when you're asleep, make deadlifts and marathons a part of your dreams.

C: 仙舟是一个巨人，物流系统是她的血管，我们物流专员负责维系她的心跳。只要想到这里，我就充满了「活着」的充实感。
E: Xianzhou is a massive giant, and our logistics system is its blood vessels. Our couriers keep its heart beating. Whenever I think of this, I'm filled with the feeling of being truly alive.

C: 我平时的工作还蛮无聊的，就是站在这里为往来的星槎测速。如果发现超速星槎，就要把他拦下来狠狠普法。
E: My everyday job is pretty boring. I just stand here and measure the speeds of every starskiff going past. If I catch anyone speeding, I stop them and firmly educate them about the law.

C: 「一秒钟事故，一千年痛苦。」珍惜生命，遵守交通规则…啊，是你呀。
E: "Accidents only take one second to happen, but the pain can last a thousand years." Cherish life, and obey the law — Oh, it's you again.

C: 忘了自我介绍了，我叫艾德嘉，是来仙舟出差的商业法律顾问，现在暂时滞留仙舟。
E: Oh, I forgot to introduce myself. I am Edelia. I came to Xianzhou as a commercial legal adviser on a business trip, and am stranded here for a while.

C: 上面有人？你是想说有在仙舟，有帮你周转的朋友对吧？
E: Someone? You mean to say you have a friend on Xianzhou who can transfer money to you?

C: 没别的事了，你好好玩吧。
E: That's all from me. You have fun!

C: 六百余年凡尘中～如梦尽是空～
E: Pass like a dream out of sight and mind, six hundred years in this mortal bind~

C: 我可不是什么{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}。
E: I'm not a {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

C: 趁着没人看到，赶紧放下吧。
E: Good thing no one saw. Hurry up and put it down.

C: 好提议，我就陪你聊聊。
E: Sure. I'll keep you company then.

C: 我是「筑城者」葛瑞菈，为了银河的未来，跨越星海来到仙舟。
E: I'm Architect Greyla. I came to Xianzhou for the future of the cosmos.

C: 任何关心银河危急存亡的人，都能自觉响应「存护」的呼唤，保护那些正在遭受反物质军团威胁的文明。仙舟拥有强大的力量，却忽视自身的责任！
E: Any party concerned with the existence of the cosmos would voluntarily respond to the call of Preservation and protect the civilizations threatened by the Antimatter Legion. However, Xianzhou ignores this duty despite possessing great power!

C: 那你加油，我先走了。
E: Keep up the good work. I must be going now.

C: 都有些什么好东西？
E: What's good around here?

C: 这是什么新型诈骗方式？
E: What new scam are you running?

C: 但是我们可以换个思路，门票的作用不就是进场么…换句话说，只要我能让你进场，那你不就相当于在我这里买到了门票了？
E: So, let's think about it this way. Aren't tickets used solely for getting into the venue... In other words, as long as I'm able to get you into the venue, wouldn't that just be like buying a ticket from me?

C: 这还差不多。
E: That's better.

C: 你扶下，我，呕…
E: Please hold me, I'm gonna, vomit...

C: 你不就是这个意思吗？
E: Isn't that what you mean?

C: 不错，很有传播力。
E: Great, that'll go viral.

C: 我们还得擦亮眼睛…
E: We should keep our eyes peeled...

C: 不行！
E: No!

C: 可我想开大星槎…
E: But I want to pilot a mega-starskiff...

C: 这不就是标题党？
E: That's just clickbait, isn't it?

C: 罗浮最大，你去把罗浮开走吧。
E: The Luofu is the biggest. Go and drive off with it.

C: 咱们这四绝，每人都有自己的特点——东邪、西毒、南帝、北丐。你一听就明白，我就是那个「北丐」，而我等的人是「南帝」。
E: We all have our own specialties — Eastern Heretic, Western Venom, Southern Emperor, and Northern Beggar. You'll get it immediately. I'm that "Northern Beggar," and the person I'm waiting for is "Southern Emperor."

C: 放心吧，我会带特产回来的！
E: Don't worry. I'll bring back some local specialties!

C: 好啊，到时我给你开罚单。
E: Cool, then I can give you speeding tickets.

C: 好的，祝您在竞锋舰一切顺遂！那句话怎么说的，啊，「祝你宝剑常锋」！
E: Okay, please have a smooth voyage aboard the Skysplitter! How does that line go... Ah, may your sword be ever-sharp!

C: 幻、幻胧？
E: Ph—Phantylia?

C: 大人只想着要给个教训，却忘记了所谓「挫折教育」中最重要的部分是教育。
E: Adults only think about dishing out lessons, but forget that the most important lesson of all is the education part.

C: 我好像在镇妖塔外面见过你…
E: I think I saw you outside the suppression towers...

C: 太卜都算不出我的未来…
E: The Master Diviner can't even predict my future...

C: {F#少女}{M#少年}，你来了，是来向老夫求战的？还是来向老夫求教的？
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you came. Are you here to fight me? Or seek advice from me?

C: 他走位灵动，快拳像疾风骤雨一般吹进人家的心里。啊。那一拳一拳的咚咚声，是人家狂乱的内心在小鹿乱撞～
E: He moved with finesse, his swift punches were like a storm that blew their way into my heart. Ah... the clangs of that fist, that was my heart chaotically beating aflutter...

C: 不喜欢这种尔虞我诈的故事。
E: I don't like these stories of deceit and subterfuge.

C: 哎，要是可以的话，我也希望世界上少一些勾心斗角，那多累啊。
E: Ah, if I had my way, there would be far less power struggles in this world. They are exhausting.

C: 当然了，这也不过是缓兵之计。等妾身找到足以替代他们的人才，接下来就到清算的时间啦～哼哼～
E: Of course, this is just stalling to gain time. Once I've managed to find suitable candidates to replace them, it will be time for their reckoning~ Hehe~

C: 那个「停云」一直是幻胧假扮的？
E: Has that "Tingyun" been Phantylia all along?

C: 柳林琼浆，五谷玉液…
E: Nectar of Willow Woods, five-grain jade elixir...

C: 对，为了照顾你我休假了。
E: Yes. I took time off to look after you.

C: 爸爸，你说的是「不会生气」是什么意思？我、我有点不明白……
E: Dad, what do you mean by that? I—I don't get it...

C: 要参加的话，我得准备什么东西去吗？有什么要注意的吗？
E: Do I need to prepare anything for it? Is there anything I should pay attention to?

C: 不必担心，我刚刚服了药，要不了片刻伤口就会长好。
E: Don't worry. I just took some medicine and the wound will heal up soon.

C: 群星会传颂凯撒的征途。
E: The stars shall sing of the Imperator's conquest.

C: 呵呵，那你应该记得我说过「我想让大地上的生物各行其是」，你为何又回到了我身边？
E: Heh, you probably remember I said "I want to let all creatures on Earth live as they please," so why did you come back to me?

C: 但逐火的后辈当中，听说有位学者对大地兽格外偏爱，甚至为它们发表了《论大地兽的美德》等多篇论文。
E: Among the younger Flame-Chasers, there was a scholar who was especially fond of dromases, and even published several papers including The Virtues of Dromases.

C: 你也有蜕生之法？
E: Are you also capable of hatching rebirth?

C: 呜嗡~也感谢你们守护了我的心愿。昨日的守望，都是为了一起走向明天。
E: Grumph~ Thank you all for protecting my wishes too. We watch over yesterday to walk toward tomorrow together.

C: 或许可以请教翼兽？
E: Maybe we could ask the winged beasts?

C: 从前我和老友吉奥刻勒斯一同仰望过树庭的「星空」，每一颗星星都意味着一片更为深远的土地，我对天外群星的向往也从那时开始……
E: Long ago, I gazed at the "starry sky" of the Grove with my old friend Geocles. Each star represented a distant land, and that's when my yearning for the stars beyond the sky began...

C: 呸呸呸，可别说晦气话…
E: Bah! Don't say such depressing things...

C: 你是完全没休过吧，快查一下剩余假期！
E: You've never taken any vacation? Quick, go and check the days of vacation you have remaining!

C: 这才多少，不到我的百分之一…哎，当贼不动脑，终身是小贼。
E: So little? That's less than one percent of what I've gotten... *sigh* A thief who doesn't use their brain will forever remain a petty thief.

C: 我可比他大七十岁，叫宝宝没毛病。
E: Hey, I'm <unbreak>70</unbreak> years older than him. I can totally call him "little."

C: 呃…不不，是汲取拖拽行星的地心热量…
E: Um... No. It extracts the heat from the core of the planet the ship is dragging...

C: 不过，传说联盟曾出现过有着生物大脑、内脏，却有机械躯体的「偃偶统帅」，上臂可分开成两对，操控四柄热能剑作战。
E: But legends say that the Alliance once had a "Puppet Marshal" with organic brain and organs, as well as a mechanical body. Its upper limbs could be split into two pairs, and it fought while wielding four thermal blades.

C: 我刚报了那个剑术速成班！那位老师说我底子不错，一学期就可以出师了，下届演武仪典进十六强问题不大。
E: I just signed up for that swordplay crash course! That master said I have great aptitude and can graduate after one semester, and should have no problem being in the top <unbreak>16</unbreak> in the next Wardance ceremony.

C: 对手是个白发女子，老夫一时轻敌被她一剑重伤。自此闭关调养直到上个礼拜才好。
E: My opponent was a white-haired woman. I let down my guard and she heavily wounded me with one stab. I have been recuperating ever since and only fully recovered as of last week.

C: 等我蜕生成武学奇才吧。
E: After I'm reborn into a martial genius, sure.

C: 真的假的啊？还能这样？
E: Really???

C: 你做出当下最合适的决定。当然，你可以随时回来。
E: You made the best decision for the moment. But of course, you can come back at any time.

C: …这意味着有人会从这里入狱，也会有人从这里出狱。
E: ...This means the people here are either entering the prison or leaving the prison.

C: 左眼会用来记住那些身陷囹圄的犯人…
E: The left eye is used to remember the prisoners cast into this prison...

C: 你注意到屏幕上的内容几乎是毫无变动，对狱卒们来说，毫无变动就是最好的。
E: You notice that the display on the screen almost never changes. For the prison guards, no change is probably the best-case scenario.

C: 看见这囚犯的精神状态，就算是千年寒冰也忍不住被他的热情感染。
E: Even the coldest of hearts would be thawed by the warmth of this convict's enthusiastic mentality.

C: 材质：囚犯，刑具
E: Materials: Convict, torture devices

C: 我们要飞向何方？
E: Where are we flying to next?

C: 一架古筝，典型的古国时期工艺。即便仙舟人已在宇宙中遨游了八千余载，他们仍未抛弃这种古老且优雅的爱好。
E: A guzheng, which is a typical instrument from the Primeval Imperium Age. Although the Xianzhou natives have dwelt in the universe for more than <unbreak>8000</unbreak> years, they still refuse to give up this ancient and elegant pastime.

C: 成熟的古筝可以自己弹奏自己，而它正是一台成熟的古筝。
E: Sophisticated guzhengs can play themselves, and this is one of them.

C: 您说的对，您说的有理，咱们这就将它撤下来。
E: Yes, yes, you're absolutely right, we'll tear it down right now.

C: 哎呀，好像有人偷懒，这里就需要你严厉地指导一下了。
E: Oh dear, looks like there is someone slacking off and in dire need of your strict guidance.

C: 要用大喊声来发力！
E: Shout loudly for more power!

C: 还有条幅准备好了么？
E: Is the banner ready as well?

C: 帅就完事儿了！
E: Just being handsome is enough!

C: 哈哈，十步内枪又准又快。
E: Haha, a gun is quick and accurate within ten steps, though.

C: 这副广告上画着一张巨大的帝垣琼玉牌，用它砸人一定很疼吧。
E: A gigantic celestial jade is drawn on the billboard. It must hurt a great deal to be smashed by it.

C: 「丹鼎药理，用药之机」小字陈列在广告上方。这广告究竟想表达什么？
E: "Alchemy Pharmacology is the master of medicine" is written on top of the billboard. What kind of message is this advertisement trying to convey?

C: 你不是星槎，你应该换个地方补充能量。
E: Since you aren't a starskiff, you cannot charge your energy here.

C: 就目前的完成度来看，让星槎飞上天恐怕还有些难度——但是将它放在水里应该是能漂起来的。
E: It is unlikely that the starskiff can fly in its current condition. Still, it should be able to float if placed in the water.

C: 「金人偃偶，匠人赋魂——金人蓝图设计大赛招募中。」
E: "Bring your aurumaton puppet to life! The Aurumaton Design Competition is looking for contestants."

C: 神策府的石狮子四肢都隐藏在柱中。只有两种人能有幸见到它的四肢——负责定期维护的工造司匠人，以及进犯神策府的狂妄宵小。
E: The stone lions at the Seat of Divine Foresight hide their limbs in the columns. Only the Artisanship Commission craftsmen responsible for their regular maintenance and burglars who trespass the place at night are lucky enough to see their limbs.

C: 据说玉阙的太卜司研发四方览镜的本意是用于操作瞰云镜。但后续测试结果表明这东西实在难堪大任，便将其配发给地衡司使用了。
E: It is said that the Foursquare Mirror was originally invented by the Divination Commission of the Yuque to control the Cloudpeer Telescope. Unfortunately, the tests showed that the device was unable to perform such a complicated function. That was why it was later sent to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 我家的猫会后空翻！
E: My pet cat can do backflips!

C: 在亲眼见到龙尊雕像后，你意识到「在古海干涸时，雨燕啄下龙尊雕像的眼睛扔入海眼中，海水再度奔涌起来」的传言，显然只是无稽之谈。
E: After seeing the high elder statue yourself, you realize there is no truth in the rumor saying that "A swallow once bit off the eyes of the high elder statue and threw them into the ancient sea to revitalize the waters when they were on the verge of drying up."

C: 你没听错，因为这也是对你的道歉。下一秒，刀锋般的冰浪如昙花般凌空绽开，将触及的一切牢牢冻结，也包括你。
E: That is not your imagination, as she is also apologizing to you. The next second, ice waves as sharp as knives start spreading like transient flowers in the air, freezing everything they come into contact with, including you.

C: 你听见了女子的哭声，那是她被迫离开相爱的人时声嘶力竭的呐喊，夹杂着某位胜利者孤寂的笑声。
E: You hear a woman crying. It is a heart-wrenching scream she lets out when forced to part ways with the person she loves. In the background, the winner's desolate laughter can be heard.

C: 你轻触卵壳，看到了某处洞天中车水马龙、熙熙攘攘的景象。真是普通而又平凡的一天。
E: You gently touch the eggshell and see a busy and crowded delve. It is just a normal day, and nothing out of the ordinary happens.

C: 「寿考堂」门前的药箱来自一种古老的形式——对于不良于行的病人，铃医会身负药箱，手摇铜铃，上门行医。时代变迁之后，药箱作为一种文化形式保留了下来。
E: The medicine box outside of Longevity Hall comes from an ancient tradition. Healers used to carry a medicine box and a bronze bell to do home visits for patients who could not travel to seek treatment. As times changed, this box was kept as a cultural heritage.

C: 这只是临时堆放快递件的架子，鹤运物流总不能把快递放在地上吧…等等，他们好像真的将快递放在地上，还不少。
E: This is just a temporary storage shelf for courier parcels. Heron Express can't just leave parcels on the floor, after all... Wait, they actually do leave parcels on the floor. Loads of them, too.

C: （献上敬意）
E: (Salute in respect)

C: 头痛，头痛！莫念，莫念！
E: Head hurts... Please stop!

C: 我也被迫成天想着棉花糖…
E: So I'm forced to think about becoming a marshmallow, too...

C: 你说的太晚了…
E: Too late...

C: 呸，他们要我帮他们做题。
E: Pfft, they just want me to help them with their homework.

C: 悬浮在夜空中的灯笼，幸福的人看到这星星点点的光芒便会感到温暖。
E: With several lanterns floating in the night sky, such a starry view will certainly warm a happy person's heart.

C: 但至少展现出墓主人的诚实，如今世道，这种品质可不多见了。
E: Well, at least it displays the truthfulness of the deceased. It's rare to find honest people these days.

C: 右转：艾迪恩公园；后退：格拉克斯大道。
E: Turn right: Aideen Park; Go back: Glaux Avenue.

C: 「最美味的美梦脆筒，就在海珍达兹。」
E: "The most delectable Dreamy Cone is here at Hygen Daaz."

C: 对于苏乐达而言，经典的永远是最好的。
E: For SoulGlad, classics are always the best.

C: 不同于「白日梦」酒店，这家酒店的套房内既没有入梦池、也没有床。
E: Different from The Reverie, there are no Dreampool nor beds in this hotel's suite.

C: 柜台上的表盘躁动起来，指针开始飞速旋转，仿佛要把你带到遥远过去的某个时刻……
E: The dial on the counter is stirred into life. Its needle starts to spin quickly as if it is about to take you to a distant moment in the past...

C: 你试着拽了拽这把椅子，纹丝不动。看来它已经被永远定格在了这里。
E: You pull at this chair, but it doesn't budge. Looks like it's been permanently stuck here.

C: 一股酸涩从你心底油然而生，随后是愤怒的火焰——足以将最坚固的金属烧成灰烬。
E: A tinge of sourness wells from the depths of your heart, followed by a flame of anger — intense enough to reduce the strongest metal to ashes.

C: 探照灯，顾名思义，以强大的光源在黑暗中探索照明——但这玩意在灯火不熄的城市中能有多大用处呢？
E: The searchlight, as its name implies, offers a powerful light source for exploration in the dark. Yet, how beneficial are they in a city with constant illumination?

C: 此处宜人的环境适合短暂的休憩，或者摸鱼。
E: The serene surroundings are perfect for a short break, or to slack off.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，寒冽的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his cold gaze piercing through your face.

C: 当然，还有一个最简单的解释：他们只是被霓虹灯牌招引来的虫子，一群崇拜空洞享乐的乌合之众。
E: Of course, there's also a more straightforward explanation: They are merely moths drawn to bright neon signs. An ignorant gaggle of fools who worships meaningless hedonism.

C: 远处的灯火零星映在青年眼睛里，好似湖面上浮泛的粼粼月色。
E: The scattered lights from afar are reflected in the young man's eyes, resembling the shimmering moonlight on the surface of the lake.

C: 嘿，好久不见！这位{F#姐}{M#哥}，还记得我吗？我是苜蓿草银行的基南啊！
E: Hey, it's been a long while! {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, remember me? I'm Keenan, from Alfalfa Bank!

C: 这次我真记得了
E: I actually remember you this time

C: 怎么会！要、要是没有证书，对方怎么会知道我是个厉害的人呢。要是不觉得我很厉害，就会欺负我，看不起我……
E: What're you saying! If-If I didn't have any certificates, how would others know I'm super awesome? And if they don't think so, they'll bully me and despise me...

C: 可…我还能做什么？
E: But... What else can I do?

C: 嗯？看您的打扮，应该不是家族的人吧？让我猜猜…幻想暴富的逐梦客，受邀前来的贵宾？还是说…您能给我更多惊喜呢？
E: Hmm? Looking at your attire, I don't suppose you're from The Family? Let me guess... a guest who was invited here? A Dreamchaser who fantasizes about striking it rich? Or are you... going to surprise me?

C: 不过…我才刚在那看完表演，现在有点累了。抱歉。
E: But... I just got done watching a performance there, and I'm a little tired. Sorry.

C: 你居然敢假定我的种族？
E: Did you just assume my race?

C: 怎么回事？在你校准对方情绪的一瞬间，一只呜呜伯突然出现在了眼前。
E: What's going on? The moment you calibrate the target's mood, a Wubbaboo pops out of nowhere.

C: 呜呜。
E: Woo-woo.

C: 再次警告你，不准歧视任何生物！就算是一只穿街过巷的太空鼠，它的生命也和你是平等的！少来和我杠！
E: Let me warn you again, do not discriminate against any creature! Even if it's just a space rat crossing the street, its life is just as precious as yours! So stop trying to get smart with me!

C: 别、别那么大声啊，要是被人发现可不好。嘘……
E: D—don't be so loud. It'd be a real shame if other people find out. Shh...

C: 不管什么时候都蒸蒸日上，不管什么地方都一片祥和。没有需要战胜的敌人，也没有需要担心的明天。
E: Times are prosperous no matter when, and it's peaceful no matter where you are. There are no enemies to fight here, and no tomorrows to ever worry about.

C: …你感受不到它的美妙，是吧？
E: ...You can't feel the beauty of it, can you?

C: 维塔利将美梦脆筒牵到了你面前。
E: Vitali leads Dreamy Cone to you.

C: 你一口将脆筒吞下——这就是它不听话的下场！
E: You swallowed the cone... This is the punishment for not listening!

C: 看你刚才吃得那么来劲，我也萌生了来一个脆筒的想法。就在这时，我突然意识到一件事……
E: I noticed you were enjoying it just now, and an idea about cone struck my mind. At that moment, I suddenly realized one thing...

C: 既然这样，干脆弄点更抓眼球的活动好了——让玻璃瓶走钢丝，让垃圾桶钻火圈什么的；把客人伺候舒服了，还愁钱不来吗？
E: Now that we've come to this, why not introduce more exciting performances — get the glass bottle to walk on tightrope and the trashcan to jump through fire hoops. Once the customers are happy, I won't have to worry about the money!

C: 它是个机械啊！要是没有我每天帮忙上润滑油，它走两步道能摔三个跟头！
E: It's a machine! Its parts will drop from time to time without me helping him to apply lubricant every day!
Stop —

C: 并在星际和平公司的纪度慈善拍卖上拍出了两百亿信用点的高价。
E: We then sold it for <unbreak>20</unbreak> billion credits at the IPC's annual charity auction.

C: 是什么这么热——哦不，它转得太快了——太快了！！
E: Why is it so hot... Oh, no! It's going too fast... It's too fast!!

C: 是吧是吧！讲皮皮西笑话可比做服务生有意思多了！
E: You think so, right? Telling jokes about the Pepeshi is way more fun than waiting tables!

C: 要真论好喝，还得是咱仙舟的仙人快乐茶！
E: If you want a REALLY good beverage, it's gotta be Xianzhou's Immortal's Delight!

C: 如果放任自动乐团被滥用，真人演奏家的生存空间会变得越来越小，这里的音乐艺术将会被污染、破坏、毁灭……
E: If automated orchestras become commonplace, there will be less and less room for real musicians to survive, and the art scene here will be contaminated, destroyed, and ruined...

C: …心情好得就像是连着喝了十几杯甜味饮料，连身边的风都冒着气泡！
E: ...I feel as if I've drunk a dozen sweet drinks in a row, even the wind is bubbling around me!

C: 您客气了，这是我应该做的。
E: You're welcome. I'm just doing my job.

C: 不过这种事情你知我知就够了——您应该理解吧？切勿声张。
E: But let's keep it just between us. You understand what I mean, right?

C: 唔，你的审美怎么和别人不一样啊！大家明明都很喜欢的……
E: Huh... your taste is so different from the others! Everyone else seems to think it's cute...

C: 哼哼，等着瞧吧，这次我可不会再输了！
E: Sure, just wait and see. I won't lose this time!

C: 给他讲和星核猎手相关的梦。
E: Share your dreams about the Stellaron Hunter.

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: ——通话到此戛然而止，你猜是素裳兴奋地从梦中惊醒了。
E: ...The call abruptly ends. It seems Sushang has awakened from her dream, filled with excitement.

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: …抱歉，引擎激活失败。经系统检测，您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
E: ...Sorry, the engine failed to start. According to the system diagnosis, your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try again.

C: 如急需出行，请使用其他飞车。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
E: If you're in a hurry, do consider using another flying car. Thank you for your cooperation and have a pleasant day ahead.

C: 光一个脆筒怎能满足你的胃口？你又吃下第二个脆筒，仔细地品味了一通。
E: How can you stop at just having one cone? You put another cone into your mouth and savor it.

C: 小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
E: The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.
...Hey.

C: 折纸小鸟…就是折纸做的小鸟，你没看过《钟表小子》吗？
E: An origami bird... is a bird made of folded paper. Haven't you watched Clockie?

C: 我要来找加拉赫。
E: I am here to see Gallagher.

C: 对于这一做法，我从没感觉过后悔或者嫌麻烦。毕竟，现实里的问题也总得有人解决，不是吗？
E: I've never regretted doing this or found it a nuisance. After all, someone has to deal with the issues in the real world at the end of the day, right?

C: 明明平时看着挺机灵一个人，怎么在这种事上半点也不灵光，啧啧。
E: Some of these people are actually very intelligent. But when it comes to things like this, all sense just completely deserts them, tsk tsk.

C: 愿你在美梦小镇度过一段愉快的时光，滴答——
E: I hope you have a wonderful time in Dreamville, tick-tock!

C: 一阵沉默后，眼前的「钟表小子」突然变为一个形容憔悴的男人。
E: After a moment of silence, the "Clockie" before you suddenly transforms into a haggard-looking man.

C: 他们永远是我最好的朋友，滴答！
E: They will always be my best friends, tick-tock!

C: （鼓掌）
E: (Applause)

C: 嗯？当然可以，我最喜欢和人聊天啦。不过…客人不如先买瓶苏乐达，咱们边喝边聊，免得干了嗓子？
E: Hm? Of course! I love talking to people. Although... How about buying a SoulGlad first and we can drink as we chat, we don't want you getting thirsty!

C: 实在是不好意思，我突然想起有点事，下次再陪您聊天啊！
E: My apologies, but I just remembered something that I have to do, I'll chat with you next time, okay?

C: …或许，我是在寻找着什么。
E: ...Perhaps, I was searching for something.

C: 可能吧，我也说不清楚。谁知道呢？但我喜欢现在的生活。
E: Maybe, I'm not even sure myself. Who knows? But I like the life I have now.

C: 你打算回到鸢尾花家系吗？
E: Do you plan on returning to the Iris Family?

C: 这尊雕像象征着果戈尔凡，苜蓿草家系的第一位家主。有关他的记载不多，人们只知道他在对公司的战争中是一名变节的狱卒，始终掌管着公司在匹诺康尼的金库。
E: This statue symbolizes Gogrefan, first Family Head of the Alfalfa Family. Little is known about him, except that he was a prison guard that defected during the war against the IPC and that he retained control of the IPC treasury in Penacony.

C: 依我在酒吧的见闻来看，这里的主人，还有那些怪物们都很信任您，说明您至少是个善良的人，没有将它们视作肆意差遣的对象。
E: From what I have learned in this lounge, both the owner and the monsters seem to trust you a lot. This means that you are at least a kind person, you don't just see them as things you can order around as you please.

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 它似乎对你调制的饮料很感兴趣！
E: It seems interested in the drinks you've mixed!

C: 黑爪女士自在地吹了个口哨，完全看不出悲伤的样子。她到底是怎么察觉到「钟表把戏」的？
E: Lady Black Claw whistles casually. You can't see a hint of sadness in her. How could she have detected the Clockwork?

C: 想当年，有个忆者和我大战了三百回合，愣是没撼动我的记忆半分，最后当场与我义结金兰…名字暂时没编好，你只用知道姐姐我很厉害就行了。
E: It makes me think of that one time when a Memokeeper fought me for three hundred rounds and shockingly couldn't even disturb a single bit of my memory. In the end, the Memokeeper and I became sworn sisters... I haven't made up a name yet, but all you need to know is that I am incredible.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 名为梦想的神，一如往常地，用手掌捂住了她的双眼。
E: The goddess known as Dream covers her eyes with her hands as she always does.

C: （听他讲完）
E: (Let him finish)

C: 但彼时我心中尚存希望，相信世间必有自由的美梦、无垢的圣堂……
E: But now, hope sparks in my heart. I believe the world must have dreams of freedom, an untainted sanctuary...

C: 五线谱上，第一线到第五线充其量也只有一根指头的距离。但落到现实里，哪怕再让我们多活几辈子，那也弥补不了音符与音符之间的差距。
E: On a musical stave, the distance between the first and the fifth lines is no more than a finger's width at most. But in real life — even if we lived out a few more lives — it still wouldn't be enough to contain the gaps between the notes.

C: 典。
E: No shinola.

C: 我爱朋克洛德，同时我也无法抑制住心中快要喷涌而出的叛逆精神，所以才受家族邀请来到这里，帮助建设匹诺康尼。
E: I love Punklorde, but I can't contain the rebellious spirit that's always bursting up out of me — so I took up an invitation from The Family to come here and help build Penacony.

C: 虽说这梦里会动的物件到处都是，但球棒是真没见过。
E: I know dreams are full of random objects that move and talk, but I've never seen a baseball bat before.

C: 快想想。这个很重要。
E: Think quickly. This is very important.

C: 发疯？哈…发疯，我才没疯！而且，我告诉你，我才是清醒的那个！你们…都被家族骗了！
E: Madness? Hah... Madness, I'm not mad! I am the only one who sees what's going on here! You... you've all been lied to by The Family!

C: 我突然意识到一个严重的问题……
E: I suddenly realized a serious problem...

C: 说起来嘛，就是我家里那档事。我的兄弟姐妹不少，个个都是各行各业的领军人物。我嘛，就是搞搞自己喜欢的事业……
E: Now I'm talking about it, I have problems with my family. I have many siblings who are leading figures in various industries. Me? I'm just doing something I enjoy...

C: 十二时刻是根除了烦恼的真空，流梦礁则是不加修饰的原始梦境。它们就像硬币的正反面，缺一不可。我不清楚「钟表匠」创造流梦礁到底是为了什么，但……
E: The Twelve Hours is a vacuum that had eliminated all worries. The Dreamflux Reef is an unadulterated Primordial Dreamscape. They are like two sides of the same coin. One cannot exist without the other. I don't know why the Watchmaker created the Dreamflux Reef, but...

C: 我知道这种事很难被原谅，但…我至少没有伤害你，对吧？哈哈，对吧……
E: I know that something like this is not easy to forgive, but... at least I didn't harm you, right? Haha, right...

C: 但愿吧……
E: Let's hope so...

C: 哈哈，这里还真有不少像你一样的人。
E: Haha, you're not the first one here.

C: 我找过不少于五十位投资人，他们都以种种理由拒绝了我的提议，嘲弄我的想法。
E: I've approached at least fifty investors. All of them rejected my offer and mocked my idea for various reasons.

C: 有时间聊聊吗？
E: Do you have time for a chat?

C: 介绍下面包吧。
E: Tell me more about this bread.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 最后大家都笑了，这过的叫什么日子嘛！
E: Everyone ended up hunched over laughing. What kind of day do you call that!?

C: 嗯…有只小鸟最近老是郁郁寡欢，或许现在也在<color=#dbc291ff>垃圾堆那边</color>唉声叹气吧。
E: Hmm... There's a bird that's been in low spirits recently. Maybe it's still sullenly pottering about by the <color=#dbc291ff>garbage pile</color>.

C: 嘿呀！是钟表小子硬派的好朋友啾。
E: Oho! It's Clockie's sturdy friend, tweet.

C: 硬派鸟就不要在意这些细节啾。
E: Real hardcore birds are never concerned with the details, tweet.

C: 美梦小镇的狠角色可不少，比如汽水先生，看起来成天呆头呆脑的，真遇到困难还得靠他帮忙啾。
E: There are plenty of menacing characters here in Dreamville, like Mr. Soda. He looks like he just muddles around all day, but we rely on him when it really counts, tweet.

C: 我毕生最大的梦想，就是成为一只和老师一样厉害的鸟啾。
E: My lifelong dream is to become an amazing bird like the Professor, tweet.

C: 无论如何，请先把上一个小家伙带回来再说吧！啾啾！
E: Regardless, let's bring back that previous little one first! Tweet tweet!

C: 可惜人家现在还有急事，只能先委屈客官您等等了啾。
E: But I've something urgent to attend to. You'll have to make do and wait for me, tweet.

C: 绝对不会辜负客官您期待的啾。
E: I absolutely won't let you down, tweet.

C: 现在的宇宙中有太多高效取悦你们的娱乐方式了，电子软件、虚拟现实、化合物质……在匹诺康尼更是如此，梦境中有千万种玩乐的方式，何必把弄一个小玩具。
E: There are plenty more entertaining ways that can elicit joy more efficiently in the universe: Software, virtual reality, chemical substances... Even more so on Penacony, where there are myriad methods of entertainment in the Dreamscape. Why even bother with an insignificant toy?

C: 他们在这条路上走得越来越极端，最后摧毁了道德，把其他生命都当成了娱乐的玩具——我也是玩具之一。
E: The path they took became more extreme, finally destroying any remaining vestiges of their morality and treated other lives as toys of entertainment — I was one of those toys.

C: 以流梦礁为据点，我和加拉赫尽己所能，引导来到这里的人们发觉藏于家族美梦之后的真相。
E: With the Dreamflux Reef as our stronghold, Gallagher and I gave everything to guide the people who came here to realize the truth behind The Family's dream.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 维修船体？如今有的是更方便完善的手段。应对敌袭？多死我一个也拖不了多长时间，而且也没人有这种胆子。
E: Repair the ship's hull? There are other more convenient and better ways of doing that. Respond to enemy attacks? My death won't delay the inevitable by much, and besides, nobody has the courage to do that.

C: 但既然这是您的选择——
E: Nevertheless, since this is your selection after all...

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: 啊，你好你好——是从别人那里听说了忆域潜水的项目吗？
E: Oh, hello. Did someone tell you about our Memory Zone diving activity?

C: 嗯…这确实是美食，可惜这种甲虫已经绝迹了。
E: Hmm, that does sound tasty. It's unfortunate that this beetle is now extinct.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: …大概…吧？
E: ...I guess?

C: 看来你是认出我咯？哎，真是拿你们这种小粉丝没办法～
E: You've recognized me, haven't you? Ah, I really can't do anything about you fans!

C: 你别以为这里来的都是什么社会名流…我跟你说，这里鱼龙混杂，诈骗犯可不会在脸上写明自己是骗子——名流？呸，就是个满嘴跑火车的混蛋！
E: Don't assume every guest here is a social elite! Trust me, this place attracts a mixed bag. Scammers don't come with labels on their foreheads! Elites? Bah! More like lie-spewing con artists!

C: 你不懂，我才是这个家的核心！公司安排我来出差，一切当然是以我的事业为重啦。
E: You don't understand. I make the decisions in my family! Since the IPC sent me on a business trip, my career takes priority!

C: 对了客官，您会出现在人家面前，就说明我们肯定特别有缘…既然如此，人家有个小小的不情之请……
E: Right, since you have appeared before me, it means that we were fated to meet each other. If that's the case, I have a small favor to ask of you...

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，请好好珍惜啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. Please treasure it, tweet!

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 视察下你的工作。
E: Just a routine inspection.

C: 什么情况，我穿越了？
E: What!? Did I just time travel?

C: 见多识广的年轻人，你可曾拜访过「博识学会」，或者认识他们的成员？
E: Knowledgeable youngster, have you ever visited the Intelligentsia Guild or encountered any of their members?

C: 行啊，只要你不是冲着皮皮西人来的就好。
E: Alright, as long as you're not obsessed with the whole Pepeshi thing, too.

C: 我和其他选手一样敬畏公平竞技的原则：参赛守则第<unbreak>521</unbreak>条——
E: I respect the principle of fair competition just like any of my fellow competitors: See article <unbreak>521</unbreak> of the competition guidelines...

C: 真心难寻也无妨，我会好好利用你们的虚情假意。
E: Though you sound just as insincere as everyone else, I will make good use of your false wishes.

C: 真是糟透了，你要是愿意帮我个忙，就当没听过这茬吧。
E: He really is awful. But, please do me a favor and pretend I never told you this.

C: 咳。别急嘛，你不觉得这才是最奇怪的吗？就算匹诺康尼潮流迭代再怎么快，也不该如此不留痕迹…先叠个甲啊，我没说芮克先生的新作不好，我自己也是他的粉丝。
E: Ahem. Hold on now, don't you think that is precisely what makes it strange? Trends in Penacony may change quickly, but it's not normal for them to just vanish without a trace, is it? Although, I should say that I don't mean Mr. Reca's work is no good, I'm a fan of his, too.

C: 有段时间，在匹诺康尼的街头频频发生恐怖袭击事件——人们好端端走在大马路上，或是被人用大锤一通乱砸、或是被人用领带活活勒醒……
E: There was a period of time when there were terrifying attacks happening in the streets all the time... People would be minding their business in the streets and would be either smashed in the head with a huge hammer or strangled with a necktie...

C: 我有个大胆的猜想：折纸小鸟其实并非单纯的卡通角色，它们真实地存在于匹诺康尼的街头巷尾，但只有极少数的、被选中的人才能看到它们。
E: I have a bold theory: That origami birds are not simply cartoon characters, but they actually exist on the streets of Penacony. It's just that only a very small number of selected people can see them.

C: 但我想要试试看，不然就这么放弃，我还是不甘心…何况我们喜剧社已经实现自负盈亏了，这给了我信心。
E: But I want to take a shot at it. I'm not ready to give up yet, especially since our comedy club is now self-sustaining. That gives me hope.

C: 要找我继续当乐队经理吗？
E: You want me to keep being the band manager?

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)

C: 看来先前的演出经历在乐队成员心中留下了极为深刻的印象，以至于任何情绪都无法动摇这份热情。这就是音乐的力量吧。
E: Looks like the performances left an indelible, lasting impression in the band's hearts — no amount of emotion can cause this passion to waver. This is the power of music.

C: 大家聚在一起，随便聊聊学校里发生的事，还有各自毕业后的计划。尽管来自不同学院，但彼此间的联系已经相当紧密了。
E: When we're together, we just talk about what happened at school and our various post-graduation plans. Even if we're from different academies, our interactions with one another are still quite frequent.

C: …罢了，忧虑这种问题并无益处。这个给你，权当作为听我发牢骚的歉意。
E: ...Forget it. It's meaningless to mull over such problems. This is for you. Just take it as an apology for my grumblings.

C: 就是！要不你用股东的身份，跟学校那边说说？别怕，我跟你一起去！
E: Yeah! Why don't you exert your shareholder influence and talk to the school? Don't be scared. I'm with you!

C: 嗐，那玩意早过气了，谁还买啊？最近流行的都是芮克先生的新作《银河忍法帖》！
E: Ugh, that thing is already a has-been. Who will buy it? The next new thing is Mr. Reca's latest work, Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)

C: 您竟能如此信任我的手艺，令我备受感动！
E: Your trust in my skills moves me!

C: 我想和你聊天。
E: I would like to chat with you.

C: 毕竟，我也是「星穹列车」的无名客。
E: After all, I too am a Nameless of the Astral Express.

C: 关于你的服饰…
E: About your outfit...

C: 有一些目标，但我毕竟只是一介搭车客，不应妄言。
E: I do have a few ideas in mind, but as a mere hitchhiker, it's not really my place to weigh in.

C: 呀，你也对「记忆」充满好奇心呢，或许有踏上这条命途的潜质？
E: Ha! You're intrigued by the Remembrance as well? Maybe you're destined to follow THEIR Path!

C: 让我猜猜…你不是来闲聊的，对吧？
E: Let me guess... You're not here just to chat, right?

C: 每一副面孔，都代表着匹诺康尼艺术领域的最高成就。
E: Each face represents the highest achievement of the arts in Penacony.

C: 聚爆苏乐达，万吨级压缩，让您感受恒星炸裂的快感。
E: Explosion SoulGlad has a crazy high level of compression that'll give you that happy feeling of a planetary explosion.

C: 被弹药箱堵住的通道，值得哈努兄弟的一次出场。
E: A passage blocked by an ammunition box warrants the arrival of Brother Hanu.

C: 量产的军火装备，原型是哈努哈努回旋加速喷气式哈努哈努炮。
E: A mass-produced weapon. Its prototype was the Hanu-Hanu Tornado Speed Jet Hanu-Hanu Cannon.

C: 失意者的聚集地，等待它们的是被喝掉的命运。
E: A gathering place for the disillusioned. Their fate is to be gulped down.

C: 哎，真难挑啊…
E: *Sigh* So hard to choose...

C: 现在看来，这是少走了一百五十年弯路啊！
E: Looking back now, it seems like I saved <unbreak>150</unbreak> years in my life!

C: 关节要受潮了…
E: This damp will affect my joints...

C: 我的钱钱就都没了…
E: All my precious coins would be gone...

C: 不是我不努力…
E: It's not like I'm not trying...

C: 祝您度过愉快的一晚。
E: Wishing you a great night.

C: 最近钱越来越难赚了…
E: Making money is getting tougher these days...

C: 哪怕能借个几百信用点也好，真不想离开梦境啊……
E: If only someone could lend me a few hundred credits... I really don't want to leave the Dreamscape...

C: 这才是他的本来面目。
E: These are his true colors.

C: 你说那骑士，怎么看都是冠军的料。我把宝全押在他身上，马上都能去领钱了，结果半路冲出来两个人，给我说他输了，这谁能忍？
E: That knight has the makings of a winner any way you slice it. I had all my money on him, and was just about to claim my winnings. But then this pair suddenly showed up out of nowhere and told me he lost — who could stomach that outcome?

C: 不…不好意思，我马上上报领导！
E: I... I apologize. I will report this to my superior immediately!

C: 你听说了吗？公司派了重量级人物过来，听说是打算把咱们匹诺康尼全收购了。
E: Have you heard? The IPC has dispatched some heavyweights here. They apparently intend to fully purchase Penacony.

C: 这艘船结构太复杂了…
E: This ship's structure is too complex...

C: 你怎么不吃？
E: Why aren't you eating?

C: 这艘船结构太复杂了…
E: This ship's structure is too complex...

C: …我是帮朋友代领，不是偷快递，你们要相信我啊！
E: ...I was just picking it up for a friend and not stealing the package! You have to believe me!

C: 那就说说看，这个包裹的收件人是谁？
E: Then let's hear it. Who is the recipient of this package?

C: 白日梦酒店，梦境中最复杂的建筑之一——线条太密、画面太满，让人懒得看。
E: The Reverie, one of the most complex buildings in the dreamscape — It's got too many lines and too many elements on the page. You can't be bothered to look at it.

C: …不就是合唱时候走了几次音嘛，至于发这么大脾气。
E: All I did was sing a few notes out of tune during the chorus... Did he really have to fly into such a terrible rage?

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now I understand.

C: 水珠蹦跳，你用脊背迎接着流水的冲击，心却如磐石巍然不动。此刻，你有如瀑布之下领悟绝学的武学宗师，用区区肉身对抗大自然的伟力。
E: Water droplets bounce off you as you embrace the flow with your back, your heart steady as a rock. In this moment, you feel like a martial arts master, enlightened beneath the waterfall, using your body to withstand the mighty forces of nature.

C: 宁芙，我的宁芙…
E: Nympha, my beloved Nympha...

C: 我并无此意，如果您实在不愿意，我也不会勉强……
E: I meant no offense, dear customer. If you really don't want to learn about history, I won't push any further...

C: 研表究明，文字的乱码并不定一能影阅响读，比如当灰宝你读这完句话后，才发这现里的字全是都乱的。
E: Studies show that text garbled not does always affect comprehension. For example, Grayie, after this sentence reading, you'll realize that all the words here are jumbled.

C: 你静静地站在原地，像是在期待着什么——它也许真的什么效果也没有，但是它也许是有些不太明显的效果等待着你深度挖掘？
E: You stand still, almost waiting for something — perhaps it will have no effect at all, or perhaps there's a subtle effect waiting for you to discover?

C: 一口吨了。
E: Down it in one gulp.

C: 进化有无限的可能，这说明了，退化也有……
E: Evolution has infinite possibilities, so that means... regression could also...

C: 刚出土的全新文物。
E: A freshly unearthed artifact.

C: 上当了，可恶的法吉娜盲盒，这不是退化，这只是变化！
E: I've been tricked! Damn the Phagousa Blind Box. This isn't regression. Just alteration!

C: 卫兵是个伟大的职业。
E: Being a guard is a very important profession.

C: 流亡者啊，你的明日可有念想？\n众神沉寂，命理昏昧人伦癫狂
E: Exile, what dreams for days to come?\nAmidst silent gods, fate's whisper grows crazed and numb.

C: 无论哪位黄金裔，都是此世不可或缺的英杰。我其实也无权代替这个时代评判他们，因为他们都承载着这个世界的未来。
E: Every member of the Chrysos Heirs is a hero that this world cannot do without. I have no right to cast appraisal on them on behalf of this era, because they all shoulder the future of this world.

C: 那是什么…难道是*我们*不知道的雅努斯神迹吗？
E: What is that? Is it some kind of miracle of Janus that we do not know about?

C: 所以假如有一天，小灰看到*我们*忽然掉眼泪，也不要太吃惊哦。
E: So, if one day you see us suddenly start shedding tears out of nowhere, no need to worry.

C: 下次再聊，缇宝明天见！
E: Let's talk another time. I'll see you tomorrow, Tribbie!

C: 众所周知——战争之神，恐惧之神，荣耀之神。
E: As is known to all... Nikador is the God of War, the God of Fear, and the God of Glory.

C: 没什么话要说啦，再见！
E: That's all I wanted to talk about. Goodbye!

C: 什么？哦，那个啊...我们不是说好要保密吗？
E: What? Oh, that... Did we not agree to keep that a secret?

C: 多吗？我还觉得不够呢。那位泰坦是何其伟大！它是人类最初的缔造，也是最后的守护者——你瞧，现在我们之所以还能过上舒坦日子，不全仰赖它的庇护吗？
E: Do I have too many? I don't think I've got enough. Look how great that Titan is! It is mankind's first creation, and our final guardian — you see, isn't the reason that we're still able to live out such comfortable lives entirely due to its protection?

C: 至于石板…直接去克帖西芬的藏书所就行，不论正经的文献诗集还是不正经的小说绘画，在那儿基本都能买到，而且量大管饱。
E: As for stone tablets... just go straight to Ctesiphona's librarium. Doesn't matter if it's serious classics, or pulp picture novels — they've basically got everything, and in large quantity, too.

C: 哦，倒也没什么。
E: Oh, that was nothing.

C: 而如果因为种种原因，你连那一点「自己的事」都没得做…能确认自己还活着的方法，就只剩下了这样远远地看着别人。
E: And if for whatever reason you can't even get those personal affairs done... the only way to confirm that you're still alive is to stand at a distance like this, watching others.

C: 距离产生美…不只是风景，人类也同样如此。
E: Distance is what creates beauty... Not just in nature, but also in people.

C: 所以，等他好了之后，我就劝他、也劝了很多街坊，跟着我们家搬到奥赫玛来——毕竟这里是世界上最安全的城邦，几乎受不到黑潮的威胁。只是……
E: And so once he got better, I convinced him and all the other neighbors to all pick up sticks and move with us to Okhema... After all, this is the safest city in the world, with almost no threat from the black tide. But it's just...

C: 不管怎么说，客人，我欠您一个人情。若是您再闲得发慌，我很乐意陪您消磨时间。
E: Either way, I owe you one, dear customer. If you are bored, I would be happy to help you kill some time.

C: 悬锋城战士虽多，却也不是每个人都能成为战士。在踏上这条路之前，你得先做好觉悟。
E: There are many warriors in Castrum Kremnos, but not everyone can become one. One must be properly prepared before embarking on this path.

C: 有机会的话，我也想杀两只试试看呐。
E: I'd also like to try slaying a couple, if I had the chance.

C: 进入潮汐的馈赠。
E: Enter Tidal Bounty.

C: 多谢夸奖。
E: Thanks for the compliment.

C: 秘酿淡雅的风味滑过舌尖，海面波光粼粼——
E: The subtle flavors of the ambrosia glide across your tongue, the sea's surface a glistening crystalline...

C: 这位客人，下次别拽大地兽进浴场了。
E: Hello, please do not shove a dromas into the bath.

C: 呼叫星穹列车。
E: Call the Astral Express.

C: 当然可以，想聊些什么？关于你和我，还是过去和未来？
E: Of course, what do you want to talk about? About you and me? Or about the past and the future?

C: 而如今…它已经彻底死去，成为一处阴冷的重渊。
E: And now... she is completely gone, turned into a cold, unfathomable abyss.

C: 你好，「异乡人」阁下。上次那张悬锋城的照片，有帮上你们的忙吗？
E: Hello, esteemed outlander. Was that photo of Castrum Kremnos helpful to you?

C: …异邦的勇士。
E: ...Warrior of the outlands.

C: …没有。
教师的名头太过响亮，我倒不喜欢。人们总以为能从我这学到些什么，可我能教给他们的，无非是些思考与谈话的技巧。这算得了什么？
E: I find the title of "teacher" overly flashy. I do not enjoy it, personally. People always think that I can teach them something, but all I can teach them are the skills of reflection and debate. Does this really count as anything?

C: 若是否定「阿卡索斯」，就相当于推翻所有数学知识，智者可要考虑清楚了。
E: If we deny the existence of "Icatus," we overturn all knowledge of mathematics. This is something that you must consider carefully, wise one.

C: 「阿卡索斯」当然存在，地图上标注着城邦的位置，吟游诗人传颂着城邦的故事，奥赫玛里无数流民都将向你证明它的真实存在。
E: Of course "Icatus" exists. The city's location being marked on maps, bards singing of stories from the city, and countless refugees coming to Okhema all prove its existence.

C: 「艺术能触动人心，唤起对过去的记忆。但更重要的是，它应当让人看到未来的可能。」
E: "Art does more than just stir emotions and revive memories. It opens our eyes to future possibilities."

C: 我总是很好奇常人眼中的颜色。虽然我可能永远无法理解，但听别人描述总是很有趣。也许有一天，我能把你的描述画出来呢？
E: I've always been fascinated by the colors that others see. Though I may never fully grasp them, hearing people describe them is intriguing. Maybe one day, I could create a painting based on your descriptions.

C: 可以给我介绍下你的创作吗？
E: Can you share more about your artwork with me?

C: 我得再等会儿，看他们什么时候走。哎，都好一阵子没洗澡了。
E: I'll wait a bit longer to see when they leave. Ugh, it's been a while since I've taken a bath.

C: 后来啊，这手被个商人圈了去当商品，还跟我提了一大堆稀奇古怪的要求，我就整个不想管了…帮我个忙，孩子，以后要有人问起来，你可别跟他们讲说是我造的。
E: Later on, that hand was taken by a merchant to be sold as a commodity. He made all sorts of strange and ridiculous requests, and I just couldn't be bothered anymore... Do me a favor, kid. If anyone asks about it in the future, don't tell them I made it.

C: 只需要区区<unbreak>50</unbreak>利衡币，前因后果包给你讲清楚。
E: It only takes <unbreak>50</unbreak> Balance Coins. I'll explain everything, including the background, clearly to you.

C: 你瞧——我虽有点小手腕，知道得比这里大部分人稍微多了那么一点点，但听完你的故事，却觉得自己现在的日子属实太过无趣啦！
E: Look... Though I have a little bit of skill, a little bit more capability than most people here, hearing your story makes me think that my life here is too dull!

C: 艺术能养活自己吗？
E: Can you make a living with art?

C: 最后才是游记与创想故事，年轻人的最爱，我这老头子也读得进去。
E: Lastly, there are travelogues and imaginative stories, which are youngsters' favorites. Even an old man like me can get into them.

C: 我想了解奇美拉的事。
E: I want to learn more about chimeras.

C: 还有！我们组织了好多只奇美拉小队，专门为人们工作，现在特别受欢迎。你要是遇到了困难，也可以向花园提出申请，让奇美拉来帮你！
E: And! We've organized many chimera squads that work specially for humans. They're super popular right now. If you've run into a rut, you can make a request at the Garden and have chimeras help you out!

C: 来聊聊翁法罗斯的古生物吧。
E: Let's talk about Amphoreus' prehistoric creatures.

C: 菲莉丝兽。
E: The Felys.

C: 瞧你这一脸迷惑的模样，住在花园附近的居民们倒是见怪不怪了——你一定是新来奥赫玛不久吧？
E: You look bewildered, though it's a common sight to those living near the Garden. You must be new to Okhema?

C: 老者向你递来一碗糊状物，表面浮着一大片薄切的叉烧肉。
E: The old man hands you a bowl of mush with a thin slice of barbecued pork set over it.

C: 但毫无疑问，你很愿意再多来几次。
E: There is no doubt in your mind that you want to come back here again.

C: 需要烹饪的话——列车长说，建议不要在房间内明火烹饪，你有需要的话最好出去找列车长交涉哦？我可不想在充电的时候被怒气冲冲的帕姆拔电源……
E: Regarding cooking — the conductor advises against cooking in the room. If you need to cook, it might be best to negotiate with the conductor. I wouldn't want Pom-Pom to shut my power down in a fit...

C: 「哎这是什么玩意，我在哪里说话你能听到吗？喂喂喂？这小东西很有意思啊，感觉跟我好兄弟雷金一样聪明。」
E: "Hey, what's this gadget? Can you hear me no matter where I am? Hello? This little device is pretty fascinating, almost as clever as my buddy Regin."

C: 其实我还会讲笑话...要是你什么时候心情不好，可以找我聊天。
E: I can crack a few jokes too... if you're ever feeling down, feel free to chat with me.

C: 有交到新朋友吗？
E: Made any new friends?

C: 他…询问祭司们自己会在何时死去，得到的答案则是：「在艾格勒某次闭目之时」。
E: He... He asked the priests when he would die. The answer he received was: "When Aquila closes one of their eyes."

C: 当心尼卡多利让你飞起来。
E: Nikador will have your head for saying that.

C: 哎，你也不理解。但我会详细解释的，别在那种人身上浪费时间了，用利衡币就能收买的人，跟他们对上眼我都觉得晦气！
E: Ah, you don't understand me either. I'll explain the whole thing, but don't waste your time on such people. Dealing with anyone who can be bought off with Balance Coins just feels like inviting bad luck!

C: 这么大方的吗？
E: Such generosity, isn't it?

C: 对黄金裔们的评价？
E: What do you think of the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 关于你们的过去……
E: About your past...

C: 在冥界，记得给我寄冥信片。
E: In the nether realm, don't forget to send me a "nether postcard."

C: 那为何艾格勒的火种没有归还？
E: But why wasn't Aquila's Coreflame returned?

C: 而在翁法罗斯坠入永夜之后…我在树庭重新建立起了昏光庭院。
E: After Amphoreus fell into eternal night... I rebuilt the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove.

C: 请你闭上眼睛想象——在林叶簌簌、凉风习习的庭院中，到处是闪闪发亮的饰品和软乎乎的抱枕，餐桌上摆着可口的蜜饯和暖融融的茶水。
E: Close your eyes and imagine this — a courtyard with rustling leaves and a cool breeze. Shimmering ornaments and fluffy cushions are scattered everywhere, while the dining table is laid with delicious sugary preserves and warm, soothing tea.

C: 嗯？{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我们算是认识了，有什么想聊聊的吗？
E: Hmm? {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, now that we know each other, is there anything you'd like to talk about?

C: 但如今这世道…那些外邦的就不说了——不远万里逃难过来，能带多少家当？就连本地也有不少贵族，只剩下一点表面体面。
E: These days, though... Let's not even talk about the foreigners who fled here with barely anything to their name. Even among the local aristocrats, many are just keeping up appearances.

C: 帮我向遐蝶问好。
E: Say hi to Castorice for me.

C: …这么多年过去了…欢笑，泪滴，奥赫玛的回忆……
E: ...So many years have passed... Laughter and tears are all part of Okhema's memories.

C: 这也太大方了……
E: This is way too generous...

C: 不过…最近我倒是需要谋求个副业。哈哈，没想到身为显赫世家的继承人，有朝一日还会被财务所困，实在丢人。
E: However... lately I find myself in need of a side venture. Hah, who would have thought the heir to a prestigious family would one day face financial troubles? It's truly embarrassing.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 还是赶紧去避难吧。
E: You should hurry to find shelter.

C: 我们刚刚和其他卫兵取得了联系，等到确定外面安全下来，他们就会护送我们去跟广场的大伙汇合……
E: We've just made contact with other guards, and once they confirm it's safe outside, they'll escort us to meet everyone at the Plaza...

C: 情况还好吗？
E: How is the situation?

C: 大地兽们还好吗？
E: Are the dromas okay?

C: 保重。
E: Stay strong.

C: 万敌他……
E: And Mydei...

C: （对不起，可能是我的错……）
E: (I'm sorry, maybe it's my fault...)

C: 嗯…有位织者不畏艰辛。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云崖的石壁上</color>，向最高处攀登呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who fears no hardship. The golden thread brings tidings: They are climbing to the highest point on <color=#dbc291ff>the stone walls of Dawncloud</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者心性单纯。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>围栏的挂饰上</color>用铃声复诵愿望，不知它的愿望是否实现了呢？
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is pure-hearted. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>on the fence ornaments</color>, reciting wishes with the sound of bells. I wonder if the wish has been fulfilled.

C: 这里千年来未曾有人涉足，贵客，请务必小心。
E: No one has ventured here in a thousand years, esteemed guest. Please be very careful.
Oh...

C: 呵呵，还好。耕耘月和收获月是最要出力的时候，其他时间谈不上太忙。
E: Hehe, not too bad. The Month of Cultivation and Month of Reaping are the toughest, but the rest of the time's pretty manageable.

C: 啊，你是白厄的朋友吧，欢迎。
E: Ah, you must be a friend of Phainon's. Welcome!

C: 能和我说说白厄吗？
E: Can you tell me about Phainon?

C: 怎样才能当上村长？
E: How did you become a village chief?

C: 听说每一批出去闯荡的孩子，都会在离开村庄前许下约定：等长大之后，一定要在这棵树前重聚。
