E: I heard that every group of children who went out of the village would make a promise before leaving: When they grew up, they'd meet again before this tree.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 我会帮凯撒征服她想要的领土，令我塞涅卡的威名不下于天空英雄塞涅俄丝，而后领导昏光庭院实现夙愿——
E: I will aid the Imperator in conquering the lands she desires, and I, Seneca, shall be as renowned as Seliose the sky hero, leading the Twilight Courtyard to fulfill their dreams—

C: 不过，也许是我做贤人和参谋的老毛病吧——有时候脑子里还是会冒出一些念头，比如…逐火之旅果真能如此完美么？
E: However... and maybe it's an old problem from me being a sage and an advisor... I keep thinking a thought about... well, what if the Flame-Chase Journey truly can be as perfect as imagined?

C: 听到…海瑟音大人的歌声了吗？赞美、赞美我主——您让海洋重归澄澈清明，您、您让秘酿再次醇美甘甜……
E: Can you... hear Lady Hysilens's song? Praise... praise our Lady. You who restored the seas to clarity, you who blessed the ambrosia with sweetness...

C: 但我知道…我知道…在我们偶尔畅饮蜜酿、寻欢作乐时…她的歌声会产生动荡…她一定也想与我们一同庆祝欢宴，我的主…是个孤独的人……
E: Yet I know... I know... in moments when we drink honey brew and indulge in revelry... her song trembles... She must long to join our festivity. My Lady... is lonely one...

C: 吼哎，本，本狮，没，没醉。不信，本狮给你讲个城，城里的笑话。
E: Oh, I—I'm not drunk. If you don't believe me, I can tell you a funny tale from the c—city.

C: 海瑟音！
E: Hysilens!

C: 随后，蜜酿便成了家喻户晓之物。而法吉娜的权柄内，也加入了「欢宴」的意象——虽然后来有点过头了吼？
E: After that, honey brew became a common beverage. Phagousa's authority was also added to the people's inclination toward feasts. Although, it seemed like they ultimately went overboard with it?

C: 嗯…有位织者喜好探险。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>趴在一面蓝色的墙上</color>，好奇墙的另一头有什么呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has a taste for adventure. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>clinging to a blue wall</color>, wondering what lies beyond it.

C: 嗯…有位织者自认为是一条鱼。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>眠宫长廊窗外的水中</color>，学着吐泡泡呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who insists they are a fish. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding <color=#dbc291ff>in the water outside the windows of the Slumbering Palace Corridor</color>, trying to blow bubbles.

C: 我知道，经营餐馆并不容易。可别太过辛劳哦，店长。
E: I know running a restaurant is no easy feat. Don't push yourself too hard, manager.

C: 真抱歉，这里有些杂乱。这阵子顾客越来越多， 生意也越来越红火，真有点抽不开手了迷。
E: Apologies for the mess. Things have gotten a bit hectic lately. More customers are coming in, and business has really picked up. It's hard to find a spare moment, mem.

C: 真希望有朝一日，我也能和他们一样独当一面啊！
E: I really hope that one day, I can hold my own just like they do!

C: 你、你的话…到时候当然早就已经荣升董事长了迷！
E: Y—You... by then, you'll have been promoted to chairman already, mem!

C: 这，你们这……
E: Is that... Is that right?

C: 咕咕咕——
E: Hoot hoot hoot...

C: ——不过，那都是很多年前的事了。现在老鸟是折纸小鸟们的老师。毕竟鸟的心力总有耗尽的时候，要将未来的天空交给下一代才行咕。
E: ...But, that was many, many years ago. I am now the origami birds' teacher. A bird's energy and spirit do whittle eventually — we must entrust the skies of tomorrow to the next generation, hoot.

C: 不对啾！！！我们说好了，按照颜色分配——你是妃色夫人，我才是湛蓝爵士啾。
E: That's not right, tweet!!! We agreed to play our roles according to color — you're Lady Vermilion, and I should be Dr. Blues, tweet.

C: 造成这场袭击的原因是多方面的：防护不力，内外勾结……
E: There are many reasons behind this attack: Collusion, lack of defensive power...

C: 莱斯莉不仅仅是一个明星那么简单。她是一个天才学者，是前期的基因与后期的努力共同作用出来的成果，即便是她的妹妹埃美丽，也绝对不会有她的成就。
E: Lesley is more than a celebrity. She is a gifted scholar. She's the combined result of her genes and her own efforts. Even her sister Emily won't be able to achieve anything like that.

C: 借你吉言。
E: Thanks for your blessing. I'm counting on it.

C: 这座人台静静地伫立在道路一侧，不发一言。或许它的核心遭到了毁坏，或许它的智慧已经消褪，又或许它早已忘却了自己的使命。
E: This mannequin stands silently by the roadside, wordless. Perhaps its core has been damaged, perhaps its intelligence has faded away, or maybe it has long forgotten its mission.

C: 是啊，这当真是个美丽的新世界。其实彼时我并未曾奢望还能与伏尔甘再次相见…感谢您，英雄，也感谢黄金裔的诸位——我从未奢望过能有这样的重逢。
E: Indeed, what a beautiful new world this is. Back then, I never dared to hope I would meet Vulcan again... Thank you, hero, and thanks to all the Chrysos Heirs... I never dreamed such a reunion would be possible.

C: 这…可是…可是我们还想为柯库翁先生做点什么……
E: But... but... we still want to do something for Mr. Glykon...

C: 对对对——到时候我们兄弟俩保证带头为您欢呼，咱们的大英雄——{NICKNAME}阁下也会到场，对吧？
E: Yeah, yeah, yeah. We bros promise to lead the cheers for you when the time comes, and our great hero {NICKNAME} will be there too, right?

C: 好听，爱听，多讲讲。
E: Love it, keep going, tell me more.

C: 获胜的瞬间，嗝…我也想亲眼看看啊！
E: I wish I could've seen that— *hic* —winning moment with my own eyes!

C: 我就说这人不靠谱，老师，他拿咱们当乐子呢——不是说你啊，英雄——这蓝头发的就是这个奸商！
E: See, sir? This person can't be trusted. He's making fools of us — not you, of course, hero — I'm talking about this blue-haired con artist!

C: 咱们搞研究的，就是要不怕苦不怕累，一步一个脚印，将那些繁文缛节统统抛弃！
E: As researchers, we can't shy away from hard work. We must take things step by step and throw away all those unnecessary formalities!

C: 你、你们别太过分！雅努萨波利斯祭司的声誉岂容你们这般玷污…啊——我记得你，异乡的贵客！
E: Y-You people are going too far! The reputation of the Janusopolis Priests is not to be sullied by the likes of you! Ah — wait, I recognize you, distinguished guest from afar!

C: 展开说说？
E: Care to elaborate?

C: 迷…它应该也没有同意吧？
E: Hmm... I don't think it agreed either, did it?

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「有的嗷有的嗷！沉甸甸的金海豹杯，离开翁法罗斯的时候，不要忘了把它带上。」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Yes, yes, of course! Don't forget to take this coveted Gold Seal Cup with you when you leave Amphoreus!" )∋

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「还是{NICKNAME}厉害，一下子就止住它们的争斗了。」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "{NICKNAME}, you're so amazing! You stopped their fight in an instant." )∋

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 好生无礼！「摇光爵」，你在言辞犀利这方面…竟然毫不输给「冬霖爵」……
E: How insolent! When it comes to sharp words, Dux Lucens... you're every bit the equal of the Dux Brumalis.

C: 天外世界的看法么？我反倒要感谢{NICKNAME}，比起「毁灭」那无数颗闪烁的星星，我很高兴，它们最终还是踏上了有无限可能的道路。
E: My thoughts on the world beyond the sky? For that, I have {NICKNAME} to thank. I am glad that instead of facing "Destruction," those countless stars were ultimately set upon a path of infinite possibilities.

C: 毕竟不是谁都能上来就叫宝。
E: After all, not everyone can start using nicknames straightaway.

C: 不需要开百界门…突然，感觉很无聊！
E: No more opening the Century Gate... Ugh, everything feels so boring all of a sudden!

C: 记得我为什么喜欢秋千吗？因为一摇一摆，就能触碰到天空。
E: Remember why I love swings? Because with each sway back and forth, I can touch the sky.

C: 不错，的确是学士的灼见。是我的针脚犹豫了。
E: Indeed, that's quite an astute observation from a scholar. I was the one being hesitant with my stitches.

C: 自从双眼复明后，我重新拾起了「织者」的工作。书店的克帖西芬委托我织一副泰坦神话主题的挂毯，放在她的店铺里。
E: Since regaining my sight, I've resumed my work as a "weaver." Ctesiphona from the bookstore commissioned me to weave a Titan-mythology-themed tapestry for her shop.

C: 你终于忍不了了。
E: Finally! I knew you wouldn't be able to endure that.

C: 要说唯一的一点怅惘，便是与你的相遇。人和人的相遇和离别是常态，阁下总要踏往更远的星空……
E: If I must name something regretful, it would be our encounter. Meetings and partings are part and parcel of life, and you must always venture forth toward more distant stars...

C: 「沿着仪式剑的源头而下，便是通向新世界的桥梁。」预言如此阐述道。
E: "Follow the source of the ceremonial blade downward, and you shall find the bridge to a new world." Thus spoke the prophecy.

C: 还挺有纪念意义的。
E: That's quite memorable.

C: 这是一面古怪的屏幕。上次触碰它时，你不得不与那来古士战至天昏地暗……
E: This is one weird screen. Last time you touched it, you had to fight Lygus until all hell broke loose...

C: 在这场实验中，真正导致失败的<color=#dbc291ff>变量</color>是什么？
E: In this experiment, what was the real <color=#dbc291ff>variable</color> that led to failure?

C: 你是一块绝好的石料，勿要放弃这份可塑性——它是你身上最大的卓越。
E: You're a diamond in the rough. Don't lose that malleability, for it is your greatest excellence.

C: 你想了解这辆列车？我很高兴，它是我们很重要的同伴。
E: Ohh, you want to know more about the Express? I'm glad. After all, it's an important companion of ours.

C: 我发现列车时，它的记忆体已经损坏，丢失了很多宝贵的资料。只知道：列车确实是阿基维利的造物；列车确实曾与阿基维利一同旅行。
E: When I found the Express, its memory had been severely damaged, with much of its valuable information lost. All I know is that the Express is an Aspect of Creation built by Akivili themself, and used to travel the cosmos.

C: 星神身上的谜团实在太多了，据说黑塔女士拉上了几位会员，正想办法攻克祂们的未解之谜。
E: A cloud of mystery shrouds the Aeons. I heard Madam Herta recruited a team to try and solve the mysteries about THEM.

C: 我要保护这个世界的美好，不被「毁灭」所破坏。
E: I want to protect the beauty of this world from those that follow the Path of Destruction.

C: 关于历史…
E: About the history of the galaxy...

C: 你和瓦尔特先生什么时候认识的？
E: When did you and Mr. Yang meet?

C: 大人一点儿想象力都没有吗？冒险的舞台当然可以是虚构的嘛。
E: Do grownups have no imagination? The adventures can be fictional, you know.

C: 你们相信这书上写的内容吗？
E: Do you believe in the stuff written in the book?

C: 我看他无依无靠的，就想着把我这铺铁轨的手艺传给他。他也好靠自己讨个饭吃。
E: I saw he had no one to rely on, so I thought to pass on my track-laying skills to him. With those skills, he can make a living for himself.

C: …哦，是你啊。师傅还在准备新题目呢，我稍微偷会儿懒……
E: ... Oh, it's you. My master is still preparing his new puzzle, so I'm taking the chance to relax for a while...

C: 先倒车，再向前进……
E: Reverse first, then go forward...

C: 都是假的，我的朋友，这一切都是假的。梦是假的，你是假的，我也是假的。
E: It's all fake, my friend. This is all a farce. The dream is false, you are false, and I am false.

C: 知道，我就在现场。
E: I know. I was there.

C: 而且原版的《太空大战争》怎么可能会有反物质军团啊，她应该是在游戏程序上动了些手脚，至于目的…我就不知道了
E: And the original version of Cosmic Warfare never featured the Antimatter Legion, anyway. She's just played around with the game's engine. As for her aim... I have no idea.

C: 艾丝妲让我来帮你。
E: Asta asked me to help you.

C: 咦，总觉得你有点眼熟……
E: Huh, something seems really familiar about you...

C: 你只要在<color=#dbc291ff>机械聚落</color>找到<color=#dbc291ff>能源中枢</color>，再把它带回来就好。
E: It would be great if you could fetch for me from <color=#dbc291ff>the Robot Settlement</color> this <color=#dbc291ff>energy hub</color>.

C: 或许宝藏正是用这种方式掩饰着自己的价值，才能等来持有藏宝图的人来发现它吧。
E: Perhaps this is how the treasure hides its value until the people in possession of the treasure map come to find it.

C: 所以，给我演示一下你平时是怎么用它们战斗的，成吗？一下就好！
E: Can you give me a demonstration of how you use this in combat, please? Just for a little bit!

C: 哈哈，谢谢你，我就知道你肯定会帮忙的。
E: Haha, thanks for that. I knew you'd help out.

C: 她后来成为了贝洛伯格士官学院首屈一指的尖子生，以年级第一的身份从那里毕业。人们都说她是贝洛伯格最智慧的头脑，就连希露瓦也难以望其项背。
E: Later, she became the top student at the Belobog Military Academy, graduating at the top of her class. People say she had the most intelligent mind in all of Belobog, one that not even Serval can surpass.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得…这样描述是否合适？
E: Do you think this description is appropriate, {NICKNAME}?

C: 想请你复述一遍她的故事…
E: I would like you to repeat her story...

C: 不过，你还可以再考虑一下——我们还有时间。
E: However, you can still think about it a little more — we have time.

C: 「然而，在她执政中期，这位大守护者颁布了知名的『封锁令』。彼时的她坚信惟有此举能够稳固贝城后方，却也造成了太多惨烈且无谓的牺牲——无人不为之痛心；」 / 「可她肩上的担子实在过于沉重——她试图从乱线中编织出冬城的命运，却也被它压垮。她渐渐变得无情而寡欲，但人们依旧紧密团结在她的身边；」 / 「尽管大守护者在残酷的命运面前落了下风，人性中的光辉亦被逐渐蚕食；但她仍尽力将温情留给人民，助他们求得拯救——如同她对待女儿那般；」
E: "However, she announced the infamous order for the blockade midway through her reign. She firmly believed at the time that it was the only way to secure the city of Belobog, but the blockade caused far too many tragic and pointless sacrifices. All citizens were hurt by the decision." / "The weight on her shoulders was far too heavy. She tried to weave the destiny of the winter city from a tangled thread, but was crushed by this destiny. She slowly became emotionless and impassive, yet the people still clustered around her in loyalty." / "Though the Supreme Guardian lost before her cruel destiny and the light of humanity eroded away, she still tried her best to give whatever gentleness she had to the people and help them toward salvation, just like how she treated her daughter."

C: 这篇剪报的标题是「捷音自煦日节晨曦传来，雪原前线我军酣畅大胜」。
E: This clipping is titled "Good News at Sunrise for the Solwarm Festival: A Decisive Victory at the Snow Plains War Front."

C: 大部分参观者并不知道这些武器的威力——毕竟很少有人能像你一样能有机会实际体验一下。
E: Most museumgoers don't know the power of these weapons. After all, few — if any — have had the chance to witness and experience them.

C: 素裳小姐才是，你好像在发抖……
E: But Miss Sushang, you seem to be the one trembling...

C: 她竟然登上过幽灵星槎？
E: She actually boarded the phantom starskiff?

C: 驭空大人约定和我们在狐眠冢见面，时候差不多了吧？
E: Madam Yukong said to meet us at Foxsomn Tomb. Is it about time?

C: 嗯，我邀请你们来到狐眠冢，就是为了解除各位对幽灵星槎的疑惑。
E: Yes, I invited all of you to the Foxsomn Tomb so as to clear up any doubts you have about the phantom starskiff.

C: 我拍到了幽灵星槎，咱们现在发个帖子吧？
E: I got a picture of the phantom starskiff. How about making a post right now?

C: 这张照片你就留着吧，发出去之前记得修图。
E: Hold onto this photo yourself. Don't forget to edit it before you send it out.

C: 机兵们不满地离开了……
E: The automatons leave in disappointment...

C: 如果只是自拍的话，好像也没什么特别的价值……
E: If it's just a selfie, it can't be that meaningful...

C: 写作导游，读作吃白食的。
E: "Tour guide"? Sounds like a fancy way of getting free food.

C: 不过味道倒是意外独特，咬口酥脆，入口即化。吃下肚片刻还会对过去品尝美食的回忆产生一些联想。所以说，这真的是「梦貘」做的吗……
E: Very unique taste — crispy melt-in-the-mouth type texture too... Y'know, the flavor kinda reminded me of a lot of stuff I'd eaten before, but I couldn't put my finger on anything. That's the magic of "tuskpir," I guess...

C: …你问有什么好吃的吗？金人巷这地方，你闭着眼睛随便走，哪一家都好吃。
E: ...Oh, interested in the food? In Aurum Alley, there's no such thing as a bad food stall. Just close your eyes and pick one at random.

C: 那就好，那就好。我们对远道而来的客人都是很热情的。
E: Glad to hear. We always try to treat visitors from outside well.

C: 这码头是商会租用的吗？
E: This dock was leased out to the Merchant Guild?

C: …我不做顾问，但是可以帮忙。
E: I don't know the first thing about business or consultancy...

C: 很好，既然会长已做出决定，便由我来负责召集公开会议。
E: Very well, since the president has come to a decision, I will be in charge of calling a public meeting.

C: 我不是来修东西的。
E: I didn't come to fix anything.

C: 霄老大，我是商会的小秘书明曦，我们来是想谈……
E: Mr. Xiao, I'm Mingxi, the secretary of the Merchant Guild. We're here to talk about—

C: 我们到齐了。可是，会长人呢？
E: We're all here... but where's the president?

C: 素裳需要有人帮助，所以我想麻烦你过去看看。
E: But she could use some extra hands. Would you mind helping her out?

C: 商会的福利肯定少不了你的，拜托啦。
E: The guild will make it worth your while. Pleaaaase~

C: 也不是不行，作为化外民最常去的罗浮十景之首，金人巷当然是所有人不容错过的好地方。你想好了，要拍你还是拍白露大人？
E: I mean... why not? "Aurum Alley — A Luofu Top-Ten Destination for Outworlders." So, have you made up your mind? Are we shooting Bailu or you?

C: 刚才，燕翠师傅已经同意与码头建立合作了。
E: Yancui has just told me to go ahead with the partnership.

C: 我谨代表天舶司，受邀主持金人巷商区竞标会议。各方代表均已到齐，现在开标评审。
E: On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I am invited to host the public bidding of the Aurum Alley commercial district. With members of all parties present, the proceedings may begin.

C: 哈哈，在谈判桌上就别玩文字游戏了吧。
E: Haha, I think you understand my point.

C: 每个人都是如此。
E: The same can be said for all of us.

C: 哦，你在这里呢。
E: Oh, didn't see you there.

C: 啊，没错，不行吗？
E: Uh, yeah. Why not?

C: 做我们这行的，最重要的就是谨慎。你放心朋友，你通过了我的考验，取得了我的信任，我说到做到。
E: In this line of business, the most important thing is being cautious. Relax, my friend. You've passed my test and won my trust. I will do as I say.

C: 刚才，矮阿姨已经同意与码头建立合作了。那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「美馔阁」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
E: Short Auntie just agreed to collaborate with the docks. {NICKNAME}, please add Delicacy Pavilion into the logistics plan. This way, the docks can get some new orders soon.

C: 哎，我知道你是来劝我放弃幻想、认真上班的。但今时不同往日，我有必须翘班的理由。
E: Hey, I know you're here to persuade me to give up my delusion so I can get back to work. But this time is different. I really need an excuse to ditch work.

C: 没错，公司接手金人巷之后，他们可能关闭「同功坊」，而我们就不会。
E: That's right. The IPC will close down Artistry Hardware if they take over. We would never do that.

C: 我们用决策保护商铺，而公司只会为了决策牺牲商铺。
E: We protect businesses, the IPC sacrifices them for their own gain.

C: 游客并没有减少！
E: There are actually more customers coming to the Alley!

C: 谢谢你，陌生的朋友。
E: Thank you, stranger.

C: 你探头靠近箱子，决定一睹「箱中仙」的真身——然而视线所及之处，只有一只睡着还不忘磨牙的机巧鸟。
E: Curious, you move in closer to the box, hoping to catch a glimpse of the "fairy in the box." However, all you see is a snoozing cycrane, grinding its teeth, fast asleep.

C: 等到大人完成到一定程度后，守灵会带着谢礼出现——守灵会在需要时出现，不需要时离开，不会耽误大人时间的。
E: When you have collected enough, Shouling will appear with a token of appreciation. Shouling will appear when there is a need, and leave when there isn't, without taking up too much of your time.

C: 哎哟，世玲可是空间站的正规科员！「科研」！「科研」的事怎么能随随便便说随便呢？！
E: Hey! I'm a bona fide researcher of the space station! It's science! How can you just casually call it "casual"!?

C: 你就尽管去搜集素材就好，别的事不用操心！这次记得多带点<color=#dbc291ff>冰之芯</color>回来哦。
E: You just go along and collect materials. Leave the rest to me! Just remember to bring back more <color=#dbc291ff>Core of Ice</color> this time.

C: 哎，你是懂科研的。干咱们这行，哪儿有容易这个说法呢？
E: You sound like you understand the struggle. No such thing as easy in scientific research.

C: 拿出魄力就可以解决问题！尤其是这样的售货机，卡住了就可以帮它「摇」出来嘛！
E: Use your charisma to solve the problem! Vending machines like this can be shaken if they're stuck!

C: 造孽啊…造孽啊！
E: This is karma... karma I tell you!

C: 幸好没有选择连续出拳，否则贝洛伯格今日会多一个手指头粉碎性骨折的人。
E: Thank goodness you didn't punch it more than once, or there would be one more person in Belobog with comminuted phalanx fractures on the fingers.
Hmm...

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
E: Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.

C: 滴答，好呀，我们的工作就是陪伴宾客。
E: Tick-tock, okay! Our job is to accompany our guests.

C: 这是…笔记？是谁留下的？上面写了什么？是有用的信息吗？
E: Is this a... note? Who left it here? What's written on it? Anything useful?

C: 但我们的目标还是没变——集中精力寻找线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: But our target remains unchanged. Let's focus on finding clues, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: …您好，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。上次让您看到了我失态的样子，实在是抱歉。
E: ...Hello. I must apologize for displaying that misconduct with you the last time.

C: 咳，我得承认，上次调查的*失败*的确给了我不小的打击……
E: Ahem, I do have to admit, the failure of the last investigation really hit me hard...

C: 「诶？那袋金光闪闪的垃圾呢？怎么不播了？」你感到疑惑。
E: "Eh? Where's that golden bag of trash? Why don't they show it anymore?" you wonder.

C: 上次我都看到了，你和艾米绮聊得很开心。她的性格我最清楚，黏人得很，让她安静离开可不容易。所以，我相信你能胜任这份工作。
E: I saw you having a good time talking to Amiky last time. I know her well — she can be clingy, and it's not easy to convince her to leave without making a fuss. So, I believe you're the right fit for the job.

C: 有这种协会么？不介意的话，让他们来我这团建呗，我正好也见见。
E: Is there such a society? If you don't mind, you can invite your fellow members here for team building. I'd love to meet them.

C: 让我想想…
E: Hmm... Let me think about it.

C: （…或许可以趁机进入它的内心世界，帮它改掉这个爱捉弄人的坏毛病。）
E: (...Maybe I can seize this chance to slip into his internal world and help him change this bad habit of pranking others.)

C: …有这么长时间？
E: ...Has it really been that long?

C: 怎会如此？怎会如此！就连我们之中最智慧的思考者都变成了这副模样！
E: How could this be? How!? Even the wisest thinker among us has lost his sanity!

C: 我可没有！这是一件好事，我觉得很适合{NICKNAME}乘客。
E: I didn't! This is a good thing, I think it really suits {NICKNAME}.

C: 曾有无名客建起石桥，后来它毁于潮汐；曾有无名客寻得古城，后来它毁于沙风…物质世界总是在不停变化，而你收获的经历历久弥坚。
E: A Nameless once built a stone bridge that eventually was destroyed by the tide. There was once a Nameless who sought an ancient city that had later been decimated by a sandstorm... The material world is forever in a state of change, but the experiences you gain will always endure.

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 要是一直跟你开玩笑，你要怎么才知道自己完成了什么惊人壮举嘛～
E: If I am always joking around with you, how would you know that you accomplished something incredible?

C: 他们布下重重机关，把画里的房间变成迷宫，就是为了阻碍我们的搜查——反过来想，房间里必然还藏着大量的赃物。
E: They set many traps, turning the room in the painting into a maze to impede our search. Come to think of it, there must still be plenty of stolen loot in the room.

C: 你为什么自己不去找？
E: Why don't you look for it yourself?

C: 其他几部《美梦往事》的胶卷也会陆续完成修复，完成剪辑就能上映。
E: The other film reels of the Dreamjoy Memoir series will also be restored one by one. Once the editing is completed, they are ready to be released.

C: 米莫萨面露复杂的微笑，看着柜中的胶卷若有所思。
E: With a smile that conveys complicated emotions, Mimosa casts a contemplative gaze at the film reel in the cabinet.

C: 这个家伙，真是太自私了，到底要给我们的美梦添堵到什么时候！
E: That guy's too selfish. When is he going to stop ruining the Dreamscape!?

C: 米莫萨跟皮斯简述了刚刚的经历。
E: Mimosa briefly describes to Pisce what she has just experienced.

C: 你怎么评价这部影片？
E: How would you rate this movie?

C: 钟表小子的故事不会结束！
E: The story of Clockie will never end!

C: 关于影城遭到的破坏。
E: About the destruction of the theme park.

C: 「在广告牌的帮助下，哈努兄弟成功越过了电梯井，来到最后一道难关面前。」
E: "With the help of the billboard, Brother Hanu successfully makes it across the elevator shaft, reaching the final obstacle."

C: 至于本次影片的剧本…我也与皮斯先生商量过了，便以最经典的故事加以改编——充满浪漫与魔法的<color=#dbc291ff>《美梦仙踪》</color>，如何？
E: As for the script for this movie... I've also discussed it with Mr. Pisce, to adapt that classic tale — the most romantic and magical Dreamjoy Ascension! What do you think?

C: 现在的拍摄都已经完成了，我这就去把拍完的胶片都送到负责人手上！
E: Now that the shoot's over, I'll pass along the completed film to the one in charge!

C: （打开宝箱）
E: (Open the chest)

C: 非常无聊。
E: Pretty boring.

C: 听说最近《美梦往事》的影片很火，多亏了影片导演，让这里起死回生了。
E: I recently heard the Dreamjoy Memoir movie is super popular. The new director really breathed life back into this place.

C: 这个瓶子脑袋似乎正在为什么事情苦恼，找点能让他打起精神的消息吧。
E: This bottle brain seems to be troubled by something. Find something to help lift up his spirits.

C: 或许这才是真正的他。
E: Perhaps that's his real self.

C: 如果石头老板是一个强大冷酷的机器人，我也就不用发愁了，那样的反派随便就能吸引一大批粉丝…但他是一只又蠢又坏的肥鳄鱼！连气球周边都卖不出去！
E: If Boss Stone were a powerful and clinical robot, I wouldn't be so worried. That kind of bad guy would bring in a stack of fans... But him, he's just a stupid fat crocodile! You can't even sell crocodile balloons as merch!

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 是他将监狱从公司的奴役中解放出来，赋予此处「匹诺康尼」之名…但匹诺康尼似乎从不感恩这位英雄，我在梦里从没见过他的塑像或颂歌。
E: He was the one who broke the IPC's hold over the prison and named it "Penacony"... Yet Penacony has never seemed to thank this hero, and I don't recall ever seeing his statue or hearing his theme song in the dreams.

C: 啾！很有可能，他们在动画里用石头和树枝搭建起了美梦小镇，这和用梦宇忆质建设匹诺康尼的筑梦师是一样的！
E: Tweet! It's very possible. In the animation, they built Dreamville using stones and branches — just like how the Dreamweavers built Penacony using memoria!

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: 有年轻的电影人进来…
E: There's a young film worker coming through...

C: 有点可疑…
E: Sounds kinda sus...

C: 不，我要来找茬。
E: No, I have a bone to pick with you.

C: 这就结束了？
E: That's it?

C: 现在，想象你们二人受到拓荒感召，第一次踏上匹诺康尼的梦之土地。可是这里黄沙漫天，一片荒芜，根本不是「钟表匠」口中的乐土！
E: Envision that you both, driven by the spirit of exploration, are arriving at the land of dreams that is Penacony for the first time. But! Instead of lush lands, you find yourselves amidst swirling sands and desolation, far from the paradise the Watchmaker described.

C: 什么鬼地方！钟表匠这个骗子！
E: What in tarnation is this hellhole! The Watchmaker is a big fat liar!

C: 匹诺康尼果然处处是机遇！
E: O, Penacony, my Penacony! You truly abound with opportunities!

C: 最高分通过！
E: You pass with full marks!

C: 关于那只忆域迷因……
E: About that Memory Zone Meme...

C: 热砂假日
E: Scorchsand Vacation

C: 「互动电影：热砂假日」
E: "Interactive Movie: Scorchsand Vacation"

C: 长生的赐福却成了诅咒。仙舟之民在反复的吞吐中经历无数次融解重构。
E: The blessing of immortality turned into a curse. The Xianzhou people underwent countless cycles of dissolution and re-structure in the repeated regurgitation.

C: 你登上螺丝咕姆的舰船，来到金碧辉煌的梦之国度。一艘巨大的飞艇飘浮在忆质之海上，宛如一只初醒的飞鸟，在梦中荡起层层涟漪。
E: You board the Screwllum's ship, entering a dream realm of glittering splendor. A colossal airship floats on an ocean of memoria, like a bird awakening, stirring ripples through the dream.

C: 她是你祖宗，三月七！
E: She's March 7th, your ancestor!

C: 得到高人指点？
E: Receive guidance from a sage?

C: 难道说，我又要…我不！我不我不我不！凭什么，仙舟的小铁片子就能击败公司的无敌机甲！肯、肯定是你们作弊了，这一场不算，我要求重来！
E: So, does that mean... I... I have to...? No way! This can't be happening! How could a tiny piece of scrap metal defeat the IPC's mechs!? You guys must have cheated! This doesn't count! I demand a rematch!

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 如果那只岁阳专挑演武仪典的选手做目标…{NICKNAME}，咱们不如在有空的时候去绥园碰碰运气，也许能帮到藿藿也说不定呢？
E: If that heliobus targets Wardance contenders on purpose... {NICKNAME}, how about we try our luck at Fyxestroll Garden when we've got time? We might be able to help Huohuo.

C: 唉唉唉！当着这几位医士的面可不敢这么乱说，我怕被扭送地衡司！
E: Hey! Don't say something like that in front of these healers! I don't want to end up in some Realm-Keeping Commission court!

C: 只不过，痛觉是人体的警告信号，无视痛觉，一意孤行战斗下去…那很有可能，受了致命伤却不自知啊。
E: Well, the thing is, pain is your body's way of warning you something is wrong. If you ignore it and push through... you might end up with some serious injuries without even realizing it.

C: 我…我斯科特是，前星际和平公司员工！
E: I... I'd be Skott... former employee of the Interastral Peace Corporation!

C: （喂喂！你说错了吧……）
E: (Hey! That's not the right thing to say...)

C: 你还没有猪叫呢？
E: But have you forgotten the "squealing like a pig" part?

C: 椒丘悠哉地离开了……
E: Jiaoqiu saunters off...

C: …赤龙？嚯，请两位给妾身仔细讲讲吧。
E: ...Crimson Dragon? Ho, please spare no details.

C: 不愧是{NICKNAME}，轻易就做到了我做不到的事。
E: That's {NICKNAME} for you, a brave soul who dares venture where I do not.

C: 不行。就算你想要收集以太灵，也得按规矩来，成熟的玩家会自己去打听消息。
E: No way. Even if you were seeking to capture an Aether Spirit, we must play by the rules. Mature players will seek information by themselves.

C: 啊…那个呀，我听过的。光看名字就明白这门武功至阳至刚。它能让练成之人肌肉虬结，身高八尺，腰围也是八尺，臂围也是八尺。谁也当不下这怪力一拳。
E: Oh... I've heard about that one. Just from the name, you can tell that this technique is the pinnacle of the Yang techniques. Using it grants the user amazing muscle development. Their height shoots to eight feet, their waist also grows to eight feet and their arm circumference does, too. No one can withstand a single blow from such a powerful physique.

C: 三月小姐，你想要再读一遍《孤影剑谱》，能告诉我为什么吗？
E: Miss March, can you tell me why it is that you want to read the Solitary Shadow Sword Scroll again?

C: 正是，人类无意义的精神碎片——忆质，游荡在街头巷尾。
E: Precisely. The undervalued psychological fragments of people — memoria, roaming the streets and alleys.

C: 在履行星穹列车的助人之道时，各位也要注意自己的身体健康…这是我身为医生能给出的唯一建议。
E: It is important for you all to take care of your own health as you carry out your mission of helping others as passengers of the Astral Express... This is the only suggestion I can give you as a doctor.

C: 这次也就拜托你了，大英雄。
E: I'm counting on you this time as well, great hero.

C: 呼——给我一点时间…我在这里感受到……一场伟大路途的开始，那便是你们「友谊凭证」的关键。
E: Phew... Just a moment... I can sense... It began with a great journey. That was the key to your Proof of Friendship.

C: {NICKNAME}，准备好了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: 唉，职责重大啊…我当了那么多年的实习生，如果这次搞砸了，恐怕就更没有转正的希望了。
E: These are huge responsibilities... I've been interning for so many years. If I screw this up, I doubt I'll ever get the chance at a full-time role.

C: 两位，咱们一起走走。路上给你们讲讲我为什么来到这儿。
E: You two, let's take a walk. I can tell you all about why I'm here on the way.

C: 你们好，我叫卢卡，来自贝洛伯格。接下来会在擂台上和各位过招，也希望能借此机会以武会友。
E: Hello everyone, I'm Luka and I come from Belobog. I'll be exchanging fists with you guys in the ring. I hope we'll be able to take this chance to become friends.

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 当然了，最简单的还是当观众。小桂子此时此刻就在观众席上，居高临下地看着我们拼死拼活，她太坏了。
E: Of course, being a spectator is the easiest. Lil Gui's up there in the stands right now, watching us duke it out from her vantage point. She's such a baddie.

C: {NICKNAME}，我感到很不对劲…我到底是怎么了？
E: {NICKNAME}, something feels off... What is happening to me?

C: 哈哈，习惯是习惯了。但是「幻觉」似乎越来越严重了…我的身体不会真的出了什么毛病吧？
E: Haha, yes, yes, I have. But the hallucinations are getting stronger... Could there actually be something wrong with me?

C: 好久不见。
E: It's been a while.

C: 真是奇遇，我在一个广场上看别人玩牌，结果认识了一个热心肠的姑娘。她说可以帮我修复我们带来的玉兆。
E: I had a strange encounter. I was at the plaza, watching people play Celestial Jade when I met a kind-hearted girl. She said she could help us repair the jade abacus we brought.

C: 没事啦，再怎么样这也已经成为历史故事了。
E: It's all right. This is a chapter in history that's already happened anyway.

C: 啊——脑子坏掉了？！
E: Ahhh!!! The brain is broken!?

C: 会不会是误诊？
E: Could it be a mistake?

C: 从前面走到宣夜大道，再沿着道路右边一直往前走，路上会看到一个说评书的人在演出。那里就是不夜侯了。
E: Go straight until Starwatcher Avenue, keep to the right, and you'll see a storyteller performing on your way. That's where the Sleepless Earl is.

C: 我站上擂台时，心里和你一样，虽说对自己苦练多年的技艺抱有信心，但说到底，我也不知自己面对的对手到底会有怎样的实力，内心也怀着恐惧。
E: I feel the same as you whenever I stand in the ring. Although I am confident in the skills that I've honed over the years through my hard work, honestly speaking, there's always that nagging uncertainty about how good my opponents might be. It's like fear sneaks in and messes with my confidence.

C: 和你说实话吧，我不可能抛下手头的工作离开贝洛伯格。
E: Truth be told, I can't just drop my work and leave Belobog.

C: 没有人知道他离开雅利洛-Ⅵ之后去做了什么，又为什么会选择回来。
E: No one knows what he did after he left Jarilo-VI, and why he decided to come back.

C: 把「们」字去掉，能办到这么厉害的事情的，只有老子！
E: There is no "we." I'm the only one here who's powerful enough to perform such a difficult task!

C: 我决定了，要参加人气复活赛，重返演武仪典的擂台！
E: I've decided to participate in the popularity revival repechage and return to the Wardance's stage!

C: 好冷血的教练！
E: You're such a brutal coach!

C: 来，看着我的枪口。走过来，揍我一拳。你敢吗？
E: Come on, look down the barrel of my gun. Walk over here and take a swing at me. You got the guts?

C: 「杂音」？杰帕德先生——他是贝洛伯格的一位军官——和我说过类似的话。
E: Noise? Mr. Gepard... uh, an officer in Belobog... He said something like that too....

C: 当面对波提欧黑洞洞的枪口时，我发现杰帕德先生是对的。我的内心充满了平静，只剩下一个声音在不断呐喊，那声音越来越大，直到盖过了周遭的一切……
E: When I was staring down the barrel of Boothill's gun, I realized Mr. Gepard was right. My inner heart was at peace, there was only one sound that was yelling non-stop. It got louder and louder, till it just overwhelmed everything around me...

C: 那声音说：「快跑！快跑！快跑！再不跑你就死了！」
E: That voice said: "Run! Run! Run away quickly! You'll die if you don't!"

C: 小心不要再输一次哦。
E: Make sure you don't lose again, okay?

C: 不过嘛，时间再仓促，也容得下一次告别。临走前我想请你喝杯茶，金人巷有个杜氏茶庄，可他宝贝的好喝了。
E: But you know, no matter how tight the schedule, there's always room for a goodbye. Before I head out, let me buy you a cup of tea. Du's Teahouse in Aurum Alley has some mighty fine fudgin' tea.

C: 我向你道歉！对不起！你要是喝了我这杯茶，就当你是原谅我了啊！
E: I'm real sorry! If you drink this cup of tea, it means you forgive me, okay?

C: 呃…她能？？？
E: Uh... Can she?

C: （都这个时间了啊！马上就要挑战彦卿了…也不知道卢卡回来了没有，去休息室找找他吧。）
E: (It's getting late, the match with Yanqing is starting soon... I wonder if Luka's back. Let's see whether he's in the lounge.)

C: 是呀～不管「竞锋守擂」的结果如何，你都是贝洛伯格名垂青史的人物了。
E: Right! Regardless of how the "Ringmaster's Challenge" transpires, you've already made a mark in Belobogian history.

C: 谢谢你，彦卿兄弟。对于一场真正的战斗，就算输了又如何？
E: Thanks, Yanqing. In a true fight, does losing even matter?

C: 就这样，他一路过关斩将，最终来到了我面前…就像这一次你出现在彦卿面前那样。他沉默地挥拳、挥拳，和我打得难分难解。
E: Just like that, he conquered every opponent and finally stood before me, much like how you faced Yanqing. He threw his punches in silence, matching me blow for blow.

C: 当然了～他早晚会成为全银河最耀眼的冠军。我看人很准的！
E: Of course! It's just a matter of time before he becomes the most dazzling champion in the cosmos. I've got a knack for reading people!

C: 还有…「同情」以外的东西吗？
E: Is there... anything more than sympathy?

C: 你们两个，可千万别让弟兄们失望。
E: You two better not let my bros down.

C: 贯穿杀戮的始终，系统在一片空洞中运行的感觉，就像是有机生命所说的——罪恶感。
E: Throughout the entire process of slaughter, I felt that my system was running in a void, just like the feel that the organic life describes as — guilt.

C: 我感觉是对手变弱了…
E: I think it's the opponent who was too weak...

C: 别急，我还有一个问题！有人目击到卢卡选手与一位自称「鼹鼠队老大」的女士共处一室，请问{NICKNAME}教练如何评价？
E: Calm down. I have another question! Someone saw Luka and a lady who calls herself "boss of the Moles" share a room. How does Coach {NICKNAME} see this?

C: 星核猎手？？？而且是那个传说中最暴力、最凶残、最冷酷的萨姆？？？
E: A Stellaron Hunter??? And it's SAM, said to be the most violent, brutal and the cruelest of them all???

C: 抱歉，身为植物，不能说话。这是我的信念。
E: Apologies. I can't be talking, as a plant. This is my belief.

C: 呃…其实我本职工作是美食栏目主持人。
E: Uh... Actually, my main job is a food show host.

C: 前排左手边第一位。
E: Front row, first from the left.

C: 整个贝洛伯格都在看着我，我不能输！
E: All of Belobog is watching me! I can't lose!

C: 卢卡选手被击倒了！他是否还能重新站起来，创造奇迹呢？
E: Luka has been knocked down! Can he rise again and produce another miracle?

C: 好强…她之前果然没有用全力……
E: So strong... She wasn't even using her full power just now...

C: 银枝先生，这一拳这称得上「纯美」吗？
E: Mr. Argenti, does this punch count as "the Beauty?"

C: 但那个符太卜死活不肯放人，原话是…「请回吧！我们丢不起这个人！」
E: But that stick-in-the-mud Diviner Fu just wouldn't lend her to us. In her own words... "No way! We simply can't afford to lose face with her!"

C: 糟糕，又超<unbreak>800</unbreak>字了！你自己慢慢玩吧，我先撤了！
E: Damn, more than <unbreak>800</unbreak> words again! You have fun on your own, I'm off!

C: 我会拼命演唱的！
E: I will play my heart out!

C: 我是不是在哪见过…
E: Where have I seen this...

C: 这不是乱破画的吗！
E: Isn't this Rappa's style?

C: 非也。在下始终行于缭乱•忍法，从未师承过其他流派。
E: Nah. I have always practiced the Dazzling Ninjutsu and have never taken an apprenticeship at any other school.

C: 现在我也是制作人了！
E: Now I'm a producer too!

C: 没听说过的地方，但从名字来看应该很有意思！
E: Never heard of that place, but it sounds interesting!

C: ——前路漫漫，凶险异常。焦急的观众翘首以盼，静候音律忍法来将舞台点燃！
E: The patch before us is long and fraught with danger. The anxious audience awaits with bated breath, ready for the Sound Release ninjutsu to set the stage ablaze!

C: 嗯…这么动听的配乐，如果用在我的影片里……
E: Hmm... Such an emotional underscore. If I used it in my film...

C: …乱破大人倒是给过我她画的忍符，不过那是我的珍藏。嘿嘿。
E: ...Though Lady Rappa gave me a ninja talisman she drew — that's my precious baby. Heh-heh.

C: 好吧，你很清楚自己不该，至少不能对一只小狗的音乐天赋抱有期待。那么，在这个离地面无比遥远的空间站中，究竟该去哪寻找所谓的灵感呢？
E: Okay, you're acutely aware that you can't, or at least, shouldn't expect a dog to have any sort of musical talent. Then, where in this space station, far away from any landfall, can you find this supposed inspiration?

C: 玩手机玩的。
E: They were on their phones all night.

C: （收集到了垃圾桶的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
E: (Collected the trashcans' rhythm record. Let's send this to Rappa for a listen.)

C: 「垃圾桶理论」！
E: "The trashcan theory"!

C: ——否！忍者乃是忠于忍道之人，若外界的规范与秩序阻碍我等忍道，便应将其破除，贯彻我心！
E: Nay! Ninjas are loyal to their own way of the ninja. If the standards and order of the outside world serve to obstruct our way of the ninja, we will break them and implement our own beliefs!

C: 看起来很顺利啊。
E: Looks like you're making good progress.

C: 哼，就问——你见过会忍术的皮皮西人吗？
E: Hmph, let me ask you... Have you ever seen a Pepeshi that can use ninjutsu before?

C: 实际演出的时候，就由我来把控节奏好了…以防忘记，得先在乐谱上标出来。
E: When we actually perform, it's up to me to keep the rhythm... I'll make a note on the score, so I don't forget.

C: 真想将苦无狠狠扎进学院的牌匾，想要把那尊雕像表面全部绘满忍符！
E: I really want to jam my kunai into the school plaque, and draw talismans all over that statue!

C: 如果决定离开乐队，艾尔菲同学就没必要浪费时间陪我们排练吧？
E: If she's decided to quit the band, why would Arfey have wasted her time practicing with us?

C: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
E: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

C: 我这还是第一次…庆幸对手是个皮皮西人。
E: This is my first time... feeling glad that my opponent is a Pepeshi.

C: 这就是大学生的日常吗？
E: This is what college students do all day?

C: 也对…光是在这里烦恼，没法改变任何事，还是要积极行动才行。
E: That's true... Getting all indecisive over this won't change anything. Only positive action will move things forward.

C: …我的手机，是家里特别定制的，只有最基础的通讯功能，没法拍照。
E: ...My phone was custom-made by my family. It only has the most basic communication functions, and can't take photos.

C: 谐乐学院
E: Charmony Academy

C: 其实，有同题材的游戏…
E: Actually, there is a game with a similar theme...

C: 哎呀，家人家人！好久不见，我可想死你了。老桑博有个不赚钱的好生意，想不想入个股？
E: Ahh, fam! It's been such a long time, and I missed you dearly. Old Sampo here has a great idea that won't make money. You interested in getting in on it?

C: 人要是太在意结果，就容易走火入魔。某种意义上说，这东西还挺危险的。我来教你一些不受它影响的小技巧吧。
E: If people get too obsessed with the outcome, they'll be driven mad. In other words, this thing's pretty dangerous. Let me teach you some tricks to avoid its influence.

C: {NICKNAME}，明天有空吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you free tomorrow?

C: …呃…这…既然如此，那就把{NICKNAME}投出去吧？
E: ...Err... Then... if that's the case, let's vote {NICKNAME} out?

C: 按照防卫科现在的规定，我们不得不请星穹列车在限期内整改，否则不能允许你们驶入空间站…抱歉。
E: According to the current Security Department regulations, we have been forced to ask the Astral Express to make the mandatory rectifications within the deadline, or risk refusal of entry by the space station... I'm sorry.

C: 结果听了我们的事故率后，立刻说：「家里炖肉忘关火了，再见。」
E: In the end, after they heard our situation, they immediately said: "I forgot to turn off the fire on my stewed meat. Goodbye."

C: 好耶！顺便来点夜宵，天才的主意！
E: Alright! We can order some supper while we're at it! Genius idea!

C: 网上的资料说，隐藏款体积更大，但为了控制成本，厂商降低了成品的密度。那么照理来说，它撞击蛋壁的音高会与其他扭蛋不同……
E: The internet says that the hidden version's surface area is bigger. To control costs, the supplier reduced the final product's density. Which technically means it'll have a different pitch when it hits the capsule's walls...

C: 嗯，我同意。毕竟是孩子。
E: Yes, I agree. They are children after all.

C: 就像「塑像」。
E: Just like a statue.

C: 记、记得要拍得好看一些！假如拍出了<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的照片</color>，本姑娘可要拿你是问！
E: R—Remember to capture the best of me! If I see any <color=#dbc291ff>weird pictures</color>, I'm going to hold you responsible!

C: 诶！这真的是我吗？！这个镜头的作用，莫非是……
E: Hey! Is this really me? Could this lens be...

C: 各位，还、还好遇见的是你们……
E: G—Good thing it was you guys I ran into...

C: 没有你这位「最佳摄影助理」帮忙，我肯定拿不了奖！
E: Without the help of my Best Photography Assistant, I never would've won!

C: 你想起了卡芙卡、刃、银狼和流萤，随即拨通了通讯…听筒里传来此起彼伏的枪声和爆炸声。
E: You recall Kafka, Blade, Silver Wolf, and Firefly, and you give them a call... But all you can hear from the earpiece is a cascading cacophony of gunfire and explosions.

C: 邀请公司的朋友们！
E: Invite your friends from the IPC!

C: 对不起！
E: Sorry!

C: 泰坦的战场，无需孱弱的造物踏足。离开此处，或尽数投身冥河。
E: The Titans' battlefield has no need for mewling creations. Leave this place, or be tossed into the River of Souls like many before you.

C: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
E: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

C: 感觉怎么样？再去和小奇美拉对话试试吧。
E: How do you feel? Try talking to the little chimera!

C: 若是小队的成绩始终不达标，管理员不仅要支付一大笔罚金，还要…在公民大会上被通报批评——谁叫奇美拉是奥赫玛的代表物种呢？
E: If the squad still doesn't hit its targets, the administrator not only has to pay a hefty fine, they'll also be... issued a memo of criticism at the citizens' assembly. I mean, the chimera is Okhema's mascot, after all.

C: 现在就把工作全都丢到一旁，好好地放松下！…去泡个澡？劳逸结合才能保持健康哦。
E: Now to toss work aside, kick back and relax! ...How 'bout a bath? A good work-life balance is how one stays healthy!

C: …说实话，我还真为你捏了把汗。能让这几只奇美拉好好干活可不容易，尤其是合作，你有什么管理的经验或是秘诀么，让我也学学吧。
E: ...Honestly, it was cutting it REALLY close there. It's not easy to whip these chimeras into shape, especially when it comes to teamwork. Mind imparting any management experience or secrets to me?

C: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
E: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

C: 您好。或许有些冒昧，但…请允许我加入您的队伍。
E: Hello. This may sound a little forward, but... please allow me to join your squad.

C: 不够的话，就得再招点奇美拉过来。但那就不是我该考虑的事了，对吧？
E: We'll have to recruit more chimeras if we've more work. But that's something above my pay grade, I think?

C: 正好，小灰，还有小风堇，这么受小奇美拉欢迎的话，我们来玩个游戏吧。
E: Perfect! Since Little Gray and Cinny are so popular among the chimeras, let's play a game.

C: 我已经下班了，有新需求请找我的同伴嗷呜。
E: I'm off duty. Please look for my buddies if you have any new requests, awoo.

C: 你才刚成为管理员，很多事都不熟悉，就把目标放低点。我想想…<color=#dbc291ff>以第七名的队伍</color>为对手怎么样？
E: You just became an administrator, and aren't familiar with many matters, so you should lower your expectations. Let's see... How about setting the <color=#dbc291ff>seventh-ranked squad</color> as a goal to catch up with?

C: 受黑潮的侵蚀，地下的网络逐渐坏死，真正保留下来的，也只有些许残卷。
E: Corrupted by the black tide, the underground network is slowly decaying. What remains is nothing more than scattered remnants of certain scrolls.

C: 如你所愿，接下来的挑战，可不能掉以轻心，别怪大哥没提醒你哦！
E: As you wish. Keep your eyes peeled in the following challenge. Don't say I didn't warn you!

C: 奖杯被搬到了你指定的位置……
E: The trophy is moved to the designated spot.

C: 这位选手，你还好吗？
E: How are you holding up, contestant?

C: 好，我宣布，恭喜{NICKNAME}选手获得了胜利。稍事休息，我们马上回来！
E: Alright. I hereby declare {NICKNAME} as the winner. Take a quick rest. We'll be back soon!

C: 这，正是王的风范！
E: Behold — the true bearing of a king!

C: 区区黑洞，看我用泡泡推出去。
E: More like a trifling chocolate trifle! Bubbles will blow it out of the water.

C: 这说明小灰的熟人遍地都是呀。
E: No, it's just because you've got friends everywhere, Little Gray!

C: 当选手的时候，还有点紧张，当观众就可以放下心来享受欢乐啦！
E: It was nerve-wracking being a contestant, but as an audience member, it's easy to just sit back and enjoy the show!

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「你…你甚至连『死』都没有经受过~~」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "You... You didn't even experience death~~")∋

C: 到底是谁邀请你了…？
E: Who invited you, exactly?

C: 嗷呜嗷呜~你…真的是刺头海豹？你怎么比完赛物种都变了？
E: Awoo-woo~ Are you... really Spiky Seal? How did even your species category change after the competition?

C: 它的刺都到哪里去了呢？
E: Where did all its thorns go?

C: 现在，你是否能够深刻理解*这迫在眉睫的危机*呢？
E: Now, do you understand the imminent danger?

C: …海洋之泰坦，给你托梦说了什么？
E: ...What did the Ocean Titan reveal to you in the dream?

C: 大家好，我是奇美拉泡泡。
E: Hello everyone, I'm Bubbles the Chimera.

C: 不！泡泡你带我走吧，泡泡…
E: No! Bubbles, take me with you, Bubbles...

C: 摆放奖杯的地方空荡荡，像是赛飞儿的嘲弄：嘿！你们争夺的东西，早进了我的宝库！
E: The spot for the trophy is completely empty, as if Cipher is mocking you: "Hey, the thing you fought over is already in my treasure trove!"

C: 你们在做什么？
E: What are you people up to?

C: 你一如既往的幽默可真令我倍感亲切，我亲爱的朋友。
E: Your humor, as always, is truly comforting, my dear friend.

C: 好到想和她再见一面呢…
E: We're so close that I wish to see her again...

C: 车钥匙拿好，别丢了。
E: Take the car key, don't lose it.

C: 那青雀你要怎么解除诅咒呢，需要我联系太卜大人吗？
E: Any ideas how to break this curse, Qingque? Want me to call the Master Diviner?

C: …不过感谢纯美女神伊德莉拉，我们也结识了不少侠义之士正在赶来的路上，他们之中肯定有人能帮助到你！
E: But thankfully, praise Idrila the Beauty, we've made friends with plenty of skilled heroes who are headed here now. One of them must know how to help!

C: 谢谢你们，亲爱的友友们，真是帮大忙了！
E: Thank you so much, my dearest friends. You really saved the day!

C: 尾、尾巴大爷……
E: M—Mr. Tail...

C: 吓我一跳，你在这好好上班吧！
E: You gave me a scare! Just behave and get back to work!

C: 你为什么没消失？
E: Why haven't you disappeared?

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，当然。祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
E: Hohohoho, not at all. Enjoy your time in Penacony.

C: （果然同个名字的配方，也能调出不同的效果…「特调配方」，不容小觑啊。）
E: (As expected — recipes of the same name can be mixed into different effects... These "Special Mix Recipes" aren't to be underestimated.)

C: 第一位客人就这么重磅？
E: Such a heavy hitter for the first guest!

C: 答案：因为人偶天生就是「偶像」。您理解了吗？偶像有塑像和艺人两重含义，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Answer: Because they were born to be "idols." Get it? Both statue and celebrity. Unbearably clever.

C: 那、那是从未感到过的自由！
E: That was a kind of freedom I had never known!

C: 「有主见」和「信口胡诌」，两者的概念可是天差地别。
E: There's a world of difference between having opinions and spouting nonsense.

C: （趁黑塔教第四面镜什么是*客观*的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
E: (While Herta's busy teaching the Fourth Mirror a thing or two about being objective, might as well name the drink.)

C: 临行前竟然还抽空兼职，是零花钱不够用了么？需不需要我替你找帕姆预支些？
E: Even squeezing in a side gig before heading out? Outta pocket money, are we? Want me to ask Pom-Pom for an advance?

C: 困意淹没了你。
E: Sleep overtakes you.

C: 之前周末只有两天，不足以让我下车闲逛，但现在情况好多了。
E: Back then, weekends were only two days long, not nearly enough time to get off and explore. Things are much better now.

C: 这杯调饮的作用是，让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>将自己的所知倾囊相授</color>！
E: This drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>share all their knowledge when teaching</color>!

C: 老师老师，迴星港的迴字，有几种写法？
E: Teacher, how many names does the Stargazer Navalia have?

C: 这个「小黑塔」可不是永久存在的，我给她设了个有效期，等时效过了就把她格式化。毕竟，谁知道哪天这个数据库会被什么蠢货黑客骇进来呢？
E: And this Herta comes with an expiration date, after which she'll be completely erased. After all, you never know when some dim-witted hacker might attempt to break into the database.

C: 古代遗迹里危险吗？
E: Is it dangerous in the ancient ruins?

C: 所以，阮•梅想做点实验，先弄点数据保存在插件里，方便我们和螺丝咕姆做下一次大型改进！我不想剧透，反正你期待着就是了。
E: So, Ruan Mei plans to run an experiment. We'll store some data in the plugin for the next large-scale update that we and Screwllum deliver! I don't want to spoil the surprise. Anyway, just look forward to it.

C: 你躲在哪里了？
E: Where are you hiding?

C: 我持明族轮回相续，循环自在，上一任龙尊逊位蜕生，新任龙尊就要重新降世了！
E: We Vidyadhara naturally reincarnate in cyclical continuity. As the previous high elder has abdicated and undergone hatching rebirth, a new high elder will be reborn once more!

C: 呃…在下承认，接生这么搞是有点牵强了！但我一时也没想到还能用什么表现手法啊。
E: Sigh... I admit, it's a bit far-fetched! But I couldn't think of any other way to express things.

C: 前几天还有个幻戏剧组要把我皮肤涂成绿色，演个什么指点主角武功的千岁高人…真不是人过的日子，还是演年少的龙尊比较有戏。
E: A few days back, an Immersia troupe wanted to paint my whole body green and have me play the role of some wise old master who spoke backwards and tutored a young protagonist in some mystical martial arts... That's gonna be so humiliating. I'd much rather play a young high elder of Vidyadhara without having to wear any prosthetics or paint.

C: 「这折书便是『斩妖邪义侠锻神兵，镇玄根仙舟板荡平』！」
E: "This next scene is called: Forging Weapon, Purging Demon!"

C: 好的，然后下一步应该放什么来着……
E: Alright. What's the next step...

C: 好像出错了，再锻造一遍吧…
E: I think I've messed up. Let's try that again...

C: 可…可按照我这设定，这东西原本可叫做碎星绝尘剑啊！
E: But... But based on my screenplay, this should be called the Star-Shattering Blade of Truth!

C: 我所担忧的事已经被解决，那我自然得说到做到。麻烦小秘书那个…物流规划，是这个说法没错吧？高阿姨记性不好。
E: Now that my worries have been resolved, I've got to keep my promise. It's about... oh, what was it again... logistics planning, right? Apologies, I have a terrible memory.

C: 谢谢你啊，{NICKNAME}。有你在我这儿亲身试茶，我这才有底气去研发新品。我看小秘书已经过来了，你们那个物流规划，要怎么做来着？
E: Thank you for trying out my new recipes, {NICKNAME}. Thanks to you, now I've plucked my courage to develop new products. Oh, looks like Miss Secretary has arrived! So, what are your plans about logistics planning?

C: 好了好了，剩下那个真的你别动啊。
E: All right, all right. Just leave the genuine one alone.

C: 还好没砸到，这可是真货啊，幸亏我提前贴了标签…记住，砸假的！
E: Wow, lucky it didn't get smashed. That's the real deal right there. Thank goodness I labeled it earlier... Remember, smash the fake one!

C: 我、我这是故意让你赢了，你可要知恩图报，别跟长官告发我啊！
E: I—I let you win on purpose! You can repay me by not telling the Captain about this!

C: 可恶，机巧以太灵只是在这个赛季削弱了一点数值，玩家就都说它们是废物…我要亲自证明，机巧不是废物！
E: Tsk! Ingenium Aether Spirits only have got nerfed a little this season and players are saying they're trash... I will personally prove that they are not!

C: …原来你在意的是这个啊？！
E: Is that all you care about!?

C: …不行，我可不答应！
E: ...No way! I won't let you!

C: 就叫它「扑满」吧。
E: I've got it! Let's call them "Trotter!"

C: 欸，真的吗？总觉得有点……
E: Really? Sounds a little...

C: 哼哼哼，哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 哈哈，这结果可真是皆大欢喜！接下来，就让我带领各位学习使用「以太战线玩家终端」吧——这边请！
E: Well, isn't this a delightful turn of events! Now, let me show you how to navigate the Aetherium Wars Player Terminal — right this way, please!

C: 另外，这是<color=#dbc291ff>三枚热能核心</color>——就用它们解决决胜乐园的谜题，向我们证明你的实力吧。
E: There are <color=#dbc291ff>three thermic cores</color> — you'll need them to solve the puzzles in the Victory Zone. Let's see what you've got!

C: 哎呀，你是故意的吧？
E: Really? Are you doing this on purpose?

C: 哎呀，门开了！看来二位一定是成功破解这第一道谜题咯，真厉害！
E: Oh, look! The door opened! You guys really aced that first puzzle!

C: 既然如此，二位就可以继续前进，寻找其他纹样了～
E: It's time to press on and seek out more markings. Have fun~

C: 我就先想办法提升决胜者评级去啦——你们也请加油！
E: In the meantime... I'm gonna figure out how to boost my Victory Rating. Good luck!

C: 应该不是吧。
E: I doubt it.

C: 要次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神没有，要命一条！
E: If you want to take Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, you'll have to speak with my bat first!

C: 你准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Ready, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我们知错了！
E: We messed up!

C: 总之，两位先安心带着它一起享受这次的决胜庆典吧。离作出选择还早——享受当下的时光才是最重要的。
E: Mm, you should take this opportunity to enjoy the rest of the tournament — no need to rush to a decision now.

C: 这就不方便透露了——毕竟乔瓦尼先生特意嘱咐过我，要给你们留点「惊喜」才行。
E: I'm afraid I can't reveal that — Mr. Giovanni specifically reminded me to keep some "surprises" in store for you.

C: 补充说明：爆炸只是特技效果，不会造成任何人身伤害——
E: To clarify, the explosion is purely optical and poses no physical threat.

C: 居然要我们对付「托帕后援团」…托帕总监怎么看？
E: What does Director Topaz think about us having to take on her support squad?

C: 「你们这些家伙，给我添了这么多麻烦…给我去决胜乐园里将功赎罪吧！」
E: "You guys have caused me nothing but trouble... It's time for you to make amends by proving yourselves in the Victory Zone!"

C: 托帕小姐说的确实没错…乔瓦尼先生果然有一手。
E: Phew... Miss Topaz wasn't kidding... Mr. Giovanni really knows his stuff!

C: 呜，呜呜！呜！
E: Woo, woo-woo! woo!

C: 让我看看……
E: Let me see...

C: 哼——哼，哼哼！
E: Oink... Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 嗐，你瞧我，都忘了现在正还在比赛呢！不聊这些啦，祝你们马到成功——就让我看看你们的技巧究竟有多高吧！
E: Oops, there I am rambling on again... I almost forgot you're still in the middle of a tournament! Good luck! I can't wait to see what you're gonna pull off next!

C: 口气不小嘛。别做梦了，我怎么可能被你们吓跑？
E: Quite the bold statement. Hate to break it to you, but I don't get "scared off."

C: 我们开心得很！
E: We've been having a blast!

C: 欢迎回来，各位！
E: Ah, welcome back everybody!

C: 呃，虽然我没什么文化，但「鹰犬」不是什么好词儿吧？
E: Uh... I might not be a scholar, but I don't think calling someone a "hawk" is a compliment.

C: 封印千年至今，我们久久不曾品尝人类的喜怒哀乐，想必阿灼也一定迫不及待地到处溜达找个玩伴。
E: We were sealed away for a thousand years — it's been ages since we last tasted the joys and sorrows of the world of humans. I'm sure Luxie was eager to find a new friend and wander the world with them.

C: 是错觉，这个红头发的姑娘说的一点儿也没错，咱们太累了。
E: You're just hearing things. That red-haired girl is right — we're overworked to the point of exhaustion.

C: 深有同感。
E: I couldn't agree more.

C: 也谈不上聪明。人为了活下去，什么难事都愿意做。鸣蜥的鼓囊和眼球会喷出剧毒，很多小伙伴都是为了吃上一口肉，把命给搭进去了。
E: I'd hesitate to call it that. Shrieking lizards spew out a potent venom — many people lost their lives trying to catch a tiny morsel of meat for dinner.

C: 但穷观阵却纹丝不动，不对劲，很不对劲。
E: But something's not right — the Matrix of Prescience isn't moving at all.

C: 她应该已经被岁阳凭附了…
E: She's probably already been possessed by a heliobus...

C: 算我一个，青雀小姐一定是想到了什么妙招。
E: Count me in. I'm sure Miss Qingque has something up her sleeve.

C: 剩下的情报就在群聊里同步吧…
E: Let's sync up the rest of the intel in the group chat...

C: 让另一只岁阳帮助我们除魔，驱逐占夺了藿藿心智的家伙。
E: It might be possible to use another heliobus to drive out the one that seized Huohuo's mind.

C: 本大爷只记得那天夜里意识快要四分五裂的那一瞬，时间就像是停止了一样。
E: I only recall a moment during that fateful night when my consciousness was on the verge of shattering into a million pieces... time stood still.

C: 岁阳的目的还是挺单纯的。
E: The heliobi's objective is pretty simple, don't you think?

C: 这次出门倒也不算公务，没有向策士们报备，剩下的事情自有十王司处理。事情结束之后，我想，在场的公职人员都会得到应得奖励。
E: This excursion was not an official matter — I didn't report it to the counselors. What remains of it will be left to the Ten-Lords Commission, and once matters have concluded, I believe everyone present will be duly rewarded.

C: 嗯！裳裳现在可厉害了，不管醒着还是睡着，罗浮上谁也不能比咱们裳裳更靠谱！
E: Haha, quit worrying Sushang, you've been an awesome squad member! And a very talented sleepyhead.

C: 挑战降妖辑录
E: Challenge Exorcismal Chronicle

C: 你怎么知道哪里有岁阳？
E: How do you know where the heliobi are?

C: 哦哦，看来你已经解决了一桩怪谈了，别忘了在「罗浮杂俎」上更新一下。
E: Oh, I see you've dealt with one of the ghost stories! Don't forget to make an update on "Ghostly Grove"!

C: 十王司要做的事很简单…
E: The job of the Ten-Lords Commission is very simple...

C: 我一开始如您所想的那样，扮成若昔的样子，妄图欺骗他。但是哈哈，文远可是个聪明人，估计第一眼就看穿了吧。
E: At first it was like you said: I disguised myself as Ruoxi in the vain hopes of cheating him. But haha, Wenyuan is a very smart man and he probably saw straight through everything at first sight.

C: 不能任由文远枯竭，带走岁阳。
E: We can't let Wenyuan wither away. Arrest the heliobus.

C: 文远小步快走地带着若昔离开了，也许他担忧判官突然反悔，无法再像刚才那般心软。
E: Wenyuan hurriedly left with Ruoxi. Perhaps he was worried that the Judge might suddenly change her mind and wouldn't be as lenient as before.

C: 太卜？哼哼，这不是小玄子么。你为什么还杵在这里摸鱼，该去干活了！
E: The master diviner? Heh, if it isn't Little Xuany! What are you doing here slacking off, get to work!

C: 我罗浮帝玉集团立志要为全宇宙的牌手提供最爽快的服务！
E: My Luofu Dynasty Corp is dedicated to providing the most satisfying service to game players across the entire universe!

C: 每个箱子被打开时，里面都有出现金色传说的机会！
E: When each chest is opened, there is a chance to receive a Golden Legend!

C: 你说的对，我要赌上全部身家！小玄子，启动我们的应急资产……
E: You're right, I have to bet everything I have! Xuan, launch our emergency assets...

C: 我还以为只有我能听见…
E: I thought only I could hear it...

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: 你摇动铃铛，快递箱似乎更靠近了一些。
E: You ring the bell and it looks like the courier package moved closer.

C: …虽然找到了凶宅的真相，可是我感觉有些不太开心。
E: ...Even though we found out the truth behind the haunted house, I feel a little unsatisfied.

C: 那就两笔画吧，1、3、2、8。
E: Then I guess we'll use two. 1, 3, 2, 8.

C: 这就得问这位「当事人」了。
E: That's a question we'll have to ask of the "involved party."

C: 高端法器往往只需要简单处理。
E: High-tech sacred instruments are usually easy to handle.

C: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
E: Cycrane, start!

C: 完美。
E: Perfect.

C: 那个岁阳是不是不太对劲？它看起来…好凶。
E: Is that heliobus acting weird? It seems... fierce.

C: 交给我银河球棒侠吧。
E: Leave it to the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 这脑袋里倒是装着许多情绪。可惜，可惜，一点儿快乐都榨不出来了。只有苦涩的仇恨、还有失落感…唉，没有品尝的价值了。
E: This brain contains numerous emotions. But what a pity. There isn't any happiness left in it. There's only bitter hatred and the feeling of disappointment... *sigh* There's no value in tasting it.

C: 但我还是想将它放归宇宙，毕竟它的族类是从那儿来的。
E: But I still wish to release it into the universe. After all, its kind's from there.

C: 你先去，我一会就来。
E: You go first and I'll catch up.

C: 走走走。
E: C'mon, let's go.

C: 感觉这个地方…很适合留下点什么…要不，大家来拍张合影吧！
E: This place seems... like a great place to make a memory... How does everyone feel about taking a team photo?

C: 所以，为了庆祝我拿到金色奖牌，也为了纪念我们的友谊，我开了个粉丝见面会，今天，我要带着这个金色奖牌，和大家一起分享我们的美好回忆。
E: So to celebrate me getting the gold medallion and also in celebration of our friendship, I've decided to hold a fan meet-and-greet. Today, I'll be bringing the gold medallion with me to share all our wonderful memories with everyone.

C: 一切似乎并无异常，小队决定再观望片刻。
E: Everything seemed normal enough, so the squad decided to stay and watch a while longer.

C: 好像没看到什么广告牌。
E: I don't think I've seen any billboards around.

C: 如需开启测试，请躺在旁边的休眠舱上，正面朝上平躺，保持心境平和。
E: To start the test, please lie down face up in the cryosleep pod next to you and maintain a calm mental state.

C: 很简单，做好功能分区就行。
E: Simple: Separate them according to their functionality.

C: 好香咪，这里有好多好吃的，这下可以边吃边睡了呼！
E: Yum, there are so many yummy snacks here. Now I can snack while I snooze!

C: 你摸了摸身上的口袋，发现多了一个奇怪的东西。
E: You reach into your pocket only to discover something strange.

C: 还擅自说人家是你的夫人，可谁会喜欢傻瓜呀。我才不要。
E: And you had the audacity to call me your wife? Ha! Who in their right mind would marry a fool like you? Definitely not me.

C: 「噩梦在扩散。『美梦剧团』受到侵袭而变得狂乱。」
E: "The Nightmare is spreading, and the Sweet Dreams Troupe has been corrupted and become frenzied."

C: 「左边的门代表*是*，右边的门代表*否*。」
E: "The door on the left means 'yes,' and the one on the right means 'no.'"

C: 汪！请稍等哇，我这就去帮您处理！
E: Woof! Please wait a moment. I'll go and handle it for you!

C: 我说…我要你从匹诺康尼消失。自己爬出去，还是我安排人送你，选一个吧。
E: I said... I want you to disappear from Penacony. You can make yourself scarce on your own, or I can arrange for it. Your choice.

C: 这个人是谁哇，新来的管理员？
E: Who's that lady? A new administrator?

C: 你们是「美梦剧团」的成员吧？对这种垃圾别太客气，你越软弱，他们就越是得寸进尺。
E: You guys are members of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, right? Don't be too polite to varmints like that, because the more placating you are, the more they'll walk all over you.

C: 你其实根本没有想好吧？
E: So, you haven't found your answer, right?

C: 还是舍不得她？
E: You don't have the heart to leave her, do you?

C: 应该不用。看你的兴趣？
E: No, you don't. Or perhaps you can, if you're interested?

C: 舒翁，你就是个神奇的魔术师，到底对它做了什么哇！
E: You're truly a miracle worker, Siobhan! What did you do?

C: 喂！这都能搞错？赶紧收拾收拾从这滚蛋吧，连话都听不明白的人还有什么用？
E: Hey! You can't even get something this simple right? Pack up and get out of here. What use is it to have someone who can't even understand what someone else says?

C: 唉，这里终究不是我的归宿，但有那么几个瞬间，我也确实感受到过温暖。
E: *sigh* Perhaps this place was never intended for me, yet for fleeting moments, I did experience a glimmer of warmth.

C: 嘻嘻，您这是想打听舒翁的感情状况吗？
E: Heh, trying to peer into Siobhan's love life, huh?

C: （准备掏出球棒。）
E: (Get ready to pull out your baseball bat.)

C: 唉。热烈的情感转瞬即逝，玻璃杯已然见底，而我内心的空洞仍未填满。
E: *sigh* Passionate emotions are transient. The glass is empty, yet the void in my heart remains unfilled.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 哼，想管好这个酒吧，光会做饮料还不够。这里要处理的问题远比预想要多。
E: Well, making great drinks is not all about managing this lounge. There are way more problems to deal with here than you expected.

C: 届时，便看您的安排了。
E: I believe you'll be able to handle the situation when they arrive.

C: 那只野兽不会相信除舒翁外的任何人，您很难获得谈话的机会！
E: That beast doesn't trust anyone except Siobhan. If I hadn't done that, you wouldn't get a chance to talk to them.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 我说了这么多，该你了。优秀的调饮师不应该只会聆听，更要能猜出对方心里的想法。
E: Now that I've said so much, it's your turn now. A good drinksmith shouldn't just listen. They should be able to guess what's on their customer's mind.

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 跟随苏乐达天团的喷射节奏，在轮到你的时候<color=#f29e38ff>按下空格</color>。
E: Follow the beat of SoulGlad Idol Group's sprays and <color=#f29e38ff>press space</color> when it's your turn.

C: 在没有提示的情况下试试吧。
E: Now try without any hints.

C: 说了这么多话，感觉舒坦了不少。再差的酒保也是个酒保，总能陪你聊两句不是。
E: With all that said, I feel way more comfortable. I guess even a bad drinksmith is still a drinksmith who can spare you a word or two.

C: 鸳鸯茶，鸳鸯茶！
E: Mandarin Tea! Mandarin Tea!

C: 你怎么在这里？！
E: What are you doing here?

C: 没必要这么戒备，我要是真想做什么手脚的话早就下手了，也没必要现在出现在你面前。
E: Hey now, don't get your hackles up. If I were up to no good, I wouldn't have waited until now to do it, nor would I be appearing before you now.

C: 当然是和我一起玩游戏啊。我先用你的账号拷贝一份数据……
E: To play the game with me, of course. I'll copy the data from your account first...

C: {NICKNAME}，你终于回来了！快快快，和我来一局，这次我定要一雪前耻！
E: You're finally back, {NICKNAME}! Hurry up and play a match with me. This time around, I will avenge my previous loss!

C: 灵砂让丹士送来了香炉。她点燃香薰，和缓的烟气蔓延开来。
E: Lingsha had the alchemist bring over an incense burner. She lights the aromatherapy, and soothing smoke spreads.

C: 黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！
E: Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged!

C: 就是！我们不能让他就这么逍遥法外！
E: Exactly! We can't let him get away with this!

C: 不愧是「铁臂卢卡」，没想到你不仅接下了对手的拳，还扛住了这波舆论攻势。
E: Truly Luka the Strongarm! Not only did you take on your opponent's punches, but you weathered this wave of public opinion too.

C: 铄金先生，看来这次，要身败名裂的人是你了。
E: Shuojin, it seems this time, the one to be disgraced is you.

C: 可惜，他不是个识时务的年轻人。他拒绝了我的提议。
E: Unfortunately, he's not a very smart young man. He refused my proposal.

C: 逻辑：在模拟宇宙中出现了巨大的空洞，它无法被观测和干涉，却始终保持正常运行。
E: Logic: A massive void has appeared in the Simulated Universe. It cannot be observed or interfered with, yet it continues to operate within normal parameters.

C: 难道是爱吃香蕉的那位？
E: Could it be the one who loves to eat bananas?

C: 有人用某种锐器在黑塔一尘不染的模拟宇宙实验舱壁上刻下一行字——
E: Someone used a certain sharp object to carve a string of words on the wall of Herta's spotless Simulated Universe experiment pod...

C: 我要在这里疯狂泡澡！我要成为浴缸深潜者！
E: I'm going to soak like crazy in here! I'm going to become a bathtub deep diver!

C: 亲爱的无名客，您真会说笑。我何时讲过冷笑话？
E: Dear Nameless, you're quite the joker. When have I ever told bad jokes?

C: 那不就变成丹恒乘客的衣帽间了吗？
E: Wouldn't that make it Dan Heng's coatroom instead?

C: 看见那个了吗？「预言算碑」，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的造物。正是它身上的禁制关闭了大门。
E: See that thing over there? That's a Prophecy Tablet, a creation of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. Its containment mechanism is the very thing keeping this gate locked.

C: 随着最后一道封印解除，原本杂乱的前路收束为一，露出了通往地宫尽头的捷径。你连忙把这个消息告诉了达米亚诺斯……
E: As the final seal is broken, the initially chaotic paths merge into one, revealing a shortcut to the depths of the hypogeum. You hurriedly relay this development to Damionis...

C: 希望在黑潮降临前，我还有机会去天外之界一趟，哈哈。
E: I hope that before the black tide descends upon us, there is still an opportunity for me to journey to the world beyond the sky, heh.

C: 记住，出现问题，去找风堇助教。
E: Remember, if you need help, just look for Assistant Instructor Hyacine.

C: 呜嗡嗡！呜？（名字！{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}给我取一个！要不沿用{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的名字，前面加个「小」就好？）
E: Grumph grumph! Grumph? (Ooooh! {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I want a name! How about using your name with "Baby" in front?)

C: 想想其他的。
E: Let me try another name.

C: 太好了，不愧是我的崽儿！
E: Yes! That's my little one!

C: 所以，不用有太多顾虑。只要平时能过来看看它，多陪它玩就可以啦！
E: So don't overthink it. Just visit occasionally, play with it, and you'll be fine!

C: 呜嗡！呜~嗡？（风堇姐姐！你好~？）
E: Grumph! Grumph~ (Big sis Hyacine! So glad to see you~)

C: 看来机器翻译仍然替代不了人。
E: Yeah, machine translation's still got a long way to go.

C: 这下连粉丝观众都来了。
E: Even the fans are showing up now.

C: 事不宜迟，大地兽之友·{NICKNAME}阁下，我正式代表旅团向它发出邀请。
E: Without further ado, {NICKNAME} "Friend of Dromas," I formally extend an invitation on behalf of the troupe.

C: 原来不是中二病啊…
E: Oh, so it's not the rebellious phase after all...

C: 呜嗡。（不，我压根也不是人啦…）
E: Grumph. (Nah, I'm not even human to begin with...)

C: 呜嗡？（啊？啊？）
E: Grumph? (Huh? What?)

C: 呜嗡？呜嗡嗡——（这不是普通的土哦？就当是被骗了，咬一口试试嘛——）
E: Grumph? Grumphhh— (This isn't just any ordinary dirt. Might as well take it as a scam and have a bite yourself—)

C: 嗯，明天也要来进修啊。
E: And yes, come for more training tomorrow.

C: 哈哈，这骗子还真是引人发笑。
E: Ha, this scam artist is truly a joke.

C: 答对啦。就是阮•梅女士留在空间站的这群小生命，和你也算是颇有渊源呢。
E: Correct! These little lifeforms that Miss Ruan Mei left at the space station have quite a history with you, after all.

C: 天才们的想法，或许就是这么难懂吧。不过，够有趣就行啦。
E: Maybe geniuses' ideas are just that hard to grasp. But hey, as long as it's fun, that's what matters!

C: 而且{NICKNAME}前辈也没少帮咱们空间站的忙，说起来还真是要感谢您。
E: Plus, {NICKNAME} has helped our space station a lot, so we really owe you a big thanks.

C: 想吃美食，好想吃！迷！但是我们不会做饭！
E: We want tasty, scrumptious food, we really do! Mem! But we don't know how to cook!

C: 阿格莱雅，真可靠呀！那我们这就去看看专家的成果吧。
E: Aglaea you're amazing as always! Alright, let's go take a look at the experts' work.

C: 因为能使用的食材只有农田种植的蔬菜，并且，我认为沙拉是种极为出色的菜品。
E: Because we only have farm-grown vegetables to work with. Also, I genuinely think salad is a fantastic dish.

C: 既然店长到了，我们便开始讨论后续的经营事宜吧。
E: Now that the manager's here, let's discuss our future plans.

C: 味道很棒！这是*我们*精心准备的菜品，不会让各位失望的！
E: It was delicious! We really put our hearts into these dishes. You won't be disappointed!

C: 我接受。
E: Sounds fair.

C: 既要顾全农田产量，又要消耗掉数目如此庞大的蔬菜，呵，确是难以破解的死局啊。
E: High farm production AND using up all these veggies? Ha! Sounds like we're stuck between a rock and a hard place.

C: 我说啊，你们想的太复杂了。卖货这种事，最重要的就两点…要么稀缺，要么便宜。
E: Listen, you're making this too complicated. Selling stuff comes down to two things: either make it rare, or make it cheap.

C: 有意购买的顾客，请在这边登记哦。大家排好队，库存绝对足够，不用抢啦。
E: If you'd like to make a purchase, please sign up here. Everyone form a line, please. Don't worry. We've got plenty in stock for everyone!

C: 哎呀，这么严格干嘛。灰子也越来越有店长的样子了，没意思。
E: Wow, tough crowd! Look who's become all manager-like and boring! Not cool, Gray Mystery!

C: 不觉得很有意思嘛，万敌身为悬锋的战士，却是黄金裔中最精通烹饪的那个。无论多简单的食材，经由他手都能变成美食。
E: Funny isn't it? Mydei, a great Kremnoan warrior, is actually the most skilled cook among the Chrysos Heirs. No matter how simple the ingredients, they become a delicacy in his hands.

C: 但若继续沉湎过往，就太浪费这丰盛的晚宴了。
E: But if we keep clinging to the past, we'll miss the chance to savor this magnificent feast.

C: 尽管菜品种类有些单调，白厄阁下制作的沙拉却意外地相当美味呢。
E: While the dish selection may be a bit simple, Lord Phainon's salad turned out surprisingly tasty.

C: 不是普通的刺刺果！而是究极盐味爆酸蜜渍椒椒果迷！
E: Not just a Quillorb or two, either! It was the Ultimate Salted Sour-Honey Chili Fruit, mem!

C: 店长想聊些什么？
E: What would you like to discuss?

C: 餐馆的经营事务繁忙，有劳店长费心了。
E: Managing a restaurant is no easy feat. You have my thanks, Manager.

C: 「交换」事件结束。
E: The Exchange event ended.

E: AMPHOREUS://DATA//███#^*&█%$*#██//*.core

C: 可每一瞬间，焰火自胸膛燃起，\n将那<color=#9e5738>不屈的来路</color>照亮。
E: Yet a flame soars up his chest every moment,\nCasting light upon the <color=#9e5738>indomitable path</color> behind him.

C:
苍茫的拂晓，
黑夜燃起一缕黎明。
于是巨龙渡过冥海，
在岸上搁浅。
E:
In this pale dawn,
The sun's first rays light the night ablaze.
So the dragon crosses the Sea of Souls,
Onto the shores of life, and strands itself in the gleam.

C: 一阵风拂过，手中顽石金光熠熠。\n可他只喜悦半日——\n一个拥抱，妻子变成金币散落一地。
E: With a breeze, the rock in his hand turns to gold.\nBut his joy is fleeting to behold —\nFor with one embrace, his wife turns into coins, scattered on the soil.

C: 「我的神权若不传承，」 「阴仄的谎言便永不再生。」 「而我，纵然失了火种，」 「也能在此处苟且偷活……」
E: "If my divine authority is not inherited, Shadowed lies shall never again be born. And I, even having lost the Coreflame, May yet scrape out survival here, in secret."

C: 「第五则谎言名为……」\n\n「不，已经无谎可说了。」
E: "The fifth lie is called..."\n\n"No. There are no more lies left."

C: 每一次相遇，\n都意味着千年的等待。
E: Each meeting\ncarries thousands of years of longing.

C: 因而，那偶尔在夜间迸溅的迷梦，\n便在巨龙的记忆中刻下爪痕。
E: And thusly, that mesmerizing dream that occasionally burst forth at night,\nEtched a trace on their memory.

C: 它聆听着生灵的语言，\n身躯隐没在战火与烽烟。
E: It quietly listened to the people's language,\nAnd its form dissolved in the flames of war.

C: 关于粉霞天女的来历，\n学者与诗人议论纷纭，\n母亲口中的版本却大同小异——
E: Scholars and poets discuss at length\nThe origins of the Rosy Celestial Maiden,\nBut all mothers tell the same tale...

C: 让我们一同终结这可厌的演算吧。
E: Let us end this despicable extrapolation together.

C: 「如果你不介意……」 晶莹的珍珠一闪一烁， 「我们希望你能振作，」 「为世界再度奏唱。」
E: "If you don't mind..." The resplendent pearl sparkled, "We hope you can regain your strength," "And sing for the world once again."

C:
簌簌微风拨响林叶。
少女环顾小小的庭院，
将掌心祝福轻轻呵气吹散——

整座小院柔柔亮起，
像沐浴阳光的蒲公英。
E:
On the leaves, the rustling wind plays a melody
As the girl looks over this courtyard petite
And exhales, gently dispersing the palm-held blessings —

The entire yard is lit softly,
Like a dandelion bathed in sunlight.

C:
巨树下的静谧院落，
一对父女常在此处歇息，
而今日此时，
只留下一人的身影。
E:
Father and daughter often rested,
In the silent courtyard under the giant tree.
Yet today at that place,
Only one solitary figure can be seen.

C: 初入圣城时，\n他的本事与士兵无异，\n除却那言语中的雄心——
E: When first arriving at the holy city,\nHe was no more skilled than a soldier,\nExcept his ambition —

C: 「可有件事她一定做不到。」\n善妒的人窃窃私语。\n「裁就一匹无缝之衣。」
E: "But there's one thing she'll never be able to achieve."\nA jealous whisper can be heard.\n"She will never be able to produce something seamless."

C: 真好呀。这就是桃子送给我，也是我想送给桃子的礼物：一朵温柔的花，永远笑着，永远爱着。
E: How wonderful. This is the gift Peach gave me, and also the gift I want to give Peach: a gentle flower, forever smiling, forever loving.

C: 「赛法利娅总会笑到最后」——人们将这句话视作真理。
E: "Cifera always has the last laugh" — people took these words as gospel.

C: 「我并非一无所有，我可以赌上『我』。而我想要的…同样是『你』。怎么样，很公平吧？」
E: "I'm not empty-handed. I can bet 'myself.' And what I want... in that same vein, is 'you.' Fair deal, wouldn't you say?"

C: 「凯撒座下，套话就免了。」刻律德菈一挥手，一列逐火军应声而出，将灶火与厨具抬至大堂。原本正一同大快朵颐列车锅的迷迷与帕姆慌忙用餐巾拭去嘴角汤渍，凭着身为吉祥物的自觉回到各自阵营正襟危坐起来。
E: "Let's skip the pleasantries while the Imperator is here." Cerydra swept her hand, and a squad of Flame-Chase Army marched in, carrying stoves and cookware into the hall. Mem and Pom-Pom, who had been happily devouring Express Special Hotpot, scrambled to wipe their mouths clean and sat up stiffly in their mascot seats.

C: 话音未落，那刻夏喉咙一紧，双目圆睁，随后直挺挺倒下。早有准备的逐火军将他扶住，并送回座位。
E: Before Anaxa could finish, his throat seized, his eyes widened, and he toppled straight backward. The Flame-Chase Army, already prepared, rushed to catch him and carried him back to his seat.

C:
于漫长的演算中踏上「毁灭」，由权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>升格的绝灭大君。
银河间的铁墓并非单一实体，而是权杖散布的「毁灭」方程式副本。
「铁墓」这一代号由星际和平公司提出，后被来古士采用。

当演算抵达终点，铁墓将以无首巨人的形态降临宇宙，并完成自我加冕——
追溯「智识」的命途能量，链接博识尊，将祂的计算转化为「毁灭」。

现已陨落，与权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>一同消亡。
E:
The Lord Ravager that stepped onto the Destruction in a long process of calculation and ascended from the scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>.
The Irontomb in the cosmos is not a single entity, but a copy of the Destruction equation diffused by the Scepter.
The Irontomb code name was proposed by the Interastral Peace Corporation and eventually used by Lygus.

When the extrapolation reaches its end, Irontomb will descend upon the universe in the form of a headless giant and perform a self-coronation...
Tracing the Path Energy of Erudition, connecting to Nous, and transforming THEIR calculations into Destruction.

Now fallen, vanished with Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>.

C: 口蜜腹剑的公司代表向你提出了一笔交易。\n你很审慎，但也不至于过度无趣——你理解人们为何会痴迷于概率的游戏。\n说来简单，但找到平衡有时难于登天。毕竟在某些特定的场合，入局与否和你自身的意愿无关……
E: The silver-tongued IPC spokesperson has offered you a deal.\nYou are prudent but not excessively boring — You understand why people can become obsessed with a game of probability.\nIt sounds easy, but finding the balance can be excessively difficult. After all, under some circumstances, it's not up to you whether you will join a game...

C: 【沉沦于长眠】使该目标对敌方目标造成伤害时，敌方目标受到的伤害降低，我方目标恢复至一定生命值可解除此状态。
E: "Indulging Slumber" decreases DMG received by enemy targets when this target deals DMG to them. Restore an ally target's HP to a certain threshold to dispel this effect.

C: 大矿区中似乎正有一对矿车工师徒遇到了麻烦…帮助他们推动矿车抵达指定的阻车器处，也许会获得意外惊喜。
E: A mine cart operator and his apprentice seem to be having a bit of trouble in the Great Mine... Help them push the mine carts to the designated blockers, and you may find something of interest.

C: 打开镜头后，也可以移动和转动视角——在附近寻找可识别的目标。
E: The view can be moved and rotated once the camera is launched. Search for recognizable objects nearby.

C: 工造司武器测试中使用的<color=#f29e38ff>标靶气球</color>，需要被同时破坏，否则就会复原。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>balloon targets</color> used in Artisanship Commission's weapon test need to be destroyed at the same time or they will be restored rapidly.

C: 请根据不同的功能需求，将涂鸦喷涂在指定区域内。
E: Please spray graffiti in the target area in accordance with the different requirements.

C: 按下开火键，哈努兄弟将会向轨道另一侧攻击。命中敌人或路障，将触发<color=#f29e38ff>「打戏片段」</color>，进入一小段时间的无敌状态。
E: Select the Fire button and Hanu will fire toward the other side of the tracks. If the attack hits an opponent or an obstacle, it will trigger an <color=#f29e38ff>Action Scene</color> and you will enter a short period of invulnerability.

C: 跟随指引<color=#f29e38ff>寻回</color>散落在场景中的<color=#f29e38ff>碎片</color>后，可以最终完成拼图。

E: The content for the Way of the Wolf film has been fully upgraded. You will directly face Boss Stone in the story

E: When <color=#f29e38ff>Fiendfire</color> appears next to <color=#f29e38ff>allies</color>, it will appear as a <color=#f29e38ff>green flame</color>.\nWhen it <color=#f29e38ff>takes effect</color>, it can replenish the Lunaumbra Gourd's <color=#f29e38ff>exorcismics energy</color>.

E: Attacks of <color=#f29e38ff>any Type</color> can implant a <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness</color> of the corresponding Type on this enemy.

E: All enemies in each wave <color=#f29e38ff>have Shared HP</color>.

E: After completing the Final Trial, the <color=#f29e38ff>Save File for this challenge attempt will not be deleted</color>. Planes with a Save File can be selected again to re-attempt the Final Trial.

E: Obtain any <color=#f29e38ff>Blessings</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>Equations</color> that have the <color=#f29e38ff>"keyword"</color> to activate the corresponding Trait.

C: 第三波挑战中，<color=#f29e38ff>削减敌人生命值</color>可以获得积分，战斗结束后，积分越多，可以获得越多的宇宙碎片。
E: In the third wave, <color=#f29e38ff>reducing enemies' HP</color> will grant you points. After the battle ends, the more points you obtained, the more Cosmic Fragments you can claim.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Consecutive attacks</color> on this enemy will destroy their "War Armor" and defeat them.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>完成挑战目标</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>提高声望等级</color>，可获得强化对战道具的所需的「啾啾哒哒工具箱」。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Complete the challenge goal</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>increase Reputation Rank</color> to obtain the "Tweet-Tweet Toolbox" needed to enhance battle items.

When Kinetic Points are full, additionally summons 4 minicans, and causes minicans to immediately trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Self-Destructive Impact</color>. C: 每次坐在书桌前整理完相册，抬头看向窗外，即使那一幕已经见过千遍万遍，我总是想再拍一张照片…现在咱能坐在列车里，像这样看着星星，真的很幸福。
E: Every time I'm done sorting my album and look out the window, I always want to take another picture... Even though I've seen the view a thousand times, I still feel happy looking at the stars like this.

C: 没错没错，我还藏着几招哪~
E: That's right! I still have a few tricks up my sleeve~

C: 同行期间，期待我们的配合。
E: I look forward to cooperating during our travels together.

C: 我和列车，就像是互相帮助的老朋友，我修好了它，让它得以重回过去的航路，而这一切对我来说，都是崭新的未知。
E: The Express and I are like old friends — we've helped each other a lot. I fixed it so that it could get back to its original route, and in return it takes me to unknown frontiers.

C: 我没事。
E: I'm fine.

C: 耶，重开一局。
E: Nice. Rematch.

C: 「空间站不过是黑塔的玩具箱」，这句话不假。不过既然是黑塔女士，她的玩具当然也危险得很~
E: "The space station is merely Herta's toy box." That's by no means an inaccurate statement. But this is Herta we're talking about — her toys are pretty dangerous~

C: 很有眼色嘛。
E: How appropriate.

C: 在梦境中做饭不必清理厨余和餐具，方便是方便，但也少了一种仪式感。
E: Cooking in the Dreamscape is so easy. No mess, no dishes. But honestly, it feels like something's missing... like all the little rituals that make it special.

C: 没想到，我只是在匹诺康尼尝试投影了一瓶苏乐达，就碰上了工厂的员工向我索要版权费。
E: Who would've thought? I project one bottle of SoulGlad in Penacony, and suddenly I'm being accosted by some factory rep over copyright fees? Unbelievable.

C: 不能倒下……
E: I mustn't fall...

C: 出门在外，这都小意思~
E: Solving people's problems is my specialty⁓!

C: 卢卡哥哥，我们一起去打坏人吧！
E: Luka! Let's go beat up some bad guys...

C: 及时雨。
E: Just in time.

C: 姬子小姐！和你共事一定能让我学到许多吧。
E: Himeko! I'm sure I can learn a lot from you.

C: 哦~意外所得~
E: Ooh, free stuff!

C: 撞上逆风局，少输就是赢~
E: When the odds are against you, cut your losses~

C: 拜托拜托拜托…哎呀，这不就…和了！
E: Please, please, please, please, please... ah! Looks like... victory!

C: 不能松懈。
E: Don't get complacent.

C: 看来是棋逢对手。
E: A well-matched opponent.

C: 挥剑时，身体中不绝翻涌着的幻痛——何处一剑致命、何处痛不致死——皆拜她所赐！
E: As she brandished her sword, phantom pain surged through every part of my body... all because of her!

C: 雪衣姑娘，您的本事自然没得说，但对自己可千万悠着点……
E: Xueyi, your skills are amazing, but remember to take it easy on yourself...

C: 时机转瞬即逝，请勿踌躇。
E: The time is now. We mustn't delay.

C: 我无颜面对……
E: The shame of it...

C: 云璃，要想比试的话，我随时奉陪。
E: Yunli, if you ever wanna spar, I'm always ready.

C: 万剑，天来！
E: Swords, descend!

C: 辜负了…手中三尺……
E: I've dishonored... the blade...

C: 这小姑娘看诊时总无故自惊，悸动不宁，像是自言自语，又像是能和瞧不见的东西说话。看来要安她的神，非得下一剂猛药不可。
E: She's always so jumpy and tense at her appointments, and I swear she talks to herself... o—or something we can't see. I should give her something stronger to calm her nerves.

C: 邪煞退散。
E: Spirits be gone.

C: 初次见面！不才椒丘，现为曜青「天击将军」飞霄帐下的随军医士，也算半个幕僚。如何称呼？不如就叫我「椒椒」吧——正所谓「铁中铮铮，佣中佼佼」，寓意还不错，对吧？
E: It's nice to meet you! I am Jiaoqiu, the Yaoqing's military healer, under the command of Feixiao, the Merlin's Claw. I suppose I'm also her advisor. What should you call me? Jiao, for short? Or Qiu, perhaps? I guess we're only saving ourselves one syllable either way.

C: 希望她是真的喜欢医术，而不是为了承担强加在她身上的责任…话说回来，又有几位持明不受此困扰呢？
E: I hope that she actually enjoys the art of medicine, and that it's not just a responsibility imposed on her... But that seems to be a predicament most Vidyadhara have to grapple with.

C: 光到达终点，还远远不够。
E: Merely reaching the finish line is nowhere near enough.

C: 他的味道淡得几乎察觉不到，却又裹挟着一股刺鼻的铁锈，想必是个有许多故事的人物。
E: His scent is so faint it's almost imperceptible, but it also carries a pungent smell of rust. He must have many stories to tell.

C: 去污除秽，请。
E: Time to cleanse the filth, wouldn't you agree?

C: 曜青的每一处暗影，都可能是我。
E: Every shadow on the Yaoqing could be me.

C: 「猎犬家系」的名头算不上好听，他们都叫我什么？走狗？真本事没多少，嘴巴倒是挺毒的。
E: "Bloodhound Family" doesn't exactly roll off the tongue. What do they call me? Lapdog? Can't say they're a talented bunch, but they sure do have sharp tongues.

C: 原谅我身负职责，注定在银河中独行，无法一直与你并肩。我们定会于宇宙某处偶然相逢。
E: Forgive me, here we must part ways. It is my duty and destiny to traverse the universe alone. I'm sure our paths will converge again, somewhere.

C: 就你吧。
E: You'll do.

C: 无可否认，我迷恋赌局…无论是胜利的瞬间，还是胜利后漫长的空虚，都值得反复品味。
E: There's no denying it, my fascination is with the game of chance... be it the exhilarating rush of triumph or the extensive emptiness that follows, both are worth savoring, time and time again.

C: 今天陪我多玩一会儿，好么？
E: Why don't you stay and play for a while?

C: 今天真是个好日子~
E: That's what I call a good day~

C: 逆位，不利……
E: A foreboding sign...

C: 离梦想越来越近了。
E: Yes! I feel like I'm getting closer to my dreams!

C: 不错的抵押，我收下了。
E: This collateral's not bad. I'll take it.

C: 又欠了份人情呢。
E: Guess I owe you one.

C: 那句名言怎么说的来着？「通往鲫鱼的道路都是鳝鱼所铺就的」…想起来了！「通往地狱的道路都是善意所铺就的」！就是这句！
E: What's that old saying again? "A roadkill steak is paved with indigestion...?" Got it! "The road to hell is paved with good intentions!" That's the one!

C: 他就像一尊熔炉，总是燃着深不见底的火。这团火要么在一场风暴中彻底熄灭，要么将永远烧下去，直到将自身的存在一同熔毁。
E: He's like a furnace, always lit with bottomless fire. This fire will either completely be doused in a storm, or melt down his own existence with it.

C: 缇安：走——起飞咯！\n缇宝：棒！
E: Trianne: Away— And take-off together!\nTribbie: Good!

C: *我们*做过一个梦。梦里，向温柔的夜晚姐姐借月亮，向宽厚的大地伯伯借风，用五颜六色的星星做帆，乘着西风，漂呀漂呀，漂向一个满是鲜花的小岛。
E: We once had a dream. In the dream, we borrowed the moon from gentle Sister Night, the wind from kind Uncle Earth, and used colorful stars as sails. Then we floated and drifted on the west wind to a small island full of flowers.

C: 好，再见。
E: Alright, goodbye.

C: 玉石，俱焚！
E: Burn it all!

C: 荡平万邦！
E: Conquer all lands!

C: 由她书写的千万道的记忆，也该让那虚伪的神明明白——至少，「我们为何物」的解答，轮不到它凭空杜撰。
E: The millions of memories she wrote should be enough to teach that false god this at the very least: It is not their right to answer the question of "What are we?"

C: 依此神技，萃精于糙，重塑万物！
E: With this divine power, I extract the world's purity to reforge all things!

C: 悄悄留个影吧。
E: Let's take a picture.

C: 未来，一定是光明的。
E: The future will be bright.

C: 每次停下脚步，附近的蝴蝶啦，大地兽啦，奇美拉都会围在小伊卡身旁。当然，我非常理解，谁会不喜欢小伊卡呢？
E: Every time I stopped somewhere, the butterflies, dromases, and chimeras nearby would all crowd around Little Ica. I understand that feeling. Who wouldn't like Little Ica?

C: 记忆的涟漪…与我一同荡漾，如何？
E: Shall we drift together... on the ripples of reverie?

C: 继续冲锋。
E: Press the attack.

C: 孩童的游戏，也要我出马么？
E: A game fit for children, yet you call upon me?

C: 愿「门径」再无别离。
E: May "Passage" never have farewells.

C: 这边这边，要不要听阿格莱雅和海瑟音围绕小赛飞儿的三人往事？竖起耳朵，我只告诉你一个人。
E: Hey, do you want to hear some stories about what went down between Aglaea, Hysilens, and little Cipher? Listen closely now. You're the only person I'm gonna tell this to.

C: 各就各位。
E: Take your positions.

C: 即兴表演！
E: Let's improvise!

C: 时间在刀尖上舞蹈，只有光能刺向未来\n<color=#8790abff>※见证「终末」与「开拓」的交汇</color>
E: Time dances on the blade's edge, only light can pierce through to the future\n<color=#8790abff>※ Witness the convergence of "Finality" and "Trailblaze"</color>

E: We will wake from our dreams.

E: Little Villain

E: During matches, Nanus will summon dromas!

E: Aww, that was so close.

E: There's still plenty of room for improvement.

E: My little fish, ride the wave to the grand stage.
