C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动时施放【罪血枭首】，选择1名没有被【指名祸首】选中过的我方角色承受【罪血枭首】的最高伤害和【<u>罪血腐蚀</u>】。当所有角色都被【指名祸首】选中过时，可任意选择目标。
E: Enter the Charging state. In the next action, uses "Hemotort Decapitation" and selects 1 ally character who has not been targeted by "Name the Culprit" before to take the maximum DMG from "Hemotort Decapitation" and "<u>Hemotort Corruption</u>". When all characters have been targeted by "Name the Culprit," you can select any target.

C: 致幻哀歌
E: Psychedelic Elegy

C: 你踏入「存在的地平线」，这是「虚无」的表征之一，也是告别「虚无」的出口。黄泉与你道别，请你记住自己的名字，她会在尽头等你。
E: You stepped into the Horizon of Existence, an emblem of Nihility, yet also the passage to bid it farewell. Acheron parted with you, asking you to remember your name, for she would be waiting at the end.

E: Look for a sparring partner.

C: 在碎星芳饵的基础上，星空生态学派研发了一种新型材料，对虚空鲸等大型生物都具有一定程度的诱惑作用。该材料推动了太空捕鲸行业发展，加剧了生态恶化。据不可靠消息，公司原打算用它来诱捕光逝，直到相关人员在一场大型实验中发现——人类也会被它吸引。
E: The Astral Ecology School's work on Shattered Star Bait yielded a new substance that had an enticing effect on void song whales and other large creatures. This innovation propelled the advancement of the space whaling industry, accelerating ecological deterioration. According to unreliable sources, the IPC had originally planned to use it to lure Luxbane, until relevant personnel discovered during a large-scale experiment that humans were also attracted to it.

C: 效果抵抗强化
E: Effect RES Boost

C: 击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，攻击处于【速效进化】状态的敌方目标时，无视【速效进化】的无法造成暴击效果。【幼蛰虫】将优先攻击处于【天敌】状态的我方角色。
E: Increases Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. When attacking an enemy target in the "Rapid Evolution" state, ignores the "Rapid Evolution" effect that prevents attackers from dealing CRIT Hits. "Juvenile Sting" will prioritize attacking ally characters in the "Nemesis" state.

C: 被添加的额外虚数弱点。
E: Additionally implanted Imaginary Weakness.

C: 冷冻美德（善）
E: Frozen Virtue (Virtuous)

C: 盛大的宴会即将告结，只需向前开拓，为匹诺康尼夺还明天。
E: As the grand banquet draws to a close, all that remains is to trailblaze forward and reclaim tomorrow for Penacony.

C: 寻找拼图碎片
E: Find the jigsaw pieces

C: 确认神秘少女的身份
E: Confirm the mysterious girl's identity

C: 寻找流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 夺回「开启」的权利。
E: To wrestle back from fate the right to have a "beginning."

C: 嗓音的事，我听说了。有空来惊梦酒吧，我帮你看看是怎么回事。
E: I heard about your voice issue. Drop by the Dreamjolt Hostelry when you're free, and I'll take a look at what's going on.

C: 看来我说中了？来吧，二位——让我老桑博带你们好好体验一下大人的世界！
E: Looks like my analysis is spot-on. Follow me, you two. Let me give you a taste of the adult world!

C: 不妨顺着方才的思绪，再次深入其中……
E: Let's follow that train of thought and delve deeper...

C: 她伪装成你的故人，用尽各种手段，暗示梦境的真相。最后，干脆直接将你们送入了梦境深处。
E: She disguised herself as someone from your past, using every means possible to hint at the truth of the dreamscape. In the end, she simply sent you both deep into the dreamscape.

C: 今…天吗？还是不必了吧。
E: T-Today? Not really.

C: 可这对我们来说，应该毫无意义。能让他触景生情的事物，在我们眼中，只会莫名其妙。
E: But for us, that's probably meaningless. Whatever triggers his memories would just seem bizarre and random to us.

C: 她希望用自己的「死亡」，为你展示梦境的真相。而在被贯穿的瞬间，虚无的令使也会有所顾忌，在拔刀时迟疑。这就是她选择的两全其美。
E: She hoped to reveal the truth of the dreamscape to you through her own "Death". At the moment she was impaled, even the Emanator of the Nihility would falter, blade wavering in hesitation. That was her way of securing the best of both worlds.

C: 你愿意相信我吗？
E: Will you believe me?

C: 可你是否想过，为何偏偏在那之后，虫灾变本加厉？
E: But have you ever wondered why, right after that, the infestation only grew worse?

C: 谎话连篇呢，亲爱的。
E: Nothing but lies, my dear.

C: 那段刻骨铭心的时光，你像是非要享受不可呢。识趣些，我现在没空招待你。
E: You really seem determined to savor those unforgettable moments, don't you? Be smart and take a hint. I don't have time to entertain you right now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>即便是再续前缘，我也从未改变。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Even if we rekindle what once was, I remain unchanged.</color>

C: 我有时会憎恨记忆，本就是因为…有些人不配在回忆中，再次欣赏我绽放时的身姿。
E: Sometimes, I resent memories... Because some people don't deserve to witness my radiant bloom again in their memories.

C: 所以，梦主究竟在谋划些什么？
E: So what exactly is the Dreammaster plotting?

C: 你把流萤怎么了？
E: What did you do to Firefly?

C: 给梦主办事的，但一看就不老实——她偷偷和我做了个交易。
E: She works for the Dreammaster, but she definitely has her own agendas. She secretly made a deal with me.

C: 我为「告解」而来，老朋友。我多想听听，死亡给你何种感受——
E: I came for a "confession," old friend. I wonder... what did death feel like to you...

C: 可一位与虫群同源的行者，若是被调律骗过，误以为眼前确为死地，在星核面前许下「想要活着」的愿望，那结果，便将扭曲成致人以死的灾祸，寰宇蝗灾。
E: But if a pathstrider of the same origin as the Swarm were to be deceived by tuning, mistaking what lies before them as certain death... If they were to make a wish "to live" before the Stellaron... The outcome would twist into a catastrophe that brings death: the Swarm Disaster.

C: 谋划多年，他将一位格拉默铁骑，引诱到了星核面前。自入梦起，虽然流萤调查到的都是真相，却都是梦主想要让她看到的真相。
E: He lured a Glamoth Iron Cavalry to face a Stellaron after years of plotting. Though everything Firefly had learned since entering the dream was true, they were only truths that the Dreammaster wanted her to see.

C: 我会让匹诺康尼拥有明天！
E: I will give Penacony a tomorrow!

C: 收起你的虚饰吧，歌唱需要的，只有「真挚」。
E: Drop the sanctimonious mask. Singing only needs one thing, and that's "sincerity."

C: 那么，继续向前走吧，死去对你来说更加合适。
E: Well then, keep walking forward. Death would suit you better.

C: 涉入家族的阴谋，直面迷因的锋刃，携着能窥视未来的「剧本」，独自一人，挑战复生的寰宇蝗灾。
E: Entangled in The Family's conspiracy, facing the memetic entities' blades head-on, while challenging the resurrected Swarm Disaster alone, armed only with the "script" that can peer into the future...

C: 康士坦丝
E: Constance

C: 你根本不是好运，是你不当醉鬼，时刻清醒。
E: You're not lucky at all. You choose to forever remain sober, never becoming a drunkard.

C: 无论你们会不会阻止。
E: Whether you try to stop me or not.

C: 不，我必须完成约定。
E: No. I must keep my promise.

C: 答应你的，我都会做到。
E: I'll do everything I promised you.

C: 就现在？也太着急了吧！
E: Right now? Talk about being impulsive!

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: 「喀嚓…咚！」机关触发，墓室的板门轰然倒塌。你举起火把，照亮面前黑暗的房间，墙壁上的一行铭文映入眼帘：
E: "Click... THUD!" A mechanism triggers, and the tomb's stone door comes crashing down. You raise your torch, illuminating the dark room ahead, where an inscription on the wall catches your eye:

C: 你向那声音点头应允。浓云褪去，柔和的月光倾泻而下，你的珍宝似乎发生了变化……
E: You nod in agreement to the voice. As the thick clouds disperse, soft moonlight pours down, and your treasure seems to have undergone a change...

C: 好听，好听就是好桶。
E: Sounds good, and good sounds make good cans.

C: 什么事也不想干…
E: I don't feel like doing anything...

C: 我已经不是垃圾桶了。我唯一的幸福只有攀登。
E: I'm no longer a trashcan. Climbing is my only form of happiness.

C: 向最高、最高处…
E: To the highest, highest point...

C: 上吧，华丽地击败对手！
E: Let's go! Take them down in style!

C: 想带走的话，先想办法通过我的测验吧。
E: If you want to take it, you'll have to pass my test first.

C: 「梦主」歌斐木
E: Dreammaster Gopher Wood

C: 哲学的胎儿
E: Embryo of Philosophy

C: 处于【可负载】状态的单位会将受到伤害<color=#f29e38ff>超出当前生命值的部分</color>转化为【负载生命值】，且不会因此陷入无法战斗状态。
E: Units in the "Overloadable" state will convert <color=#f29e38ff>any damage exceeding their current HP</color> into "HP Overload" and won't be knocked down as a result.

C: 角色晋阶
E: Character Ascension
